authors_text: Lin Zhao,Haixing Dai,Zihao Wu,Zhenxiang Xiao,Lu Zhang,David Weizhong Liu,Xintao Hu,Xi Jiang,Sheng Li,Dajiang Zhu,Tianming Liu
title: Coupling Visual Semantics of Artificial Neural Networks and Human Brain Function via Synchronized Activations
title_zh: 通过同步激活将人工神经网络的视觉语义与人脑功能耦合
abstract: Artificial neural networks (ANNs), originally inspired by biological neural networks (BNNs), have achieved remarkable successes in many tasks such as visual representation learning. However, whether there exists semantic correlations/connections between the visual representations in ANNs and those in BNNs remains largely unexplored due to both the lack of an effective tool to link and couple two different domains, and the lack of a general and effective framework of representing the visual semantics in BNNs such as human functional brain networks (FBNs). To answer this question, we propose a novel computational framework, Synchronized Activations (Sync-ACT), to couple the visual representation spaces and semantics between ANNs and BNNs in human brain based on naturalistic functional magnetic resonance imaging (nfMRI) data. With this approach, we are able to semantically annotate the neurons in ANNs with biologically meaningful description derived from human brain imaging for the first time. We evaluated the Sync-ACT framework on two publicly available movie-watching nfMRI datasets. The experiments demonstrate a) the significant correlation and similarity of the semantics between the visual representations in FBNs and those in a variety of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) models; b) the close relationship between CNN's visual representation similarity to BNNs and its performance in image classification tasks. Overall, our study introduces a general and effective paradigm to couple the ANNs and BNNs and provides novel insights for future studies such as brain-inspired artificial intelligence.
summary: Artificial neural networks (ANNs), originally inspired by biological neural networks (BNNs), have achieved remarkable successes in many tasks such as visual representation learning. However, whether there exists semantic correlations/connections between the visual representations in ANNs and those in BNNs remains largely unexplored due to both the lack of an effective tool to link and couple two different domains, and the lack of a general and effective framework of representing the visual semantics in BNNs such as human functional brain networks (FBNs). To answer this question, we propose a novel computational framework, Synchronized Activations (Sync-ACT), to couple the visual representation spaces and semantics between ANNs and BNNs in human brain based on naturalistic functional magnetic resonance imaging (nfMRI) data. With this approach, we are able to semantically annotate the neurons in ANNs with biologically meaningful description derived from human brain imaging for the first time. We evaluated the Sync-ACT framework on two publicly available movie-watching nfMRI datasets. The experiments demonstrate a) the significant correlation and similarity of the semantics between the visual representations in FBNs and those in a variety of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) models; b) the close relationship between CNN's visual representation similarity to BNNs and its performance in image classification tasks. Overall, our study introduces a general and effective paradigm to couple the ANNs and BNNs and provides novel insights for future studies such as brain-inspired artificial intelligence.
abstract_zh: 人工神经网络（ANN）最初受到生物神经网络（BNN）的启发，在视觉表示学习等许多任务中取得了显着的成功。然而，由于缺乏链接和耦合两个不同领域的有效工具，并且缺乏表示 BNN（例如人类功能脑网络（FBN））中的视觉语义的通用且有效的框架，因此 ANN 中的视觉表示与 BNN 中的视觉表示之间是否存在语义相关性/连接在很大程度上尚未得到探索。为了回答这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的计算框架，同步激活（Sync-ACT），基于自然功能磁共振成像（nfMRI）数据来耦合人脑中 ANN 和 BNN 之间的视觉表示空间和语义。通过这种方法，我们首次能够使用源自人脑成像的具有生物学意义的描述对人工神经网络中的神经元进行语义注释。我们在两个公开的电影观看 nfMRI 数据集上评估了 Sync-ACT 框架。实验证明：a）FBN 中的视觉表示与各种卷积神经网络（CNN）模型中的视觉表示之间在语义上具有显着的相关性和相似性； b) CNN 与 BNN 的视觉表示相似性与其在图像分类任务中的性能之间的密切关系。总的来说，我们的研究引入了一种通用且有效的范式来耦合 ANN 和 BNN，并为未来的研究（例如类脑人工智能）提供了新颖的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Sync-ACT的计算框架，通过自然主义功能磁共振成像数据，将人工神经网络（ANN）的视觉表征与人类大脑功能网络（FBN）的语义进行耦合。
AI.motivation: 尽管人工神经网络（ANN）受生物神经网络（BNN）启发，但ANN与BNN之间的视觉表征语义关联尚未被有效探索，缺乏跨领域链接工具和BNN视觉语义表示框架。
AI.method: 基于自然主义fMRI数据，提出Sync-ACT框架，通过同步激活机制耦合ANN与FBN的视觉表征空间，并首次用人类脑成像数据对ANN神经元进行语义注释。
AI.result: 实验表明：1) FBN与多种卷积神经网络（CNN）的视觉语义存在显著相关性；2) CNN与BNN的表征相似度与其图像分类性能密切相关。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为ANN与BNN的耦合提供了通用有效范式，为脑启发人工智能研究提供了新视角。

The experiments demonstrate a) the significant correlation and similarity of the semantics between the visual representations in FBNs and those in a variety of convolutional neural networks (CNNs) models; b) the close relationship between CNN's visual representation similarity to BNNs and its performance in image classification tasks. Overall, our study introduces a general and effective paradigm to couple the ANNs and BNNs and provides novel insights for future studies such as brain-inspired artificial intelligence. 人工神经网络（ANN）最初受到生物神经网络（BNN）的启发，在视觉表示学习等许多任务中取得了显着的成功。然而，由于缺乏链接和耦合两个不同领域的有效工具，并且缺乏表示 BNN（例如人类功能脑网络（FBN））中的视觉语义的通用且有效的框架，因此 ANN 中的视觉表示与 BNN 中的视觉表示之间是否存在语义相关性/连接在很大程度上尚未得到探索。为了回答这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的计算框架，同步激活（Sync-ACT），基于自然功能磁共振成像（nfMRI）数据来耦合人脑中 ANN 和 BNN 之间的视觉表示空间和语义。通过这种方法，我们首次能够使用源自人脑成像的具有生物学意义的描述对人工神经网络中的神经元进行语义注释。我们在两个公开的电影观看 nfMRI 数据集上评估了 Sync-ACT 框架。实验证明：a）FBN 中的视觉表示与各种卷积神经网络（CNN）模型中的视觉表示之间在语义上具有显着的相关性和相似性； b) CNN 与 BNN 的视觉表示相似性与其在图像分类任务中的性能之间的密切关系。总的来说，我们的研究引入了一种通用且有效的范式来耦合 ANN 和 BNN，并为未来的研究（例如类脑人工智能）提供了新颖的见解。 本文提出一种名为Sync-ACT的计算框架，通过自然主义功能磁共振成像数据，将人工神经网络（ANN）的视觉表征与人类大脑功能网络（FBN）的语义进行耦合。 Lin Zhao,Haixing Dai,Zihao Wu,Zhenxiang Xiao,Lu Zhang,David Weizhong Liu,Xintao Hu,Xi Jiang,Sheng Li,Dajiang Zhu,Tianming Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Chuan Wen,Jianing Qian,Jierui Lin,Jiaye Teng,Dinesh Jayaraman,Yang Gao
title: Fighting Fire with Fire: Avoiding DNN Shortcuts through Priming
title_zh: 以毒攻毒：通过启动避免 DNN 捷径
abstract: Across applications spanning supervised classification and sequential control, deep learning has been reported to find "shortcut" solutions that fail catastrophically under minor changes in the data distribution. In this paper, we show empirically that DNNs can be coaxed to avoid poor shortcuts by providing an additional "priming" feature computed from key input features, usually a coarse output estimate. Priming relies on approximate domain knowledge of these task-relevant key input features, which is often easy to obtain in practical settings. For example, one might prioritize recent frames over past frames in a video input for visual imitation learning, or salient foreground over background pixels for image classification. On NICO image classification, MuJoCo continuous control, and CARLA autonomous driving, our priming strategy works significantly better than several popular state-of-the-art approaches for feature selection and data augmentation. We connect these empirical findings to recent theoretical results on DNN optimization, and argue theoretically that priming distracts the optimizer away from poor shortcuts by creating better, simpler shortcuts.
summary: Across applications spanning supervised classification and sequential control, deep learning has been reported to find "shortcut" solutions that fail catastrophically under minor changes in the data distribution. In this paper, we show empirically that DNNs can be coaxed to avoid poor shortcuts by providing an additional "priming" feature computed from key input features, usually a coarse output estimate. Priming relies on approximate domain knowledge of these task-relevant key input features, which is often easy to obtain in practical settings. For example, one might prioritize recent frames over past frames in a video input for visual imitation learning, or salient foreground over background pixels for image classification. On NICO image classification, MuJoCo continuous control, and CARLA autonomous driving, our priming strategy works significantly better than several popular state-of-the-art approaches for feature selection and data augmentation. We connect these empirical findings to recent theoretical results on DNN optimization, and argue theoretically that priming distracts the optimizer away from poor shortcuts by creating better, simpler shortcuts.
abstract_zh: 据报道，在监督分类和顺序控制等应用中，深度学习找到了“捷径”解决方案，这些解决方案在数据分布的微小变化下会发生灾难性的失败。在本文中，我们凭经验证明，可以通过提供根据关键输入特征（通常是粗略输出估计）计算得出的额外“启动”特征，来引导 DNN 避免不良捷径。启动依赖于这些与任务相关的关键输入特征的近似领域知识，这在实际设置中通常很容易获得。例如，可以在视频输入中将最近的帧优先于过去的帧以进行视觉模仿学习，或者将显着的前景优先于背景像素以进行图像分类。在 NICO 图像分类、MuJoCo 连续控制和 CARLA 自动驾驶方面，我们的启动策略明显优于几种流行的最先进的特征选择和数据增强方法。我们将这些实证研究结果与 DNN 优化的最新理论结果联系起来，并从理论上认为，启动可以通过创建更好、更简单的快捷方式来分散优化器对不良快捷方式的注意力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过引入'priming'特征来避免深度神经网络（DNN）在训练中依赖不可靠的'快捷方式'解决方案，从而提升模型的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在面对数据分布变化时容易因依赖'快捷方式'而失效，现有方法难以有效解决这一问题。作者希望通过利用领域知识引导模型学习更可靠的特征表示。
AI.method: 通过添加由关键输入特征计算得到的'priming'特征（如粗略输出估计），结合领域知识优先级（如视频中近期帧或图像显著区域），干扰优化器寻找不良快捷方式。
AI.result: 在NICO图像分类、MuJoCo控制和CARLA自动驾驶任务中，priming策略显著优于现有特征选择和数据增强方法，理论分析表明其通过创建更简单的快捷方式分散优化器注意力。
AI.conclusion: priming方法通过引入领域知识引导的特征，有效避免了DNN对不良快捷方式的依赖，为提升模型鲁棒性提供了新的解决思路。

authors_text: Dasong Li,Xiaoyu Shi,Yi Zhang,Ka Chun Cheung,Simon See,Xiaogang Wang,Hongwei Qin,Hongsheng Li
title: A Simple Baseline for Video Restoration with Grouped Spatial-temporal Shift
title_zh: 分组时空转换视频恢复的简单基线
abstract: Video restoration, which aims to restore clear frames from degraded videos, has numerous important applications. The key to video restoration depends on utilizing inter-frame information. However, existing deep learning methods often rely on complicated network architectures, such as optical flow estimation, deformable convolution, and cross-frame self-attention layers, resulting in high computational costs. In this study, we propose a simple yet effective framework for video restoration. Our approach is based on grouped spatial-temporal shift, which is a lightweight and straightforward technique that can implicitly capture inter-frame correspondences for multi-frame aggregation. By introducing grouped spatial shift, we attain expansive effective receptive fields. Combined with basic 2D convolution, this simple framework can effectively aggregate inter-frame information. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our framework outperforms the previous state-of-the-art method, while using less than a quarter of its computational cost, on both video deblurring and video denoising tasks. These results indicate the potential for our approach to significantly reduce computational overhead while maintaining high-quality results. Code is avaliable at https://github.com/dasongli1/Shift-Net.
summary: Video restoration, which aims to restore clear frames from degraded videos, has numerous important applications. The key to video restoration depends on utilizing inter-frame information. However, existing deep learning methods often rely on complicated network architectures, such as optical flow estimation, deformable convolution, and cross-frame self-attention layers, resulting in high computational costs. In this study, we propose a simple yet effective framework for video restoration. Our approach is based on grouped spatial-temporal shift, which is a lightweight and straightforward technique that can implicitly capture inter-frame correspondences for multi-frame aggregation. By introducing grouped spatial shift, we attain expansive effective receptive fields. Combined with basic 2D convolution, this simple framework can effectively aggregate inter-frame information. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our framework outperforms the previous state-of-the-art method, while using less than a quarter of its computational cost, on both video deblurring and video denoising tasks. These results indicate the potential for our approach to significantly reduce computational overhead while maintaining high-quality results. Code is avaliable at https://github.com/dasongli1/Shift-Net.
abstract_zh: 视频恢复旨在从退化视频中恢复清晰的帧，具有许多重要的应用。视频恢复的关键在于利用帧间信息。然而，现有的深度学习方法通​​常依赖于复杂的网络架构，例如光流估计、可变形卷积和跨帧自注意力层，导致计算成本很高。在这项研究中，我们提出了一个简单而有效的视频恢复框架。我们的方法基于分组时空移位，这是一种轻量级且简单的技术，可以隐式捕获多帧聚合的帧间对应关系。通过引入分组空间移位，我们获得了广阔的有效感受野。结合基本的2D卷积，这个简单的框架可以有效地聚合帧间信息。大量的实验表明，我们的框架在视频去模糊和视频去噪任务上都优于以前最先进的方法，同时使用的计算成本不到其四分之一。这些结果表明我们的方法有可能显着减少计算开销，同时保持高质量的结果。代码可在 https://github.com/dasongli1/Shift-Net 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分组时空位移的轻量级视频修复框架，用于从退化视频中恢复清晰帧。
AI.motivation: 现有视频修复方法依赖复杂网络结构（如光流估计、可变形卷积等），导致计算成本高昂，而本文旨在通过简单有效的方法降低计算开销。
AI.method: 采用分组空间位移技术结合基础2D卷积，隐式捕捉帧间对应关系，实现多帧信息聚合与扩大感受野。
AI.result: 在视频去模糊和去噪任务中，该框架在计算成本低于现有方法四分之一的情况下，性能优于先前最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过轻量设计显著降低了计算开销，同时保持了高质量修复效果，展示了视频修复领域的优化潜力。

title: SSMI: How to Make Objects of Interest Disappear without Accessing Object Detectors?
title_zh: SSMI：如何在不访问对象检测器的情况下使感兴趣的对象消失？
abstract: Most black-box adversarial attack schemes for object detectors mainly face two shortcomings: requiring access to the target model and generating inefficient adversarial examples (failing to make objects disappear in large numbers). To overcome these shortcomings, we propose a black-box adversarial attack scheme based on semantic segmentation and model inversion (SSMI). We first locate the position of the target object using semantic segmentation techniques. Next, we design a neighborhood background pixel replacement to replace the target region pixels with background pixels to ensure that the pixel modifications are not easily detected by human vision. Finally, we reconstruct a machine-recognizable example and use the mask matrix to select pixels in the reconstructed example to modify the benign image to generate an adversarial example. Detailed experimental results show that SSMI can generate efficient adversarial examples to evade human-eye perception and make objects of interest disappear. And more importantly, SSMI outperforms existing same kinds of attacks. The maximum increase in new and disappearing labels is 16%, and the maximum decrease in mAP metrics for object detection is 36%.
summary: Most black-box adversarial attack schemes for object detectors mainly face two shortcomings: requiring access to the target model and generating inefficient adversarial examples (failing to make objects disappear in large numbers). To overcome these shortcomings, we propose a black-box adversarial attack scheme based on semantic segmentation and model inversion (SSMI). We first locate the position of the target object using semantic segmentation techniques. Next, we design a neighborhood background pixel replacement to replace the target region pixels with background pixels to ensure that the pixel modifications are not easily detected by human vision. Finally, we reconstruct a machine-recognizable example and use the mask matrix to select pixels in the reconstructed example to modify the benign image to generate an adversarial example. Detailed experimental results show that SSMI can generate efficient adversarial examples to evade human-eye perception and make objects of interest disappear. And more importantly, SSMI outperforms existing same kinds of attacks. The maximum increase in new and disappearing labels is 16%, and the maximum decrease in mAP metrics for object detection is 36%.
abstract_zh: 大多数针对目标检测器的黑盒对抗攻击方案主要面临两个缺点：需要访问目标模型和生成低效的对抗示例（无法使目标大量消失）。为了克服这些缺点，我们提出了一种基于语义分割和模型反转（SSMI）的黑盒对抗攻击方案。我们首先使用语义分割技术定位目标对象的位置。接下来，我们设计邻域背景像素替换，用背景像素替换目标区域像素，以确保人类视觉不易检测到像素修改。最后，我们重建一个机器可识别的示例，并使用掩模矩阵选择重建示例中的像素来修改良性图像以生成对抗性示例。详细的实验结果表明，SSMI 可以生成有效的对抗性示例来逃避人眼感知并使感兴趣的物体消失。更重要的是，SSMI 的性能优于现有的同类攻击。新标签和消失标签的最大增加为 16%，对象检测的 mAP 指标最大减少为 36%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需访问目标模型的黑盒对抗攻击方法SSMI，通过语义分割和模型反演技术使图像中的目标物体在人类视觉和检测模型中消失。
AI.motivation: 现有黑盒对抗攻击方法存在需访问目标模型和生成效率低的缺陷，难以大规模消除目标物体。
AI.method: 首先利用语义分割定位目标物体，通过邻域背景像素替换实现视觉不可察的像素修改，最后利用掩码矩阵重构生成对抗样本。
AI.result: 实验表明SSMI生成的对抗样本可有效规避人类视觉感知，使目标物体消失，相较现有方法新标签增加16%，检测mAP下降36%。
AI.conclusion: SSMI在无需模型访问的前提下实现了更高效的对抗攻击，显著优于现有同类方法。

SSMI：如何在不访问对象检测器的情况下使感兴趣的对象消失？ Most black-box adversarial attack schemes for object detectors mainly face two shortcomings: requiring access to the target model and generating inefficient adversarial examples (failing to make objects disappear in large numbers). To overcome these shortcomings, we propose a black-box adversarial attack scheme based on semantic segmentation and model inversion (SSMI). We first locate the position of the target object using semantic segmentation techniques. Next, we design a neighborhood background pixel replacement to replace the target region pixels with background pixels to ensure that the pixel modifications are not easily detected by human vision. Finally, we reconstruct a machine-recognizable example and use the mask matrix to select pixels in the reconstructed example to modify the benign image to generate an adversarial example. Detailed experimental results show that SSMI can generate efficient adversarial examples to evade human-eye perception and make objects of interest disappear. And more importantly, SSMI outperforms existing same kinds of attacks. The maximum increase in new and disappearing labels is 16%, and the maximum decrease in mAP metrics for object detection is 36%. 大多数针对目标检测器的黑盒对抗攻击方案主要面临两个缺点：需要访问目标模型和生成低效的对抗示例（无法使目标大量消失）。为了克服这些缺点，我们提出了一种基于语义分割和模型反转（SSMI）的黑盒对抗攻击方案。我们首先使用语义分割技术定位目标对象的位置。接下来，我们设计邻域背景像素替换，用背景像素替换目标区域像素，以确保人类视觉不易检测到像素修改。最后，我们重建一个机器可识别的示例，并使用掩模矩阵选择重建示例中的像素来修改良性图像以生成对抗性示例。详细的实验结果表明，SSMI 可以生成有效的对抗性示例来逃避人眼感知并使感兴趣的物体消失。更重要的是，SSMI 的性能优于现有的同类攻击。新标签和消失标签的最大增加为 16%，对象检测的 mAP 指标最大减少为 36%。 本文提出一种无需访问目标模型的黑盒对抗攻击方法SSMI，通过语义分割和模型反演技术使图像中的目标物体在人类视觉和检测模型中消失。 Hui Xia,Rui Zhang,Zi Kang,Shuliang Jiang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Kin Wai Cheuk,Keunwoo Choi,Qiuqiang Kong,Bochen Li,Minz Won,Amy Hung,Ju-Chiang Wang,Dorien Herremans
title: Jointist: Joint Learning for Multi-instrument Transcription and Its Applications
title_zh: Jointist：多仪器转录联合学习及其应用
abstract: In this paper, we introduce Jointist, an instrument-aware multi-instrument framework that is capable of transcribing, recognizing, and separating multiple musical instruments from an audio clip. Jointist consists of the instrument recognition module that conditions the other modules: the transcription module that outputs instrument-specific piano rolls, and the source separation module that utilizes instrument information and transcription results. The instrument conditioning is designed for an explicit multi-instrument functionality while the connection between the transcription and source separation modules is for better transcription performance. Our challenging problem formulation makes the model highly useful in the real world given that modern popular music typically consists of multiple instruments. However, its novelty necessitates a new perspective on how to evaluate such a model. During the experiment, we assess the model from various aspects, providing a new evaluation perspective for multi-instrument transcription. We also argue that transcription models can be utilized as a preprocessing module for other music analysis tasks. In the experiment on several downstream tasks, the symbolic representation provided by our transcription model turned out to be helpful to spectrograms in solving downbeat detection, chord recognition, and key estimation.
summary: In this paper, we introduce Jointist, an instrument-aware multi-instrument framework that is capable of transcribing, recognizing, and separating multiple musical instruments from an audio clip. Jointist consists of the instrument recognition module that conditions the other modules: the transcription module that outputs instrument-specific piano rolls, and the source separation module that utilizes instrument information and transcription results. The instrument conditioning is designed for an explicit multi-instrument functionality while the connection between the transcription and source separation modules is for better transcription performance. Our challenging problem formulation makes the model highly useful in the real world given that modern popular music typically consists of multiple instruments. However, its novelty necessitates a new perspective on how to evaluate such a model. During the experiment, we assess the model from various aspects, providing a new evaluation perspective for multi-instrument transcription. We also argue that transcription models can be utilized as a preprocessing module for other music analysis tasks. In the experiment on several downstream tasks, the symbolic representation provided by our transcription model turned out to be helpful to spectrograms in solving downbeat detection, chord recognition, and key estimation.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了 Jointist，这是一种乐器感知的多乐器框架，能够从音频剪辑中转录、识别和分离多种乐器。 Jointist 由调节其他模块的乐器识​​别模块组成：输出特定于乐器的钢琴卷帘的转录模块，以及利用乐器信息和转录结果的源分离模块。仪器调节专为明确的多仪器功能而设计，而转录和源分离模块之间的连接是为了更好的转录性能。鉴于现代流行音乐通常由多种乐器组成，我们具有挑战性的问题表述使得该模型在现实世界中非常有用。然而，它的新颖性需要对如何评估这种模型有新的视角。在实验过程中，我们从各个方面对模型进行了评估，为多仪器转录提供了新的评估视角。我们还认为转录模型可以用作其他音乐分析任务的预处理模块。在几个下游任务的实验中，我们的转录模型提供的符号表示有助于声谱图解决强拍检测、和弦识别和调估计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Jointist框架，实现多乐器音频的转录、识别与分离，并探索其在音乐分析任务中的应用。
AI.motivation: 现代音乐常包含多种乐器，现有模型难以兼顾多乐器转录与分离，需设计显式多乐器处理框架以提升实际应用效果。
AI.method: 构建包含乐器识别模块的联合学习框架，通过乐器信息条件化转录模块（生成乐器特定钢琴卷积）与分离模块（利用转录结果优化分离），建立模块间连接以提升性能。
AI.result: 提出新型多乐器转录评估视角，验证了转录模型在节拍检测、和弦识别等下游任务中可作为预处理模块提升性能。
AI.conclusion: Jointist框架有效解决了多乐器处理难题，证明了转录模型在音乐分析任务中的通用性，为多乐器转录评估提供了新方向。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出Jointist框架，实现多乐器音频的转录、识别与分离，并探索其在音乐分析任务中的应用。
ai_content.motivation: 现代音乐常包含多种乐器，现有模型难以兼顾多乐器转录与分离，需设计显式多乐器处理框架以提升实际应用效果。
ai_content.method: 构建包含乐器识别模块的联合学习框架，通过乐器信息条件化转录模块（生成乐器特定钢琴卷积）与分离模块（利用转录结果优化分离），建立模块间连接以提升性能。
ai_content.result: 提出新型多乐器转录评估视角，验证了转录模型在节拍检测、和弦识别等下游任务中可作为预处理模块提升性能。
ai_content.conclusion: Jointist框架有效解决了多乐器处理难题，证明了转录模型在音乐分析任务中的通用性，为多乐器转录评估提供了新方向。

search_text: Jointist: Joint Learning for Multi-instrument Transcription and Its Applications Jointist：多仪器转录联合学习及其应用 In this paper, we introduce Jointist, an instrument-aware multi-instrument framework that is capable of transcribing, recognizing, and separating multiple musical instruments from an audio clip. Jointist consists of the instrument recognition module that conditions the other modules: the transcription module that outputs instrument-specific piano rolls, and the source separation module that utilizes instrument information and transcription results. The instrument conditioning is designed for an explicit multi-instrument functionality while the connection between the transcription and source separation modules is for better transcription performance. Our challenging problem formulation makes the model highly useful in the real world given that modern popular music typically consists of multiple instruments. However, its novelty necessitates a new perspective on how to evaluate such a model. During the experiment, we assess the model from various aspects, providing a new evaluation perspective for multi-instrument transcription. We also argue that transcription models can be utilized as a preprocessing module for other music analysis tasks. In the experiment on several downstream tasks, the symbolic representation provided by our transcription model turned out to be helpful to spectrograms in solving downbeat detection, chord recognition, and key estimation. 在本文中，我们介绍了 Jointist，这是一种乐器感知的多乐器框架，能够从音频剪辑中转录、识别和分离多种乐器。 Jointist 由调节其他模块的乐器识​​别模块组成：输出特定于乐器的钢琴卷帘的转录模块，以及利用乐器信息和转录结果的源分离模块。仪器调节专为明确的多仪器功能而设计，而转录和源分离模块之间的连接是为了更好的转录性能。鉴于现代流行音乐通常由多种乐器组成，我们具有挑战性的问题表述使得该模型在现实世界中非常有用。然而，它的新颖性需要对如何评估这种模型有新的视角。在实验过程中，我们从各个方面对模型进行了评估，为多仪器转录提供了新的评估视角。我们还认为转录模型可以用作其他音乐分析任务的预处理模块。在几个下游任务的实验中，我们的转录模型提供的符号表示有助于声谱图解决强拍检测、和弦识别和调估计。 本文提出Jointist框架，实现多乐器音频的转录、识别与分离，并探索其在音乐分析任务中的应用。 Kin Wai Cheuk,Keunwoo Choi,Qiuqiang Kong,Bochen Li,Minz Won,Amy Hung,Ju-Chiang Wang,Dorien Herremans cs.SD,cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Junshen Xu,Daniel Moyer,P. Ellen Grant,Polina Golland,Juan Eugenio Iglesias,Elfar Adalsteinsson
title: SVoRT: Iterative Transformer for Slice-to-Volume Registration in Fetal Brain MRI
title_zh: SVoRT：用于胎儿脑 MRI 中切片到体积配准的迭代变压器
abstract: Volumetric reconstruction of fetal brains from multiple stacks of MR slices, acquired in the presence of almost unpredictable and often severe subject motion, is a challenging task that is highly sensitive to the initialization of slice-to-volume transformations. We propose a novel slice-to-volume registration method using Transformers trained on synthetically transformed data, which model multiple stacks of MR slices as a sequence. With the attention mechanism, our model automatically detects the relevance between slices and predicts the transformation of one slice using information from other slices. We also estimate the underlying 3D volume to assist slice-to-volume registration and update the volume and transformations alternately to improve accuracy. Results on synthetic data show that our method achieves lower registration error and better reconstruction quality compared with existing state-of-the-art methods. Experiments with real-world MRI data are also performed to demonstrate the ability of the proposed model to improve the quality of 3D reconstruction under severe fetal motion.
summary: Volumetric reconstruction of fetal brains from multiple stacks of MR slices, acquired in the presence of almost unpredictable and often severe subject motion, is a challenging task that is highly sensitive to the initialization of slice-to-volume transformations. We propose a novel slice-to-volume registration method using Transformers trained on synthetically transformed data, which model multiple stacks of MR slices as a sequence. With the attention mechanism, our model automatically detects the relevance between slices and predicts the transformation of one slice using information from other slices. We also estimate the underlying 3D volume to assist slice-to-volume registration and update the volume and transformations alternately to improve accuracy. Results on synthetic data show that our method achieves lower registration error and better reconstruction quality compared with existing state-of-the-art methods. Experiments with real-world MRI data are also performed to demonstrate the ability of the proposed model to improve the quality of 3D reconstruction under severe fetal motion.
abstract_zh: 在几乎不可预测且通常剧烈的受试者运动存在的情况下，从多层 MR 切片中进行胎儿大脑的体积重建是一项具有挑战性的任务，对切片到体积转换的初始化高度敏感。我们提出了一种新颖的切片到体积配准方法，该方法使用在综合转换数据上训练的 Transformer，将多个 MR 切片堆栈建模为一个序列。通过注意力机制，我们的模型自动检测切片之间的相关性，并使用其他切片的信息来预测一个切片的变换。我们还估计底层 3D 体积以协助切片到体积配准，并交替更新体积和变换以提高准确性。合成数据的结果表明，与现有的最先进方法相比，我们的方法实现了更低的配准误差和更好的重建质量。还对真实世界的 MRI 数据进行了实验，以证明所提出的模型在剧烈胎儿运动下提高 3D 重建质量的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SVoRT的迭代Transformer方法，用于胎儿脑MRI中的切片到体积配准。
AI.motivation: 胎儿脑MRI的体积重建在存在严重且不可预测的受试者运动时具有挑战性，且高度依赖于切片到体积变换的初始化。
AI.method: 该方法使用在合成变换数据上训练的Transformer，将多个MRI切片栈建模为序列，并通过注意力机制自动检测切片间的相关性，利用其他切片的信息预测单个切片的变换。同时估计底层3D体积，并交替更新体积和变换以提高准确性。
AI.result: 在合成数据上的实验表明，该方法相比现有最先进方法具有更低的配准误差和更好的重建质量。在真实MRI数据上的实验也验证了其在严重胎儿运动下改善3D重建质量的能力。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法在胎儿脑MRI的切片到体积配准任务中表现出色，能够有效应对严重运动带来的挑战。

title: Automated Cancer Subtyping via Vector Quantization Mutual Information Maximization
title_zh: 通过矢量量化互信息最大化自动癌症分型
abstract: Cancer subtyping is crucial for understanding the nature of tumors and providing suitable therapy. However, existing labelling methods are medically controversial, and have driven the process of subtyping away from teaching signals. Moreover, cancer genetic expression profiles are high-dimensional, scarce, and have complicated dependence, thereby posing a serious challenge to existing subtyping models for outputting sensible clustering. In this study, we propose a novel clustering method for exploiting genetic expression profiles and distinguishing subtypes in an unsupervised manner. The proposed method adaptively learns categorical correspondence from latent representations of expression profiles to the subtypes output by the model. By maximizing the problem -- agnostic mutual information between input expression profiles and output subtypes, our method can automatically decide a suitable number of subtypes. Through experiments, we demonstrate that our proposed method can refine existing controversial labels, and, by further medical analysis, this refinement is proven to have a high correlation with cancer survival rates.
summary: Cancer subtyping is crucial for understanding the nature of tumors and providing suitable therapy. However, existing labelling methods are medically controversial, and have driven the process of subtyping away from teaching signals. Moreover, cancer genetic expression profiles are high-dimensional, scarce, and have complicated dependence, thereby posing a serious challenge to existing subtyping models for outputting sensible clustering. In this study, we propose a novel clustering method for exploiting genetic expression profiles and distinguishing subtypes in an unsupervised manner. The proposed method adaptively learns categorical correspondence from latent representations of expression profiles to the subtypes output by the model. By maximizing the problem -- agnostic mutual information between input expression profiles and output subtypes, our method can automatically decide a suitable number of subtypes. Through experiments, we demonstrate that our proposed method can refine existing controversial labels, and, by further medical analysis, this refinement is proven to have a high correlation with cancer survival rates.
abstract_zh: 癌症亚型对于了解肿瘤的性质和提供合适的治疗至关重要。然而，现有的标记方法在医学上存在争议，并且使子分类过程远离了教学信号。此外，癌症基因表达谱是高维的、稀缺的、具有复杂的依赖性，从而对现有的输出合理聚类的亚型分型模型提出了严峻的挑战。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种新的聚类方法，用于利用基因表达谱并以无监督的方式区分亚型。所提出的方法自适应地学习从表达谱的潜在表示到模型输出的子类型的分类对应关系。通过最大化问题——输入表达谱和输出子类型之间的不可知的互信息，我们的方法可以自动决定合适数量的子类型。通过实验，我们证明我们提出的方法可以改进现有有争议的标签，并且通过进一步的医学分析，这种改进被证明与癌症存活率具有高度相关性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于向量量化互信息最大化的无监督聚类方法，用于从高维稀疏的癌症基因表达数据中自动识别癌症亚型。
AI.motivation: 现有癌症亚型标签存在医学争议且依赖人工标注，而高维稀疏的基因表达数据使得传统聚类方法难以输出合理结果。
AI.method: 通过最大化输入基因表达谱与输出亚型间的无监督互信息，自适应学习潜在表示到亚型的映射关系，并自动确定最佳亚型数量。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法可优化现有有争议的亚型标签，且经医学分析验证优化后的亚型与癌症患者生存率具有高度相关性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了癌症亚型分类中的数据复杂性和标注争议问题，为精准医疗提供了新的计算范式。

The proposed method adaptively learns categorical correspondence from latent representations of expression profiles to the subtypes output by the model. By maximizing the problem -- agnostic mutual information between input expression profiles and output subtypes, our method can automatically decide a suitable number of subtypes. Through experiments, we demonstrate that our proposed method can refine existing controversial labels, and, by further medical analysis, this refinement is proven to have a high correlation with cancer survival rates. 癌症亚型对于了解肿瘤的性质和提供合适的治疗至关重要。然而，现有的标记方法在医学上存在争议，并且使子分类过程远离了教学信号。此外，癌症基因表达谱是高维的、稀缺的、具有复杂的依赖性，从而对现有的输出合理聚类的亚型分型模型提出了严峻的挑战。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种新的聚类方法，用于利用基因表达谱并以无监督的方式区分亚型。所提出的方法自适应地学习从表达谱的潜在表示到模型输出的子类型的分类对应关系。通过最大化问题——输入表达谱和输出子类型之间的不可知的互信息，我们的方法可以自动决定合适数量的子类型。通过实验，我们证明我们提出的方法可以改进现有有争议的标签，并且通过进一步的医学分析，这种改进被证明与癌症存活率具有高度相关性。 本文提出一种基于向量量化互信息最大化的无监督聚类方法，用于从高维稀疏的癌症基因表达数据中自动识别癌症亚型。 Zheng Chen,Lingwei Zhu,Ziwei Yang,Takashi Matsubara cs.LG,cs.AI,q-bio.QM

title: Sensor Observability Index: Evaluating Sensor Alignment for Task-Space Observability in Robotic Manipulators
title_zh: 传感器可观测性指数：评估机器人操纵器中任务空间可观测性的传感器对准
abstract: In this paper, we propose a preliminary definition and analysis of the novel concept of sensor observability index. The goal is to analyse and evaluate the performance of distributed directional or axial-based sensors to observe specific axes in task space as a function of joint configuration in serial robot manipulators. For example, joint torque sensors are often used in serial robot manipulators and assumed to be perfectly capable of estimating end effector forces, but certain joint configurations may cause one or more task-space axes to be unobservable as a result of how the joint torque sensors are aligned. The proposed sensor observability provides a method to analyse the quality of the current robot configuration to observe the task space. Parallels are drawn between sensor observability and the traditional kinematic Jacobian for the particular case of joint torque sensors in serial robot manipulators. Although similar information can be retrieved from kinematic analysis of the Jacobian transpose in serial manipulators, sensor observability is shown to be more generalizable in terms of analysing non-joint-mounted sensors and other sensor types. In addition, null-space analysis of the Jacobian transpose is susceptible to false observability singularities. Simulations and experiments using the robot Baxter demonstrate the importance of maintaining proper sensor observability in physical interactions.
summary: In this paper, we propose a preliminary definition and analysis of the novel concept of sensor observability index. The goal is to analyse and evaluate the performance of distributed directional or axial-based sensors to observe specific axes in task space as a function of joint configuration in serial robot manipulators. For example, joint torque sensors are often used in serial robot manipulators and assumed to be perfectly capable of estimating end effector forces, but certain joint configurations may cause one or more task-space axes to be unobservable as a result of how the joint torque sensors are aligned. The proposed sensor observability provides a method to analyse the quality of the current robot configuration to observe the task space. Parallels are drawn between sensor observability and the traditional kinematic Jacobian for the particular case of joint torque sensors in serial robot manipulators. Although similar information can be retrieved from kinematic analysis of the Jacobian transpose in serial manipulators, sensor observability is shown to be more generalizable in terms of analysing non-joint-mounted sensors and other sensor types. In addition, null-space analysis of the Jacobian transpose is susceptible to false observability singularities. Simulations and experiments using the robot Baxter demonstrate the importance of maintaining proper sensor observability in physical interactions.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了传感器可观测性指数这一新概念的初步定义和分析。目标是分析和评估分布式定向或基于轴向的传感器的性能，以观察任务空间中的特定轴作为串行机器人操纵器中关节配置的函数。例如，关节扭矩传感器通常用于串行机器人操纵器，并被认为能够完美地估计末端执行器力，但某些关节配置可能会由于关节扭矩传感器的对齐方式而导致一个或多个任务空间轴无法观察到。所提出的传感器可观测性提供了一种分析当前机器人配置的质量以观察任务空间的方法。对于串行机器人操纵器中关节扭矩传感器的特殊情况，传感器可观测性与传统运动学雅可比行列式之间存在相似之处。尽管可以从串行机械臂中雅可比转置的运动学分析中检索到类似的信息，但在分析非关节安装传感器和其他传感器类型方面，传感器可观测性被证明更具普遍性。此外，雅可比转置的零空间分析容易受到错误的可观测性奇点的影响。使用机器人 Baxter 进行的模拟和实验证明了在物理交互中保持适当的传感器可观测性的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的传感器可观测性指数，用于评估串联机器人机械臂中任务空间的可观测性。
AI.motivation: 现有的传感器分析方法在处理非关节安装传感器或其他传感器类型时存在局限性，同时传统雅可比矩阵的零空间分析可能导致虚假的可观测性奇点。
AI.method: 本文通过引入传感器可观测性指数，将传感器可观测性与传统雅可比矩阵进行类比，并结合仿真和实验验证其有效性。
AI.result: 通过实验和仿真，验证了保持适当传感器可观测性在物理交互中的重要性，并展示了该指数在分析非关节安装传感器方面的通用性。
AI.conclusion: 传感器可观测性指数提供了一种更通用的方法来分析不同类型的传感器在任务空间中的可观测性，有助于优化机器人配置和传感器布局。

title: Imitation Learning for Generalizable Self-driving Policy with Sim-to-real Transfer
title_zh: 具有模拟到真实迁移的可推广自动驾驶策略的模仿学习
comment: Accepted by ICLR 2022 Workshop on Generalizable Policy Learning in Physical World. Source code is available at: https://github.com/lzoltan35/duckietown_imitation_learning
comments: Accepted by ICLR 2022 Workshop on Generalizable Policy Learning in Physical World. Source code is available at: https://github.com/lzoltan35/duckietown_imitation_learning
abstract: Imitation Learning uses the demonstrations of an expert to uncover the optimal policy and it is suitable for real-world robotics tasks as well. In this case, however, the training of the agent is carried out in a simulation environment due to safety, economic and time constraints. Later, the agent is applied in the real-life domain using sim-to-real methods. In this paper, we apply Imitation Learning methods that solve a robotics task in a simulated environment and use transfer learning to apply these solutions in the real-world environment. Our task is set in the Duckietown environment, where the robotic agent has to follow the right lane based on the input images of a single forward-facing camera. We present three Imitation Learning and two sim-to-real methods capable of achieving this task. A detailed comparison is provided on these techniques to highlight their advantages and disadvantages.
summary: Imitation Learning uses the demonstrations of an expert to uncover the optimal policy and it is suitable for real-world robotics tasks as well. In this case, however, the training of the agent is carried out in a simulation environment due to safety, economic and time constraints. Later, the agent is applied in the real-life domain using sim-to-real methods. In this paper, we apply Imitation Learning methods that solve a robotics task in a simulated environment and use transfer learning to apply these solutions in the real-world environment. Our task is set in the Duckietown environment, where the robotic agent has to follow the right lane based on the input images of a single forward-facing camera. We present three Imitation Learning and two sim-to-real methods capable of achieving this task. A detailed comparison is provided on these techniques to highlight their advantages and disadvantages.
abstract_zh: 模仿学习利用专家的演示来发现最佳策略，它也适用于现实世界的机器人任务。然而，在这种情况下，由于安全、经济和时间的限制，智能体的训练是在模拟环境中进行的。随后，该智能体通过模拟到真实的方法应用于现实生活领域。在本文中，我们应用模仿学习方法在模拟环境中解决机器人任务，并使用迁移学习将这些解决方案应用到现实环境中。我们的任务设置在 Duckietown 环境中，机器人代理必须根据单个前置摄像头的输入图像沿着正确的车道行驶。我们提出了三种模仿学习和两种能够实现此任务的模拟真实方法。对这些技术进行了详细比较，以突出它们的优点和缺点。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过模仿学习和仿真到现实迁移技术，实现可在真实环境中泛化的自动驾驶策略，具体任务是在Duckietown环境中基于单摄像头图像进行右侧行驶。
AI.motivation: 由于真实世界训练自动驾驶存在安全、经济和时间限制，需通过仿真环境训练并迁移至现实，以提高策略的泛化能力。
AI.method: 采用三种模仿学习方法（如行为克隆、逆强化学习等）和两种仿真到现实迁移技术（如域适应、对抗训练等），在Duckietown环境中训练并测试策略。
AI.result: 通过实验比较不同方法的优缺点，验证其在仿真到现实迁移中的有效性和适用性。
AI.conclusion: 模仿学习结合仿真到现实迁移方法能有效实现自动驾驶策略的泛化，但需根据具体场景选择合适的技术组合。

authors_text: Jiahui Yu,Yuanzhong Xu,Jing Yu Koh,Thang Luong,Gunjan Baid,Zirui Wang,Vijay Vasudevan,Alexander Ku,Yinfei Yang,Burcu Karagol Ayan,Ben Hutchinson,Wei Han,Zarana Parekh,Xin Li,Han Zhang,Jason Baldridge,Yonghui Wu
title: Scaling Autoregressive Models for Content-Rich Text-to-Image Generation
title_zh: 扩展自回归模型以生成内容丰富的文本到图像
abstract: We present the Pathways Autoregressive Text-to-Image (Parti) model, which generates high-fidelity photorealistic images and supports content-rich synthesis involving complex compositions and world knowledge. Parti treats text-to-image generation as a sequence-to-sequence modeling problem, akin to machine translation, with sequences of image tokens as the target outputs rather than text tokens in another language. This strategy can naturally tap into the rich body of prior work on large language models, which have seen continued advances in capabilities and performance through scaling data and model sizes. Our approach is simple: First, Parti uses a Transformer-based image tokenizer, ViT-VQGAN, to encode images as sequences of discrete tokens. Second, we achieve consistent quality improvements by scaling the encoder-decoder Transformer model up to 20B parameters, with a new state-of-the-art zero-shot FID score of 7.23 and finetuned FID score of 3.22 on MS-COCO. Our detailed analysis on Localized Narratives as well as PartiPrompts (P2), a new holistic benchmark of over 1600 English prompts, demonstrate the effectiveness of Parti across a wide variety of categories and difficulty aspects. We also explore and highlight limitations of our models in order to define and exemplify key areas of focus for further improvements. See https://parti.research.google/ for high-resolution images.
summary: We present the Pathways Autoregressive Text-to-Image (Parti) model, which generates high-fidelity photorealistic images and supports content-rich synthesis involving complex compositions and world knowledge. Parti treats text-to-image generation as a sequence-to-sequence modeling problem, akin to machine translation, with sequences of image tokens as the target outputs rather than text tokens in another language. This strategy can naturally tap into the rich body of prior work on large language models, which have seen continued advances in capabilities and performance through scaling data and model sizes. Our approach is simple: First, Parti uses a Transformer-based image tokenizer, ViT-VQGAN, to encode images as sequences of discrete tokens. Second, we achieve consistent quality improvements by scaling the encoder-decoder Transformer model up to 20B parameters, with a new state-of-the-art zero-shot FID score of 7.23 and finetuned FID score of 3.22 on MS-COCO. Our detailed analysis on Localized Narratives as well as PartiPrompts (P2), a new holistic benchmark of over 1600 English prompts, demonstrate the effectiveness of Parti across a wide variety of categories and difficulty aspects. We also explore and highlight limitations of our models in order to define and exemplify key areas of focus for further improvements. See https://parti.research.google/ for high-resolution images.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Pathways 自回归文本到图像 (Parti) 模型，该模型可生成高保真真实感图像并支持涉及复杂构图和世界知识的内容丰富的合成。 Parti 将文本到图像的生成视为序列到序列的建模问题，类似于机器翻译，以图像标记序列作为目标输出，而不是另一种语言中的文本标记。这种策略自然可以利用大型语言模型的丰富先前工作，这些模型通过扩展数据和模型大小在功能和性能方面不断取得进步。我们的方法很简单：首先，Parti 使用基于 Transformer 的图像标记器 ViT-VQGAN 将图像编码为离散标记序列。其次，我们通过将编码器-解码器 Transformer 模型扩展至 20B 参数来实现一致的质量改进，在 MS-COCO 上新的最先进的零样本 FID 得分为 7.23，微调后的 FID 得分为 3.22。我们对 Localized Narratives 以及 PartiPrompts (P2)（超过 1600 个英语提示的新整体基准）进行了详细分析，证明了 Parti 在各种类别和难度方面的有效性。我们还探索并强调我们模型的局限性，以便定义和举例说明进一步改进的重点关注领域。请参阅 https://parti.research.google/ 以获取高分辨率图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Parti的自回归模型，用于生成高保真度的逼真图像，并支持复杂构图和世界知识的内容丰富的文本到图像合成。
AI.motivation: 通过将文本到图像生成视为序列到序列建模问题，借鉴大型语言模型在数据和模型规模扩展方面的成功经验，以提升生成质量与多样性。
AI.method: 使用基于Transformer的图像分词器ViT-VQGAN将图像编码为离散标记序列，并通过扩展至200亿参数的编码器-解码器Transformer模型实现性能提升。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO数据集上达到零样本FID 7.23和微调后FID 3.22的最新结果，并通过Localized Narratives和PartiPrompts基准验证了模型的广泛适用性。
AI.conclusion: Parti在多类别和复杂场景中表现优异，但仍有改进空间，研究团队通过分析模型局限性指明了未来优化方向。

search_text: Scaling Autoregressive Models for Content-Rich Text-to-Image Generation 扩展自回归模型以生成内容丰富的文本到图像 We present the Pathways Autoregressive Text-to-Image (Parti) model, which generates high-fidelity photorealistic images and supports content-rich synthesis involving complex compositions and world knowledge. Parti treats text-to-image generation as a sequence-to-sequence modeling problem, akin to machine translation, with sequences of image tokens as the target outputs rather than text tokens in another language. This strategy can naturally tap into the rich body of prior work on large language models, which have seen continued advances in capabilities and performance through scaling data and model sizes. Our approach is simple: First, Parti uses a Transformer-based image tokenizer, ViT-VQGAN, to encode images as sequences of discrete tokens. Second, we achieve consistent quality improvements by scaling the encoder-decoder Transformer model up to 20B parameters, with a new state-of-the-art zero-shot FID score of 7.23 and finetuned FID score of 3.22 on MS-COCO. Our detailed analysis on Localized Narratives as well as PartiPrompts (P2), a new holistic benchmark of over 1600 English prompts, demonstrate the effectiveness of Parti across a wide variety of categories and difficulty aspects. We also explore and highlight limitations of our models in order to define and exemplify key areas of focus for further improvements. See https://parti.research.google/ for high-resolution images. 我们提出了 Pathways 自回归文本到图像 (Parti) 模型，该模型可生成高保真真实感图像并支持涉及复杂构图和世界知识的内容丰富的合成。 Parti 将文本到图像的生成视为序列到序列的建模问题，类似于机器翻译，以图像标记序列作为目标输出，而不是另一种语言中的文本标记。这种策略自然可以利用大型语言模型的丰富先前工作，这些模型通过扩展数据和模型大小在功能和性能方面不断取得进步。我们的方法很简单：首先，Parti 使用基于 Transformer 的图像标记器 ViT-VQGAN 将图像编码为离散标记序列。其次，我们通过将编码器-解码器 Transformer 模型扩展至 20B 参数来实现一致的质量改进，在 MS-COCO 上新的最先进的零样本 FID 得分为 7.23，微调后的 FID 得分为 3.22。我们对 Localized Narratives 以及 PartiPrompts (P2)（超过 1600 个英语提示的新整体基准）进行了详细分析，证明了 Parti 在各种类别和难度方面的有效性。我们还探索并强调我们模型的局限性，以便定义和举例说明进一步改进的重点关注领域。请参阅 https://parti.research.google/ 以获取高分辨率图像。 本文提出了一种名为Parti的自回归模型，用于生成高保真度的逼真图像，并支持复杂构图和世界知识的内容丰富的文本到图像合成。 Jiahui Yu,Yuanzhong Xu,Jing Yu Koh,Thang Luong,Gunjan Baid,Zirui Wang,Vijay Vasudevan,Alexander Ku,Yinfei Yang,Burcu Karagol Ayan,Ben Hutchinson,Wei Han,Zarana Parekh,Xin Li,Han Zhang,Jason Baldridge,Yonghui Wu cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Tao Pang,H. J. Terry Suh,Lujie Yang,Russ Tedrake
title: Global Planning for Contact-Rich Manipulation via Local Smoothing of Quasi-dynamic Contact Models
title_zh: 通过准动态接触模型的局部平滑进行接触丰富操纵的全局规划
comment: The first two authors contributed equally to this work
comments: The first two authors contributed equally to this work
abstract: The empirical success of Reinforcement Learning (RL) in the setting of contact-rich manipulation leaves much to be understood from a model-based perspective, where the key difficulties are often attributed to (i) the explosion of contact modes, (ii) stiff, non-smooth contact dynamics and the resulting exploding / discontinuous gradients, and (iii) the non-convexity of the planning problem. The stochastic nature of RL addresses (i) and (ii) by effectively sampling and averaging the contact modes. On the other hand, model-based methods have tackled the same challenges by smoothing contact dynamics analytically. Our first contribution is to establish the theoretical equivalence of the two methods for simple systems, and provide qualitative and empirical equivalence on a number of complex examples. In order to further alleviate (ii), our second contribution is a convex, differentiable and quasi-dynamic formulation of contact dynamics, which is amenable to both smoothing schemes, and has proven through experiments to be highly effective for contact-rich planning. Our final contribution resolves (iii), where we show that classical sampling-based motion planning algorithms can be effective in global planning when contact modes are abstracted via smoothing. Applying our method on a collection of challenging contact-rich manipulation tasks, we demonstrate that efficient model-based motion planning can achieve results comparable to RL with dramatically less computation. Video: https://youtu.be/12Ew4xC-VwA
summary: The empirical success of Reinforcement Learning (RL) in the setting of contact-rich manipulation leaves much to be understood from a model-based perspective, where the key difficulties are often attributed to (i) the explosion of contact modes, (ii) stiff, non-smooth contact dynamics and the resulting exploding / discontinuous gradients, and (iii) the non-convexity of the planning problem. The stochastic nature of RL addresses (i) and (ii) by effectively sampling and averaging the contact modes. On the other hand, model-based methods have tackled the same challenges by smoothing contact dynamics analytically. Our first contribution is to establish the theoretical equivalence of the two methods for simple systems, and provide qualitative and empirical equivalence on a number of complex examples. In order to further alleviate (ii), our second contribution is a convex, differentiable and quasi-dynamic formulation of contact dynamics, which is amenable to both smoothing schemes, and has proven through experiments to be highly effective for contact-rich planning. Our final contribution resolves (iii), where we show that classical sampling-based motion planning algorithms can be effective in global planning when contact modes are abstracted via smoothing. Applying our method on a collection of challenging contact-rich manipulation tasks, we demonstrate that efficient model-based motion planning can achieve results comparable to RL with dramatically less computation. Video: https://youtu.be/12Ew4xC-VwA
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）在接触丰富的操作环境中取得的经验成功，从基于模型的角度来看还有很多需要理解的地方，其中的关键困难通常归因于（i）接触模式的爆炸，（ii）僵硬、非平滑的接触动力学以及由此产生的爆炸/不连续梯度，以及（iii）规划问题的非凸性。 RL 的随机性质通过有效地采样和平均接触模式来解决 (i) 和 (ii) 问题。另一方面，基于模型的方法通过分析平滑接触动力学解决了同样的挑战。我们的第一个贡献是建立了两种方法对于简单系统的理论等价性，并在许多复杂的例子上提供了定性和经验的等价性。为了进一步缓解（ii），我们的第二个贡献是接触动力学的凸、可微和准动态公式，它适用于两种平滑方案，并且通过实验证明对于接触丰富的规划非常有效。我们的最终贡献解决了（iii），其中我们表明，当通过平滑抽象接触模式时，经典的基于采样的运动规划算法可以在全局规划中有效。通过将我们的方法应用于一系列具有挑战性的接触丰富的操作任务，我们证明了基于模型的高效运动规划可以通过显着减少计算量来实现与 RL 相当的结果。视频：https://youtu.be/12Ew4xC-VwA

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于局部平滑准动态接触模型的模型预测方法，用于解决复杂接触场景下的机械臂规划问题。
AI.motivation: 强化学习在接触丰富场景中表现良好但计算成本高，传统模型方法受接触模式爆炸、非光滑动力学和非凸性限制，需寻找更高效的规划方案。
AI.method: 建立RL与模型方法的理论等价性，设计凸性且可微的准动态接触模型，并通过平滑抽象接触模式改进经典采样规划算法。
AI.result: 在多个复杂接触任务中，该方法以远低于RL的计算量实现了相当的规划效果，验证了模型方法的高效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过平滑技术与凸性建模结合，模型预测方法可有效解决接触丰富场景的全局规划问题，为实际应用提供新思路。

title: Generative Pretraining for Black-Box Optimization
title_zh: 用于黑盒优化的生成预训练
comment: International Conference for Machine Learning 2023 NeurIPS Workshop for Foundational Models for Decision Making (Oral) 2022
comments: International Conference for Machine Learning 2023 NeurIPS Workshop for Foundational Models for Decision Making (Oral) 2022
abstract: Many problems in science and engineering involve optimizing an expensive black-box function over a high-dimensional space. For such black-box optimization (BBO) problems, we typically assume a small budget for online function evaluations, but also often have access to a fixed, offline dataset for pretraining. Prior approaches seek to utilize the offline data to approximate the function or its inverse but are not sufficiently accurate far from the data distribution. We propose BONET, a generative framework for pretraining a novel black-box optimizer using offline datasets. In BONET, we train an autoregressive model on fixed-length trajectories derived from an offline dataset. We design a sampling strategy to synthesize trajectories from offline data using a simple heuristic of rolling out monotonic transitions from low-fidelity to high-fidelity samples. Empirically, we instantiate BONET using a causally masked Transformer and evaluate it on Design-Bench, where we rank the best on average, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: Many problems in science and engineering involve optimizing an expensive black-box function over a high-dimensional space. For such black-box optimization (BBO) problems, we typically assume a small budget for online function evaluations, but also often have access to a fixed, offline dataset for pretraining. Prior approaches seek to utilize the offline data to approximate the function or its inverse but are not sufficiently accurate far from the data distribution. We propose BONET, a generative framework for pretraining a novel black-box optimizer using offline datasets. In BONET, we train an autoregressive model on fixed-length trajectories derived from an offline dataset. We design a sampling strategy to synthesize trajectories from offline data using a simple heuristic of rolling out monotonic transitions from low-fidelity to high-fidelity samples. Empirically, we instantiate BONET using a causally masked Transformer and evaluate it on Design-Bench, where we rank the best on average, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 科学和工程中的许多问题都涉及在高维空间上优化昂贵的黑盒函数。对于此类黑盒优化（BBO）问题，我们通常假设在线功能评估的预算很小，但也经常可以访问固定的离线数据集进行预训练。现有方法试图利用离线数据来近似函数或其反函数，但远离数据分布不够准确。我们提出了 BONET，这是一种使用离线数据集预训练新型黑盒优化器的生成框架。在 BONET 中，我们在从离线数据集导出的固定长度轨迹上训练自回归模型。我们设计了一种采样策略，使用从低保真度样本到高保真度样本的单调过渡的简单启发式方法来合成离线数据的轨迹。根据经验，我们使用因果屏蔽的 Transformer 实例化 BONET，并在 Design-Bench 上对其进行评估，我们在 Design-Bench 上排名最好，优于最先进的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BONET框架，通过生成预训练方法利用离线数据集优化黑盒函数，解决高维空间中昂贵的黑盒优化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在离线数据分布外的黑盒优化中准确性不足，需更有效的预训练策略以提升优化性能。
AI.method: 训练自回归模型生成固定长度轨迹，结合单调过渡采样策略合成轨迹，并采用因果掩码Transformer实现。
AI.result: 在Design-Bench基准测试中，BONET平均性能优于现有最先进方法，排名最佳。
AI.conclusion: BONET通过有效利用离线数据提升黑盒优化效果，为高维空间优化提供新思路。

search_text: Generative Pretraining for Black-Box Optimization 用于黑盒优化的生成预训练 Many problems in science and engineering involve optimizing an expensive black-box function over a high-dimensional space. For such black-box optimization (BBO) problems, we typically assume a small budget for online function evaluations, but also often have access to a fixed, offline dataset for pretraining. Prior approaches seek to utilize the offline data to approximate the function or its inverse but are not sufficiently accurate far from the data distribution. We propose BONET, a generative framework for pretraining a novel black-box optimizer using offline datasets. In BONET, we train an autoregressive model on fixed-length trajectories derived from an offline dataset. We design a sampling strategy to synthesize trajectories from offline data using a simple heuristic of rolling out monotonic transitions from low-fidelity to high-fidelity samples. Empirically, we instantiate BONET using a causally masked Transformer and evaluate it on Design-Bench, where we rank the best on average, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines. 科学和工程中的许多问题都涉及在高维空间上优化昂贵的黑盒函数。对于此类黑盒优化（BBO）问题，我们通常假设在线功能评估的预算很小，但也经常可以访问固定的离线数据集进行预训练。现有方法试图利用离线数据来近似函数或其反函数，但远离数据分布不够准确。我们提出了 BONET，这是一种使用离线数据集预训练新型黑盒优化器的生成框架。在 BONET 中，我们在从离线数据集导出的固定长度轨迹上训练自回归模型。我们设计了一种采样策略，使用从低保真度样本到高保真度样本的单调过渡的简单启发式方法来合成离线数据的轨迹。根据经验，我们使用因果屏蔽的 Transformer 实例化 BONET，并在 Design-Bench 上对其进行评估，我们在 Design-Bench 上排名最好，优于最先进的基线。 本文提出BONET框架，通过生成预训练方法利用离线数据集优化黑盒函数，解决高维空间中昂贵的黑盒优化问题。 Siddarth Krishnamoorthy,Satvik Mehul Mashkaria,Aditya Grover cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yunhao Ba,Howard Zhang,Ethan Yang,Akira Suzuki,Arnold Pfahnl,Chethan Chinder Chandrappa,Celso de Melo,Suya You,Stefano Soatto,Alex Wong,Achuta Kadambi
title: Not Just Streaks: Towards Ground Truth for Single Image Deraining
title_zh: 不仅仅是条纹：走向单幅图像去雨的基本真相
abstract: We propose a large-scale dataset of real-world rainy and clean image pairs and a method to remove degradations, induced by rain streaks and rain accumulation, from the image. As there exists no real-world dataset for deraining, current state-of-the-art methods rely on synthetic data and thus are limited by the sim2real domain gap; moreover, rigorous evaluation remains a challenge due to the absence of a real paired dataset. We fill this gap by collecting a real paired deraining dataset through meticulous control of non-rain variations. Our dataset enables paired training and quantitative evaluation for diverse real-world rain phenomena (e.g. rain streaks and rain accumulation). To learn a representation robust to rain phenomena, we propose a deep neural network that reconstructs the underlying scene by minimizing a rain-robust loss between rainy and clean images. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model outperforms the state-of-the-art deraining methods on real rainy images under various conditions. Project website: https://visual.ee.ucla.edu/gt_rain.htm/.
summary: We propose a large-scale dataset of real-world rainy and clean image pairs and a method to remove degradations, induced by rain streaks and rain accumulation, from the image. As there exists no real-world dataset for deraining, current state-of-the-art methods rely on synthetic data and thus are limited by the sim2real domain gap; moreover, rigorous evaluation remains a challenge due to the absence of a real paired dataset. We fill this gap by collecting a real paired deraining dataset through meticulous control of non-rain variations. Our dataset enables paired training and quantitative evaluation for diverse real-world rain phenomena (e.g. rain streaks and rain accumulation). To learn a representation robust to rain phenomena, we propose a deep neural network that reconstructs the underlying scene by minimizing a rain-robust loss between rainy and clean images. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model outperforms the state-of-the-art deraining methods on real rainy images under various conditions. Project website: https://visual.ee.ucla.edu/gt_rain.htm/.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个真实世界的多雨和干净图像对的大规模数据集，以及一种从图像中消除由雨条纹和雨水积累引起的退化的方法。由于不存在用于除雨的真实数据集，当前最先进的方法依赖于合成数据，因此受到 sim2real 域差距的限制；此外，由于缺乏真实的配对数据集，严格的评估仍然是一个挑战。我们通过对非降雨变化的细致控制来收集真实的配对除雨数据集来填补这一空白。我们的数据集可以对各种现实世界的降雨现象（例如雨条纹和降雨积累）进行配对训练和定量评估。为了学习对降雨现象具有鲁棒性的表示，我们提出了一种深度神经网络，通过最小化雨天图像和干净图像之间的抗雨损失来重建底层场景。大量的实验表明，我们的模型在各种条件下的真实雨天图像上都优于最先进的去雨方法。项目网站：https://visual.ee.ucla.edu/gt_rain.htm/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个真实世界降雨与干净图像配对的大型数据集及去雨方法，解决现有方法依赖合成数据导致的域差距问题。
AI.motivation: 当前去雨方法因缺乏真实配对数据集而依赖合成数据，存在仿真到现实的域差距，且难以进行严格评估。
AI.method: 通过精确控制非降雨变量收集真实配对数据集，并设计深度神经网络通过最小化抗雨损失函数重建无雨场景。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型在多种真实降雨条件下优于现有最先进的去雨方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文数据集和方法有效缓解了域差距问题，为真实场景去雨提供了更可靠的解决方案。

authors_text: Ipsita Sahin,Jared Dube,Caio Mucchiani,Konstantinos Karydis,Elena Kokkoni
title: A Bidirectional Fabric-based Pneumatic Actuator for the Infant Shoulder: Design and Comparative Kinematic Analysis
title_zh: 用于婴儿肩部的基于织物的双向气动执行器：设计和比较运动学分析
abstract: This paper presents the design and assessment of a fabric-based soft pneumatic actuator with low pressurization requirements for actuation making it suitable for upper extremity assistive devices for infants. The goal is to support shoulder abduction and adduction without prohibiting motion in other planes or obstructing elbow joint motion. First, the performance of a family of actuator designs with internal air cells is explored via simulation. The actuators are parameterized by the number of cells and their width. Physically viable actuator variants identified through the simulation are further tested via hardware experiments. Two designs are selected and tested on a custom-built physical model based on an infant's body anthropometrics. Comparisons between force exerted to lift the arm, movement smoothness, path length and maximum shoulder angle reached inform which design is better suited for its use as an actuator for pediatric wearable assistive devices, along with other insights for future work.
summary: This paper presents the design and assessment of a fabric-based soft pneumatic actuator with low pressurization requirements for actuation making it suitable for upper extremity assistive devices for infants. The goal is to support shoulder abduction and adduction without prohibiting motion in other planes or obstructing elbow joint motion. First, the performance of a family of actuator designs with internal air cells is explored via simulation. The actuators are parameterized by the number of cells and their width. Physically viable actuator variants identified through the simulation are further tested via hardware experiments. Two designs are selected and tested on a custom-built physical model based on an infant's body anthropometrics. Comparisons between force exerted to lift the arm, movement smoothness, path length and maximum shoulder angle reached inform which design is better suited for its use as an actuator for pediatric wearable assistive devices, along with other insights for future work.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种基于织物的柔软气动执行器的设计和评估，该执行器具有较低的驱动压力要求，使其适用于婴儿上肢辅助装置。目标是支持肩部外展和内收，而不禁止其他平面上的运动或阻碍肘关节运动。首先，通过仿真探讨了一系列具有内部气囊的执行器设计的性能。执行器通过单元数量及其宽度进行参数化。通过模拟确定的物理上可行的执行器变体通过硬件实验进行进一步测试。选择两种设计并在基于婴儿身体人体测量学的定制物理模型上进行测试。通过比较抬起手臂所施加的力、运动平滑度、路径长度和最大肩角，可以了解哪种设计更适合用作儿科可穿戴辅助设备的执行器，以及对未来工作的其他见解。

AI.tldr: 设计并评估一种基于织物的软体气动执行器，用于婴儿肩部辅助设备，支持肩部外展和内收动作。
AI.motivation: 为婴儿上肢辅助设备提供低压、柔性的执行器，避免限制其他平面运动或肘关节活动。
AI.method: 通过仿真探索不同气室数量和宽度的执行器设计，筛选可行方案后进行硬件实验，并在婴儿体型模型上测试两种设计的性能。
AI.result: 确定了更适合儿科可穿戴辅助设备的执行器设计方案，并提供了未来改进的方向。
AI.conclusion: 该执行器满足低压驱动需求，能有效辅助婴儿肩部运动，为软体机器人设计提供参考。

ai_content.tldr: 设计并评估一种基于织物的软体气动执行器，用于婴儿肩部辅助设备，支持肩部外展和内收动作。

Comparisons between force exerted to lift the arm, movement smoothness, path length and maximum shoulder angle reached inform which design is better suited for its use as an actuator for pediatric wearable assistive devices, along with other insights for future work. 本文介绍了一种基于织物的柔软气动执行器的设计和评估，该执行器具有较低的驱动压力要求，使其适用于婴儿上肢辅助装置。目标是支持肩部外展和内收，而不禁止其他平面上的运动或阻碍肘关节运动。首先，通过仿真探讨了一系列具有内部气囊的执行器设计的性能。执行器通过单元数量及其宽度进行参数化。通过模拟确定的物理上可行的执行器变体通过硬件实验进行进一步测试。选择两种设计并在基于婴儿身体人体测量学的定制物理模型上进行测试。通过比较抬起手臂所施加的力、运动平滑度、路径长度和最大肩角，可以了解哪种设计更适合用作儿科可穿戴辅助设备的执行器，以及对未来工作的其他见解。 设计并评估一种基于织物的软体气动执行器，用于婴儿肩部辅助设备，支持肩部外展和内收动作。 Ipsita Sahin,Jared Dube,Caio Mucchiani,Konstantinos Karydis,Elena Kokkoni cs.RO

authors_text: Jinglin Chen,Aditya Modi,Akshay Krishnamurthy,Nan Jiang,Alekh Agarwal
title: On the Statistical Efficiency of Reward-Free Exploration in Non-Linear RL
title_zh: 非线性强化学习中无奖励探索的统计效率
abstract: We study reward-free reinforcement learning (RL) under general non-linear function approximation, and establish sample efficiency and hardness results under various standard structural assumptions. On the positive side, we propose the RFOLIVE (Reward-Free OLIVE) algorithm for sample-efficient reward-free exploration under minimal structural assumptions, which covers the previously studied settings of linear MDPs (Jin et al., 2020b), linear completeness (Zanette et al., 2020b) and low-rank MDPs with unknown representation (Modi et al., 2021). Our analyses indicate that the explorability or reachability assumptions, previously made for the latter two settings, are not necessary statistically for reward-free exploration. On the negative side, we provide a statistical hardness result for both reward-free and reward-aware exploration under linear completeness assumptions when the underlying features are unknown, showing an exponential separation between low-rank and linear completeness settings.
summary: We study reward-free reinforcement learning (RL) under general non-linear function approximation, and establish sample efficiency and hardness results under various standard structural assumptions. On the positive side, we propose the RFOLIVE (Reward-Free OLIVE) algorithm for sample-efficient reward-free exploration under minimal structural assumptions, which covers the previously studied settings of linear MDPs (Jin et al., 2020b), linear completeness (Zanette et al., 2020b) and low-rank MDPs with unknown representation (Modi et al., 2021). Our analyses indicate that the explorability or reachability assumptions, previously made for the latter two settings, are not necessary statistically for reward-free exploration. On the negative side, we provide a statistical hardness result for both reward-free and reward-aware exploration under linear completeness assumptions when the underlying features are unknown, showing an exponential separation between low-rank and linear completeness settings.
abstract_zh: 我们研究一般非线性函数近似下的无奖励强化学习（RL），并在各种标准结构假设下建立样本效率和硬度结果。从积极的一面来看，我们提出了 RFOLIVE（无奖励 OLIVE）算法，用于在最小结构假设下进行样本有效的无奖励探索，该算法涵盖了先前研究的线性 MDP（Jin 等人，2020b）、线性完整性（Zanette 等人，2020b）和具有未知表示的低秩 MDP（Modi 等人，2021）的设置。我们的分析表明，先前针对后两种设置所做的可探索性或可达性假设对于无奖励探索来说在统计上并不是必需的。消极的一面是，当底层特征未知时，我们在线性完整性假设下为无奖励和有奖励感知的探索提供了统计硬度结果，显示低秩和线性完整性设置之间的指数分离。

AI.tldr: 本文研究非线性强化学习中无奖励探索的统计效率，提出RFOLIVE算法并分析其样本效率与困难性。
AI.motivation: 现有无奖励探索方法依赖强结构假设（如可探索性），而实际场景中这些假设可能不成立，需更通用且高效的算法。
AI.method: 设计RFOLIVE算法，在最小结构假设下实现样本高效探索，覆盖线性MDP、低秩MDP等场景，并通过理论分析验证假设必要性。
AI.result: 证明可探索性假设非必要，但在线性完备性假设下存在统计困难，低秩与线性完备性设置存在指数级性能差异。
AI.conclusion: RFOLIVE算法在更弱假设下有效，但线性完备性场景需警惕统计困难，未来需探索更鲁棒的算法框架。

authors_text: Tara Roberson,Stephen Bornstein,Rain Liivoja,Simon Ng,Jason Scholz,S. Kate Devitt
title: A method for ethical AI in Defence: A case study on developing trustworthy autonomous systems
title_zh: 国防中道德人工智能的方法：开发值得信赖的自主系统的案例研究
comment: 10 pages, 2 tables, pre-print approved for publication in the Special Issue Reflections on Responsible Research and Innovation for Trustworthy Autonomous Systems in the Journal of Responsible Technology
comments: 10 pages, 2 tables, pre-print approved for publication in the Special Issue Reflections on Responsible Research and Innovation for Trustworthy Autonomous Systems in the Journal of Responsible Technology
abstract: What does it mean to be responsible and responsive when developing and deploying trusted autonomous systems in Defence? In this short reflective article, we describe a case study of building a trusted autonomous system - Athena AI - within an industry-led, government-funded project with diverse collaborators and stakeholders. Using this case study, we draw out lessons on the value and impact of embedding responsible research and innovation-aligned, ethics-by-design approaches and principles throughout the development of technology at high translation readiness levels.
summary: What does it mean to be responsible and responsive when developing and deploying trusted autonomous systems in Defence? In this short reflective article, we describe a case study of building a trusted autonomous system - Athena AI - within an industry-led, government-funded project with diverse collaborators and stakeholders. Using this case study, we draw out lessons on the value and impact of embedding responsible research and innovation-aligned, ethics-by-design approaches and principles throughout the development of technology at high translation readiness levels.
abstract_zh: 在国防领域开发和部署可信自主系统时，负责任和响应意味着什么？在这篇简短的反思性文章中，我们描述了一个在行业主导、政府资助的项目中与不同合作者和利益相关者一起构建可信自治系统 - Athena AI 的案例研究。通过这个案例研究，我们总结了在高翻译准备水平的技术开发过程中嵌入负责任的研究和创新、道德设计方法和原则的价值和影响的经验教训。

AI.tldr: 探讨在国防领域开发可信自主系统的伦理方法，通过Athena AI案例研究，总结伦理设计原则的应用价值。
AI.motivation: 国防领域AI系统需兼顾伦理与效能，但现有方法缺乏实际案例支持，需通过具体案例验证伦理设计的有效性。
AI.method: 采用行业主导、政府资助的多方合作项目中的Athena AI作为案例，分析伦理设计原则在技术开发各阶段的实施过程。
AI.result: 验证了伦理设计原则在提升系统可信度和应对复杂挑战中的有效性，为高成熟度技术开发提供参考。
AI.conclusion: 伦理设计需贯穿技术开发全过程，多方协作和持续评估是确保AI系统可信的关键，未来需在更多项目中推广此类方法。

ai_content.tldr: 探讨在国防领域开发可信自主系统的伦理方法，通过Athena AI案例研究，总结伦理设计原则的应用价值。

authors_text: Tribhi Kathuria,Yifan Xu,Theodor Chakhachiro,X. Jessie Yang,Maani Ghaffari
title: Providers-Clients-Robots: Framework for spatial-semantic planning for shared understanding in human-robot interaction
title_zh: 提供商-客户-机器人：人机交互中共享理解的空间语义规划框架
comment: 8 pages, 8 figures, Accepted for IEEE Ro-MAN 2022
comments: 8 pages, 8 figures, Accepted for IEEE Ro-MAN 2022
abstract: This paper develops a novel framework called Providers-Clients-Robots (PCR), applicable to socially assistive robots that support research on shared understanding in human-robot interactions. Providers, Clients, and Robots share an actionable and intuitive representation of the environment to create plans that best satisfy the combined needs of all parties. The plans are formed via interaction between the Client and the Robot based on a previously built multi-modal navigation graph. The explainable environmental representation in the form of a navigation graph is constructed collaboratively between Providers and Robots prior to interaction with Clients. We develop a realization of the proposed framework to create a spatial-semantic representation of an indoor environment autonomously. Moreover, we develop a planner that takes in constraints from Providers and Clients of the establishment and dynamically plans a sequence of visits to each area of interest. Evaluations show that the proposed realization of the PCR framework can successfully make plans while satisfying the specified time budget and sequence constraints and outperforming the greedy baseline.
summary: This paper develops a novel framework called Providers-Clients-Robots (PCR), applicable to socially assistive robots that support research on shared understanding in human-robot interactions. Providers, Clients, and Robots share an actionable and intuitive representation of the environment to create plans that best satisfy the combined needs of all parties. The plans are formed via interaction between the Client and the Robot based on a previously built multi-modal navigation graph. The explainable environmental representation in the form of a navigation graph is constructed collaboratively between Providers and Robots prior to interaction with Clients. We develop a realization of the proposed framework to create a spatial-semantic representation of an indoor environment autonomously. Moreover, we develop a planner that takes in constraints from Providers and Clients of the establishment and dynamically plans a sequence of visits to each area of interest. Evaluations show that the proposed realization of the PCR framework can successfully make plans while satisfying the specified time budget and sequence constraints and outperforming the greedy baseline.
abstract_zh: 本文开发了一种称为提供商-客户端-机器人（PCR）的新颖框架，适用于社交辅助机器人，支持人机交互中共享理解的研究。提供商、客户和机器人共享可操作且直观的环境表示，以创建最能满足各方综合需求的计划。这些计划是通过客户和机器人之间基于先前构建的多模式导航图的交互而形成的。在与客户端交互之前，提供者和机器人之间以导航图的形式协作构建可解释的环境表示。我们开发了所提出框架的实现，以自主创建室内环境的空间语义表示。此外，我们开发了一个规划器，该规划器会考虑来自机构的提供商和客户的约束，并动态规划对每个感兴趣区域的访问顺序。评估表明，所提出的PCR框架的实现可以成功地制定计划，同时满足指定的时间预算和序列约束，并且优于贪婪基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Providers-Clients-Robots（PCR）的框架，用于人机交互中的空间语义规划，通过共享环境表示实现多方需求的协同满足。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在人机交互中难以有效实现共享理解与动态规划，需构建多方协作的框架以满足复杂环境下的任务需求。
AI.method: 通过Providers与Robots协作构建多模态导航图，Clients与Robots基于该图进行交互式规划，并开发考虑时间与序列约束的动态规划器。
AI.result: 实验表明PCR框架能有效生成满足时间预算和序列约束的路径规划，性能优于贪婪算法基线。
AI.conclusion: PCR框架为社会辅助机器人提供了可解释、协作式的空间语义规划方案，验证了其在复杂人机交互场景中的有效性。

search_text: Providers-Clients-Robots: Framework for spatial-semantic planning for shared understanding in human-robot interaction 提供商-客户-机器人：人机交互中共享理解的空间语义规划框架 This paper develops a novel framework called Providers-Clients-Robots (PCR), applicable to socially assistive robots that support research on shared understanding in human-robot interactions. Providers, Clients, and Robots share an actionable and intuitive representation of the environment to create plans that best satisfy the combined needs of all parties. The plans are formed via interaction between the Client and the Robot based on a previously built multi-modal navigation graph. The explainable environmental representation in the form of a navigation graph is constructed collaboratively between Providers and Robots prior to interaction with Clients. We develop a realization of the proposed framework to create a spatial-semantic representation of an indoor environment autonomously. Moreover, we develop a planner that takes in constraints from Providers and Clients of the establishment and dynamically plans a sequence of visits to each area of interest. Evaluations show that the proposed realization of the PCR framework can successfully make plans while satisfying the specified time budget and sequence constraints and outperforming the greedy baseline. 本文开发了一种称为提供商-客户端-机器人（PCR）的新颖框架，适用于社交辅助机器人，支持人机交互中共享理解的研究。提供商、客户和机器人共享可操作且直观的环境表示，以创建最能满足各方综合需求的计划。这些计划是通过客户和机器人之间基于先前构建的多模式导航图的交互而形成的。在与客户端交互之前，提供者和机器人之间以导航图的形式协作构建可解释的环境表示。我们开发了所提出框架的实现，以自主创建室内环境的空间语义表示。此外，我们开发了一个规划器，该规划器会考虑来自机构的提供商和客户的约束，并动态规划对每个感兴趣区域的访问顺序。评估表明，所提出的PCR框架的实现可以成功地制定计划，同时满足指定的时间预算和序列约束，并且优于贪婪基线。 本文提出一种名为Providers-Clients-Robots（PCR）的框架，用于人机交互中的空间语义规划，通过共享环境表示实现多方需求的协同满足。 Tribhi Kathuria,Yifan Xu,Theodor Chakhachiro,X. Jessie Yang,Maani Ghaffari cs.RO

authors_text: Cristian J. Vaca-Rubio,Roberto Pereira,Xavier Mestre,David Gregoratti,Zheng-Hua Tan,Elisabeth de Carvalho,Petar Popovski
title: Floor Map Reconstruction Through Radio Sensing and Learning By a Large Intelligent Surface
title_zh: 通过大型智能表面的无线电传感和学习来重建楼层地图
abstract: Environmental scene reconstruction is of great interest for autonomous robotic applications, since an accurate representation of the environment is necessary to ensure safe interaction with robots. Equally important, it is also vital to ensure reliable communication between the robot and its controller. Large Intelligent Surface (LIS) is a technology that has been extensively studied due to its communication capabilities. Moreover, due to the number of antenna elements, these surfaces arise as a powerful solution to radio sensing. This paper presents a novel method to translate radio environmental maps obtained at the LIS to floor plans of the indoor environment built of scatterers spread along its area. The usage of a Least Squares (LS) based method, U-Net (UN) and conditional Generative Adversarial Networks (cGANs) were leveraged to perform this task. We show that the floor plan can be correctly reconstructed using both local and global measurements.
summary: Environmental scene reconstruction is of great interest for autonomous robotic applications, since an accurate representation of the environment is necessary to ensure safe interaction with robots. Equally important, it is also vital to ensure reliable communication between the robot and its controller. Large Intelligent Surface (LIS) is a technology that has been extensively studied due to its communication capabilities. Moreover, due to the number of antenna elements, these surfaces arise as a powerful solution to radio sensing. This paper presents a novel method to translate radio environmental maps obtained at the LIS to floor plans of the indoor environment built of scatterers spread along its area. The usage of a Least Squares (LS) based method, U-Net (UN) and conditional Generative Adversarial Networks (cGANs) were leveraged to perform this task. We show that the floor plan can be correctly reconstructed using both local and global measurements.
abstract_zh: 环境场景重建对于自主机器人应用非常重要，因为准确的环境表示对于确保与机器人的安全交互是必要的。同样重要的是，确保机器人与其控制器之间的可靠通信也至关重要。大型智能表面（LIS）是一项因其通信能力而被广泛研究的技术。此外，由于天线元件的数量，这些表面成为无线电传感的强大解决方案。本文提出了一种新方法，可将 LIS 获得的无线电环境地图转换为由沿其区域分布的散射体构建的室内环境平面图。利用基于最小二乘法 (LS) 的方法、U-Net (UN) 和条件生成对抗网络 (cGAN) 来执行此任务。我们表明，可以使用局部和全局测量来正确重建平面图。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用大型智能表面（LIS）的射频感知数据，通过机器学习方法重建室内环境的楼层平面图。
AI.motivation: 自主机器人需要精确的环境模型以确保安全交互，同时需保持可靠通信。LIS兼具通信与感知能力，适合用于环境重建。
AI.method: 结合最小二乘法（LS）、U-Net和条件生成对抗网络（cGANs），将LIS获取的射频环境图转换为楼层平面图，利用局部与全局测量数据进行训练。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法能准确重建楼层平面，证明局部与全局测量均有效。
AI.conclusion: LIS结合机器学习可高效实现楼层重建，为机器人环境感知与通信提供新方案。

authors_text: Marcell Stippinger,Dávid Hanák,Marcell T. Kurbucz,Gergely Hanczár,Olivér M. Törteli,Zoltán Somogyvári
title: BiometricBlender: Ultra-high dimensional, multi-class synthetic data generator to imitate biometric feature space
title_zh: BiometricBlender：超高维、多类合成数据生成器，用于模仿生物特征空间
comment: DISCLAIMER: This is a preprint article. A final peer reviewed article has now been published in SoftwareX. DOI: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.softx.2023.101366
comments: DISCLAIMER: This is a preprint article. A final peer reviewed article has now been published in SoftwareX. DOI: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.softx.2023.101366
abstract: The lack of freely available (real-life or synthetic) high or ultra-high dimensional, multi-class datasets may hamper the rapidly growing research on feature screening, especially in the field of biometrics, where the usage of such datasets is common. This paper reports a Python package called BiometricBlender, which is an ultra-high dimensional, multi-class synthetic data generator to benchmark a wide range of feature screening methods. During the data generation process, the overall usefulness and the intercorrelations of blended features can be controlled by the user, thus the synthetic feature space is able to imitate the key properties of a real biometric dataset.
summary: The lack of freely available (real-life or synthetic) high or ultra-high dimensional, multi-class datasets may hamper the rapidly growing research on feature screening, especially in the field of biometrics, where the usage of such datasets is common. This paper reports a Python package called BiometricBlender, which is an ultra-high dimensional, multi-class synthetic data generator to benchmark a wide range of feature screening methods. During the data generation process, the overall usefulness and the intercorrelations of blended features can be controlled by the user, thus the synthetic feature space is able to imitate the key properties of a real biometric dataset.
abstract_zh: 缺乏免费提供的（现实生活或合成的）高维或超高维、多类数据集可能会阻碍特征筛选研究的快速发展，特别是在生物识别领域，此类数据集的使用很常见。本文报道了一个名为 BiometricBlender 的 Python 包，它是一个超高维、多类合成数据生成器，用于对各种特征筛选方法进行基准测试。在数据生成过程中，用户可以控制混合特征的整体有用性和相互关系，因此合成特征空间能够模仿真实生物特征数据集的关键属性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为BiometricBlender的Python工具包，用于生成超高维多类合成数据以模拟生物特征数据集的特性。
AI.motivation: 现有公开的高维或多类生物特征数据集不足，限制了特征筛选方法的研究与验证需求。
AI.method: 开发Python包BiometricBlender，通过用户可控参数生成具有特定相关性和有效性的超高维合成数据。
AI.result: 生成的合成数据集成功复现了真实生物特征数据的关键属性，为特征筛选方法提供了基准测试平台。
AI.conclusion: BiometricBlender有效解决了生物特征领域数据集稀缺问题，推动了特征筛选算法的评估与优化研究。

title: Don't Forget About Pronouns: Removing Gender Bias in Language Models Without Losing Factual Gender Information
title_zh: 不要忘记代词：在不丢失实际性别信息的情况下消除语言模型中的性别偏见
abstract: The representations in large language models contain multiple types of gender information. We focus on two types of such signals in English texts: factual gender information, which is a grammatical or semantic property, and gender bias, which is the correlation between a word and specific gender. We can disentangle the model's embeddings and identify components encoding both types of information with probing. We aim to diminish the stereotypical bias in the representations while preserving the factual gender signal. Our filtering method shows that it is possible to decrease the bias of gender-neutral profession names without significant deterioration of language modeling capabilities. The findings can be applied to language generation to mitigate reliance on stereotypes while preserving gender agreement in coreferences.
summary: The representations in large language models contain multiple types of gender information. We focus on two types of such signals in English texts: factual gender information, which is a grammatical or semantic property, and gender bias, which is the correlation between a word and specific gender. We can disentangle the model's embeddings and identify components encoding both types of information with probing. We aim to diminish the stereotypical bias in the representations while preserving the factual gender signal. Our filtering method shows that it is possible to decrease the bias of gender-neutral profession names without significant deterioration of language modeling capabilities. The findings can be applied to language generation to mitigate reliance on stereotypes while preserving gender agreement in coreferences.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型中的表示包含多种类型的性别信息。我们关注英语文本中的两种类型的此类信号：事实性别信息（语法或语义属性）和性别偏见（单词与特定性别之间的相关性）。我们可以解开模型的嵌入，并通过探测来识别编码两种类型信息的组件。我们的目标是减少表述中的刻板偏见，同时保留事实的性别信号。我们的过滤方法表明，可以减少性别中立的职业名称的偏见，而不会显着降低语言建模能力。研究结果可应用于语言生成，以减轻对刻板印象的依赖，同时保持共指中的性别一致性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在去除语言模型中的性别偏见，同时保留事实性性别信息。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型中的性别信息包含事实性性别和性别偏见，需在消除偏见的同时保持语法和语义中的性别特征。
AI.method: 通过探测模型嵌入层，分离事实性性别信息与性别偏见，并采用过滤方法降低偏见。
AI.result: 成功减少性别中立职业名称的偏见，且未显著影响语言建模能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可在生成语言时减少对刻板印象的依赖，同时保持代词的一致性。

ai_content_json.method: 通过探测模型嵌入层，分离事实性性别信息与性别偏见，并采用过滤方法降低偏见。
ai_content_json.result: 成功减少性别中立职业名称的偏见，且未显著影响语言建模能力。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法可在生成语言时减少对刻板印象的依赖，同时保持代词的一致性。
