search_text: Don't Forget About Pronouns: Removing Gender Bias in Language Models Without Losing Factual Gender Information 不要忘记代词：在不丢失实际性别信息的情况下消除语言模型中的性别偏见 The representations in large language models contain multiple types of gender information. We focus on two types of such signals in English texts: factual gender information, which is a grammatical or semantic property, and gender bias, which is the correlation between a word and specific gender. We can disentangle the model's embeddings and identify components encoding both types of information with probing. We aim to diminish the stereotypical bias in the representations while preserving the factual gender signal. Our filtering method shows that it is possible to decrease the bias of gender-neutral profession names without significant deterioration of language modeling capabilities. The findings can be applied to language generation to mitigate reliance on stereotypes while preserving gender agreement in coreferences. 大型语言模型中的表示包含多种类型的性别信息。我们关注英语文本中的两种类型的此类信号：事实性别信息（语法或语义属性）和性别偏见（单词与特定性别之间的相关性）。我们可以解开模型的嵌入，并通过探测来识别编码两种类型信息的组件。我们的目标是减少表述中的刻板偏见，同时保留事实的性别信号。我们的过滤方法表明，可以减少性别中立的职业名称的偏见，而不会显着降低语言建模能力。研究结果可应用于语言生成，以减轻对刻板印象的依赖，同时保持共指中的性别一致性。 本文旨在去除语言模型中的性别偏见，同时保留事实性性别信息。 Tomasz Limisiewicz,David Mareček cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: David Von Dollen,Sheir Yarkoni,Daniel Weimer,Florian Neukart,Thomas Bäck
title: Quantum-Enhanced Selection Operators for Evolutionary Algorithms
title_zh: 进化算法的量子增强选择算子
abstract: Genetic algorithms have unique properties which are useful when applied to black box optimization. Using selection, crossover, and mutation operators, candidate solutions may be obtained without the need to calculate a gradient. In this work, we study results obtained from using quantum-enhanced operators within the selection mechanism of a genetic algorithm. Our approach frames the selection process as a minimization of a binary quadratic model with which we encode fitness and distance between members of a population, and we leverage a quantum annealing system to sample low energy solutions for the selection mechanism. We benchmark these quantum-enhanced algorithms against classical algorithms over various black-box objective functions, including the OneMax function, and functions from the IOHProfiler library for black-box optimization. We observe a performance gain in average number of generations to convergence for the quantum-enhanced elitist selection operator in comparison to classical on the OneMax function. We also find that the quantum-enhanced selection operator with non-elitist selection outperform benchmarks on functions with fitness perturbation from the IOHProfiler library. Additionally, we find that in the case of elitist selection, the quantum-enhanced operators outperform classical benchmarks on functions with varying degrees of dummy variables and neutrality.
summary: Genetic algorithms have unique properties which are useful when applied to black box optimization. Using selection, crossover, and mutation operators, candidate solutions may be obtained without the need to calculate a gradient. In this work, we study results obtained from using quantum-enhanced operators within the selection mechanism of a genetic algorithm. Our approach frames the selection process as a minimization of a binary quadratic model with which we encode fitness and distance between members of a population, and we leverage a quantum annealing system to sample low energy solutions for the selection mechanism. We benchmark these quantum-enhanced algorithms against classical algorithms over various black-box objective functions, including the OneMax function, and functions from the IOHProfiler library for black-box optimization. We observe a performance gain in average number of generations to convergence for the quantum-enhanced elitist selection operator in comparison to classical on the OneMax function. We also find that the quantum-enhanced selection operator with non-elitist selection outperform benchmarks on functions with fitness perturbation from the IOHProfiler library. Additionally, we find that in the case of elitist selection, the quantum-enhanced operators outperform classical benchmarks on functions with varying degrees of dummy variables and neutrality.
abstract_zh: 遗传算法具有独特的属性，在应用于黑盒优化时非常有用。使用选择、交叉和变异算子，无需计算梯度即可获得候选解。在这项工作中，我们研究了在遗传算法的选择机制中使用量子增强算子获得的结果。我们的方法将选择过程构建为二元二次模型的最小化，我们用该模型对种群成员之间的适应度和距离进行编码，并利用量子退火系统对选择机制的低能量解决方案进行采样。我们通过各种黑盒目标函数（包括 OneMax 函数以及 IOHProfiler 库中用于黑盒优化的函数）对这些量子增强算法与经典算法进行基准测试。我们观察到，与 OneMax 函数上的经典算子相比，量子增强精英选择算子的平均收敛代数有性能提升。我们还发现，具有非精英选择的量子增强选择算子的性能优于 IOHProfiler 库中具有适应度扰动的函数的基准。此外，我们发现，在精英选择的情况下，量子增强算子在具有不同程度的虚拟变量和中性的函数上优于经典基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将量子增强选择算子应用于进化算法，通过量子退火系统优化遗传算法的选择机制以提升黑箱优化性能。
AI.motivation: 传统遗传算法在黑箱优化中依赖经典选择算子，难以高效处理复杂函数特性如扰动和冗余变量，量子计算可能提供新优化路径。
AI.method: 将选择过程建模为二元二次优化问题，利用量子退火系统采样低能解，并在OneMax函数及IOHProfiler库函数上与经典算法对比测试。
AI.result: 量子增强精英选择算子在OneMax函数上收敛代数更优，非精英选择在扰动函数上表现更好，且在冗余变量场景下超越经典基准。
AI.conclusion: 量子增强选择算子在特定黑箱优化问题中展现性能优势，但需进一步研究其普适性与实际应用潜力。

title: Deep Metric Color Embeddings for Splicing Localization in Severely Degraded Images
title_zh: 用于严重退化图像中拼接定位的深度量颜色嵌入
abstract: One common task in image forensics is to detect spliced images, where multiple source images are composed to one output image. Most of the currently best performing splicing detectors leverage high-frequency artifacts. However, after an image underwent strong compression, most of the high frequency artifacts are not available anymore. In this work, we explore an alternative approach to splicing detection, which is potentially better suited for images in-the-wild, subject to strong compression and downsampling. Our proposal is to model the color formation of an image. The color formation largely depends on variations at the scale of scene objects, and is hence much less dependent on high-frequency artifacts. We learn a deep metric space that is on one hand sensitive to illumination color and camera white-point estimation, but on the other hand insensitive to variations in object color. Large distances in the embedding space indicate that two image regions either stem from different scenes or different cameras. In our evaluation, we show that the proposed embedding space outperforms the state of the art on images that have been subject to strong compression and downsampling. We confirm in two further experiments the dual nature of the metric space, namely to both characterize the acquisition camera and the scene illuminant color. As such, this work resides at the intersection of physics-based and statistical forensics with benefits from both sides.
summary: One common task in image forensics is to detect spliced images, where multiple source images are composed to one output image. Most of the currently best performing splicing detectors leverage high-frequency artifacts. However, after an image underwent strong compression, most of the high frequency artifacts are not available anymore. In this work, we explore an alternative approach to splicing detection, which is potentially better suited for images in-the-wild, subject to strong compression and downsampling. Our proposal is to model the color formation of an image. The color formation largely depends on variations at the scale of scene objects, and is hence much less dependent on high-frequency artifacts. We learn a deep metric space that is on one hand sensitive to illumination color and camera white-point estimation, but on the other hand insensitive to variations in object color. Large distances in the embedding space indicate that two image regions either stem from different scenes or different cameras. In our evaluation, we show that the proposed embedding space outperforms the state of the art on images that have been subject to strong compression and downsampling. We confirm in two further experiments the dual nature of the metric space, namely to both characterize the acquisition camera and the scene illuminant color. As such, this work resides at the intersection of physics-based and statistical forensics with benefits from both sides.
abstract_zh: 图像取证中的一项常见任务是检测拼接图像，其中多个源图像组合成一个输出图像。目前大多数性能最佳的拼接检测器都利用高频伪影。然而，在图像经过强压缩后，大多数高频伪影将不再可用。在这项工作中，我们探索了一种拼接检测的替代方法，该方法可能更适合经过强压缩和下采样的野外图像。我们的建议是对图像的颜色形成进行建模。颜色形成很大程度上取决于场景对象尺度的变化，因此对高频伪影的依赖性要小得多。我们学习一个深度度量空间，它一方面对照明颜色和相机白点估计敏感，但另一方面对物体颜色的变化不敏感。嵌入空间中的大距离表明两个图像区域要么来自不同的场景，要么来自不同的相机。在我们的评估中，我们表明所提出的嵌入空间在经过强压缩和下采样的图像上优于现有技术。我们在两个进一步的实验中确认了度量空间的双重性质，即同时表征采集相机和场景光源颜色。因此，这项工作处于基于物理和统计取证的交叉点，双方都受益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度度量颜色嵌入的方法，用于检测经过严重压缩和下采样的拼接图像。
AI.motivation: 现有拼接检测方法依赖高频特征，但强压缩会破坏这些特征。本文旨在寻找一种不依赖高频信息、更适合真实场景中退化图像的检测方法。
AI.method: 通过建模图像颜色形成机制，学习一个对光照色和相机白平衡敏感但对物体颜色变化不敏感的深度度量空间，利用嵌入空间中的距离差异判断图像区域是否来自不同场景或相机。
AI.result: 在强压缩和下采样图像上优于现有方法，实验验证了该度量空间对相机参数和场景光照的双重表征能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法结合物理特性和统计分析，为真实场景下的图像取证提供了鲁棒解决方案。

In our evaluation, we show that the proposed embedding space outperforms the state of the art on images that have been subject to strong compression and downsampling. We confirm in two further experiments the dual nature of the metric space, namely to both characterize the acquisition camera and the scene illuminant color. As such, this work resides at the intersection of physics-based and statistical forensics with benefits from both sides. 图像取证中的一项常见任务是检测拼接图像，其中多个源图像组合成一个输出图像。目前大多数性能最佳的拼接检测器都利用高频伪影。然而，在图像经过强压缩后，大多数高频伪影将不再可用。在这项工作中，我们探索了一种拼接检测的替代方法，该方法可能更适合经过强压缩和下采样的野外图像。我们的建议是对图像的颜色形成进行建模。颜色形成很大程度上取决于场景对象尺度的变化，因此对高频伪影的依赖性要小得多。我们学习一个深度度量空间，它一方面对照明颜色和相机白点估计敏感，但另一方面对物体颜色的变化不敏感。嵌入空间中的大距离表明两个图像区域要么来自不同的场景，要么来自不同的相机。在我们的评估中，我们表明所提出的嵌入空间在经过强压缩和下采样的图像上优于现有技术。我们在两个进一步的实验中确认了度量空间的双重性质，即同时表征采集相机和场景光源颜色。因此，这项工作处于基于物理和统计取证的交叉点，双方都受益。 本文提出一种基于深度度量颜色嵌入的方法，用于检测经过严重压缩和下采样的拼接图像。 Benjamin Hadwiger,Christian Riess cs.CV,cs.MM

title: Imitate then Transcend: Multi-Agent Optimal Execution with Dual-Window Denoise PPO
title_zh: 模仿然后超越：使用双窗口降噪 PPO 的多智能体最优执行
abstract: A novel framework for solving the optimal execution and placement problems using reinforcement learning (RL) with imitation was proposed. The RL agents trained from the proposed framework consistently outperformed the industry benchmark time-weighted average price (TWAP) strategy in execution cost and showed great generalization across out-of-sample trading dates and tickers. The impressive performance was achieved from three aspects. First, our RL network architecture called Dual-window Denoise PPO enabled efficient learning in a noisy market environment. Second, a reward scheme with imitation learning was designed, and a comprehensive set of market features was studied. Third, our flexible action formulation allowed the RL agent to tackle optimal execution and placement collectively resulting in better performance than solving individual problems separately. The RL agent's performance was evaluated in our multi-agent realistic historical limit order book simulator in which price impact was accurately assessed. In addition, ablation studies were also performed, confirming the superiority of our framework.
summary: A novel framework for solving the optimal execution and placement problems using reinforcement learning (RL) with imitation was proposed. The RL agents trained from the proposed framework consistently outperformed the industry benchmark time-weighted average price (TWAP) strategy in execution cost and showed great generalization across out-of-sample trading dates and tickers. The impressive performance was achieved from three aspects. First, our RL network architecture called Dual-window Denoise PPO enabled efficient learning in a noisy market environment. Second, a reward scheme with imitation learning was designed, and a comprehensive set of market features was studied. Third, our flexible action formulation allowed the RL agent to tackle optimal execution and placement collectively resulting in better performance than solving individual problems separately. The RL agent's performance was evaluated in our multi-agent realistic historical limit order book simulator in which price impact was accurately assessed. In addition, ablation studies were also performed, confirming the superiority of our framework.
abstract_zh: 提出了一种使用强化学习（RL）和模仿来解决最优执行和布局问题的新框架。根据所提出的框架训练的 RL 代理在执行成本方面始终优于行业基准时间加权平均价格 (TWAP) 策略，并且在样本外交易日期和代码中表现出良好的泛化能力。令人瞩目的业绩是从三个方面取得的。首先，我们的 RL 网络架构称为双窗口降噪 PPO，可以在嘈杂的市场环境中实现高效学习。其次，设计了模仿学习的奖励方案，并研究了全面的市场特征。第三，我们灵活的行动制定使强化学习代理能够共同解决最佳执行和布局问题，从而比单独解决单个问题获得更好的性能。 RL 代理的性能在我们的多代理现实历史限价订单簿模拟器中进行了评估，其中价格影响得到了准确评估。此外，还进行了消融研究，证实了我们框架的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模仿学习的强化学习框架，用于解决多代理最优执行问题，通过改进网络架构和奖励机制，显著降低交易成本。
AI.motivation: 传统交易策略如TWAP在复杂市场环境中表现有限，而现有强化学习方法在处理噪声数据和动态市场特征时存在不足，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计Dual-window Denoise PPO网络架构以应对市场噪声，结合模仿学习奖励机制，引入全面的市场特征集，并采用联合优化动作空间解决执行与挂单问题。
AI.result: 实验表明，该框架在样本外日期和不同股票上均优于TWAP策略，消融实验证实了各模块的有效性，验证了框架的优越性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过创新网络结构、奖励机制和动作空间设计，本文提出的框架在多代理交易场景中实现了更低的执行成本和更强的市场适应性，为高频交易提供了新思路。

authors_text: Shengkang Chen,Vidullan Surendran,Alan R. Wagner,Jason Borenstein,Ronald C. Arkin
title: Toward Ethical Robotic Behavior in Human-Robot Interaction Scenarios
title_zh: 人机交互场景中的机器人行为道德
comment: in TRAITS Workshop Proceedings (arXiv:2206.08270) held in conjunction with Companion of the 2022 ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human-Robot Interaction, March 2022, Pages 1284-1286
comments: in TRAITS Workshop Proceedings (arXiv:2206.08270) held in conjunction with Companion of the 2022 ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human-Robot Interaction, March 2022, Pages 1284-1286
abstract: This paper describes current progress on developing an ethical architecture for robots that are designed to follow human ethical decision-making processes. We surveyed both regular adults (folks) and ethics experts (experts) on what they consider to be ethical behavior in two specific scenarios: pill-sorting with an older adult and game playing with a child. A key goal of the surveys is to better understand human ethical decision-making. In the first survey, folk responses were based on the subject's ethical choices ("folk morality"); in the second survey, expert responses were based on the expert's application of different formal ethical frameworks to each scenario. We observed that most of the formal ethical frameworks we included in the survey (Utilitarianism, Kantian Ethics, Ethics of Care and Virtue Ethics) and "folk morality" were conservative toward deception in the high-risk task with an older adult when both the adult and the child had significant performance deficiencies.
summary: This paper describes current progress on developing an ethical architecture for robots that are designed to follow human ethical decision-making processes. We surveyed both regular adults (folks) and ethics experts (experts) on what they consider to be ethical behavior in two specific scenarios: pill-sorting with an older adult and game playing with a child. A key goal of the surveys is to better understand human ethical decision-making. In the first survey, folk responses were based on the subject's ethical choices ("folk morality"); in the second survey, expert responses were based on the expert's application of different formal ethical frameworks to each scenario. We observed that most of the formal ethical frameworks we included in the survey (Utilitarianism, Kantian Ethics, Ethics of Care and Virtue Ethics) and "folk morality" were conservative toward deception in the high-risk task with an older adult when both the adult and the child had significant performance deficiencies.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了为遵循人类道德决策过程而设计的机器人道德架构的当前进展。我们对普通成年人（民间）和道德专家（专家）进行了调查，了解他们认为在两种特定情况下的道德行为：与老年人一起分药和与孩子一起玩游戏。调查的一个关键目标是更好地了解人类道德决策。在第一项调查中，民间反应是基于受试者的道德选择（“民间道德”）；在第二次调查中，专家的回答基于专家对每种情况应用不同的正式道德框架。我们观察到，调查中纳入的大多数正式道德框架（功利主义、康德伦理学、关怀伦理学和美德伦理学）和“民间道德”对于在老年人和儿童都存在显着表现缺陷的高风险任务中的欺骗行为持保守态度。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发一种使机器人遵循人类伦理决策过程的伦理架构，并通过调查分析人类在特定场景下的伦理判断。
AI.motivation: 确保机器人在与人类交互时表现出符合伦理的行为，以提升安全性和社会接受度。
AI.method: 通过调查普通成年人（民众）和伦理专家对两种场景（为老年人分药、与儿童玩游戏）中伦理行为的看法，对比不同伦理框架与民众道德的差异。
AI.result: 多数伦理框架（功利主义、康德伦理等）及民众道德在高风险任务中对欺骗行为持保守态度，尤其当老年人和儿童均存在显著表现缺陷时。
AI.conclusion: 机器人伦理设计需结合形式化伦理框架与实际人类道德判断，尤其需谨慎处理高风险场景中的欺骗问题。

title: Sharp Constants in Uniformity Testing via the Huber Statistic
title_zh: 通过 Huber 统计观察均匀性测试中的尖锐常数
abstract: Uniformity testing is one of the most well-studied problems in property testing, with many known test statistics, including ones based on counting collisions, singletons, and the empirical TV distance. It is known that the optimal sample complexity to distinguish the uniform distribution on $m$ elements from any $ε$-far distribution with $1-δ$ probability is $n = Θ\left(\frac{\sqrt{m \log (1/δ)}}{ε^2} + \frac{\log (1/δ)}{ε^2}\right)$, which is achieved by the empirical TV tester. Yet in simulation, these theoretical analyses are misleading: in many cases, they do not correctly rank order the performance of existing testers, even in an asymptotic regime of all parameters tending to $0$ or $\infty$. We explain this discrepancy by studying the \emph{constant factors} required by the algorithms. We show that the collisions tester achieves a sharp maximal constant in the number of standard deviations of separation between uniform and non-uniform inputs. We then introduce a new tester based on the Huber loss, and show that it not only matches this separation, but also has tails corresponding to a Gaussian with this separation. This leads to a sample complexity of $(1 + o(1))\frac{\sqrt{m \log (1/δ)}}{ε^2}$ in the regime where this term is dominant, unlike all other existing testers.
summary: Uniformity testing is one of the most well-studied problems in property testing, with many known test statistics, including ones based on counting collisions, singletons, and the empirical TV distance. It is known that the optimal sample complexity to distinguish the uniform distribution on $m$ elements from any $ε$-far distribution with $1-δ$ probability is $n = Θ\left(\frac{\sqrt{m \log (1/δ)}}{ε^2} + \frac{\log (1/δ)}{ε^2}\right)$, which is achieved by the empirical TV tester. Yet in simulation, these theoretical analyses are misleading: in many cases, they do not correctly rank order the performance of existing testers, even in an asymptotic regime of all parameters tending to $0$ or $\infty$. We explain this discrepancy by studying the \emph{constant factors} required by the algorithms. We show that the collisions tester achieves a sharp maximal constant in the number of standard deviations of separation between uniform and non-uniform inputs. We then introduce a new tester based on the Huber loss, and show that it not only matches this separation, but also has tails corresponding to a Gaussian with this separation. This leads to a sample complexity of $(1 + o(1))\frac{\sqrt{m \log (1/δ)}}{ε^2}$ in the regime where this term is dominant, unlike all other existing testers.
abstract_zh: 均匀性测试是属性测试中研究最深入的问题之一，有许多已知的测试统计数据，包括基于计数碰撞、单例和经验电视距离的测试统计数据。众所周知，区分$m$元素上的均匀分布与任何具有$1-δ$概率的$ε$-远分布的最佳样本复杂度是$n = θ\left(\frac{\sqrt{m \log (1/δ)}}{ε^2} + \frac{\log (1/δ)}{ε^2}\right)$，这是由经验电视检验器实现的。然而在模拟中，这些理论分析具有误导性：在许多情况下，即使在所有参数趋于 $0$ 或 $\infty$ 的渐近状态下，它们也没有正确地对现有测试人员的性能进行排序。我们通过研究算法所需的\emph{常数因子}来解释这种差异。我们表明，碰撞测试仪在均匀和非均匀输入之间的分离标准差数量上实现了尖锐的最大常数。然后，我们引入一个基于 Huber 损失的新测试器，并表明它不仅匹配此分离，而且还具有与此分离的高斯相对应的尾部。与所有其他现有测试器不同，在该项占主导地位的情况下，这导致样本复杂度为 $(1 + o(1))\frac{\sqrt{m \log (1/δ)}}{ε^2}$。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了均匀性检验中的尖锐常数问题，通过引入Huber统计量提出了一种新的检验方法，以改进现有方法的样本复杂度。
AI.motivation: 现有均匀性检验的理论分析与模拟结果存在矛盾，尤其在常数因子上未被正确反映，导致测试性能排序不准确。
AI.method: 分析现有检验方法（如碰撞计数、TV距离）的常数因子，提出基于Huber损失函数的新检验统计量，并证明其尾部性质符合高斯分布。
AI.result: Huber检验方法在主导项下达到样本复杂度$(1 + o(1))\ rac{\\sqrt{m \\log (1/δ)}}{ε^2}$，优于其他方法，且分离度达到最优常数。
AI.conclusion: 理论分析需关注常数因子，Huber统计量在均匀性检验中提供了更优的渐进行为和实际性能保证。

search_text: Sharp Constants in Uniformity Testing via the Huber Statistic 通过 Huber 统计观察均匀性测试中的尖锐常数 Uniformity testing is one of the most well-studied problems in property testing, with many known test statistics, including ones based on counting collisions, singletons, and the empirical TV distance. It is known that the optimal sample complexity to distinguish the uniform distribution on $m$ elements from any $ε$-far distribution with $1-δ$ probability is $n = Θ\left(\frac{\sqrt{m \log (1/δ)}}{ε^2} + \frac{\log (1/δ)}{ε^2}\right)$, which is achieved by the empirical TV tester. Yet in simulation, these theoretical analyses are misleading: in many cases, they do not correctly rank order the performance of existing testers, even in an asymptotic regime of all parameters tending to $0$ or $\infty$. We explain this discrepancy by studying the \emph{constant factors} required by the algorithms. We show that the collisions tester achieves a sharp maximal constant in the number of standard deviations of separation between uniform and non-uniform inputs. We then introduce a new tester based on the Huber loss, and show that it not only matches this separation, but also has tails corresponding to a Gaussian with this separation. This leads to a sample complexity of $(1 + o(1))\frac{\sqrt{m \log (1/δ)}}{ε^2}$ in the regime where this term is dominant, unlike all other existing testers. 均匀性测试是属性测试中研究最深入的问题之一，有许多已知的测试统计数据，包括基于计数碰撞、单例和经验电视距离的测试统计数据。众所周知，区分$m$元素上的均匀分布与任何具有$1-δ$概率的$ε$-远分布的最佳样本复杂度是$n = θ\left(\frac{\sqrt{m \log (1/δ)}}{ε^2} + \frac{\log (1/δ)}{ε^2}\right)$，这是由经验电视检验器实现的。然而在模拟中，这些理论分析具有误导性：在许多情况下，即使在所有参数趋于 $0$ 或 $\infty$ 的渐近状态下，它们也没有正确地对现有测试人员的性能进行排序。我们通过研究算法所需的\emph{常数因子}来解释这种差异。我们表明，碰撞测试仪在均匀和非均匀输入之间的分离标准差数量上实现了尖锐的最大常数。然后，我们引入一个基于 Huber 损失的新测试器，并表明它不仅匹配此分离，而且还具有与此分离的高斯相对应的尾部。与所有其他现有测试器不同，在该项占主导地位的情况下，这导致样本复杂度为 $(1 + o(1))\frac{\sqrt{m \log (1/δ)}}{ε^2}$。 本文研究了均匀性检验中的尖锐常数问题，通过引入Huber统计量提出了一种新的检验方法，以改进现有方法的样本复杂度。 Shivam Gupta,Eric Price stat.ML,cs.DS,cs.IT,cs.LG,math.ST

title: Meta Reinforcement Learning with Finite Training Tasks -- a Density Estimation Approach
title_zh: 具有有限训练任务的元强化学习——一种密度估计方法
abstract: In meta reinforcement learning (meta RL), an agent learns from a set of training tasks how to quickly solve a new task, drawn from the same task distribution. The optimal meta RL policy, a.k.a. the Bayes-optimal behavior, is well defined, and guarantees optimal reward in expectation, taken with respect to the task distribution. The question we explore in this work is how many training tasks are required to guarantee approximately optimal behavior with high probability. Recent work provided the first such PAC analysis for a model-free setting, where a history-dependent policy was learned from the training tasks. In this work, we propose a different approach: directly learn the task distribution, using density estimation techniques, and then train a policy on the learned task distribution. We show that our approach leads to bounds that depend on the dimension of the task distribution. In particular, in settings where the task distribution lies in a low-dimensional manifold, we extend our analysis to use dimensionality reduction techniques and account for such structure, obtaining significantly better bounds than previous work, which strictly depend on the number of states and actions. The key of our approach is the regularization implied by the kernel density estimation method. We further demonstrate that this regularization is useful in practice, when `plugged in' the state-of-the-art VariBAD meta RL algorithm.
summary: In meta reinforcement learning (meta RL), an agent learns from a set of training tasks how to quickly solve a new task, drawn from the same task distribution. The optimal meta RL policy, a.k.a. the Bayes-optimal behavior, is well defined, and guarantees optimal reward in expectation, taken with respect to the task distribution. The question we explore in this work is how many training tasks are required to guarantee approximately optimal behavior with high probability. Recent work provided the first such PAC analysis for a model-free setting, where a history-dependent policy was learned from the training tasks. In this work, we propose a different approach: directly learn the task distribution, using density estimation techniques, and then train a policy on the learned task distribution. We show that our approach leads to bounds that depend on the dimension of the task distribution. In particular, in settings where the task distribution lies in a low-dimensional manifold, we extend our analysis to use dimensionality reduction techniques and account for such structure, obtaining significantly better bounds than previous work, which strictly depend on the number of states and actions. The key of our approach is the regularization implied by the kernel density estimation method. We further demonstrate that this regularization is useful in practice, when `plugged in' the state-of-the-art VariBAD meta RL algorithm.
abstract_zh: 在元强化学习（元 RL）中，代理从一组训练任务中学习如何快速解决来自相同任务分布的新任务。最优元强化学习策略，又名贝叶斯最优行为，是明确定义的，并保证相对于任务分布而言的期望中的最优奖励。我们在这项工作中探讨的问题是需要多少训练任务才能保证高概率的近似最佳行为。最近的工作首次为无模型环境提供了此类 PAC 分析，其中从训练任务中学习了依赖于历史的策略。 In this work, we propose a different approach: directly learn the task distribution, using density estimation techniques, and then train a policy on the learned task distribution.我们表明，我们的方法会导致取决于任务分布维度的界限。特别是，在任务分布位于低维流形的设置中，我们将分析扩展到使用降维技术并考虑这种结构，获得比以前的工作明显更好的界限，这严格取决于状态和动作的数量。我们方法的关键是核密度估计方法所隐含的正则化。我们进一步证明，当“插入”最先进的 VariBAD 元 RL 算法时，这种正则化在实践中非常有用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过密度估计学习任务分布的元强化学习方法，以减少所需训练任务的数量并提高性能。
AI.motivation: 现有元强化学习方法的样本复杂度依赖于状态和动作的数量，难以适应低维任务分布场景，需改进理论界并提升实际效果。
AI.method: 采用核密度估计直接学习任务分布，并结合降维技术处理低维流形结构，通过正则化优化策略训练。
AI.result: 理论分析表明，该方法的样本复杂度依赖于任务分布维度，在低维场景下显著优于传统方法；实验验证了正则化对VariBAD算法的提升效果。
AI.conclusion: 基于密度估计的元强化学习方法能有效利用任务分布的结构特性，降低样本需求并提升实际性能，为元学习理论提供了新视角。

title: Panoramic Panoptic Segmentation: Insights Into Surrounding Parsing for Mobile Agents via Unsupervised Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 全景全景分割：通过无监督对比学习洞察移动代理的周围解析
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems (T-ITS). Extended version of arXiv:2103.00868. The project is at https://github.com/alexanderjaus/PPS
comments: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems (T-ITS). Extended version of arXiv:2103.00868. The project is at https://github.com/alexanderjaus/PPS
abstract: In this work, we introduce panoramic panoptic segmentation, as the most holistic scene understanding, both in terms of Field of View (FoV) and image-level understanding for standard camera-based input. A complete surrounding understanding provides a maximum of information to a mobile agent. This is essential information for any intelligent vehicle to make informed decisions in a safety-critical dynamic environment such as real-world traffic. In order to overcome the lack of annotated panoramic images, we propose a framework which allows model training on standard pinhole images and transfers the learned features to the panoramic domain in a cost-minimizing way. The domain shift from pinhole to panoramic images is non-trivial as large objects and surfaces are heavily distorted close to the image border regions and look different across the two domains. Using our proposed method with dense contrastive learning, we manage to achieve significant improvements over a non-adapted approach. Depending on the efficient panoptic segmentation architecture, we can improve 3.5-6.5% measured in Panoptic Quality (PQ) over non-adapted models on our established Wild Panoramic Panoptic Segmentation (WildPPS) dataset. Furthermore, our efficient framework does not need access to the images of the target domain, making it a feasible domain generalization approach suitable for a limited hardware setting. As additional contributions, we publish WildPPS: The first panoramic panoptic image dataset to foster progress in surrounding perception and explore a novel training procedure combining supervised and contrastive training.
summary: In this work, we introduce panoramic panoptic segmentation, as the most holistic scene understanding, both in terms of Field of View (FoV) and image-level understanding for standard camera-based input. A complete surrounding understanding provides a maximum of information to a mobile agent. This is essential information for any intelligent vehicle to make informed decisions in a safety-critical dynamic environment such as real-world traffic. In order to overcome the lack of annotated panoramic images, we propose a framework which allows model training on standard pinhole images and transfers the learned features to the panoramic domain in a cost-minimizing way. The domain shift from pinhole to panoramic images is non-trivial as large objects and surfaces are heavily distorted close to the image border regions and look different across the two domains. Using our proposed method with dense contrastive learning, we manage to achieve significant improvements over a non-adapted approach. Depending on the efficient panoptic segmentation architecture, we can improve 3.5-6.5% measured in Panoptic Quality (PQ) over non-adapted models on our established Wild Panoramic Panoptic Segmentation (WildPPS) dataset. Furthermore, our efficient framework does not need access to the images of the target domain, making it a feasible domain generalization approach suitable for a limited hardware setting. As additional contributions, we publish WildPPS: The first panoramic panoptic image dataset to foster progress in surrounding perception and explore a novel training procedure combining supervised and contrastive training.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们引入了全景全景分割，作为最全面的场景理解，无论是在视场（FoV）还是基于标准相机输入的图像级理解方面。对周围环境的完整了解为移动代理提供了最大限度的信息。对于任何智能车辆来说，这是在安全关键的动态环境（例如现实交通）中做出明智决策的重要信息。为了克服缺乏带注释的全景图像的问题，我们提出了一个框架，允许对标准针孔图像进行模型训练，并以成本最小化的方式将学习到的特征转移到全景领域。从针孔图像到全景图像的域转换并非微不足道，因为大型物体和表面在靠近图像边界区域时严重扭曲，并且在两个域中看起来不同。使用我们提出的方法和密集对比学习，我们成功地比非适应方法取得了显着的改进。依靠高效的全景分割架构，在我们建立的野生全景全景分割 (WildPPS) 数据集上，我们可以将全景质量 (PQ) 测量值比非适应模型提高 3.5-6.5%。此外，我们的高效框架不需要访问目标域的图像，这使其成为适合有限硬件设置的可行域泛化方法。作为额外贡献，我们发布了 WildPPS：第一个全景全景图像数据集，以促进周围感知的进步，并探索结合监督和对比训练的新颖训练程序。

AI.tldr: 本文提出全景全景分割方法，通过无监督对比学习解决移动智能体在缺乏标注全景图像下的周围环境理解问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以获取标注全景图像，而移动智能体（如自动驾驶）需依赖全面的环境感知以确保安全决策。
AI.method: 设计基于标准针孔图像训练的框架，利用密集对比学习迁移特征至全景领域，无需目标域图像且结合监督与对比训练。
AI.result: 在WildPPS数据集上，相比未适配模型提升3.5-6.5% Panoptic Quality，且适用于硬件受限场景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现跨领域特征迁移，发布的WildPPS数据集及混合训练策略为全景感知研究提供新方向。

search_text: Panoramic Panoptic Segmentation: Insights Into Surrounding Parsing for Mobile Agents via Unsupervised Contrastive Learning 全景全景分割：通过无监督对比学习洞察移动代理的周围解析 In this work, we introduce panoramic panoptic segmentation, as the most holistic scene understanding, both in terms of Field of View (FoV) and image-level understanding for standard camera-based input. A complete surrounding understanding provides a maximum of information to a mobile agent. This is essential information for any intelligent vehicle to make informed decisions in a safety-critical dynamic environment such as real-world traffic. In order to overcome the lack of annotated panoramic images, we propose a framework which allows model training on standard pinhole images and transfers the learned features to the panoramic domain in a cost-minimizing way. The domain shift from pinhole to panoramic images is non-trivial as large objects and surfaces are heavily distorted close to the image border regions and look different across the two domains. Using our proposed method with dense contrastive learning, we manage to achieve significant improvements over a non-adapted approach. Depending on the efficient panoptic segmentation architecture, we can improve 3.5-6.5% measured in Panoptic Quality (PQ) over non-adapted models on our established Wild Panoramic Panoptic Segmentation (WildPPS) dataset. Furthermore, our efficient framework does not need access to the images of the target domain, making it a feasible domain generalization approach suitable for a limited hardware setting. As additional contributions, we publish WildPPS: The first panoramic panoptic image dataset to foster progress in surrounding perception and explore a novel training procedure combining supervised and contrastive training. 在这项工作中，我们引入了全景全景分割，作为最全面的场景理解，无论是在视场（FoV）还是基于标准相机输入的图像级理解方面。对周围环境的完整了解为移动代理提供了最大限度的信息。对于任何智能车辆来说，这是在安全关键的动态环境（例如现实交通）中做出明智决策的重要信息。为了克服缺乏带注释的全景图像的问题，我们提出了一个框架，允许对标准针孔图像进行模型训练，并以成本最小化的方式将学习到的特征转移到全景领域。从针孔图像到全景图像的域转换并非微不足道，因为大型物体和表面在靠近图像边界区域时严重扭曲，并且在两个域中看起来不同。使用我们提出的方法和密集对比学习，我们成功地比非适应方法取得了显着的改进。依靠高效的全景分割架构，在我们建立的野生全景全景分割 (WildPPS) 数据集上，我们可以将全景质量 (PQ) 测量值比非适应模型提高 3.5-6.5%。此外，我们的高效框架不需要访问目标域的图像，这使其成为适合有限硬件设置的可行域泛化方法。作为额外贡献，我们发布了 WildPPS：第一个全景全景图像数据集，以促进周围感知的进步，并探索结合监督和对比训练的新颖训练程序。 本文提出全景全景分割方法，通过无监督对比学习解决移动智能体在缺乏标注全景图像下的周围环境理解问题。 Alexander Jaus,Kailun Yang,Rainer Stiefelhagen cs.CV,cs.RO,eess.IV

title: Online Modeling and Control of Soft Multi-fingered Grippers via Koopman Operator Theory
title_zh: 基于库普曼算子理论的软多指夹具在线建模与控制
comment: Accepted to IEEE International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE) 2022
comments: Accepted to IEEE International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE) 2022
abstract: Soft grippers are gaining momentum across applications due to their flexibility and dexterity. However, the infinite-dimensionality and non-linearity associated with soft robots challenge modeling and closed-loop control of soft grippers to perform grasping tasks. To solve this problem, data-driven methods have been proposed. Most data-driven methods rely on intensive model learning in simulation or offline, and as such it may be hard to generalize across different settings not explicitly trained upon and in physical robot testing where online control is required. In this paper, we propose an online modeling and control algorithm that utilizes Koopman operator theory to update an estimated model of the underlying dynamics at each time step in real-time. The learned and continuously updated models are then embedded into an online Model Predictive Control (MPC) structure and deployed onto soft multi-fingered robotic grippers. To evaluate the performance, the prediction accuracy of our approach is first compared against other model-extraction methods among different datasets. Next, the online modeling and control algorithm is tested experimentally with a soft 3-fingered gripper grasping objects of various shapes and weights unknown to the controller initially. Results indicate a high success ratio in grasping different objects using the proposed method. Sample trials can be viewed at https://youtu.be/i2hCMX7zSKQ.
summary: Soft grippers are gaining momentum across applications due to their flexibility and dexterity. However, the infinite-dimensionality and non-linearity associated with soft robots challenge modeling and closed-loop control of soft grippers to perform grasping tasks. To solve this problem, data-driven methods have been proposed. Most data-driven methods rely on intensive model learning in simulation or offline, and as such it may be hard to generalize across different settings not explicitly trained upon and in physical robot testing where online control is required. In this paper, we propose an online modeling and control algorithm that utilizes Koopman operator theory to update an estimated model of the underlying dynamics at each time step in real-time. The learned and continuously updated models are then embedded into an online Model Predictive Control (MPC) structure and deployed onto soft multi-fingered robotic grippers. To evaluate the performance, the prediction accuracy of our approach is first compared against other model-extraction methods among different datasets. Next, the online modeling and control algorithm is tested experimentally with a soft 3-fingered gripper grasping objects of various shapes and weights unknown to the controller initially. Results indicate a high success ratio in grasping different objects using the proposed method. Sample trials can be viewed at https://youtu.be/i2hCMX7zSKQ.
abstract_zh: 软夹具由于其灵活性和灵巧性而在各种应用中获得了发展势头。然而，与软机器人相关的无限维和非线性对软夹具执行抓取任务的建模和闭环控制提出了挑战。为了解决这个问题，人们提出了数据驱动的方法。大多数数据驱动方法依赖于模拟或离线的强化模型学习，因此可能很难在未明确训练的不同设置和需要在线控制的物理机器人测试中进行推广。在本文中，我们提出了一种在线建模和控制算法，该算法利用库普曼算子理论来实时更新每个时间步的基础动力学估计模型。然后将学习到的和不断更新的模型嵌入到在线模型预测控制（MPC）结构中，并部署到软多指机器人抓手上。为了评估性能，首先将我们的方法的预测准确性与不同数据集中的其他模型提取方法进行比较。接下来，使用柔软的三指夹具抓取控制器最初未知的各种形状和重量的物体，对在线建模和控制算法进行实验测试。结果表明，使用所提出的方法抓取不同物体的成功率很高。示例试验可以在 https://youtu.be/i2hCMX7zSKQ 上查看。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Koopman算子理论的在线建模与控制算法，用于软多指夹爪的实时动态建模和控制。
AI.motivation: 软夹爪因其灵活性和灵巧性在多个应用中受到关注，但其无限维性和非线性特征使得建模和闭环控制面临挑战，传统数据驱动方法难以适应不同场景和实时控制需求。
AI.method: 本文利用Koopman算子理论，在每个时间步实时更新系统动态模型，并将该模型嵌入在线模型预测控制（MPC）结构中，部署于软多指夹爪上。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在抓取不同形状和重量的物体时具有较高的成功率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过在线建模和控制有效提升了软多指夹爪的抓取性能，为实际应用提供了新思路。

title: TraSE: Towards Tackling Authorial Style from a Cognitive Science Perspective
title_zh: TraSE：从认知科学的角度解决作者风格
comment: Experimental results in the paper are incorrectly reported due to an unforeseen glitch in the software prototype. The paper and its findings are withdrawn
comments: Experimental results in the paper are incorrectly reported due to an unforeseen glitch in the software prototype. The paper and its findings are withdrawn
abstract: Stylistic analysis of text is a key task in research areas ranging from authorship attribution to forensic analysis and personality profiling. The existing approaches for stylistic analysis are plagued by issues like topic influence, lack of discriminability for large number of authors and the requirement for large amounts of diverse data. In this paper, the source of these issues are identified along with the necessity for a cognitive perspective on authorial style in addressing them. A novel feature representation, called Trajectory-based Style Estimation (TraSE), is introduced to support this purpose. Authorship attribution experiments with over 27,000 authors and 1.4 million samples in a cross-domain scenario resulted in 90% attribution accuracy suggesting that the feature representation is immune to such negative influences and an excellent candidate for stylistic analysis. Finally, a qualitative analysis is performed on TraSE using physical human characteristics, like age, to validate its claim on capturing cognitive traits.
summary: Stylistic analysis of text is a key task in research areas ranging from authorship attribution to forensic analysis and personality profiling. The existing approaches for stylistic analysis are plagued by issues like topic influence, lack of discriminability for large number of authors and the requirement for large amounts of diverse data. In this paper, the source of these issues are identified along with the necessity for a cognitive perspective on authorial style in addressing them. A novel feature representation, called Trajectory-based Style Estimation (TraSE), is introduced to support this purpose. Authorship attribution experiments with over 27,000 authors and 1.4 million samples in a cross-domain scenario resulted in 90% attribution accuracy suggesting that the feature representation is immune to such negative influences and an excellent candidate for stylistic analysis. Finally, a qualitative analysis is performed on TraSE using physical human characteristics, like age, to validate its claim on capturing cognitive traits.
abstract_zh: 文本文体分析是从作者归属到取证分析和个性分析等研究领域的一项关键任务。现有的文体分析方法受到主题影响、对大量作者缺乏区分性以及需要大量不同数据等问题的困扰。在本文中，确定了这些问题的根源以及解决这些问题时对作者风格的认知视角的必要性。引入了一种新颖的特征表示，称为基于轨迹的风格估计（TraSE）来支持这一目的。在跨领域场景中对 27,000 多名作者和 140 万个样本进行的作者归属实验得出了 90% 的归因准确率，这表明特征表示不受此类负面影响的影响，并且是文体分析的绝佳候选者。最后，使用年龄等人体特征对 TraSE 进行定性分析，以验证其捕获认知特征的主张。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于认知科学视角的作者风格分析方法TraSE，以解决现有文本风格分析中的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有文本风格分析方法受主题影响大、难以区分大量作者且需要大量多样化数据，需从认知科学角度重新审视作者风格特征。
AI.method: 引入轨迹特征表示法（TraSE），通过认知科学视角捕捉作者的风格特征并进行作者归属分析。
AI.result: 在跨领域场景下使用27,000位作者的140万样本测试，作者归属准确率达90%，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: TraSE能够有效抵御负面因素影响，是文本风格分析的优质方案，并通过年龄等认知特征验证了其有效性。

search_text: TraSE: Towards Tackling Authorial Style from a Cognitive Science Perspective TraSE：从认知科学的角度解决作者风格 Stylistic analysis of text is a key task in research areas ranging from authorship attribution to forensic analysis and personality profiling. The existing approaches for stylistic analysis are plagued by issues like topic influence, lack of discriminability for large number of authors and the requirement for large amounts of diverse data. In this paper, the source of these issues are identified along with the necessity for a cognitive perspective on authorial style in addressing them. A novel feature representation, called Trajectory-based Style Estimation (TraSE), is introduced to support this purpose. Authorship attribution experiments with over 27,000 authors and 1.4 million samples in a cross-domain scenario resulted in 90% attribution accuracy suggesting that the feature representation is immune to such negative influences and an excellent candidate for stylistic analysis. Finally, a qualitative analysis is performed on TraSE using physical human characteristics, like age, to validate its claim on capturing cognitive traits. 文本文体分析是从作者归属到取证分析和个性分析等研究领域的一项关键任务。现有的文体分析方法受到主题影响、对大量作者缺乏区分性以及需要大量不同数据等问题的困扰。在本文中，确定了这些问题的根源以及解决这些问题时对作者风格的认知视角的必要性。引入了一种新颖的特征表示，称为基于轨迹的风格估计（TraSE）来支持这一目的。在跨领域场景中对 27,000 多名作者和 140 万个样本进行的作者归属实验得出了 90% 的归因准确率，这表明特征表示不受此类负面影响的影响，并且是文体分析的绝佳候选者。最后，使用年龄等人体特征对 TraSE 进行定性分析，以验证其捕获认知特征的主张。 本文提出了一种基于认知科学视角的作者风格分析方法TraSE，以解决现有文本风格分析中的问题。 Ronald Wilson,Avanti Bhandarkar,Damon Woodard cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Jiachen Zhu,Rafael M. Moraes,Serkan Karakulak,Vlad Sobol,Alfredo Canziani,Yann LeCun
title: TiCo: Transformation Invariance and Covariance Contrast for Self-Supervised Visual Representation Learning
title_zh: TiCo：自监督视觉表示学习的变换不变性和协方差对比
abstract: We present Transformation Invariance and Covariance Contrast (TiCo) for self-supervised visual representation learning. Similar to other recent self-supervised learning methods, our method is based on maximizing the agreement among embeddings of different distorted versions of the same image, which pushes the encoder to produce transformation invariant representations. To avoid the trivial solution where the encoder generates constant vectors, we regularize the covariance matrix of the embeddings from different images by penalizing low rank solutions. By jointly minimizing the transformation invariance loss and covariance contrast loss, we get an encoder that is able to produce useful representations for downstream tasks. We analyze our method and show that it can be viewed as a variant of MoCo with an implicit memory bank of unlimited size at no extra memory cost. This makes our method perform better than alternative methods when using small batch sizes. TiCo can also be seen as a modification of Barlow Twins. By connecting the contrastive and redundancy-reduction methods together, TiCo gives us new insights into how joint embedding methods work.
summary: We present Transformation Invariance and Covariance Contrast (TiCo) for self-supervised visual representation learning. Similar to other recent self-supervised learning methods, our method is based on maximizing the agreement among embeddings of different distorted versions of the same image, which pushes the encoder to produce transformation invariant representations. To avoid the trivial solution where the encoder generates constant vectors, we regularize the covariance matrix of the embeddings from different images by penalizing low rank solutions. By jointly minimizing the transformation invariance loss and covariance contrast loss, we get an encoder that is able to produce useful representations for downstream tasks. We analyze our method and show that it can be viewed as a variant of MoCo with an implicit memory bank of unlimited size at no extra memory cost. This makes our method perform better than alternative methods when using small batch sizes. TiCo can also be seen as a modification of Barlow Twins. By connecting the contrastive and redundancy-reduction methods together, TiCo gives us new insights into how joint embedding methods work.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了用于自监督视觉表示学习的变换不变性和协方差对比度（TiCo）。与其他最近的自监督学习方法类似，我们的方法基于最大化同一图像的不同失真版本的嵌入之间的一致性，这促使编码器产生变换不变表示。为了避免编码器生成常数向量的简单解决方案，我们通过惩罚低秩解决方案来正则化来自不同图像的嵌入的协方差矩阵。通过联合最小化变换不变性损失和协方差对比度损失，我们得到了一个能够为下游任务生成有用表示的编码器。我们分析了我们的方法，并表明它可以被视为 MoCo 的变体，具有无限大小的隐式内存库，无需额外的内存成本。这使得我们的方法在使用小批量时比其他方法表现更好。 TiCo 也可以看作是 Barlow Twins 的改良版。通过将对比方法和冗余减少方法连接在一起，TiCo 为我们提供了关于联合嵌入方法如何工作的新见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TiCo方法，通过结合变换不变性与协方差对比损失，提升自监督视觉表征学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督方法易陷入生成常量向量的平凡解，且难以在小批量数据下有效学习。
AI.method: 联合优化变换不变性损失（最大化同图不同扭曲版本嵌入一致性）与协方差对比损失（正则化不同图像嵌入协方差矩阵），并揭示其与MoCo和Barlow Twins的关联。
AI.result: 在小批量场景下优于现有方法，且无需额外内存即可实现无限大小隐式记忆库。
AI.conclusion: TiCo通过整合对比学习与冗余减少机制，为联合嵌入方法提供了新视角与改进方向。

title: Exploring the Effectiveness of Self-supervised Learning and Classifier Chains in Emotion Recognition of Nonverbal Vocalizations
title_zh: 探索自监督学习和分类器链在非语言发声情感识别中的有效性
comment: Accepted by the ICML Expressive Vocalizations Workshop and Competition 2022
comments: Accepted by the ICML Expressive Vocalizations Workshop and Competition 2022
abstract: We present an emotion recognition system for nonverbal vocalizations (NVs) submitted to the ExVo Few-Shot track of the ICML Expressive Vocalizations Competition 2022. The proposed method uses self-supervised learning (SSL) models to extract features from NVs and uses a classifier chain to model the label dependency between emotions. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method can significantly improve the performance of this task compared to several baseline methods. Our proposed method obtained a mean concordance correlation coefficient (CCC) of $0.725$ in the validation set and $0.739$ in the test set, while the best baseline method only obtained $0.554$ in the validation set. We publicate our code at https://github.com/Aria-K-Alethia/ExVo to help others to reproduce our experimental results.
summary: We present an emotion recognition system for nonverbal vocalizations (NVs) submitted to the ExVo Few-Shot track of the ICML Expressive Vocalizations Competition 2022. The proposed method uses self-supervised learning (SSL) models to extract features from NVs and uses a classifier chain to model the label dependency between emotions. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method can significantly improve the performance of this task compared to several baseline methods. Our proposed method obtained a mean concordance correlation coefficient (CCC) of $0.725$ in the validation set and $0.739$ in the test set, while the best baseline method only obtained $0.554$ in the validation set. We publicate our code at https://github.com/Aria-K-Alethia/ExVo to help others to reproduce our experimental results.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于非语言发声 (NV) 的情感识别系统，已提交给 2022 年 ICML 表达性发声竞赛的 ExVo Few-Shot 赛道。所提出的方法使用自监督学习 (SSL) 模型从 NV 中提取特征，并使用分类器链对情绪之间的标签依赖关系进行建模。实验结果表明，与几种基线方法相比，所提出的方法可以显着提高该任务的性能。我们提出的方法在验证集中获得了 0.725 美元的平均一致性相关系数 (CCC)，在测试集中获得了 0.739 美元的平均一致性相关系数 (CCC)，而最佳基线方法在验证集中仅获得了 0.554 美元。我们在 https://github.com/Aria-K-Alethia/ExVo 发布我们的代码，以帮助其他人重现我们的实验结果。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种结合自监督学习和分类链的方法，用于非语言语音的情绪识别任务。
AI.motivation: 非语言语音情绪识别面临数据稀缺和标签依赖复杂的问题，传统方法难以有效建模多标签间的关系。
AI.method: 采用自监督学习模型提取非语言语音特征，并通过分类链结构建模情绪标签间的依赖关系。
AI.result: 在验证集和测试集上分别达到CCC 0.725和0.739，显著优于最佳基线方法的0.554。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过特征学习与标签依赖建模的结合有效提升了非语言语音情绪识别性能，代码已开源供复现。

title: Making the case for audience design in conversational AI: Rapport expectations and language ideologies in a task-oriented chatbot
title_zh: 为对话式人工智能中的受众设计提供理由：在面向任务的聊天机器人中融洽的期望和语言意识形态
abstract: Chatbots are more and more prevalent in commercial and science contexts. They help customers complain about a product or service or support them to find the best travel deals. Other bots provide mental health support or help book medical appointments. This paper argues that insights into users' language ideologies and their rapport expectations can be used to inform the audience design of the bot's language and interaction patterns and ensure equitable access to the services provided by bots. The argument is underpinned by three kinds of data: simulated user interactions with a chatbot facilitating health appointment bookings, users' introspective comments on their interactions and users' qualitative survey comments post engagement with the booking bot. In closing, I will define audience design for conversational AI and discuss how user-centred analyses of chatbot interactions and sociolinguistically informed theoretical approaches, such as rapport management, can be used to support audience design.
summary: Chatbots are more and more prevalent in commercial and science contexts. They help customers complain about a product or service or support them to find the best travel deals. Other bots provide mental health support or help book medical appointments. This paper argues that insights into users' language ideologies and their rapport expectations can be used to inform the audience design of the bot's language and interaction patterns and ensure equitable access to the services provided by bots. The argument is underpinned by three kinds of data: simulated user interactions with a chatbot facilitating health appointment bookings, users' introspective comments on their interactions and users' qualitative survey comments post engagement with the booking bot. In closing, I will define audience design for conversational AI and discuss how user-centred analyses of chatbot interactions and sociolinguistically informed theoretical approaches, such as rapport management, can be used to support audience design.
abstract_zh: 聊天机器人在商业和科学领域越来越普遍。他们帮助客户投诉产品或服务，或支持他们找到最好的旅行优惠。其他机器人提供心理健康支持或帮助预约医疗预约。本文认为，对用户的语言意识形态及其融洽期望的洞察可用于为受众设计机器人的语言和交互模式，并确保公平地访问机器人提供的服务。这一论点以三种数据为基础：模拟用户与聊天机器人的交互，促进健康预约预订、用户对其交互的内省评论以及用户在与预订机器人互动后的定性调查评论。最后，我将定义对话式人工智能的受众设计，并讨论如何使用以用户为中心的聊天机器人交互分析和社会语言学理论方法（例如融洽管理）来支持受众设计。

AI.tldr: 本文主张在任务导向的聊天机器人设计中融入受众设计，通过分析用户的语言意识形态和关系期望，优化机器人的语言与交互模式。
AI.motivation: 现有聊天机器人可能因忽视用户语言差异和关系期望，导致服务公平性不足，需通过受众设计提升用户体验与包容性。
AI.method: 基于模拟用户交互数据、用户反思评论及定性调查结果，结合语言学理论（如关系管理）进行用户中心分析。
AI.result: 发现用户对机器人语言风格和互动模式存在显著期望差异，受众设计可有效弥合技术功能与用户需求间的鸿沟。
AI.conclusion: 定义了对话式AI的受众设计框架，提出融合用户分析与语言学理论的方法，为公平、高效的聊天机器人开发提供理论支持。

search_text: Making the case for audience design in conversational AI: Rapport expectations and language ideologies in a task-oriented chatbot 为对话式人工智能中的受众设计提供理由：在面向任务的聊天机器人中融洽的期望和语言意识形态 Chatbots are more and more prevalent in commercial and science contexts. They help customers complain about a product or service or support them to find the best travel deals. Other bots provide mental health support or help book medical appointments. This paper argues that insights into users' language ideologies and their rapport expectations can be used to inform the audience design of the bot's language and interaction patterns and ensure equitable access to the services provided by bots. The argument is underpinned by three kinds of data: simulated user interactions with a chatbot facilitating health appointment bookings, users' introspective comments on their interactions and users' qualitative survey comments post engagement with the booking bot. In closing, I will define audience design for conversational AI and discuss how user-centred analyses of chatbot interactions and sociolinguistically informed theoretical approaches, such as rapport management, can be used to support audience design. 聊天机器人在商业和科学领域越来越普遍。他们帮助客户投诉产品或服务，或支持他们找到最好的旅行优惠。其他机器人提供心理健康支持或帮助预约医疗预约。本文认为，对用户的语言意识形态及其融洽期望的洞察可用于为受众设计机器人的语言和交互模式，并确保公平地访问机器人提供的服务。这一论点以三种数据为基础：模拟用户与聊天机器人的交互，促进健康预约预订、用户对其交互的内省评论以及用户在与预订机器人互动后的定性调查评论。最后，我将定义对话式人工智能的受众设计，并讨论如何使用以用户为中心的聊天机器人交互分析和社会语言学理论方法（例如融洽管理）来支持受众设计。 本文主张在任务导向的聊天机器人设计中融入受众设计，通过分析用户的语言意识形态和关系期望，优化机器人的语言与交互模式。 Doris Dippold cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Multi-level Domain Adaptation for Lane Detection
title_zh: 用于车道检测的多级域适应
comment: Proceedings of the CVPR 2022 Workshop of Autonomous Driving
comments: Proceedings of the CVPR 2022 Workshop of Autonomous Driving
abstract: We focus on bridging domain discrepancy in lane detection among different scenarios to greatly reduce extra annotation and re-training costs for autonomous driving. Critical factors hinder the performance improvement of cross-domain lane detection that conventional methods only focus on pixel-wise loss while ignoring shape and position priors of lanes. To address the issue, we propose the Multi-level Domain Adaptation (MLDA) framework, a new perspective to handle cross-domain lane detection at three complementary semantic levels of pixel, instance and category. Specifically, at pixel level, we propose to apply cross-class confidence constraints in self-training to tackle the imbalanced confidence distribution of lane and background. At instance level, we go beyond pixels to treat segmented lanes as instances and facilitate discriminative features in target domain with triplet learning, which effectively rebuilds the semantic context of lanes and contributes to alleviating the feature confusion. At category level, we propose an adaptive inter-domain embedding module to utilize the position prior of lanes during adaptation. In two challenging datasets, ie TuSimple and CULane, our approach improves lane detection performance by a large margin with gains of 8.8% on accuracy and 7.4% on F1-score respectively, compared with state-of-the-art domain adaptation algorithms.
summary: We focus on bridging domain discrepancy in lane detection among different scenarios to greatly reduce extra annotation and re-training costs for autonomous driving. Critical factors hinder the performance improvement of cross-domain lane detection that conventional methods only focus on pixel-wise loss while ignoring shape and position priors of lanes. To address the issue, we propose the Multi-level Domain Adaptation (MLDA) framework, a new perspective to handle cross-domain lane detection at three complementary semantic levels of pixel, instance and category. Specifically, at pixel level, we propose to apply cross-class confidence constraints in self-training to tackle the imbalanced confidence distribution of lane and background. At instance level, we go beyond pixels to treat segmented lanes as instances and facilitate discriminative features in target domain with triplet learning, which effectively rebuilds the semantic context of lanes and contributes to alleviating the feature confusion. At category level, we propose an adaptive inter-domain embedding module to utilize the position prior of lanes during adaptation. In two challenging datasets, ie TuSimple and CULane, our approach improves lane detection performance by a large margin with gains of 8.8% on accuracy and 7.4% on F1-score respectively, compared with state-of-the-art domain adaptation algorithms.
abstract_zh: 我们专注于弥合不同场景之间车道检测的域差异，以大大减少自动驾驶的额外注释和重新训练成本。阻碍跨域车道检测性能提高的关键因素是传统方法仅关注像素级损失而忽略车道的形状和位置先验。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了多级域适应（MLDA）框架，这是一种在像素、实例和类别三个互补语义级别上处理跨域车道检测的新视角。具体来说，在像素级别，我们建议在自训练中应用跨类置信度约束来解决车道和背景的不平衡置信度分布。在实例级别，我们超越像素，将分段车道视为实例，并通过三元组学习促进目标域中的判别特征，这有效地重建了车道的语义上下文，并有助于缓解特征混乱。在类别级别，我们提出了一种自适应域间嵌入模块，以在适应过程中利用车道的位置先验。在两个具有挑战性的数据集（即 TuSimple 和 CULane）中，与最先进的域自适应算法相比，我们的方法大幅提高了车道检测性能，准确度提高了 8.8%，F1 分数提高了 7.4%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多级领域自适应框架（MLDA），通过像素、实例和类别三个层次解决跨领域车道检测中的领域差异问题，以减少自动驾驶中的标注和再训练成本。
AI.motivation: 传统方法仅关注像素级损失，忽略车道形状和位置先验信息，导致跨领域车道检测性能受限，需通过多级自适应提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: MLDA框架包含三个层次：像素级采用跨类置信度约束优化自训练；实例级通过三元组学习重建车道语义上下文；类别级设计自适应跨领域嵌入模块利用车道位置先验。
AI.result: 在TuSimple和CULane数据集上，MLDA分别提升准确率8.8%和F1分数7.4%，优于现有领域自适应算法。
AI.conclusion: 多级领域自适应方法通过融合像素、实例和类别层次信息，有效缓解跨领域车道检测中的特征混淆问题，显著提升检测性能。

title: Learning Continuous Rotation Canonicalization with Radial Beam Sampling
title_zh: 通过径向光束采样学习连续旋转规范化
abstract: Nearly all state of the art vision models are sensitive to image rotations. Existing methods often compensate for missing inductive biases by using augmented training data to learn pseudo-invariances. Alongside the resource demanding data inflation process, predictions often poorly generalize. The inductive biases inherent to convolutional neural networks allow for translation equivariance through kernels acting parallely to the horizontal and vertical axes of the pixel grid. This inductive bias, however, does not allow for rotation equivariance. We propose a radial beam sampling strategy along with radial kernels operating on these beams to inherently incorporate center-rotation covariance. Together with an angle distance loss, we present a radial beam-based image canonicalization model, short BIC. Our model allows for maximal continuous angle regression and canonicalizes arbitrary center-rotated input images. As a pre-processing model, this enables rotation-invariant vision pipelines with model-agnostic rotation-sensitive downstream predictions. We show that our end-to-end trained angle regressor is able to predict continuous rotation angles on several vision datasets, i.e. FashionMNIST, CIFAR10, COIL100, and LFW.
summary: Nearly all state of the art vision models are sensitive to image rotations. Existing methods often compensate for missing inductive biases by using augmented training data to learn pseudo-invariances. Alongside the resource demanding data inflation process, predictions often poorly generalize. The inductive biases inherent to convolutional neural networks allow for translation equivariance through kernels acting parallely to the horizontal and vertical axes of the pixel grid. This inductive bias, however, does not allow for rotation equivariance. We propose a radial beam sampling strategy along with radial kernels operating on these beams to inherently incorporate center-rotation covariance. Together with an angle distance loss, we present a radial beam-based image canonicalization model, short BIC. Our model allows for maximal continuous angle regression and canonicalizes arbitrary center-rotated input images. As a pre-processing model, this enables rotation-invariant vision pipelines with model-agnostic rotation-sensitive downstream predictions. We show that our end-to-end trained angle regressor is able to predict continuous rotation angles on several vision datasets, i.e. FashionMNIST, CIFAR10, COIL100, and LFW.
abstract_zh: 几乎所有最先进的视觉模型都对图像旋转敏感。现有方法通常通过使用增强训练数据来学习伪不变性来补偿缺失的归纳偏差。除了需要大量资源的数据膨胀过程之外，预测的概括性往往很差。卷积神经网络固有的归纳偏差允许通过与像素网格的水平轴和垂直轴平行作用的内核实现平移等方差。然而，这种归纳偏差不允许旋转等方差。我们提出了一种径向光束采样策略以及在这些光束上运行的径向内核，以固有地合并中心旋转协方差。结合角度距离损失，我们提出了一种基于径向光束的图像标准化模型，简称 BIC。我们的模型允许最大连续角度回归并规范化任意中心旋转的输入图像。作为预处理模型，这使得旋转不变的视觉管道能够具有与模型无关的旋转敏感的下游预测。我们证明，我们的端到端训练角度回归器能够在多个视觉数据集（即 FashionMNIST、CIFAR10、COIL100 和 LFW）上预测连续旋转角度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于径向光束采样的连续旋转规范化解法模型（BIC），用于解决视觉模型对图像旋转敏感的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉模型对图像旋转敏感，依赖数据增强学习伪不变性但资源消耗大且泛化性差，而卷积神经网络缺乏旋转等变性。
AI.method: 设计径向光束采样策略与径向核，结合角度距离损失函数，构建旋转规范化解模型BIC，实现连续角度回归与任意中心旋转图像的规范化解。
AI.result: BIC在FashionMNIST、CIFAR10等数据集上实现了连续旋转角度预测，作为预处理模块可构建旋转不变的视觉流水线。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过引入径向结构与角度损失，无需数据增强即可实现旋转不变性，提升了模型的泛化能力与旋转敏感任务的性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于径向光束采样的连续旋转规范化解法模型（BIC），用于解决视觉模型对图像旋转敏感的问题。
ai_content.motivation: 现有视觉模型对图像旋转敏感，依赖数据增强学习伪不变性但资源消耗大且泛化性差，而卷积神经网络缺乏旋转等变性。
ai_content.method: 设计径向光束采样策略与径向核，结合角度距离损失函数，构建旋转规范化解模型BIC，实现连续角度回归与任意中心旋转图像的规范化解。
ai_content.result: BIC在FashionMNIST、CIFAR10等数据集上实现了连续旋转角度预测，作为预处理模块可构建旋转不变的视觉流水线。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法通过引入径向结构与角度损失，无需数据增强即可实现旋转不变性，提升了模型的泛化能力与旋转敏感任务的性能。

result: BIC在FashionMNIST、CIFAR10等数据集上实现了连续旋转角度预测，作为预处理模块可构建旋转不变的视觉流水线。

search_text: Learning Continuous Rotation Canonicalization with Radial Beam Sampling 通过径向光束采样学习连续旋转规范化 Nearly all state of the art vision models are sensitive to image rotations. Existing methods often compensate for missing inductive biases by using augmented training data to learn pseudo-invariances. Alongside the resource demanding data inflation process, predictions often poorly generalize. The inductive biases inherent to convolutional neural networks allow for translation equivariance through kernels acting parallely to the horizontal and vertical axes of the pixel grid. This inductive bias, however, does not allow for rotation equivariance. We propose a radial beam sampling strategy along with radial kernels operating on these beams to inherently incorporate center-rotation covariance. Together with an angle distance loss, we present a radial beam-based image canonicalization model, short BIC. Our model allows for maximal continuous angle regression and canonicalizes arbitrary center-rotated input images. As a pre-processing model, this enables rotation-invariant vision pipelines with model-agnostic rotation-sensitive downstream predictions. We show that our end-to-end trained angle regressor is able to predict continuous rotation angles on several vision datasets, i.e. FashionMNIST, CIFAR10, COIL100, and LFW. 几乎所有最先进的视觉模型都对图像旋转敏感。现有方法通常通过使用增强训练数据来学习伪不变性来补偿缺失的归纳偏差。除了需要大量资源的数据膨胀过程之外，预测的概括性往往很差。卷积神经网络固有的归纳偏差允许通过与像素网格的水平轴和垂直轴平行作用的内核实现平移等方差。然而，这种归纳偏差不允许旋转等方差。我们提出了一种径向光束采样策略以及在这些光束上运行的径向内核，以固有地合并中心旋转协方差。结合角度距离损失，我们提出了一种基于径向光束的图像标准化模型，简称 BIC。我们的模型允许最大连续角度回归并规范化任意中心旋转的输入图像。作为预处理模型，这使得旋转不变的视觉管道能够具有与模型无关的旋转敏感的下游预测。我们证明，我们的端到端训练角度回归器能够在多个视觉数据集（即 FashionMNIST、CIFAR10、COIL100 和 LFW）上预测连续旋转角度。 本文提出了一种基于径向光束采样的连续旋转规范化解法模型（BIC），用于解决视觉模型对图像旋转敏感的问题。 Johann Schmidt,Sebastian Stober cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Near-Linear $\varepsilon$-Emulators for Planar Graphs
title_zh: 用于平面图的近线性$\varepsilon$-模拟器
abstract: We study vertex sparsification for distances, in the setting of planar graphs with distortion: Given a planar graph $G$ (with edge weights) and a subset of $k$ terminal vertices, the goal is to construct an $\varepsilon$-emulator, which is a small planar graph $G'$ that contains the terminals and preserves the distances between the terminals up to factor $1+\varepsilon$. We construct the first $\varepsilon$-emulators for planar graphs of near-linear size $\tilde O(k/\varepsilon^{O(1)})$. In terms of $k$, this is a dramatic improvement over the previous quadratic upper bound of Cheung, Goranci and Henzinger, and breaks below known quadratic lower bounds for exact emulators (the case when $\varepsilon=0$). Moreover, our emulators can be computed in (near-)linear time, which lead to fast $(1+\varepsilon)$-approximation algorithms for basic optimization problems on planar graphs, including multiple-source shortest paths, minimum $(s,t)$-cut, graph diameter, and dynamic distace oracle.
summary: We study vertex sparsification for distances, in the setting of planar graphs with distortion: Given a planar graph $G$ (with edge weights) and a subset of $k$ terminal vertices, the goal is to construct an $\varepsilon$-emulator, which is a small planar graph $G'$ that contains the terminals and preserves the distances between the terminals up to factor $1+\varepsilon$. We construct the first $\varepsilon$-emulators for planar graphs of near-linear size $\tilde O(k/\varepsilon^{O(1)})$. In terms of $k$, this is a dramatic improvement over the previous quadratic upper bound of Cheung, Goranci and Henzinger, and breaks below known quadratic lower bounds for exact emulators (the case when $\varepsilon=0$). Moreover, our emulators can be computed in (near-)linear time, which lead to fast $(1+\varepsilon)$-approximation algorithms for basic optimization problems on planar graphs, including multiple-source shortest paths, minimum $(s,t)$-cut, graph diameter, and dynamic distace oracle.
abstract_zh: 我们在带有畸变的平面图的设置中研究距离的顶点稀疏化：给定平面图$G$（带有边权重）和$k$终端顶点的子集，目标是构造一个$\varepsilon$仿真器，它是一个包含终端的小平面图$G'$，并保留终端之间的距离高达因子$1+\varepsilon$。我们为接近线性大小 $\tilde O(k/\varepsilon^{O(1)})$ 的平面图构造了第一个 $\varepsilon$ 模拟器。就 $k$ 而言，这比 Cheung、Goranci 和 Henzinger 之前的二次上限有了显着改进，并且突破了精确模拟器已知的二次下限（当 $\varepsilon=0$ 时的情况）。此外，我们的模拟器可以在（接近）线性时间内进行计算，这导致了平面图上基本优化问题的快速 $(1+\varepsilon)$ 近似算法，包括多源最短路径、最小 $(s,t)$ 切割、图直径和动态距离预言。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了平面图的顶点稀疏化问题，旨在构建一个近线性大小的ε-模拟器，以近似保留终端节点间的距离。
AI.motivation: 在大规模网络中，精确维护所有节点距离计算成本高昂，需通过稀疏化技术减少计算复杂度，同时保证关键终端节点的距离近似性。
AI.method: 利用平面图的结构特性，设计了一种近线性大小的ε-模拟器构造方法，并结合线性时间算法实现高效计算。
AI.result: 首次提出近线性大小（~O(k/ε^{O(1)}))的ε-模拟器，突破二次时间复杂度下界，并为多源最短路径等优化问题提供了快速近似算法。
AI.conclusion: 该成果在理论界突破了精确模拟器的下界限制，同时为实际网络优化问题提供了高效的算法工具，具有重要的理论与应用价值。

authors_text: Tom Silver,Ashay Athalye,Joshua B. Tenenbaum,Tomas Lozano-Perez,Leslie Pack Kaelbling
title: Learning Neuro-Symbolic Skills for Bilevel Planning
title_zh: 学习双层规划的神经符号技能
abstract: Decision-making is challenging in robotics environments with continuous object-centric states, continuous actions, long horizons, and sparse feedback. Hierarchical approaches, such as task and motion planning (TAMP), address these challenges by decomposing decision-making into two or more levels of abstraction. In a setting where demonstrations and symbolic predicates are given, prior work has shown how to learn symbolic operators and neural samplers for TAMP with manually designed parameterized policies. Our main contribution is a method for learning parameterized polices in combination with operators and samplers. These components are packaged into modular neuro-symbolic skills and sequenced together with search-then-sample TAMP to solve new tasks. In experiments in four robotics domains, we show that our approach -- bilevel planning with neuro-symbolic skills -- can solve a wide range of tasks with varying initial states, goals, and objects, outperforming six baselines and ablations. Video: https://youtu.be/PbFZP8rPuGg Code: https://tinyurl.com/skill-learning
summary: Decision-making is challenging in robotics environments with continuous object-centric states, continuous actions, long horizons, and sparse feedback. Hierarchical approaches, such as task and motion planning (TAMP), address these challenges by decomposing decision-making into two or more levels of abstraction. In a setting where demonstrations and symbolic predicates are given, prior work has shown how to learn symbolic operators and neural samplers for TAMP with manually designed parameterized policies. Our main contribution is a method for learning parameterized polices in combination with operators and samplers. These components are packaged into modular neuro-symbolic skills and sequenced together with search-then-sample TAMP to solve new tasks. In experiments in four robotics domains, we show that our approach -- bilevel planning with neuro-symbolic skills -- can solve a wide range of tasks with varying initial states, goals, and objects, outperforming six baselines and ablations. Video: https://youtu.be/PbFZP8rPuGg Code: https://tinyurl.com/skill-learning
abstract_zh: 在具有连续的以对象为中心的状态、连续的动作、长的视野和稀疏的反馈的机器人环境中，决策是具有挑战性的。任务和运动规划 (TAMP) 等分层方法通过将决策分解为两个或多个抽象级别来应对这些挑战。在给出演示和符号谓词的环境中，先前的工作已经展示了如何使用手动设计的参数化策略来学习 TAMP 的符号运算符和神经采样器。我们的主要贡献是一种结合算子和采样器学习参数化策略的方法。这些组件被打包成模块化神经符号技能，并与搜索然后采样 TAMP 一起排序以解决新任务。在四个机器人领域的实验中，我们证明了我们的方法（具有神经符号技能的双层规划）可以解决具有不同初始状态、目标和对象的广泛任务，其性能优于六个基线和消融。视频：https://youtu.be/PbFZP8rPuGg 代码：https://tinyurl.com/skill-learning

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合神经网络与符号逻辑的双层规划方法，通过学习参数化策略解决机器人环境中的复杂决策问题。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人决策方法在处理连续状态、长时域和稀疏反馈时存在局限，而手动设计的分层规划策略难以适应复杂多变的任务需求。
AI.method: 提出神经符号技能学习框架，将参数化策略、符号操作符与神经采样器模块化组合，并通过搜索-采样机制实现任务规划。
AI.result: 在四个机器人领域实验中，该方法在不同初始状态和目标条件下优于六个基线方法及消融实验，验证了其广泛适用性。
AI.conclusion: 神经符号技能的双层规划方法有效融合了符号推理的可解释性与神经网络的灵活性，为复杂机器人任务提供了高效解决方案。

In a setting where demonstrations and symbolic predicates are given, prior work has shown how to learn symbolic operators and neural samplers for TAMP with manually designed parameterized policies. These components are packaged into modular neuro-symbolic skills and sequenced together with search-then-sample TAMP to solve new tasks. In experiments in four robotics domains, we show that our approach -- bilevel planning with neuro-symbolic skills -- can solve a wide range of tasks with varying initial states, goals, and objects, outperforming six baselines and ablations. Video: https://youtu.be/PbFZP8rPuGg Code: https://tinyurl.com/skill-learning 在具有连续的以对象为中心的状态、连续的动作、长的视野和稀疏的反馈的机器人环境中，决策是具有挑战性的。任务和运动规划 (TAMP) 等分层方法通过将决策分解为两个或多个抽象级别来应对这些挑战。在给出演示和符号谓词的环境中，先前的工作已经展示了如何使用手动设计的参数化策略来学习 TAMP 的符号运算符和神经采样器。我们的主要贡献是一种结合算子和采样器学习参数化策略的方法。这些组件被打包成模块化神经符号技能，并与搜索然后采样 TAMP 一起排序以解决新任务。在四个机器人领域的实验中，我们证明了我们的方法（具有神经符号技能的双层规划）可以解决具有不同初始状态、目标和对象的广泛任务，其性能优于六个基线和消融。视频：https://youtu.be/PbFZP8rPuGg 代码：https://tinyurl.com/skill-learning 本文提出一种结合神经网络与符号逻辑的双层规划方法，通过学习参数化策略解决机器人环境中的复杂决策问题。 Tom Silver,Ashay Athalye,Joshua B. Tenenbaum,Tomas Lozano-Perez,Leslie Pack Kaelbling cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Emily Wenger,Roma Bhattacharjee,Arjun Nitin Bhagoji,Josephine Passananti,Emilio Andere,Haitao Zheng,Ben Y. Zhao
title: Natural Backdoor Datasets
title_zh: 自然后门数据集
abstract: Extensive literature on backdoor poison attacks has studied attacks and defenses for backdoors using "digital trigger patterns." In contrast, "physical backdoors" use physical objects as triggers, have only recently been identified, and are qualitatively different enough to resist all defenses targeting digital trigger backdoors. Research on physical backdoors is limited by access to large datasets containing real images of physical objects co-located with targets of classification. Building these datasets is time- and labor-intensive. This works seeks to address the challenge of accessibility for research on physical backdoor attacks. We hypothesize that there may be naturally occurring physically co-located objects already present in popular datasets such as ImageNet. Once identified, a careful relabeling of these data can transform them into training samples for physical backdoor attacks. We propose a method to scalably identify these subsets of potential triggers in existing datasets, along with the specific classes they can poison. We call these naturally occurring trigger-class subsets natural backdoor datasets. Our techniques successfully identify natural backdoors in widely-available datasets, and produce models behaviorally equivalent to those trained on manually curated datasets. We release our code to allow the research community to create their own datasets for research on physical backdoor attacks.
summary: Extensive literature on backdoor poison attacks has studied attacks and defenses for backdoors using "digital trigger patterns." In contrast, "physical backdoors" use physical objects as triggers, have only recently been identified, and are qualitatively different enough to resist all defenses targeting digital trigger backdoors. Building these datasets is time- and labor-intensive. This works seeks to address the challenge of accessibility for research on physical backdoor attacks. We hypothesize that there may be naturally occurring physically co-located objects already present in popular datasets such as ImageNet. Once identified, a careful relabeling of these data can transform them into training samples for physical backdoor attacks. We propose a method to scalably identify these subsets of potential triggers in existing datasets, along with the specific classes they can poison. We call these naturally occurring trigger-class subsets natural backdoor datasets. Our techniques successfully identify natural backdoors in widely-available datasets, and produce models behaviorally equivalent to those trained on manually curated datasets. We release our code to allow the research community to create their own datasets for research on physical backdoor attacks.
abstract_zh: 关于后门中毒攻击的大量文献研究了使用“数字触发模式”的后门攻击和防御。相比之下，“物理后门”使用物理对象作为触发器，最近才被识别，并且在质量上有足够的不同，足以抵抗所有针对数字触发后门的防御。对物理后门的研究受到对包含与分类目标位于同一位置的物理对象的真实图像的大型数据集的访问的限制。构建这些数据集非常耗时和费力。这项工作旨在解决物理后门攻击研究的可访问性挑战。我们假设 ImageNet 等流行数据集中可能已经存在自然发生的物理共置对象。一旦识别出来，对这些数据进行仔细的重新标记可以将它们转化为物理后门攻击的训练样本。我们提出了一种方法来可扩展地识别现有数据集中潜在触发器的这些子集，以及它们可能毒害的特定类别。我们将这些自然发生的触发类子集称为自然后门数据集。我们的技术成功地识别了广泛可用的数据集中的自然后门，并生成了行为上与手动管理数据集上训练的模型相同的模型。我们发布代码，以允许研究社区创建自己的数据集来研究物理后门攻击。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决物理后门攻击研究中数据集获取困难的问题，通过识别自然存在的触发物-目标类对，构建自然后门数据集。
AI.motivation: 物理后门攻击使用物理对象作为触发器，但现有研究受限于缺乏包含真实物理对象与分类目标共现的大型数据集，手动构建这些数据集耗费大量时间和人力。
AI.method: 提出一种可扩展的方法，从现有数据集中（如ImageNet）识别潜在触发物及其对应的目标类别，并通过重新标注生成可用于物理后门攻击训练的自然后门数据集。
AI.result: 成功在广泛可用的数据集中识别出自然后门，并生成行为等价于手动构建数据集训练出的模型。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法为物理后门攻击研究提供了可访问的自然后门数据集，推动相关领域的进一步研究。

authors_text: Hermann Blum,Marcus G. Müller,Abel Gawel,Roland Siegwart,Cesar Cadena
title: SCIM: Simultaneous Clustering, Inference, and Mapping for Open-World Semantic Scene Understanding
title_zh: SCIM：用于开放世界语义场景理解的同时聚类、推理和映射
abstract: In order to operate in human environments, a robot's semantic perception has to overcome open-world challenges such as novel objects and domain gaps. Autonomous deployment to such environments therefore requires robots to update their knowledge and learn without supervision. We investigate how a robot can autonomously discover novel semantic classes and improve accuracy on known classes when exploring an unknown environment. To this end, we develop a general framework for mapping and clustering that we then use to generate a self-supervised learning signal to update a semantic segmentation model. In particular, we show how clustering parameters can be optimized during deployment and that fusion of multiple observation modalities improves novel object discovery compared to prior work. Models, data, and implementations can be found at https://github.com/hermannsblum/scim
summary: In order to operate in human environments, a robot's semantic perception has to overcome open-world challenges such as novel objects and domain gaps. Autonomous deployment to such environments therefore requires robots to update their knowledge and learn without supervision. We investigate how a robot can autonomously discover novel semantic classes and improve accuracy on known classes when exploring an unknown environment. To this end, we develop a general framework for mapping and clustering that we then use to generate a self-supervised learning signal to update a semantic segmentation model. In particular, we show how clustering parameters can be optimized during deployment and that fusion of multiple observation modalities improves novel object discovery compared to prior work. Models, data, and implementations can be found at https://github.com/hermannsblum/scim
abstract_zh: 为了在人类环境中运行，机器人的语义感知必须克服开放世界的挑战，例如新物体和领域间隙。因此，自主部署到此类环境需要机器人在没有监督的情况下更新知识和学习。我们研究机器人在探索未知环境时如何自主发现新的语义类并提高已知类的准确性。为此，我们开发了一个用于映射和聚类的通用框架，然后用它来生成自监督学习信号以更新语义分割模型。特别是，我们展示了如何在部署过程中优化聚类参数，以及与之前的工作相比，多种观察模式的融合改进了新对象的发现。模型、数据和实现可以在 https://github.com/hermannsblum/scim 找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出SCIM框架，通过同时进行聚类、推理和映射，解决开放世界语义场景理解中机器人自主发现新物体并提升已知类别准确率的挑战。
AI.motivation: 机器人在人类环境中需应对新物体和领域差异等开放世界问题，传统方法依赖监督学习难以适应未知场景，需实现自主知识更新与无监督学习。
AI.method: 开发通用框架结合聚类与映射生成自监督信号，优化部署中的聚类参数，并融合多模态观测以提升新物体发现能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，方法在聚类参数优化和多模态融合方面优于现有工作，显著提升新物体发现效率及已知类别分割准确率。
AI.conclusion: SCIM框架为开放世界语义场景理解提供了有效解决方案，通过自监督学习和多模态融合实现机器人自主适应未知环境的能力。

authors_text: Jiafei Duan,Samson Yu,Nicholas Tan,Li Yi,Cheston Tan
title: BOSS: A Benchmark for Human Belief Prediction in Object-context Scenarios
title_zh: BOSS：对象上下文场景中人类信念预测的基准
abstract: Humans with an average level of social cognition can infer the beliefs of others based solely on the nonverbal communication signals (e.g. gaze, gesture, pose and contextual information) exhibited during social interactions. This social cognitive ability to predict human beliefs and intentions is more important than ever for ensuring safe human-robot interaction and collaboration. This paper uses the combined knowledge of Theory of Mind (ToM) and Object-Context Relations to investigate methods for enhancing collaboration between humans and autonomous systems in environments where verbal communication is prohibited. We propose a novel and challenging multimodal video dataset for assessing the capability of artificial intelligence (AI) systems in predicting human belief states in an object-context scenario. The proposed dataset consists of precise labelling of human belief state ground-truth and multimodal inputs replicating all nonverbal communication inputs captured by human perception. We further evaluate our dataset with existing deep learning models and provide new insights into the effects of the various input modalities and object-context relations on the performance of the baseline models.
summary: Humans with an average level of social cognition can infer the beliefs of others based solely on the nonverbal communication signals (e.g. gaze, gesture, pose and contextual information) exhibited during social interactions. This social cognitive ability to predict human beliefs and intentions is more important than ever for ensuring safe human-robot interaction and collaboration. This paper uses the combined knowledge of Theory of Mind (ToM) and Object-Context Relations to investigate methods for enhancing collaboration between humans and autonomous systems in environments where verbal communication is prohibited. We propose a novel and challenging multimodal video dataset for assessing the capability of artificial intelligence (AI) systems in predicting human belief states in an object-context scenario. The proposed dataset consists of precise labelling of human belief state ground-truth and multimodal inputs replicating all nonverbal communication inputs captured by human perception. We further evaluate our dataset with existing deep learning models and provide new insights into the effects of the various input modalities and object-context relations on the performance of the baseline models.
abstract_zh: 具有平均社会认知水平的人类可以仅根据社交互动期间表现出的非语言交流信号（例如凝视、手势、姿势和上下文信息）来推断他人的信念。这种预测人类信念和意图的社会认知能力对于确保安全的人机交互和协作比以往任何时候都更加重要。本文结合心智理论 (ToM) 和对象上下文关系的知识来研究在禁止语言交流的环境中增强人类和自主系统之间协作的方法。我们提出了一种新颖且具有挑战性的多模态视频数据集，用于评估人工智能（AI）系统在对象上下文场景中预测人类信念状态的能力。所提出的数据集包括人类信念状态基本事实的精确标记和复制人类感知捕获的所有非语言通信输入的多模态输入。我们利用现有的深度学习模型进一步评估我们的数据集，并就各种输入模式和对象上下文关系对基线模型性能的影响提供新的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为BOSS的基准数据集，用于评估人工智能系统在物体-情境场景中预测人类信念状态的能力，主要基于非语言交流信号。
AI.motivation: 人类在社交互动中能通过非语言信号推断他人信念，这对无语言沟通场景下的安全人机协作至关重要，但现有AI系统在此方面的能力仍需验证。
AI.method: 结合心智理论（ToM）与物体-情境关系，构建包含多模态输入（如视线、姿态）和精确标注信念状态的视频数据集，并测试现有深度学习模型性能。
AI.result: 数据集验证了不同输入模态与物体-情境关系对基线模型性能的影响，为改进AI预测人类信念提供了新见解。
AI.conclusion: BOSS数据集为研究非语言情境下的人类信念预测提供了有效基准，推动了人机协作中社会认知能力的提升。
