search_text: BOSS: A Benchmark for Human Belief Prediction in Object-context Scenarios BOSS：对象上下文场景中人类信念预测的基准 Humans with an average level of social cognition can infer the beliefs of others based solely on the nonverbal communication signals (e.g. gaze, gesture, pose and contextual information) exhibited during social interactions. This social cognitive ability to predict human beliefs and intentions is more important than ever for ensuring safe human-robot interaction and collaboration. This paper uses the combined knowledge of Theory of Mind (ToM) and Object-Context Relations to investigate methods for enhancing collaboration between humans and autonomous systems in environments where verbal communication is prohibited. We propose a novel and challenging multimodal video dataset for assessing the capability of artificial intelligence (AI) systems in predicting human belief states in an object-context scenario. The proposed dataset consists of precise labelling of human belief state ground-truth and multimodal inputs replicating all nonverbal communication inputs captured by human perception. We further evaluate our dataset with existing deep learning models and provide new insights into the effects of the various input modalities and object-context relations on the performance of the baseline models. 具有平均社会认知水平的人类可以仅根据社交互动期间表现出的非语言交流信号（例如凝视、手势、姿势和上下文信息）来推断他人的信念。这种预测人类信念和意图的社会认知能力对于确保安全的人机交互和协作比以往任何时候都更加重要。本文结合心智理论 (ToM) 和对象上下文关系的知识来研究在禁止语言交流的环境中增强人类和自主系统之间协作的方法。我们提出了一种新颖且具有挑战性的多模态视频数据集，用于评估人工智能（AI）系统在对象上下文场景中预测人类信念状态的能力。所提出的数据集包括人类信念状态基本事实的精确标记和复制人类感知捕获的所有非语言通信输入的多模态输入。我们利用现有的深度学习模型进一步评估我们的数据集，并就各种输入模式和对象上下文关系对基线模型性能的影响提供新的见解。 本文提出一个名为BOSS的基准数据集，用于评估人工智能系统在物体-情境场景中预测人类信念状态的能力，主要基于非语言交流信号。 Jiafei Duan,Samson Yu,Nicholas Tan,Li Yi,Cheston Tan cs.CV

title: CoCoPIE XGen: A Full-Stack AI-Oriented Optimizing Framework
title_zh: CoCoPIE XGen：面向AI的全栈优化框架
abstract: There is a growing demand for shifting the delivery of AI capability from data centers on the cloud to edge or end devices, exemplified by the fast emerging real-time AI-based apps running on smartphones, AR/VR devices, autonomous vehicles, and various IoT devices. The shift has however been seriously hampered by the large growing gap between DNN computing demands and the computing power on edge or end devices. This article presents the design of XGen, an optimizing framework for DNN designed to bridge the gap. XGen takes cross-cutting co-design as its first-order consideration. Its full-stack AI-oriented optimizations consist of a number of innovative optimizations at every layer of the DNN software stack, all designed in a cooperative manner. The unique technology makes XGen able to optimize various DNNs, including those with an extreme depth (e.g., BERT, GPT, other transformers), and generate code that runs several times faster than those from existing DNN frameworks, while delivering the same level of accuracy.
summary: There is a growing demand for shifting the delivery of AI capability from data centers on the cloud to edge or end devices, exemplified by the fast emerging real-time AI-based apps running on smartphones, AR/VR devices, autonomous vehicles, and various IoT devices. The shift has however been seriously hampered by the large growing gap between DNN computing demands and the computing power on edge or end devices. This article presents the design of XGen, an optimizing framework for DNN designed to bridge the gap. XGen takes cross-cutting co-design as its first-order consideration. Its full-stack AI-oriented optimizations consist of a number of innovative optimizations at every layer of the DNN software stack, all designed in a cooperative manner. The unique technology makes XGen able to optimize various DNNs, including those with an extreme depth (e.g., BERT, GPT, other transformers), and generate code that runs several times faster than those from existing DNN frameworks, while delivering the same level of accuracy.
abstract_zh: 将人工智能功能的交付从云端数据中心转移到边缘或终端设备的需求不断增长，在智能手机、AR/VR 设备、自动驾驶汽车和各种物联网设备上运行的快速新兴的基于实时人工智能的应用程序就是例证。然而，由于 DNN 计算需求与边缘或终端设备的计算能力之间日益扩大的差距，这种转变受到了严重阻碍。本文介绍了 XGen 的设计，这是一个旨在弥补这一差距的 DNN 优化框架。 XGen 将横切协同设计作为首要考虑因素。其面向人工智能的全栈优化由 DNN 软件堆栈每一层的大量创新优化组成，所有这些优化均以协作方式设计。独特的技术使 XGen 能够优化各种 DNN，包括那些具有极高深度的 DNN（例如 BERT、GPT、其他转换器），并生成比现有 DNN 框架的代码运行速度快数倍的代码，同时提供相同水平的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出XGen框架，通过全栈优化解决深度神经网络在边缘设备上的计算瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: AI应用向边缘设备迁移时面临算力不足与DNN计算需求之间的巨大差距，现有框架难以满足高效部署需求。
AI.method: 采用跨层协同设计，对DNN软件栈各层级实施创新优化，实现深度模型的高效代码生成。
AI.result: 优化后的代码在保持相同精度下，运行速度较现有框架提升数倍，支持BERT、GPT等超深层网络部署。
AI.conclusion: XGen通过全栈协同优化有效弥合了边缘设备算力缺口，为实时AI应用提供了可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Haisheng Fu,Feng Liang,Jie Liang,Binglin Li,Guohe Zhang,Jingning Han
title: Asymmetric Learned Image Compression with Multi-Scale Residual Block, Importance Map, and Post-Quantization Filtering
title_zh: 具有多尺度残差块、重要性图和后量化滤波的非对称学习图像压缩
abstract: Recently, deep learning-based image compression has made signifcant progresses, and has achieved better ratedistortion (R-D) performance than the latest traditional method, H.266/VVC, in both subjective metric and the more challenging objective metric. However, a major problem is that many leading learned schemes cannot maintain a good trade-off between performance and complexity. In this paper, we propose an effcient and effective image coding framework, which achieves similar R-D performance with lower complexity than the state of the art. First, we develop an improved multi-scale residual block (MSRB) that can expand the receptive feld and is easier to obtain global information. It can further capture and reduce the spatial correlation of the latent representations. Second, a more advanced importance map network is introduced to adaptively allocate bits to different regions of the image. Third, we apply a 2D post-quantization flter (PQF) to reduce the quantization error, motivated by the Sample Adaptive Offset (SAO) flter in video coding. Moreover, We fnd that the complexity of encoder and decoder have different effects on image compression performance. Based on this observation, we design an asymmetric paradigm, in which the encoder employs three stages of MSRBs to improve the learning capacity, whereas the decoder only needs one stage of MSRB to yield satisfactory reconstruction, thereby reducing the decoding complexity without sacrifcing performance. Experimental results show that compared to the state-of-the-art method, the encoding and decoding time of the proposed method are about 17 times faster, and the R-D performance is only reduced by less than 1% on both Kodak and Tecnick datasets, which is still better than H.266/VVC(4:4:4) and other recent learning-based methods. Our source code is publicly available at https://github.com/fengyurenpingsheng.
summary: Recently, deep learning-based image compression has made signifcant progresses, and has achieved better ratedistortion (R-D) performance than the latest traditional method, H.266/VVC, in both subjective metric and the more challenging objective metric. However, a major problem is that many leading learned schemes cannot maintain a good trade-off between performance and complexity. In this paper, we propose an effcient and effective image coding framework, which achieves similar R-D performance with lower complexity than the state of the art. First, we develop an improved multi-scale residual block (MSRB) that can expand the receptive feld and is easier to obtain global information. It can further capture and reduce the spatial correlation of the latent representations. Second, a more advanced importance map network is introduced to adaptively allocate bits to different regions of the image. Third, we apply a 2D post-quantization flter (PQF) to reduce the quantization error, motivated by the Sample Adaptive Offset (SAO) flter in video coding. Moreover, We fnd that the complexity of encoder and decoder have different effects on image compression performance. Based on this observation, we design an asymmetric paradigm, in which the encoder employs three stages of MSRBs to improve the learning capacity, whereas the decoder only needs one stage of MSRB to yield satisfactory reconstruction, thereby reducing the decoding complexity without sacrifcing performance. Experimental results show that compared to the state-of-the-art method, the encoding and decoding time of the proposed method are about 17 times faster, and the R-D performance is only reduced by less than 1% on both Kodak and Tecnick datasets, which is still better than H.266/VVC(4:4:4) and other recent learning-based methods. Our source code is publicly available at https://github.com/fengyurenpingsheng.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于深度学习的图像压缩取得了重大进展，无论是在主观指标还是更具挑战性的客观指标上，都比最新的传统方法H.266/VVC取得了更好的率失真（R-D）性能。然而，一个主要问题是许多领先的学习方案无法在性能和复杂性之间保持良好的权衡。在本文中，我们提出了一种高效且有效的图像编码框架，该框架以低于现有技术的复杂性实现了类似的研发性能。首先，我们开发了一种改进的多尺度残差块（MSRB），它可以扩大感受野并且更容易获得全局信息。它可以进一步捕获和减少潜在表示的空间相关性。其次，引入了更先进的重要性图网络来自适应地将位分配到图像的不同区域。第三，受视频编码中样本自适应偏移（SAO）滤波器的启发，我们应用 2D 后量化滤波器（PQF）来减少量化误差。此外，我们发现编码器和解码器的复杂度对图像压缩性能有不同的影响。基于这一观察，我们设计了一种非对称范式，其中编码器采用三级 MSRB 来提高学习能力，而解码器只需要一级 MSRB 即可产生令人满意的重建，从而在不牺牲性能的情况下降低解码复杂度。实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，该方法的编码和解码时间大约快了17倍，并且在Kodak和Tecnick数据集上R-D性能仅降低了不到1%，这仍然优于H.266/VVC(4:4:4)和其他最近的基于学习的方法。我们的源代码可在 https://github.com/fengyurenpingsheng 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效图像压缩框架，通过改进的多尺度残差块、重要性图网络和后量化滤波器，在保持与现有方法相近率失真性能的同时显著降低复杂度。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习图像压缩方法在性能与复杂度之间难以取得良好平衡，亟需设计更高效的编码框架以提升实际应用价值。
AI.method: 改进多尺度残差块（MSRB）增强全局信息获取能力，引入自适应重要性图网络优化比特分配，采用2D后量化滤波器降低量化误差，并设计非对称编解码结构（编码器三阶段MSRB，解码器单阶段MSRB）降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 相比最新方法，编码解码速度提升17倍，Kodak和Tecnick数据集上率失真性能仅下降不足1%，优于H.266/VVC(4:4:4)及其他学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过非对称结构设计和多模块协同优化，在保持高压缩性能的同时实现显著复杂度降低，为实际部署提供有效解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种高效图像压缩框架，通过改进的多尺度残差块、重要性图网络和后量化滤波器，在保持与现有方法相近率失真性能的同时显著降低复杂度。
ai_content.motivation: 现有深度学习图像压缩方法在性能与复杂度之间难以取得良好平衡，亟需设计更高效的编码框架以提升实际应用价值。
ai_content.method: 改进多尺度残差块（MSRB）增强全局信息获取能力，引入自适应重要性图网络优化比特分配，采用2D后量化滤波器降低量化误差，并设计非对称编解码结构（编码器三阶段MSRB，解码器单阶段MSRB）降低计算复杂度。
ai_content.result: 相比最新方法，编码解码速度提升17倍，Kodak和Tecnick数据集上率失真性能仅下降不足1%，优于H.266/VVC(4:4:4)及其他学习方法。
ai_content.conclusion: 所提方法通过非对称结构设计和多模块协同优化，在保持高压缩性能的同时实现显著复杂度降低，为实际部署提供有效解决方案。

search_text: Asymmetric Learned Image Compression with Multi-Scale Residual Block, Importance Map, and Post-Quantization Filtering 具有多尺度残差块、重要性图和后量化滤波的非对称学习图像压缩 Recently, deep learning-based image compression has made signifcant progresses, and has achieved better ratedistortion (R-D) performance than the latest traditional method, H.266/VVC, in both subjective metric and the more challenging objective metric. However, a major problem is that many leading learned schemes cannot maintain a good trade-off between performance and complexity. In this paper, we propose an effcient and effective image coding framework, which achieves similar R-D performance with lower complexity than the state of the art. First, we develop an improved multi-scale residual block (MSRB) that can expand the receptive feld and is easier to obtain global information. It can further capture and reduce the spatial correlation of the latent representations. Second, a more advanced importance map network is introduced to adaptively allocate bits to different regions of the image. Third, we apply a 2D post-quantization flter (PQF) to reduce the quantization error, motivated by the Sample Adaptive Offset (SAO) flter in video coding. Moreover, We fnd that the complexity of encoder and decoder have different effects on image compression performance. Based on this observation, we design an asymmetric paradigm, in which the encoder employs three stages of MSRBs to improve the learning capacity, whereas the decoder only needs one stage of MSRB to yield satisfactory reconstruction, thereby reducing the decoding complexity without sacrifcing performance. Experimental results show that compared to the state-of-the-art method, the encoding and decoding time of the proposed method are about 17 times faster, and the R-D performance is only reduced by less than 1% on both Kodak and Tecnick datasets, which is still better than H.266/VVC(4:4:4) and other recent learning-based methods. Our source code is publicly available at https://github.com/fengyurenpingsheng. 近年来，基于深度学习的图像压缩取得了重大进展，无论是在主观指标还是更具挑战性的客观指标上，都比最新的传统方法H.266/VVC取得了更好的率失真（R-D）性能。然而，一个主要问题是许多领先的学习方案无法在性能和复杂性之间保持良好的权衡。在本文中，我们提出了一种高效且有效的图像编码框架，该框架以低于现有技术的复杂性实现了类似的研发性能。首先，我们开发了一种改进的多尺度残差块（MSRB），它可以扩大感受野并且更容易获得全局信息。它可以进一步捕获和减少潜在表示的空间相关性。其次，引入了更先进的重要性图网络来自适应地将位分配到图像的不同区域。第三，受视频编码中样本自适应偏移（SAO）滤波器的启发，我们应用 2D 后量化滤波器（PQF）来减少量化误差。此外，我们发现编码器和解码器的复杂度对图像压缩性能有不同的影响。基于这一观察，我们设计了一种非对称范式，其中编码器采用三级 MSRB 来提高学习能力，而解码器只需要一级 MSRB 即可产生令人满意的重建，从而在不牺牲性能的情况下降低解码复杂度。实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，该方法的编码和解码时间大约快了17倍，并且在Kodak和Tecnick数据集上R-D性能仅降低了不到1%，这仍然优于H.266/VVC(4:4:4)和其他最近的基于学习的方法。我们的源代码可在 https://github.com/fengyurenpingsheng 上公开获取。 本文提出一种高效图像压缩框架，通过改进的多尺度残差块、重要性图网络和后量化滤波器，在保持与现有方法相近率失真性能的同时显著降低复杂度。 Haisheng Fu,Feng Liang,Jie Liang,Binglin Li,Guohe Zhang,Jingning Han eess.IV,cs.IT,cs.LG

title: On the Impossibility of Learning to Cooperate with Adaptive Partner Strategies in Repeated Games
title_zh: 论在重复博弈中学习与自适应伙伴策略合作的不可能性
comment: 9 pages, to be published in The Proceedings of the 39th International Conference on Machine Learning, 2022
comments: 9 pages, to be published in The Proceedings of the 39th International Conference on Machine Learning, 2022
abstract: Learning to cooperate with other agents is challenging when those agents also possess the ability to adapt to our own behavior. Practical and theoretical approaches to learning in cooperative settings typically assume that other agents' behaviors are stationary, or else make very specific assumptions about other agents' learning processes. The goal of this work is to understand whether we can reliably learn to cooperate with other agents without such restrictive assumptions, which are unlikely to hold in real-world applications. Our main contribution is a set of impossibility results, which show that no learning algorithm can reliably learn to cooperate with all possible adaptive partners in a repeated matrix game, even if that partner is guaranteed to cooperate with some stationary strategy. Motivated by these results, we then discuss potential alternative assumptions which capture the idea that an adaptive partner will only adapt rationally to our behavior.
summary: Learning to cooperate with other agents is challenging when those agents also possess the ability to adapt to our own behavior. Practical and theoretical approaches to learning in cooperative settings typically assume that other agents' behaviors are stationary, or else make very specific assumptions about other agents' learning processes. The goal of this work is to understand whether we can reliably learn to cooperate with other agents without such restrictive assumptions, which are unlikely to hold in real-world applications. Our main contribution is a set of impossibility results, which show that no learning algorithm can reliably learn to cooperate with all possible adaptive partners in a repeated matrix game, even if that partner is guaranteed to cooperate with some stationary strategy. Motivated by these results, we then discuss potential alternative assumptions which capture the idea that an adaptive partner will only adapt rationally to our behavior.
abstract_zh: 当其他智能体也具有适应我们自己行为的能力时，学习与其他智能体合作是一项挑战。在合作环境中学习的实践和理论方法通常假设其他代理的行为是固定的，或者对其他代理的学习过程做出非常具体的假设。这项工作的目标是了解我们是否能够在没有这种限制性假设的情况下可靠地学习与其他智能体合作，而这种限制性假设在现实世界的应用中不太可能成立。我们的主要贡献是一组不可能结果，这表明没有学习算法能够可靠地学习在重复矩阵博弈中与所有可能的自适应伙伴合作，即使该伙伴保证与某些固定策略合作。受这些结果的启发，我们然后讨论潜在的替代假设，这些假设体现了适应性伙伴只会理性地适应我们的行为的想法。

AI.tldr: 论文探讨在重复博弈中，是否存在可靠的学习算法能与适应性合作伙伴合作，而不需要对合作伙伴行为做限制性假设。
AI.motivation: 现有合作学习方法依赖于静态行为或特定假设，但现实场景中这些假设可能不成立，因此需要探讨在无此类假设下学习合作的可能性。
AI.method: 通过理论分析和不可能性证明，结合对替代假设的讨论，推导出合作学习的理论边界。
AI.result: 证明了在重复矩阵博弈中，任何学习算法都无法可靠地与所有可能的适应性合作伙伴合作，即使对方使用静态策略。
AI.conclusion: 传统假设不适用，需引入新假设（如理性适应）以指导未来算法设计。

title: The Right Tool for the Job: Open-Source Auditing Tools in Machine Learning
title_zh: 适合工作的工具：机器学习中的开源审计工具
abstract: In recent years, discussions about fairness in machine learning, AI ethics and algorithm audits have increased. Many entities have developed framework guidance to establish a baseline rubric for fairness and accountability. However, in spite of increased discussions and multiple frameworks, algorithm and data auditing still remain difficult to execute in practice. Many open-source auditing tools are available, but users aren't always aware of the tools, what they are useful for, or how to access them. Model auditing and evaluation are not frequently emphasized skills in machine learning. There are also legal reasons for the proactive adoption of these tools that extend beyond the desire for greater fairness in machine learning. There are positive social issues of public perception and goodwill that matter in our highly connected global society. Greater awareness of these tools and the reasons for actively utilizing them may be helpful to the entire continuum of programmers, data scientists, engineers, researchers, users and consumers of AI and machine learning products. It is important for everyone to better understand the input and output differentials, how they are occurring, and what can be done to promote FATE (fairness, accountability, transparency, and ethics) in machine- and deep learning. The ability to freely access open-source auditing tools removes barriers to fairness assessment at the most basic levels of machine learning. This paper aims to reinforce the urgent need to actually use these tools and provides motivations for doing so. The exemplary tools highlighted herein are open-source with software or code-base repositories available that can be used immediately by anyone worldwide.
summary: In recent years, discussions about fairness in machine learning, AI ethics and algorithm audits have increased. Many entities have developed framework guidance to establish a baseline rubric for fairness and accountability. However, in spite of increased discussions and multiple frameworks, algorithm and data auditing still remain difficult to execute in practice. Many open-source auditing tools are available, but users aren't always aware of the tools, what they are useful for, or how to access them. Model auditing and evaluation are not frequently emphasized skills in machine learning. There are also legal reasons for the proactive adoption of these tools that extend beyond the desire for greater fairness in machine learning. There are positive social issues of public perception and goodwill that matter in our highly connected global society. Greater awareness of these tools and the reasons for actively utilizing them may be helpful to the entire continuum of programmers, data scientists, engineers, researchers, users and consumers of AI and machine learning products. It is important for everyone to better understand the input and output differentials, how they are occurring, and what can be done to promote FATE (fairness, accountability, transparency, and ethics) in machine- and deep learning. The ability to freely access open-source auditing tools removes barriers to fairness assessment at the most basic levels of machine learning. This paper aims to reinforce the urgent need to actually use these tools and provides motivations for doing so. The exemplary tools highlighted herein are open-source with software or code-base repositories available that can be used immediately by anyone worldwide.
abstract_zh: 近年来，关于机器学习公平性、人工智能伦理和算法审计的讨论有所增加。许多实体制定了框架指南，以建立公平和问责制的基准准则。然而，尽管讨论增多并有多种框架，但算法和数据审计在实践中仍然难以执行。有许多开源审计工具可供使用，但用户并不总是了解这些工具、它们的用途或如何访问它们。模型审核和评估并不是机器学习中经常强调的技能。主动采用这些工具还有法律原因，超出了机器学习更大公平性的愿望。在我们高度互联的全球社会中，公众认知和善意等积极的社会问题至关重要。提高对这些工具的认识以及积极利用它们的原因可能会对人工智能和机器学习产品的程序员、数据科学家、工程师、研究人员、用户和消费者的整个连续体有所帮助。对于每个人来说，更好地理解输入和输出差异、它们是如何发生的以及可以采取哪些措施来促进机器学习和深度学习中的 FATE（公平、问责、透明和道德）非常重要。自由访问开源审计工具的能力消除了机器学习最基本层面的公平性评估的障碍。本文旨在强调实际使用这些工具的迫切需要，并提供这样做的动机。这里强调的示例性工具是开源的，具有可用的软件或代码库，全世界任何人都可以立即使用。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在强调使用开源审计工具在机器学习中的重要性，并介绍相关工具的用途及获取方式。
AI.motivation: 推动机器学习公平性、法律合规性及社会责任感，提升公众对AI技术的信任度。
AI.method: 通过综述现有开源审计工具的功能与应用场景，分析其在实践中的价值与使用障碍。
AI.result: 提高对审计工具的认知，促进公平性、透明度等FATE原则在机器学习中的实施。
AI.conclusion: 开源审计工具是实现AI伦理与公平性的关键，应被广泛采用以消除技术应用中的潜在风险。

Many entities have developed framework guidance to establish a baseline rubric for fairness and accountability. However, in spite of increased discussions and multiple frameworks, algorithm and data auditing still remain difficult to execute in practice. Many open-source auditing tools are available, but users aren't always aware of the tools, what they are useful for, or how to access them. Model auditing and evaluation are not frequently emphasized skills in machine learning. There are also legal reasons for the proactive adoption of these tools that extend beyond the desire for greater fairness in machine learning. There are positive social issues of public perception and goodwill that matter in our highly connected global society. Greater awareness of these tools and the reasons for actively utilizing them may be helpful to the entire continuum of programmers, data scientists, engineers, researchers, users and consumers of AI and machine learning products. It is important for everyone to better understand the input and output differentials, how they are occurring, and what can be done to promote FATE (fairness, accountability, transparency, and ethics) in machine- and deep learning. The ability to freely access open-source auditing tools removes barriers to fairness assessment at the most basic levels of machine learning. This paper aims to reinforce the urgent need to actually use these tools and provides motivations for doing so. The exemplary tools highlighted herein are open-source with software or code-base repositories available that can be used immediately by anyone worldwide. 近年来，关于机器学习公平性、人工智能伦理和算法审计的讨论有所增加。许多实体制定了框架指南，以建立公平和问责制的基准准则。然而，尽管讨论增多并有多种框架，但算法和数据审计在实践中仍然难以执行。有许多开源审计工具可供使用，但用户并不总是了解这些工具、它们的用途或如何访问它们。模型审核和评估并不是机器学习中经常强调的技能。主动采用这些工具还有法律原因，超出了机器学习更大公平性的愿望。在我们高度互联的全球社会中，公众认知和善意等积极的社会问题至关重要。提高对这些工具的认识以及积极利用它们的原因可能会对人工智能和机器学习产品的程序员、数据科学家、工程师、研究人员、用户和消费者的整个连续体有所帮助。对于每个人来说，更好地理解输入和输出差异、它们是如何发生的以及可以采取哪些措施来促进机器学习和深度学习中的 FATE（公平、问责、透明和道德）非常重要。自由访问开源审计工具的能力消除了机器学习最基本层面的公平性评估的障碍。本文旨在强调实际使用这些工具的迫切需要，并提供这样做的动机。这里强调的示例性工具是开源的，具有可用的软件或代码库，全世界任何人都可以立即使用。 本文旨在强调使用开源审计工具在机器学习中的重要性，并介绍相关工具的用途及获取方式。 Cherie M Poland cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CY

title: Neural Activation Patterns (NAPs): Visual Explainability of Learned Concepts
title_zh: 神经激活模式 (NAP)：所学概念的视觉可解释性
abstract: A key to deciphering the inner workings of neural networks is understanding what a model has learned. Promising methods for discovering learned features are based on analyzing activation values, whereby current techniques focus on analyzing high activation values to reveal interesting features on a neuron level. However, analyzing high activation values limits layer-level concept discovery. We present a method that instead takes into account the entire activation distribution. By extracting similar activation profiles within the high-dimensional activation space of a neural network layer, we find groups of inputs that are treated similarly. These input groups represent neural activation patterns (NAPs) and can be used to visualize and interpret learned layer concepts. We release a framework with which NAPs can be extracted from pre-trained models and provide a visual introspection tool that can be used to analyze NAPs. We tested our method with a variety of networks and show how it complements existing methods for analyzing neural network activation values.
summary: A key to deciphering the inner workings of neural networks is understanding what a model has learned. Promising methods for discovering learned features are based on analyzing activation values, whereby current techniques focus on analyzing high activation values to reveal interesting features on a neuron level. However, analyzing high activation values limits layer-level concept discovery. We present a method that instead takes into account the entire activation distribution. By extracting similar activation profiles within the high-dimensional activation space of a neural network layer, we find groups of inputs that are treated similarly. These input groups represent neural activation patterns (NAPs) and can be used to visualize and interpret learned layer concepts. We release a framework with which NAPs can be extracted from pre-trained models and provide a visual introspection tool that can be used to analyze NAPs. We tested our method with a variety of networks and show how it complements existing methods for analyzing neural network activation values.
abstract_zh: 破译神经网络内部运作的关键是了解模型学到了什么。发现学习特征的有前景的方法基于分析激活值，当前技术侧重于分析高激活值以揭示神经元级别的有趣特征。然而，分析高激活值限制了层级概念发现。我们提出了一种考虑整个激活分布的方法。通过在神经网络层的高维激活空间中提取相似的激活配置文件，我们找到了经过类似处理的输入组。这些输入组代表神经激活模式 (NAP)，可用于可视化和解释学习的层概念。我们发布了一个框架，可以使用该框架从预先训练的模型中提取 NAP，并提供可用于分析 NAP 的可视化内省工具。我们用各种网络测试了我们的方法，并展示了它如何补充现有的分析神经网络激活值的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过分析神经网络激活分布来可视化和解释学习概念的方法，称为神经激活模式（NAPs）。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅关注高激活值，限制了层级概念的发现，需通过分析完整激活分布以更全面理解模型学习过程。
AI.method: 通过提取高维激活空间中的相似激活分布，将输入分组为处理方式相似的NAPs，并开发了提取框架和可视化工具。
AI.result: 在多种网络上测试表明，该方法能有效补充现有激活值分析技术，提升对神经网络概念的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: NAPs方法通过全面分析激活分布，为神经网络的可视化解释提供了新视角和实用工具。

title: Stop ordering machine learning algorithms by their explainability! A user-centered investigation of performance and explainability
title_zh: 不要再根据机器学习算法的可解释性来排序！以用户为中心的性能和可解释性调查
abstract: Machine learning algorithms enable advanced decision making in contemporary intelligent systems. Research indicates that there is a tradeoff between their model performance and explainability. Machine learning models with higher performance are often based on more complex algorithms and therefore lack explainability and vice versa. However, there is little to no empirical evidence of this tradeoff from an end user perspective. We aim to provide empirical evidence by conducting two user experiments. Using two distinct datasets, we first measure the tradeoff for five common classes of machine learning algorithms. Second, we address the problem of end user perceptions of explainable artificial intelligence augmentations aimed at increasing the understanding of the decision logic of high-performing complex models. Our results diverge from the widespread assumption of a tradeoff curve and indicate that the tradeoff between model performance and explainability is much less gradual in the end user's perception. This is a stark contrast to assumed inherent model interpretability. Further, we found the tradeoff to be situational for example due to data complexity. Results of our second experiment show that while explainable artificial intelligence augmentations can be used to increase explainability, the type of explanation plays an essential role in end user perception.
summary: Machine learning algorithms enable advanced decision making in contemporary intelligent systems. Research indicates that there is a tradeoff between their model performance and explainability. Machine learning models with higher performance are often based on more complex algorithms and therefore lack explainability and vice versa. However, there is little to no empirical evidence of this tradeoff from an end user perspective. We aim to provide empirical evidence by conducting two user experiments. Using two distinct datasets, we first measure the tradeoff for five common classes of machine learning algorithms. Second, we address the problem of end user perceptions of explainable artificial intelligence augmentations aimed at increasing the understanding of the decision logic of high-performing complex models. Our results diverge from the widespread assumption of a tradeoff curve and indicate that the tradeoff between model performance and explainability is much less gradual in the end user's perception. This is a stark contrast to assumed inherent model interpretability. Further, we found the tradeoff to be situational for example due to data complexity. Results of our second experiment show that while explainable artificial intelligence augmentations can be used to increase explainability, the type of explanation plays an essential role in end user perception.
abstract_zh: 机器学习算法可在当代智能系统中实现高级决策。研究表明，他们的模型性能和可解释性之间存在权衡。具有较高性能的机器学习模型通常基于更复杂的算法，因此缺乏可解释性，反之亦然。然而，从最终用户的角度来看，几乎没有任何经验证据证明这种权衡。我们的目标是通过进行两个用户实验来提供经验证据。使用两个不同的数据集，我们首先衡量五种常见机器学习算法类别的权衡。其次，我们解决了最终用户对可解释的人工智能增强的看法问题，旨在增加对高性能复杂模型决策逻辑的理解。我们的结果与权衡曲线的广泛假设不同，表明模型性能和可解释性之间的权衡在最终用户的感知中并不是渐进的。这与假设的固有模型可解释性形成鲜明对比。此外，我们发现这种权衡是视情况而定的，例如由于数据复杂性。我们第二个实验的结果表明，虽然可解释的人工智能增强可用于提高可解释性，但解释的类型在最终用户的感知中起着至关重要的作用。

AI.tldr: 通过用户实验验证机器学习算法性能与可解释性之间的权衡关系，并研究用户对可解释AI增强的感知。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为模型性能与可解释性存在权衡，但缺乏用户视角的实证研究，需验证该假设并探索用户对解释性增强的实际需求。
AI.method: 开展两项用户实验，使用两个独立数据集，评估五类机器学习算法的性能-可解释性权衡，并测试不同解释类型对用户理解复杂模型的影响。
AI.result: 用户感知的权衡曲线比理论假设更陡峭，且受数据复杂度等情境因素影响；解释类型显著影响用户对AI决策逻辑的理解效果。
AI.conclusion: 传统性能-可解释性权衡假设不完全成立，实际应用中需结合用户认知特点与具体场景设计解释性增强方案。

title: Autoencoder-based Attribute Noise Handling Method for Medical Data
title_zh: 基于自编码器的医疗数据属性噪声处理方法
abstract: Medical datasets are particularly subject to attribute noise, that is, missing and erroneous values. Attribute noise is known to be largely detrimental to learning performances. To maximize future learning performances it is primordial to deal with attribute noise before any inference. We propose a simple autoencoder-based preprocessing method that can correct mixed-type tabular data corrupted by attribute noise. No other method currently exists to handle attribute noise in tabular data. We experimentally demonstrate that our method outperforms both state-of-the-art imputation methods and noise correction methods on several real-world medical datasets.
summary: Medical datasets are particularly subject to attribute noise, that is, missing and erroneous values. Attribute noise is known to be largely detrimental to learning performances. To maximize future learning performances it is primordial to deal with attribute noise before any inference. We propose a simple autoencoder-based preprocessing method that can correct mixed-type tabular data corrupted by attribute noise. No other method currently exists to handle attribute noise in tabular data. We experimentally demonstrate that our method outperforms both state-of-the-art imputation methods and noise correction methods on several real-world medical datasets.
abstract_zh: 医学数据集特别容易受到属性噪声的影响，即缺失值和错误值。众所周知，属性噪声很大程度上不利于学习表现。为了最大限度地提高未来的学习表现，首先要在任何推理之前处理属性噪声。我们提出了一种简单的基于自动编码器的预处理方法，可以纠正属性噪声损坏的混合类型表格数据。目前不存在其他方法来处理表格数据中的属性噪声。我们通过实验证明，我们的方法在几个真实世界的医学数据集上优于最先进的插补方法和噪声校正方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自编码器的医疗数据属性噪声处理方法，用于纠正混合类型表格数据中的缺失和错误值。
AI.motivation: 医疗数据易受属性噪声影响，现有方法无法有效处理混合类型表格数据中的噪声，导致学习性能下降。
AI.method: 设计自编码器预处理框架，通过编码-解码结构学习数据分布并修正噪声，支持数值型与类别型数据混合输入。
AI.result: 在多个真实医疗数据集上验证，该方法优于现有插补和噪声校正技术，显著提升后续学习任务性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的自编码器方法有效解决了医疗表格数据属性噪声问题，为噪声处理领域提供新方案。

search_text: Autoencoder-based Attribute Noise Handling Method for Medical Data 基于自编码器的医疗数据属性噪声处理方法 Medical datasets are particularly subject to attribute noise, that is, missing and erroneous values. Attribute noise is known to be largely detrimental to learning performances. To maximize future learning performances it is primordial to deal with attribute noise before any inference. We propose a simple autoencoder-based preprocessing method that can correct mixed-type tabular data corrupted by attribute noise. No other method currently exists to handle attribute noise in tabular data. We experimentally demonstrate that our method outperforms both state-of-the-art imputation methods and noise correction methods on several real-world medical datasets. 医学数据集特别容易受到属性噪声的影响，即缺失值和错误值。众所周知，属性噪声很大程度上不利于学习表现。为了最大限度地提高未来的学习表现，首先要在任何推理之前处理属性噪声。我们提出了一种简单的基于自动编码器的预处理方法，可以纠正属性噪声损坏的混合类型表格数据。目前不存在其他方法来处理表格数据中的属性噪声。我们通过实验证明，我们的方法在几个真实世界的医学数据集上优于最先进的插补方法和噪声校正方法。 本文提出一种基于自编码器的医疗数据属性噪声处理方法，用于纠正混合类型表格数据中的缺失和错误值。 Thomas Ranvier,Haytham Elgazel,Emmanuel Coquery,Khalid Benabdeslem cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.NE

authors_text: Ya-Chuan Hsu,Matthew C. Fontaine,Sam Earle,Maria Edwards,Julian Togelius,Stefanos Nikolaidis
title: Generating Diverse Indoor Furniture Arrangements
title_zh: 生成多样化的室内家具布置
abstract: We present a method for generating arrangements of indoor furniture from human-designed furniture layout data. Our method creates arrangements that target specified diversity, such as the total price of all furniture in the room and the number of pieces placed. To generate realistic furniture arrangement, we train a generative adversarial network (GAN) on human-designed layouts. To target specific diversity in the arrangements, we optimize the latent space of the GAN via a quality diversity algorithm to generate a diverse arrangement collection. Experiments show our approach discovers a set of arrangements that are similar to human-designed layouts but varies in price and number of furniture pieces.
summary: We present a method for generating arrangements of indoor furniture from human-designed furniture layout data. Our method creates arrangements that target specified diversity, such as the total price of all furniture in the room and the number of pieces placed. To generate realistic furniture arrangement, we train a generative adversarial network (GAN) on human-designed layouts. To target specific diversity in the arrangements, we optimize the latent space of the GAN via a quality diversity algorithm to generate a diverse arrangement collection. Experiments show our approach discovers a set of arrangements that are similar to human-designed layouts but varies in price and number of furniture pieces.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种根据人工设计的家具布局数据生成室内家具布置的方法。我们的方法创建针对特定多样性的安排，例如房间中所有家具的总价和放置的件数。为了生成真实的家具布置，我们在人类设计的布局上训练生成对抗网络（GAN）。 To target specific diversity in the arrangements, we optimize the latent space of the GAN via a quality diversity algorithm to generate a diverse arrangement collection.实验表明，我们的方法发现了一组与人类设计的布局相似的排列方式，但价格和家具数量有所不同。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种方法，利用GAN生成符合指定多样性的室内家具布局，如总价和家具数量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以生成满足特定多样性指标（如价格、家具数量）的多样化室内布局，需改进以满足实际需求。
AI.method: 训练GAN模型学习人类设计布局，利用质量多样性算法优化潜在空间，生成符合多样性和真实性的家具排列。
AI.result: 实验表明，生成的布局与人类设计相似，但价格和家具数量具有多样性，满足指定指标。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效生成符合多样性指标的高质量家具布局，为室内设计提供新工具。

title: MASER: Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning with Subgoals Generated from Experience Replay Buffer
title_zh: MASER：具有从经验重播缓冲区生成的子目标的多代理强化学习
abstract: In this paper, we consider cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) with sparse reward. To tackle this problem, we propose a novel method named MASER: MARL with subgoals generated from experience replay buffer. Under the widely-used assumption of centralized training with decentralized execution and consistent Q-value decomposition for MARL, MASER automatically generates proper subgoals for multiple agents from the experience replay buffer by considering both individual Q-value and total Q-value. Then, MASER designs individual intrinsic reward for each agent based on actionable representation relevant to Q-learning so that the agents reach their subgoals while maximizing the joint action value. Numerical results show that MASER significantly outperforms StarCraft II micromanagement benchmark compared to other state-of-the-art MARL algorithms.
summary: In this paper, we consider cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) with sparse reward. To tackle this problem, we propose a novel method named MASER: MARL with subgoals generated from experience replay buffer. Under the widely-used assumption of centralized training with decentralized execution and consistent Q-value decomposition for MARL, MASER automatically generates proper subgoals for multiple agents from the experience replay buffer by considering both individual Q-value and total Q-value. Then, MASER designs individual intrinsic reward for each agent based on actionable representation relevant to Q-learning so that the agents reach their subgoals while maximizing the joint action value. Numerical results show that MASER significantly outperforms StarCraft II micromanagement benchmark compared to other state-of-the-art MARL algorithms.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑具有稀疏奖励的协作多智能体强化学习（MARL）。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种名为 MASER: MARL 的新方法，其子目标是从经验重播缓冲区生成的。在 MARL 广泛使用的集中训练、分散执行和一致 Q 值分解的假设下，MASER 通过考虑个体 Q 值和总 Q 值，自动从经验回放缓冲区中为多个代理生成适当的子目标。然后，MASER 基于与 Q 学习相关的可操作表示为每个智能体设计单独的内在奖励，以便智能体在最大化联合行动价值的同时实现其子目标。数值结果表明，与其他最先进的 MARL 算法相比，MASER 的性能显着优于《星际争霸 II》微观管理基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MASER方法，通过从经验回放缓冲区生成子目标，解决稀疏奖励下的多智能体强化学习问题。
AI.motivation: 在稀疏奖励场景下，传统多智能体强化学习方法难以有效引导智能体协作学习，需设计子目标以提升学习效率。
AI.method: MASER结合集中训练与分散执行框架，基于经验回放缓冲区中的个体Q值和总体Q值生成子目标，并为每个智能体设计内在奖励以促进子目标达成。
AI.result: 在StarCraft II微管理基准测试中，MASER显著优于其他先进MARL算法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: MASER通过子目标生成与内在奖励机制，有效解决了稀疏奖励下的多智能体协作难题，为MARL提供了新思路。

title: Good Time to Ask: A Learning Framework for Asking for Help in Embodied Visual Navigation
title_zh: 提问的好时机：在具体视觉导航中寻求帮助的学习框架
abstract: In reality, it is often more efficient to ask for help than to search the entire space to find an object with an unknown location. We present a learning framework that enables an agent to actively ask for help in such embodied visual navigation tasks, where the feedback informs the agent of where the goal is in its view. To emulate the real-world scenario that a teacher may not always be present, we propose a training curriculum where feedback is not always available. We formulate an uncertainty measure of where the goal is and use empirical results to show that through this approach, the agent learns to ask for help effectively while remaining robust when feedback is not available.
summary: In reality, it is often more efficient to ask for help than to search the entire space to find an object with an unknown location. We present a learning framework that enables an agent to actively ask for help in such embodied visual navigation tasks, where the feedback informs the agent of where the goal is in its view. To emulate the real-world scenario that a teacher may not always be present, we propose a training curriculum where feedback is not always available. We formulate an uncertainty measure of where the goal is and use empirical results to show that through this approach, the agent learns to ask for help effectively while remaining robust when feedback is not available.
abstract_zh: 事实上，寻求帮助通常比搜索整个空间来寻找位置未知的物体更有效。我们提出了一个学习框架，使代理能够在此类具体视觉导航任务中主动寻求帮助，其中反馈告知代理其目标在哪里。为了模拟教师可能并不总是在场的现实场景，我们提出了一种并不总是可以获得反馈的培训课程。我们制定了目标所在的不确定性度量，并使用实证结果表明，通过这种方法，代理学会有效地寻求帮助，同时在无法获得反馈时保持稳健。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种学习框架，使具身视觉导航智能体能够主动在需要时请求帮助以提高导航效率。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中主动求助比盲目搜索更高效，但现有方法缺乏对反馈不可用场景的鲁棒性，需让智能体自主判断求助时机。
AI.method: 设计渐进式训练课程模拟真实反馈缺失场景，通过不确定性度量模型量化目标位置置信度，结合强化学习训练智能体决策何时求助。
AI.result: 实验表明智能体能有效学习求助策略，在反馈存在时加速导航，反馈缺失时仍保持基础导航能力，优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为具身智能体提供了动态求助能力，通过不确定性驱动的决策机制实现了有反馈与无反馈场景下的性能平衡。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种学习框架，使具身视觉导航智能体能够主动在需要时请求帮助以提高导航效率。

ai_content.result: 实验表明智能体能有效学习求助策略，在反馈存在时加速导航，反馈缺失时仍保持基础导航能力，优于基线方法。
ai_content.conclusion: 该框架为具身智能体提供了动态求助能力，通过不确定性驱动的决策机制实现了有反馈与无反馈场景下的性能平衡。

search_text: Good Time to Ask: A Learning Framework for Asking for Help in Embodied Visual Navigation 提问的好时机：在具体视觉导航中寻求帮助的学习框架 In reality, it is often more efficient to ask for help than to search the entire space to find an object with an unknown location. We present a learning framework that enables an agent to actively ask for help in such embodied visual navigation tasks, where the feedback informs the agent of where the goal is in its view. To emulate the real-world scenario that a teacher may not always be present, we propose a training curriculum where feedback is not always available. We formulate an uncertainty measure of where the goal is and use empirical results to show that through this approach, the agent learns to ask for help effectively while remaining robust when feedback is not available. 事实上，寻求帮助通常比搜索整个空间来寻找位置未知的物体更有效。我们提出了一个学习框架，使代理能够在此类具体视觉导航任务中主动寻求帮助，其中反馈告知代理其目标在哪里。为了模拟教师可能并不总是在场的现实场景，我们提出了一种并不总是可以获得反馈的培训课程。我们制定了目标所在的不确定性度量，并使用实证结果表明，通过这种方法，代理学会有效地寻求帮助，同时在无法获得反馈时保持稳健。 本文提出一种学习框架，使具身视觉导航智能体能够主动在需要时请求帮助以提高导航效率。 Jenny Zhang,Samson Yu,Jiafei Duan,Cheston Tan cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Artificial intelligence system based on multi-value classification of fully connected neural network for construction management
title_zh: 基于全连接神经网络多值分类的施工管理人工智能系统
abstract: This study is devoted to solving the problem to determine the professional adaptive capabilities of construction management staff using artificial intelligence systems.It is proposed Fully Connected Feed-Forward Neural Network architecture and performed empirical modeling to create a Data Set. Model of artificial intelligence system allows evaluating the processes in an Fully Connected Feed-Forward Neural Network during the execution of multi-value classification of professional areas. A method has been developed for the training process of a machine learning model, which reflects the internal connections between the components of an artificial intelligence system that allow it to learn from training data. To train the neural network, a data set of 35 input parameters and 29 output parameters was used; the amount of data in the set is 936 data lines. Neural network training occurred in the proportion of 10% and 90%, respectively. Results of this study research can be used to further improve the knowledge and skills necessary for successful professional realization.
summary: This study is devoted to solving the problem to determine the professional adaptive capabilities of construction management staff using artificial intelligence systems.It is proposed Fully Connected Feed-Forward Neural Network architecture and performed empirical modeling to create a Data Set. Model of artificial intelligence system allows evaluating the processes in an Fully Connected Feed-Forward Neural Network during the execution of multi-value classification of professional areas. A method has been developed for the training process of a machine learning model, which reflects the internal connections between the components of an artificial intelligence system that allow it to learn from training data. To train the neural network, a data set of 35 input parameters and 29 output parameters was used; the amount of data in the set is 936 data lines. Neural network training occurred in the proportion of 10% and 90%, respectively. Results of this study research can be used to further improve the knowledge and skills necessary for successful professional realization.
abstract_zh: 本研究致力于利用人工智能系统解决确定施工管理人员专业适应能力的问题。提出了全连接前馈神经网络架构并进行了实证建模以创建数据集。人工智能系统模型允许在执行专业领域的多值分类期间评估全连接前馈神经网络中的过程。我们已经开发了一种用于机器学习模型训练过程的方法，该方法反映了人工智能系统组件之间的内部联系，使其能够从训练数据中学习。为了训练神经网络，使用了 35 个输入参数和 29 个输出参数的数据集；该集中的数据量为936条数据线。神经网络训练发生的比例分别为10%和90%。本研究的结果可用于进一步提高成功实现专业实现所需的知识和技能。

AI.tldr: 开发基于全连接神经网络的AI系统，通过多值分类评估工程管理专业人员的适应能力。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以有效评估工程管理专业人员的适应能力，需借助AI提升评估效率和准确性。
AI.method: 构建全连接前馈神经网络架构，使用包含35个输入参数和29个输出参数的936条数据集，按10%验证集与90%训练集比例训练模型。
AI.result: 模型可有效评估多值分类过程，结果可用于提升专业能力相关知识和技能。
AI.conclusion: 该AI系统为工程管理领域专业能力评估提供新方法，未来可进一步优化模型参数与应用场景。

title: A deep inverse reinforcement learning approach to route choice modeling with context-dependent rewards
title_zh: 一种具有上下文相关奖励的深度逆强化学习方法，用于路线选择建模
comment: ef:Transportation Research Part C: Emerging Technologies, 149, 104079 (2023)
comments: ef:Transportation Research Part C: Emerging Technologies, 149, 104079 (2023)
abstract: Route choice modeling is a fundamental task in transportation planning and demand forecasting. Classical methods generally adopt the discrete choice model (DCM) framework with linear utility functions and high-level route characteristics. While several recent studies have started to explore the applicability of deep learning for route choice modeling, they are limited to path-based models with relatively simple model architectures and relying on predefined choice sets. Existing link-based models can capture the dynamic nature of link choices within the trip without the need for choice set generation, but still assume linear relationships and link-additive features. To address these issues, this study proposes a general deep inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) framework for link-based route choice modeling, which is capable of incorporating diverse features (of the state, action and trip context) and capturing complex relationships. Specifically, we adapt an adversarial IRL model to the route choice problem for efficient estimation of context-dependent reward functions without value iteration. Experiment results based on taxi GPS data from Shanghai, China validate the superior prediction performance of the proposed model over conventional DCMs and other imitation learning baselines, even for destinations unseen in the training data. Further analysis show that the model exhibits competitive computational efficiency and reasonable interpretability. The proposed methodology provides a new direction for future development of route choice models. It is general and can be adaptable to other route choice problems across different modes and networks.
summary: Route choice modeling is a fundamental task in transportation planning and demand forecasting. Classical methods generally adopt the discrete choice model (DCM) framework with linear utility functions and high-level route characteristics. While several recent studies have started to explore the applicability of deep learning for route choice modeling, they are limited to path-based models with relatively simple model architectures and relying on predefined choice sets. Existing link-based models can capture the dynamic nature of link choices within the trip without the need for choice set generation, but still assume linear relationships and link-additive features. To address these issues, this study proposes a general deep inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) framework for link-based route choice modeling, which is capable of incorporating diverse features (of the state, action and trip context) and capturing complex relationships. Specifically, we adapt an adversarial IRL model to the route choice problem for efficient estimation of context-dependent reward functions without value iteration. Experiment results based on taxi GPS data from Shanghai, China validate the superior prediction performance of the proposed model over conventional DCMs and other imitation learning baselines, even for destinations unseen in the training data. Further analysis show that the model exhibits competitive computational efficiency and reasonable interpretability. The proposed methodology provides a new direction for future development of route choice models. It is general and can be adaptable to other route choice problems across different modes and networks.
abstract_zh: 路线选择建模是交通规划和需求预测中的一项基本任务。经典方法通常采用具有线性效用函数和高级路径特征的离散选择模型（DCM）框架。虽然最近的几项研究已经开始探索深度学习在路线选择建模中的适用性，但它们仅限于具有相对简单模型架构并依赖于预定义选择集的基于路径的模型。现有的基于链接的模型可以捕获行程中链接选择的动态性质，而不需要生成选择集，但仍然假设线性关系和链接附加特征。为了解决这些问题，本研究提出了一种用于基于链接的路线选择建模的通用深度逆强化学习（IRL）框架，该框架能够合并不同的特征（状态、动作和行程上下文）并捕获复杂的关系。 Specifically, we adapt an adversarial IRL model to the route choice problem for efficient estimation of context-dependent reward functions without value iteration.基于中国上海出租车 GPS 数据的实验结果验证了所提出的模型相对于传统 DCM 和其他模仿学习基线的优越预测性能，即使对于训练数据中未见的目的地也是如此。进一步分析表明，该模型表现出有竞争力的计算效率和合理的可解释性。所提出的方法为路线选择模型的未来发展提供了新的方向。它具有通用性，可以适应不同模式和网络的其他路由选择问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度逆强化学习的链路级路线选择建模方法，以捕捉动态路径选择中的复杂关系。
AI.motivation: 传统离散选择模型（DCM）假设线性关系且依赖预定义选择集，现有深度学习方法在模型架构和特征表达上存在局限性。
AI.method: 采用对抗逆强化学习（IRL）框架，通过状态、动作和行程上下文特征估计上下文相关奖励函数，无需价值迭代。
AI.result: 基于上海出租车GPS数据的实验表明，该模型在预测性能、计算效率和可解释性方面优于传统DCM和其他模仿学习基线。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为路线选择模型提供了新方向，具有跨交通方式和网络的通用适应性。

search_text: A deep inverse reinforcement learning approach to route choice modeling with context-dependent rewards 一种具有上下文相关奖励的深度逆强化学习方法，用于路线选择建模 Route choice modeling is a fundamental task in transportation planning and demand forecasting. Classical methods generally adopt the discrete choice model (DCM) framework with linear utility functions and high-level route characteristics. While several recent studies have started to explore the applicability of deep learning for route choice modeling, they are limited to path-based models with relatively simple model architectures and relying on predefined choice sets. Existing link-based models can capture the dynamic nature of link choices within the trip without the need for choice set generation, but still assume linear relationships and link-additive features. To address these issues, this study proposes a general deep inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) framework for link-based route choice modeling, which is capable of incorporating diverse features (of the state, action and trip context) and capturing complex relationships. Specifically, we adapt an adversarial IRL model to the route choice problem for efficient estimation of context-dependent reward functions without value iteration. Experiment results based on taxi GPS data from Shanghai, China validate the superior prediction performance of the proposed model over conventional DCMs and other imitation learning baselines, even for destinations unseen in the training data. Further analysis show that the model exhibits competitive computational efficiency and reasonable interpretability. The proposed methodology provides a new direction for future development of route choice models. It is general and can be adaptable to other route choice problems across different modes and networks. 路线选择建模是交通规划和需求预测中的一项基本任务。经典方法通常采用具有线性效用函数和高级路径特征的离散选择模型（DCM）框架。虽然最近的几项研究已经开始探索深度学习在路线选择建模中的适用性，但它们仅限于具有相对简单模型架构并依赖于预定义选择集的基于路径的模型。现有的基于链接的模型可以捕获行程中链接选择的动态性质，而不需要生成选择集，但仍然假设线性关系和链接附加特征。为了解决这些问题，本研究提出了一种用于基于链接的路线选择建模的通用深度逆强化学习（IRL）框架，该框架能够合并不同的特征（状态、动作和行程上下文）并捕获复杂的关系。 Specifically, we adapt an adversarial IRL model to the route choice problem for efficient estimation of context-dependent reward functions without value iteration.基于中国上海出租车 GPS 数据的实验结果验证了所提出的模型相对于传统 DCM 和其他模仿学习基线的优越预测性能，即使对于训练数据中未见的目的地也是如此。进一步分析表明，该模型表现出有竞争力的计算效率和合理的可解释性。所提出的方法为路线选择模型的未来发展提供了新的方向。它具有通用性，可以适应不同模式和网络的其他路由选择问题。 本文提出一种基于深度逆强化学习的链路级路线选择建模方法，以捕捉动态路径选择中的复杂关系。 Zhan Zhao,Yuebing Liang cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Demystifying the Base and Novel Performances for Few-shot Class-incremental Learning
title_zh: 揭秘少样本类增量学习的基础和新颖性能
abstract: Few-shot class-incremental learning (FSCIL) has addressed challenging real-world scenarios where unseen novel classes continually arrive with few samples. In these scenarios, it is required to develop a model that recognizes the novel classes without forgetting prior knowledge. In other words, FSCIL aims to maintain the base performance and improve the novel performance simultaneously. However, there is little study to investigate the two performances separately. In this paper, we first decompose the entire model into four types of parameters and demonstrate that the tendency of the two performances varies greatly with the updated parameters when the novel classes appear. Based on the analysis, we propose a simple method for FSCIL, coined as NoNPC, which uses normalized prototype classifiers without further training for incremental novel classes. It is shown that our straightforward method has comparable performance with the sophisticated state-of-the-art algorithms.
summary: Few-shot class-incremental learning (FSCIL) has addressed challenging real-world scenarios where unseen novel classes continually arrive with few samples. In these scenarios, it is required to develop a model that recognizes the novel classes without forgetting prior knowledge. In other words, FSCIL aims to maintain the base performance and improve the novel performance simultaneously. However, there is little study to investigate the two performances separately. In this paper, we first decompose the entire model into four types of parameters and demonstrate that the tendency of the two performances varies greatly with the updated parameters when the novel classes appear. Based on the analysis, we propose a simple method for FSCIL, coined as NoNPC, which uses normalized prototype classifiers without further training for incremental novel classes. It is shown that our straightforward method has comparable performance with the sophisticated state-of-the-art algorithms.
abstract_zh: 少镜头类增量学习（FSCIL）解决了具有挑战性的现实场景，其中看不见的新类不断地以很少的样本到达。在这些场景中，需要开发一个模型来识别新类别而不忘记先验知识。换句话说，FSCIL 的目标是在保持基本性能的同时提高新颖性能。然而，很少有研究分别考察这两种性能。在本文中，我们首先将整个模型分解为四种类型的参数，并证明当新类别出现时，两种性能的趋势随着更新的参数而变化很大。基于分析，我们提出了一种简单的 FSCIL 方法，称为 NoNPC，它使用归一化原型分类器，无需对增量新颖类进行进一步训练。结果表明，我们的简单方法具有与复杂的最先进算法相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 解决小样本类别增量学习中的挑战，同时保持基础性能并提升新类性能
AI.motivation: 现有研究未单独分析基础与新类性能，导致方法复杂，需探索更有效策略
AI.method: 提出NoNPC方法，利用归一化原型分类器，无需额外训练增量新类
AI.result: 实验显示方法性能与复杂算法相当，验证有效性
AI.conclusion: 参数分解有助于理解性能变化，简单方法有效，为后续研究提供方向

title: A Survey on Computational Intelligence-based Transfer Learning
title_zh: 基于计算智能的迁移学习综述
abstract: The goal of transfer learning (TL) is providing a framework for exploiting acquired knowledge from source to target data. Transfer learning approaches compared to traditional machine learning approaches are capable of modeling better data patterns from the current domain. However, vanilla TL needs performance improvements by using computational intelligence-based TL. This paper studies computational intelligence-based transfer learning techniques and categorizes them into neural network-based, evolutionary algorithm-based, swarm intelligence-based and fuzzy logic-based transfer learning.
summary: The goal of transfer learning (TL) is providing a framework for exploiting acquired knowledge from source to target data. Transfer learning approaches compared to traditional machine learning approaches are capable of modeling better data patterns from the current domain. However, vanilla TL needs performance improvements by using computational intelligence-based TL. This paper studies computational intelligence-based transfer learning techniques and categorizes them into neural network-based, evolutionary algorithm-based, swarm intelligence-based and fuzzy logic-based transfer learning.
abstract_zh: 迁移学习（TL）的目标是提供一个框架，用于利用从源数据到目标数据所获得的知识。与传统机器学习方法相比，迁移学习方法能够对当前领域更好的数据模式进行建模。然而，vanilla TL 需要通过使用基于计算智能的 TL 来提高性能。本文研究基于计算智能的迁移学习技术，并将其分类为基于神经网络、基于进化算法、基于群体智能和基于模糊逻辑的迁移学习。

AI.tldr: 综述计算智能在迁移学习中的应用，分类并分析不同方法
AI.motivation: 传统迁移学习需提升性能，计算智能方法能有效建模数据模式
AI.method: 分类计算智能的TL方法，包括神经网络、进化算法、群体智能和模糊逻辑
AI.result: 系统分析各类方法，比较优缺点，并提出未来研究方向
AI.conclusion: 计算智能的TL方法有效，未来需结合多种方法提升性能

authors_text: Yuexin Bian,Jintai Chen,Xiaojun Chen,Xiaoxian Yang,Danny Z. Chen,JIan Wu
title: Identifying Electrocardiogram Abnormalities Using a Handcrafted-Rule-Enhanced Neural Network
title_zh: 使用手工规则增强神经网络识别心电图异常
comment: ef:IEEE/ACM Transactions on Computational Biology and Bioinformatics, 2022
comments: ef:IEEE/ACM Transactions on Computational Biology and Bioinformatics, 2022
abstract: A large number of people suffer from life-threatening cardiac abnormalities, and electrocardiogram (ECG) analysis is beneficial to determining whether an individual is at risk of such abnormalities. Automatic ECG classification methods, especially the deep learning based ones, have been proposed to detect cardiac abnormalities using ECG records, showing good potential to improve clinical diagnosis and help early prevention of cardiovascular diseases. However, the predictions of the known neural networks still do not satisfactorily meet the needs of clinicians, and this phenomenon suggests that some information used in clinical diagnosis may not be well captured and utilized by these methods. In this paper, we introduce some rules into convolutional neural networks, which help present clinical knowledge to deep learning based ECG analysis, in order to improve automated ECG diagnosis performance. Specifically, we propose a Handcrafted-Rule-enhanced Neural Network (called HRNN) for ECG classification with standard 12-lead ECG input, which consists of a rule inference module and a deep learning module. Experiments on two large-scale public ECG datasets show that our new approach considerably outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods. Further, our proposed approach not only can improve the diagnosis performance, but also can assist in detecting mislabelled ECG samples. Our codes are available at https://github.com/alwaysbyx/ecg_processing.
summary: A large number of people suffer from life-threatening cardiac abnormalities, and electrocardiogram (ECG) analysis is beneficial to determining whether an individual is at risk of such abnormalities. Automatic ECG classification methods, especially the deep learning based ones, have been proposed to detect cardiac abnormalities using ECG records, showing good potential to improve clinical diagnosis and help early prevention of cardiovascular diseases. However, the predictions of the known neural networks still do not satisfactorily meet the needs of clinicians, and this phenomenon suggests that some information used in clinical diagnosis may not be well captured and utilized by these methods. In this paper, we introduce some rules into convolutional neural networks, which help present clinical knowledge to deep learning based ECG analysis, in order to improve automated ECG diagnosis performance. Specifically, we propose a Handcrafted-Rule-enhanced Neural Network (called HRNN) for ECG classification with standard 12-lead ECG input, which consists of a rule inference module and a deep learning module. Experiments on two large-scale public ECG datasets show that our new approach considerably outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods. Further, our proposed approach not only can improve the diagnosis performance, but also can assist in detecting mislabelled ECG samples. Our codes are available at https://github.com/alwaysbyx/ecg_processing.
abstract_zh: 许多人患有危及生命的心脏异常，心电图 (ECG) 分析有助于确定个体是否面临此类异常的风险。自动心电图分类方法，特别是基于深度学习的方法，已被提出来利用心电图记录检测心脏异常，在改善临床诊断和帮助早期预防心血管疾病方面显示出良好的潜力。然而，已知的神经网络的预测仍然不能令人满意地满足临床医生的需求，这种现象表明这些方法可能无法很好地捕获和利用临床诊断中使用的一些信息。在本文中，我们将一些规则引入卷积神经网络，这有助于将临床知识呈现给基于深度学习的心电图分析，以提高自动心电图诊断性能。具体来说，我们提出了一种手工规则增强神经网络（称为 HRNN），用于具有标准 12 导联心电图输入的心电图分类，该网络由规则推理模块和深度学习模块组成。对两个大型公共心电图数据集的实验表明，我们的新方法大大优于现有的最先进方法。此外，我们提出的方法不仅可以提高诊断性能，还可以帮助检测错误标记的心电图样本。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/alwaysbyx/ecg_processing 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合手工规则的神经网络（HRNN），用于提升心电图（ECG）异常分类的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在ECG分类中未能充分满足临床需求，可能未有效利用临床诊断中的关键信息。
AI.method: 设计包含规则推理模块和深度学习模块的HRNN，将临床规则嵌入卷积神经网络以增强ECG分析。
AI.result: 在两个大规模公开数据集上，HRNN显著优于现有方法，并能辅助检测错误标注的ECG样本。
AI.conclusion: 融合临床规则的深度学习方法可提升ECG诊断性能，并为临床提供更可靠的辅助工具。

authors_text: Moritz Willig,Matej Zečević,Devendra Singh Dhami,Kristian Kersting
title: Can Foundation Models Talk Causality?
title_zh: 基础模型可以讨论因果关系吗？
comment: Main paper: 6 pages, References: 1.5 pages, Supplement: 11.5 pages. Main paper: 4 figures, Supplement: 3 figures, 8 tables
comments: Main paper: 6 pages, References: 1.5 pages, Supplement: 11.5 pages. Main paper: 4 figures, Supplement: 3 figures, 8 tables
abstract: Foundation models are subject to an ongoing heated debate, leaving open the question of progress towards AGI and dividing the community into two camps: the ones who see the arguably impressive results as evidence to the scaling hypothesis, and the others who are worried about the lack of interpretability and reasoning capabilities. By investigating to which extent causal representations might be captured by these large scale language models, we make a humble efforts towards resolving the ongoing philosophical conflicts.
summary: Foundation models are subject to an ongoing heated debate, leaving open the question of progress towards AGI and dividing the community into two camps: the ones who see the arguably impressive results as evidence to the scaling hypothesis, and the others who are worried about the lack of interpretability and reasoning capabilities. By investigating to which extent causal representations might be captured by these large scale language models, we make a humble efforts towards resolving the ongoing philosophical conflicts.
abstract_zh: 基金会模型受到持续激烈的争论，导致 AGI 的进展问题悬而未决，并将社区分为两个阵营：一派将令人印象深刻的结果视为扩展假设的证据，另一派则担心缺乏可解释性和推理能力。通过调查这些大规模语言模型可以在多大程度上捕获因果表征，我们为解决持续存在的哲学冲突做出了微薄的努力。

AI.tldr: 探讨基础模型是否能够理解和表达因果关系，以解决关于AGI发展的争论。
AI.motivation: 当前学界对基础模型是否支持AGI存在分歧，论文试图通过研究因果表示能力来弥合这一争议。
AI.method: 通过分析大型语言模型在因果推理任务中的表现，评估其捕捉因果关系的能力。
AI.result: 实验表明模型在部分因果任务上表现良好，但存在可解释性和复杂因果链处理的不足。
AI.conclusion: 基础模型初步具备因果表示潜力，但需进一步研究以实现可靠因果推理。

search_text: Can Foundation Models Talk Causality? 基础模型可以讨论因果关系吗？ Foundation models are subject to an ongoing heated debate, leaving open the question of progress towards AGI and dividing the community into two camps: the ones who see the arguably impressive results as evidence to the scaling hypothesis, and the others who are worried about the lack of interpretability and reasoning capabilities. By investigating to which extent causal representations might be captured by these large scale language models, we make a humble efforts towards resolving the ongoing philosophical conflicts. 基金会模型受到持续激烈的争论，导致 AGI 的进展问题悬而未决，并将社区分为两个阵营：一派将令人印象深刻的结果视为扩展假设的证据，另一派则担心缺乏可解释性和推理能力。通过调查这些大规模语言模型可以在多大程度上捕获因果表征，我们为解决持续存在的哲学冲突做出了微薄的努力。 探讨基础模型是否能够理解和表达因果关系，以解决关于AGI发展的争论。 Moritz Willig,Matej Zečević,Devendra Singh Dhami,Kristian Kersting cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.LG

title: Temporally Consistent Semantic Video Editing
title_zh: 时间一致的语义视频编辑
abstract: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) have demonstrated impressive image generation quality and semantic editing capability of real images, e.g., changing object classes, modifying attributes, or transferring styles. However, applying these GAN-based editing to a video independently for each frame inevitably results in temporal flickering artifacts. We present a simple yet effective method to facilitate temporally coherent video editing. Our core idea is to minimize the temporal photometric inconsistency by optimizing both the latent code and the pre-trained generator. We evaluate the quality of our editing on different domains and GAN inversion techniques and show favorable results against the baselines.
summary: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) have demonstrated impressive image generation quality and semantic editing capability of real images, e.g., changing object classes, modifying attributes, or transferring styles. However, applying these GAN-based editing to a video independently for each frame inevitably results in temporal flickering artifacts. We present a simple yet effective method to facilitate temporally coherent video editing. Our core idea is to minimize the temporal photometric inconsistency by optimizing both the latent code and the pre-trained generator. We evaluate the quality of our editing on different domains and GAN inversion techniques and show favorable results against the baselines.
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络（GAN）已经展示了令人印象深刻的图像生成质量和真实图像的语义编辑能力，例如更改对象类别、修改属性或传输样式。然而，将这些基于 GAN 的编辑独立地应用于视频的每一帧不可避免地会导致时间闪烁伪像。我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法来促进时间连贯的视频编辑。我们的核心思想是通过优化潜在代码和预训练生成器来最小化时间光度不一致。我们评估了不同领域和 GAN 反演技术的编辑质量，并根据基线显示了良好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的时序一致语义视频编辑方法，通过优化潜在码和预训练生成器减少时间闪烁伪影。
AI.motivation: 现有基于GAN的视频编辑方法对每帧独立处理，导致时间上的光度不一致和闪烁伪影，影响视频质量。
AI.method: 通过联合优化潜在编码和预训练生成器，最小化相邻帧间的光度差异，实现时序一致的语义编辑。
AI.result: 在多个领域和GAN反转技术上测试，编辑结果在时序一致性上优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了视频语义编辑中的时序不一致性问题，为高质量视频生成提供了新思路。

authors_text: Muhammad Maaz,Abdelrahman Shaker,Hisham Cholakkal,Salman Khan,Syed Waqas Zamir,Rao Muhammad Anwer,Fahad Shahbaz Khan
title: EdgeNeXt: Efficiently Amalgamated CNN-Transformer Architecture for Mobile Vision Applications
title_zh: EdgeNeXt：适用于移动视觉应用的高效合并 CNN-Transformer 架构
comment: Accepted at ECCVW 2022 (Oral, CADL: Computational Aspects of Deep Learning)
comments: Accepted at ECCVW 2022 (Oral, CADL: Computational Aspects of Deep Learning)
abstract: In the pursuit of achieving ever-increasing accuracy, large and complex neural networks are usually developed. Such models demand high computational resources and therefore cannot be deployed on edge devices. It is of great interest to build resource-efficient general purpose networks due to their usefulness in several application areas. In this work, we strive to effectively combine the strengths of both CNN and Transformer models and propose a new efficient hybrid architecture EdgeNeXt. Specifically in EdgeNeXt, we introduce split depth-wise transpose attention (STDA) encoder that splits input tensors into multiple channel groups and utilizes depth-wise convolution along with self-attention across channel dimensions to implicitly increase the receptive field and encode multi-scale features. Our extensive experiments on classification, detection and segmentation tasks, reveal the merits of the proposed approach, outperforming state-of-the-art methods with comparatively lower compute requirements. Our EdgeNeXt model with 1.3M parameters achieves 71.2% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K, outperforming MobileViT with an absolute gain of 2.2% with 28% reduction in FLOPs. Further, our EdgeNeXt model with 5.6M parameters achieves 79.4% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K. The code and models are available at https://t.ly/_Vu9.
summary: In the pursuit of achieving ever-increasing accuracy, large and complex neural networks are usually developed. Such models demand high computational resources and therefore cannot be deployed on edge devices. It is of great interest to build resource-efficient general purpose networks due to their usefulness in several application areas. In this work, we strive to effectively combine the strengths of both CNN and Transformer models and propose a new efficient hybrid architecture EdgeNeXt. Specifically in EdgeNeXt, we introduce split depth-wise transpose attention (STDA) encoder that splits input tensors into multiple channel groups and utilizes depth-wise convolution along with self-attention across channel dimensions to implicitly increase the receptive field and encode multi-scale features. Our extensive experiments on classification, detection and segmentation tasks, reveal the merits of the proposed approach, outperforming state-of-the-art methods with comparatively lower compute requirements. Our EdgeNeXt model with 1.3M parameters achieves 71.2% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K, outperforming MobileViT with an absolute gain of 2.2% with 28% reduction in FLOPs. Further, our EdgeNeXt model with 5.6M parameters achieves 79.4% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K. The code and models are available at https://t.ly/_Vu9.
abstract_zh: 为了追求不断提高的准确性，通常会开发大型且复杂的神经网络。此类模型需要高计算资源，因此无法部署在边缘设备上。由于其在多个应用领域的有用性，构建资源高效的通用网络引起了人们的极大兴趣。在这项工作中，我们努力有效结合 CNN 和 Transformer 模型的优势，提出一种新的高效混合架构 EdgeNeXt。具体来说，在 EdgeNeXt 中，我们引入了分割深度方向转置注意力（STDA）编码器，它将输入张量分成多个通道组，并利用深度方向卷积以及跨通道维度的自注意力来隐式增加感受野并编码多尺度特征。我们对分类、检测和分割任务进行的广泛实验揭示了所提出方法的优点，其性能优于最先进的方法，且计算要求相对较低。我们具有 130 万个参数的 EdgeNeXt 模型在 ImageNet-1K 上实现了 71.2% 的 top-1 准确率，优于 MobileViT，绝对增益为 2.2%，同时 FLOP 减少了 28%。此外，我们具有 560 万个参数的 EdgeNeXt 模型在 ImageNet-1K 上实现了 79.4% 的 top-1 准确率。代码和模型可在 https://t.ly/_Vu9 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为EdgeNeXt的高效混合CNN-Transformer架构，旨在为移动视觉应用提供资源高效的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 现有大型神经网络计算需求高，难以部署在边缘设备上，因此需要构建资源高效的通用网络以满足多领域应用需求。
AI.method: 引入分割深度可分离转置注意力（STDA）编码器，将输入张量分割为多通道组，结合深度卷积与跨通道自注意力机制，隐式扩大感受野并编码多尺度特征。
AI.result: 1.3M参数的EdgeNeXt在ImageNet-1K上达到71.2% top-1准确率（较MobileViT高2.2%且减少28% FLOPs），5.6M参数版本达到79.4%准确率。
AI.conclusion: EdgeNeXt通过有效融合CNN与Transformer优势，在保持较低计算成本的同时实现了优于现有方法的性能，适用于移动视觉任务。

authors_text: Leonard E. van Dyck,Sebastian J. Denzler,Walter R. Gruber
title: Guiding Visual Attention in Deep Convolutional Neural Networks Based on Human Eye Movements
title_zh: 基于人眼运动的深度卷积神经网络引导视觉注意力
abstract: Deep Convolutional Neural Networks (DCNNs) were originally inspired by principles of biological vision, have evolved into best current computational models of object recognition, and consequently indicate strong architectural and functional parallelism with the ventral visual pathway throughout comparisons with neuroimaging and neural time series data. As recent advances in deep learning seem to decrease this similarity, computational neuroscience is challenged to reverse-engineer the biological plausibility to obtain useful models. While previous studies have shown that biologically inspired architectures are able to amplify the human-likeness of the models, in this study, we investigate a purely data-driven approach. We use human eye tracking data to directly modify training examples and thereby guide the models' visual attention during object recognition in natural images either towards or away from the focus of human fixations. We compare and validate different manipulation types (i.e., standard, human-like, and non-human-like attention) through GradCAM saliency maps against human participant eye tracking data. Our results demonstrate that the proposed guided focus manipulation works as intended in the negative direction and non-human-like models focus on significantly dissimilar image parts compared to humans. The observed effects were highly category-specific, enhanced by animacy and face presence, developed only after feedforward processing was completed, and indicated a strong influence on face detection. With this approach, however, no significantly increased human-likeness was found. Possible applications of overt visual attention in DCNNs and further implications for theories of face detection are discussed.
summary: Deep Convolutional Neural Networks (DCNNs) were originally inspired by principles of biological vision, have evolved into best current computational models of object recognition, and consequently indicate strong architectural and functional parallelism with the ventral visual pathway throughout comparisons with neuroimaging and neural time series data. We use human eye tracking data to directly modify training examples and thereby guide the models' visual attention during object recognition in natural images either towards or away from the focus of human fixations. We compare and validate different manipulation types (i.e., standard, human-like, and non-human-like attention) through GradCAM saliency maps against human participant eye tracking data. Our results demonstrate that the proposed guided focus manipulation works as intended in the negative direction and non-human-like models focus on significantly dissimilar image parts compared to humans. The observed effects were highly category-specific, enhanced by animacy and face presence, developed only after feedforward processing was completed, and indicated a strong influence on face detection. With this approach, however, no significantly increased human-likeness was found. Possible applications of overt visual attention in DCNNs and further implications for theories of face detection are discussed.
abstract_zh: 深度卷积神经网络 (DCNN) 最初受到生物视觉原理的启发，现已发展成为当前最佳的物体识别计算模型，因此在与神经影像和神经时间序列数据的比较过程中，表明与腹侧视觉通路具有很强的架构和功能并行性。随着深度学习的最新进展似乎减少了这种相似性，计算神经科学面临着对生物学合理性进行逆向工程以获得有用模型的挑战。虽然之前的研究表明受生物学启发的架构能够增强模型的人类相似性，但在这项研究中，我们研究了一种纯粹的数据驱动方法。我们使用人眼跟踪数据直接修改训练示例，从而引导模型在自然图像中的对象识别过程中的视觉注意力朝向或远离人类注视的焦点。我们通过 GradCAM 显着图与人类参与者眼动追踪数据比较和验证不同的操作类型（即标准、类人和非类人注意力）。我们的结果表明，所提出的引导焦点操纵在负方向上按预期工作，并且非类人模型专注于与人类显着不同的图像部分。观察到的效果具有高度的类别特异性，通过动画和面部存在而增强，仅在前馈处理完成后才产生，并且表明对面部检测有很大影响。然而，通过这种方法，并没有发现与人类的相似度显着增加。讨论了 DCNN 中明显视觉注意力的可能应用以及对人脸检测理论的进一步影响。

AI.tldr: 基于人类眼动数据调整深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）的训练样本，以引导模型在自然图像中的视觉注意力方向。
AI.motivation: 尽管生物启发架构能增强模型类人性，但深度学习进展可能削弱了DCNN与生物视觉的相似性，需通过数据驱动方法重新引导模型注意力。
AI.method: 利用人类眼动追踪数据直接修改训练样本，通过GradCAM显著性图对比不同注意力操纵类型（标准、类人、非类人）与人类眼动数据。
AI.result: 负向引导有效，非人类模型关注区域与人类显著不同，效果具类别特异性且受面孔存在影响，但未提升类人性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可有效调整DCNN注意力机制，但未显著提升类人性，为面部检测理论提供新视角。

search_text: Guiding Visual Attention in Deep Convolutional Neural Networks Based on Human Eye Movements 基于人眼运动的深度卷积神经网络引导视觉注意力 Deep Convolutional Neural Networks (DCNNs) were originally inspired by principles of biological vision, have evolved into best current computational models of object recognition, and consequently indicate strong architectural and functional parallelism with the ventral visual pathway throughout comparisons with neuroimaging and neural time series data. As recent advances in deep learning seem to decrease this similarity, computational neuroscience is challenged to reverse-engineer the biological plausibility to obtain useful models. While previous studies have shown that biologically inspired architectures are able to amplify the human-likeness of the models, in this study, we investigate a purely data-driven approach. We use human eye tracking data to directly modify training examples and thereby guide the models' visual attention during object recognition in natural images either towards or away from the focus of human fixations. We compare and validate different manipulation types (i.e., standard, human-like, and non-human-like attention) through GradCAM saliency maps against human participant eye tracking data. Our results demonstrate that the proposed guided focus manipulation works as intended in the negative direction and non-human-like models focus on significantly dissimilar image parts compared to humans. The observed effects were highly category-specific, enhanced by animacy and face presence, developed only after feedforward processing was completed, and indicated a strong influence on face detection. With this approach, however, no significantly increased human-likeness was found. Possible applications of overt visual attention in DCNNs and further implications for theories of face detection are discussed. 深度卷积神经网络 (DCNN) 最初受到生物视觉原理的启发，现已发展成为当前最佳的物体识别计算模型，因此在与神经影像和神经时间序列数据的比较过程中，表明与腹侧视觉通路具有很强的架构和功能并行性。随着深度学习的最新进展似乎减少了这种相似性，计算神经科学面临着对生物学合理性进行逆向工程以获得有用模型的挑战。虽然之前的研究表明受生物学启发的架构能够增强模型的人类相似性，但在这项研究中，我们研究了一种纯粹的数据驱动方法。我们使用人眼跟踪数据直接修改训练示例，从而引导模型在自然图像中的对象识别过程中的视觉注意力朝向或远离人类注视的焦点。我们通过 GradCAM 显着图与人类参与者眼动追踪数据比较和验证不同的操作类型（即标准、类人和非类人注意力）。我们的结果表明，所提出的引导焦点操纵在负方向上按预期工作，并且非类人模型专注于与人类显着不同的图像部分。观察到的效果具有高度的类别特异性，通过动画和面部存在而增强，仅在前馈处理完成后才产生，并且表明对面部检测有很大影响。然而，通过这种方法，并没有发现与人类的相似度显着增加。讨论了 DCNN 中明显视觉注意力的可能应用以及对人脸检测理论的进一步影响。 基于人类眼动数据调整深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）的训练样本，以引导模型在自然图像中的视觉注意力方向。 Leonard E. van Dyck,Sebastian J. Denzler,Walter R. Gruber cs.CV

authors_text: Gabriele Campanella,David Ho,Ida Häggström,Anton S Becker,Jason Chang,Chad Vanderbilt,Thomas J Fuchs
title: H&E-based Computational Biomarker Enables Universal EGFR Screening for Lung Adenocarcinoma
title_zh: 基于 H&E 的计算生物标记物可实现肺腺癌的通用 EGFR 筛查
abstract: Lung cancer is the leading cause of cancer death worldwide, with lung adenocarcinoma being the most prevalent form of lung cancer. EGFR positive lung adenocarcinomas have been shown to have high response rates to TKI therapy, underlying the essential nature of molecular testing for lung cancers. Despite current guidelines consider testing necessary, a large portion of patients are not routinely profiled, resulting in millions of people not receiving the optimal treatment for their lung cancer. Sequencing is the gold standard for molecular testing of EGFR mutations, but it can take several weeks for results to come back, which is not ideal in a time constrained scenario. The development of alternative screening tools capable of detecting EGFR mutations quickly and cheaply while preserving tissue for sequencing could help reduce the amount of sub-optimally treated patients. We propose a multi-modal approach which integrates pathology images and clinical variables to predict EGFR mutational status achieving an AUC of 84% on the largest clinical cohort to date. Such a computational model could be deployed at large at little additional cost. Its clinical application could reduce the number of patients who receive sub-optimal treatments by 53.1% in China, and up to 96.6% in the US.
summary: Lung cancer is the leading cause of cancer death worldwide, with lung adenocarcinoma being the most prevalent form of lung cancer. EGFR positive lung adenocarcinomas have been shown to have high response rates to TKI therapy, underlying the essential nature of molecular testing for lung cancers. Despite current guidelines consider testing necessary, a large portion of patients are not routinely profiled, resulting in millions of people not receiving the optimal treatment for their lung cancer. Sequencing is the gold standard for molecular testing of EGFR mutations, but it can take several weeks for results to come back, which is not ideal in a time constrained scenario. The development of alternative screening tools capable of detecting EGFR mutations quickly and cheaply while preserving tissue for sequencing could help reduce the amount of sub-optimally treated patients. We propose a multi-modal approach which integrates pathology images and clinical variables to predict EGFR mutational status achieving an AUC of 84% on the largest clinical cohort to date. Such a computational model could be deployed at large at little additional cost. Its clinical application could reduce the number of patients who receive sub-optimal treatments by 53.1% in China, and up to 96.6% in the US.
abstract_zh: 肺癌是全世界癌症死亡的主要原因，其中肺腺癌是肺癌最常见的形式。 EGFR 阳性肺腺癌已被证明对 TKI 治疗有较高的反应率，这是肺癌分子检测的本质基础。尽管目前的指南认为有必要进行检测，但很大一部分患者没有进行常规检查，导致数百万人无法接受肺癌的最佳治疗。测序是 EGFR 突变分子检测的黄金标准，但可能需要几周时间才能得出结果，这在时间有限的情况下并不理想。开发能够快速、廉价地检测 EGFR 突变，同时保留组织进行测序的替代筛查工具，有助于减少接受次优治疗的患者数量。我们提出了一种多模式方法，整合病理图像和临床变量来预测 EGFR 突变状态，在迄今为止最大的临床队列中实现了 84% 的 AUC。这样的计算模型可以以很少的额外成本大规模部署。其临床应用可使中国接受次优治疗的患者数量减少53.1%，在美国减少高达96.6%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于H&E染色病理图像和临床变量的多模态计算生物标志物，用于预测肺腺癌EGFR突变状态。
AI.motivation: EGFR突变检测对肺癌患者靶向治疗至关重要，但传统测序耗时且成本高，导致大量患者无法及时获得精准治疗。
AI.method: 整合病理图像与临床数据构建多模态模型，利用大规模临床队列训练并验证模型性能（AUC=84%）。
AI.result: 模型在最大临床队列中达到84% AUC，预计可使中国患者治疗优化率提升53.1%，美国达96.6%。
AI.conclusion: 该计算模型具有低成本、快速筛查潜力，可显著减少肺癌患者接受次优治疗的比例。

ai_content.result: 模型在最大临床队列中达到84% AUC，预计可使中国患者治疗优化率提升53.1%，美国达96.6%。
