authors_text: Jie Yang,Ye Zhu,Chaoqun Wang,Zhen Li,Ruimao Zhang
title: Toward Unpaired Multi-modal Medical Image Segmentation via Learning Structured Semantic Consistency
title_zh: 通过学习结构化语义一致性实现不成对的多模态医学图像分割
abstract: Integrating multi-modal data to promote medical image analysis has recently gained great attention. This paper presents a novel scheme to learn the mutual benefits of different modalities to achieve better segmentation results for unpaired multi-modal medical images. Our approach tackles two critical issues of this task from a practical perspective: (1) how to effectively learn the semantic consistencies of various modalities (e.g., CT and MRI), and (2) how to leverage the above consistencies to regularize the network learning while preserving its simplicity. To address (1), we leverage a carefully designed External Attention Module (EAM) to align semantic class representations and their correlations of different modalities. To solve (2), the proposed EAM is designed as an external plug-and-play one, which can be discarded once the model is optimized. We have demonstrated the effectiveness of the proposed method on two medical image segmentation scenarios: (1) cardiac structure segmentation, and (2) abdominal multi-organ segmentation. Extensive results show that the proposed method outperforms its counterparts by a wide margin.
summary: Integrating multi-modal data to promote medical image analysis has recently gained great attention. This paper presents a novel scheme to learn the mutual benefits of different modalities to achieve better segmentation results for unpaired multi-modal medical images. Our approach tackles two critical issues of this task from a practical perspective: (1) how to effectively learn the semantic consistencies of various modalities (e.g., CT and MRI), and (2) how to leverage the above consistencies to regularize the network learning while preserving its simplicity. To address (1), we leverage a carefully designed External Attention Module (EAM) to align semantic class representations and their correlations of different modalities. To solve (2), the proposed EAM is designed as an external plug-and-play one, which can be discarded once the model is optimized. We have demonstrated the effectiveness of the proposed method on two medical image segmentation scenarios: (1) cardiac structure segmentation, and (2) abdominal multi-organ segmentation. Extensive results show that the proposed method outperforms its counterparts by a wide margin.
abstract_zh: 整合多模态数据来促进医学图像分析最近引起了极大的关注。本文提出了一种新颖的方案来学习不同模态的互惠互利，从而对不成对的多模态医学图像实现更好的分割结果。我们的方法从实践角度解决了这项任务的两个关键问题：（1）如何有效地学习各种模式（例如 CT 和 MRI）的语义一致性，以及（2）如何利用上述一致性来规范网络学习，同时保持其简单性。为了解决（1），我们利用精心设计的外部注意模块（EAM）来对齐语义类表示及其不同模态的相关性。为了解决（2），所提出的EAM被设计为外部即插即用型，一旦模型优化就可以丢弃。我们已经证明了该方法在两种医学图像分割场景中的有效性：（1）心脏结构分割，（2）腹部多器官分割。大量结果表明，所提出的方法大大优于同类方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过学习结构化语义一致性来实现无配对多模态医学图像分割的新方法。
AI.motivation: 多模态医学图像分析需要整合不同模态（如CT和MRI）的信息以提升分割效果，但现有方法在处理无配对数据时面临语义一致性学习和网络简化之间的矛盾。
AI.method: 设计了外部注意力模块（EAM），通过对齐不同模态的语义类表示及其相关性来学习语义一致性，并将EAM作为可插拔组件在模型优化后移除以保持简洁性。
AI.result: 在心脏结构分割和腹部多器官分割任务中，该方法在多个指标上显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过结构化语义一致性学习有效提升了无配对多模态医学图像分割性能，同时保持了网络的简洁性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过学习结构化语义一致性来实现无配对多模态医学图像分割的新方法。
ai_content.motivation: 多模态医学图像分析需要整合不同模态（如CT和MRI）的信息以提升分割效果，但现有方法在处理无配对数据时面临语义一致性学习和网络简化之间的矛盾。
ai_content.method: 设计了外部注意力模块（EAM），通过对齐不同模态的语义类表示及其相关性来学习语义一致性，并将EAM作为可插拔组件在模型优化后移除以保持简洁性。
ai_content.result: 在心脏结构分割和腹部多器官分割任务中，该方法在多个指标上显著优于现有方法。
ai_content.conclusion: 所提方法通过结构化语义一致性学习有效提升了无配对多模态医学图像分割性能，同时保持了网络的简洁性。

search_text: Toward Unpaired Multi-modal Medical Image Segmentation via Learning Structured Semantic Consistency 通过学习结构化语义一致性实现不成对的多模态医学图像分割 Integrating multi-modal data to promote medical image analysis has recently gained great attention. This paper presents a novel scheme to learn the mutual benefits of different modalities to achieve better segmentation results for unpaired multi-modal medical images. Our approach tackles two critical issues of this task from a practical perspective: (1) how to effectively learn the semantic consistencies of various modalities (e.g., CT and MRI), and (2) how to leverage the above consistencies to regularize the network learning while preserving its simplicity. To address (1), we leverage a carefully designed External Attention Module (EAM) to align semantic class representations and their correlations of different modalities. To solve (2), the proposed EAM is designed as an external plug-and-play one, which can be discarded once the model is optimized. We have demonstrated the effectiveness of the proposed method on two medical image segmentation scenarios: (1) cardiac structure segmentation, and (2) abdominal multi-organ segmentation. Extensive results show that the proposed method outperforms its counterparts by a wide margin. 整合多模态数据来促进医学图像分析最近引起了极大的关注。本文提出了一种新颖的方案来学习不同模态的互惠互利，从而对不成对的多模态医学图像实现更好的分割结果。我们的方法从实践角度解决了这项任务的两个关键问题：（1）如何有效地学习各种模式（例如 CT 和 MRI）的语义一致性，以及（2）如何利用上述一致性来规范网络学习，同时保持其简单性。为了解决（1），我们利用精心设计的外部注意模块（EAM）来对齐语义类表示及其不同模态的相关性。为了解决（2），所提出的EAM被设计为外部即插即用型，一旦模型优化就可以丢弃。我们已经证明了该方法在两种医学图像分割场景中的有效性：（1）心脏结构分割，（2）腹部多器官分割。大量结果表明，所提出的方法大大优于同类方法。 本文提出了一种通过学习结构化语义一致性来实现无配对多模态医学图像分割的新方法。 Jie Yang,Ye Zhu,Chaoqun Wang,Zhen Li,Ruimao Zhang cs.CV

title: Semantics-Depth-Symbiosis: Deeply Coupled Semi-Supervised Learning of Semantics and Depth
title_zh: 语义-深度-共生：语义和深度的深度耦合半监督学习
abstract: Multi-task learning (MTL) paradigm focuses on jointly learning two or more tasks, aiming for significant improvement w.r.t model's generalizability, performance, and training/inference memory footprint. The aforementioned benefits become ever so indispensable in the case of joint training for vision-related {\bf dense} prediction tasks. In this work, we tackle the MTL problem of two dense tasks, i.e., semantic segmentation and depth estimation, and present a novel attention module called Cross-Channel Attention Module ({CCAM}), which facilitates effective feature sharing along each channel between the two tasks, leading to mutual performance gain with a negligible increase in trainable parameters. In a true symbiotic spirit, we then formulate a novel data augmentation for the semantic segmentation task using predicted depth called {AffineMix}, and a simple depth augmentation using predicted semantics called {ColorAug}. Finally, we validate the performance gain of the proposed method on the Cityscapes and ScanNet dataset, which helps us achieve state-of-the-art results for a semi-supervised joint model based on depth and semantic segmentation.
summary: Multi-task learning (MTL) paradigm focuses on jointly learning two or more tasks, aiming for significant improvement w.r.t model's generalizability, performance, and training/inference memory footprint. The aforementioned benefits become ever so indispensable in the case of joint training for vision-related {\bf dense} prediction tasks. In this work, we tackle the MTL problem of two dense tasks, i.e., semantic segmentation and depth estimation, and present a novel attention module called Cross-Channel Attention Module ({CCAM}), which facilitates effective feature sharing along each channel between the two tasks, leading to mutual performance gain with a negligible increase in trainable parameters. In a true symbiotic spirit, we then formulate a novel data augmentation for the semantic segmentation task using predicted depth called {AffineMix}, and a simple depth augmentation using predicted semantics called {ColorAug}. Finally, we validate the performance gain of the proposed method on the Cityscapes and ScanNet dataset, which helps us achieve state-of-the-art results for a semi-supervised joint model based on depth and semantic segmentation.
abstract_zh: 多任务学习（MTL）范式侧重于联合学习两个或多个任务，旨在显着改进模型的泛化性、性能和训练/推理内存占用。在视觉相关的{\bf密集}预测任务的联合训练中，上述好处变得如此不可或缺。在这项工作中，我们解决了两个密集任务（即语义分割和深度估计）的 MTL 问题，并提出了一种称为跨通道注意力模块（{CCAM}）的新型注意力模块，它促进了两个任务之间沿每个通道的有效特征共享，从而在可训练参数的增加可忽略不计的情况下实现相互性能增益。本着真正的共生精神，我们使用预测深度（称为 {AffineMix}）为语义分割任务制定了一种新颖的数据增强，并使用预测语义（称为 {ColorAug}）进行了简单的深度增强。最后，我们在 Cityscapes 和 ScanNet 数据集上验证了所提出方法的性能增益，这有助于我们实现基于深度和语义分割的半监督联合模型的最先进结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督学习方法，通过深度耦合语义分割与深度估计任务，提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 多任务学习在视觉密集预测任务中能提高模型泛化能力与效率，但现有方法在语义分割与深度估计的联合训练中存在特征共享不足的问题。
AI.method: 设计交叉通道注意力模块（CCAM）促进双任务特征共享，并提出基于预测深度的AffineMix数据增强和基于预测语义的ColorAug深度增强方法。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes和ScanNet数据集上达到半监督联合模型的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过深度耦合与数据增强策略，本文方法有效提升了语义分割与深度估计的半监督学习效果。

authors_text: Jiayi Weng,Min Lin,Shengyi Huang,Bo Liu,Denys Makoviichuk,Viktor Makoviychuk,Zichen Liu,Yufan Song,Ting Luo,Yukun Jiang,Zhongwen Xu,Shuicheng Yan
title: EnvPool: A Highly Parallel Reinforcement Learning Environment Execution Engine
title_zh: EnvPool：高度并行的强化学习环境执行引擎
abstract: There has been significant progress in developing reinforcement learning (RL) training systems. Past works such as IMPALA, Apex, Seed RL, Sample Factory, and others, aim to improve the system's overall throughput. In this paper, we aim to address a common bottleneck in the RL training system, i.e., parallel environment execution, which is often the slowest part of the whole system but receives little attention. With a curated design for paralleling RL environments, we have improved the RL environment simulation speed across different hardware setups, ranging from a laptop and a modest workstation, to a high-end machine such as NVIDIA DGX-A100. On a high-end machine, EnvPool achieves one million frames per second for the environment execution on Atari environments and three million frames per second on MuJoCo environments. When running EnvPool on a laptop, the speed is 2.8x that of the Python subprocess. Moreover, great compatibility with existing RL training libraries has been demonstrated in the open-sourced community, including CleanRL, rl_games, DeepMind Acme, etc. Finally, EnvPool allows researchers to iterate their ideas at a much faster pace and has great potential to become the de facto RL environment execution engine. Example runs show that it only takes five minutes to train agents to play Atari Pong and MuJoCo Ant on a laptop. EnvPool is open-sourced at https://github.com/sail-sg/envpool.
summary: There has been significant progress in developing reinforcement learning (RL) training systems. Past works such as IMPALA, Apex, Seed RL, Sample Factory, and others, aim to improve the system's overall throughput. In this paper, we aim to address a common bottleneck in the RL training system, i.e., parallel environment execution, which is often the slowest part of the whole system but receives little attention. With a curated design for paralleling RL environments, we have improved the RL environment simulation speed across different hardware setups, ranging from a laptop and a modest workstation, to a high-end machine such as NVIDIA DGX-A100. On a high-end machine, EnvPool achieves one million frames per second for the environment execution on Atari environments and three million frames per second on MuJoCo environments. When running EnvPool on a laptop, the speed is 2.8x that of the Python subprocess. Moreover, great compatibility with existing RL training libraries has been demonstrated in the open-sourced community, including CleanRL, rl_games, DeepMind Acme, etc. Finally, EnvPool allows researchers to iterate their ideas at a much faster pace and has great potential to become the de facto RL environment execution engine. Example runs show that it only takes five minutes to train agents to play Atari Pong and MuJoCo Ant on a laptop. EnvPool is open-sourced at https://github.com/sail-sg/envpool.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）训练系统的开发取得了重大进展。过去的工作如 IMPALA、Apex、Seed RL、Sample Factory 等，旨在提高系统的整体吞吐量。在本文中，我们的目标是解决强化学习训练系统中的一个常见瓶颈，即并行环境执行，它通常是整个系统中最慢的部分，但很少受到关注。通过针对并行 RL 环境的精心设计，我们提高了不同硬件设置（从笔记本电脑和普通工作站到 NVIDIA DGX-A100 等高端机器）的 RL 环境模拟速度。在高端机器上，EnvPool 在 Atari 环境中的环境执行速度达到每秒 100 万帧，在 MuJoCo 环境中达到每秒 300 万帧。在笔记本电脑上运行 EnvPool 时，速度是 Python 子进程的 2.8 倍。此外，开源社区已经展示了与现有 RL 训练库的良好兼容性，包括 CleanRL、rl_games、DeepMind Acme 等。最后，EnvPool 允许研究人员以更快的速度迭代他们的想法，并具有成为事实上的 RL 环境执行引擎的巨大潜力。示例运行表明，训练代理在笔记本电脑上玩 Atari Pong 和 MuJoCo Ant 只需要五分钟。 EnvPool 在 https://github.com/sail-sg/envpool 上开源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EnvPool，一种用于强化学习的高并行环境执行引擎，旨在解决RL训练系统中环境执行速度慢的瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 现有RL训练系统（如IMPALA、Sample Factory等）虽提升整体吞吐量，但忽视了环境执行这一关键瓶颈，导致训练效率受限。
AI.method: 通过优化环境并行化设计，适配不同硬件（从笔记本到NVIDIA DGX-A100），结合高效多线程与硬件加速技术，同时保持与主流RL库（如CleanRL、DeepMind Acme）的兼容性。
AI.result: 在高端设备上，EnvPool实现Atari环境每秒100万帧、MuJoCo环境300万帧；笔记本上比Python子进程快2.8倍，且5分钟内可在笔记本训练Atari Pong和MuJoCo Ant。
AI.conclusion: EnvPool显著加速RL环境执行，提升研究迭代效率，具备成为RL环境执行引擎事实标准的潜力，已开源并验证兼容性。

search_text: EnvPool: A Highly Parallel Reinforcement Learning Environment Execution Engine EnvPool：高度并行的强化学习环境执行引擎 There has been significant progress in developing reinforcement learning (RL) training systems. Past works such as IMPALA, Apex, Seed RL, Sample Factory, and others, aim to improve the system's overall throughput. In this paper, we aim to address a common bottleneck in the RL training system, i.e., parallel environment execution, which is often the slowest part of the whole system but receives little attention. With a curated design for paralleling RL environments, we have improved the RL environment simulation speed across different hardware setups, ranging from a laptop and a modest workstation, to a high-end machine such as NVIDIA DGX-A100. On a high-end machine, EnvPool achieves one million frames per second for the environment execution on Atari environments and three million frames per second on MuJoCo environments. When running EnvPool on a laptop, the speed is 2.8x that of the Python subprocess. Moreover, great compatibility with existing RL training libraries has been demonstrated in the open-sourced community, including CleanRL, rl_games, DeepMind Acme, etc. Finally, EnvPool allows researchers to iterate their ideas at a much faster pace and has great potential to become the de facto RL environment execution engine. Example runs show that it only takes five minutes to train agents to play Atari Pong and MuJoCo Ant on a laptop. EnvPool is open-sourced at https://github.com/sail-sg/envpool. 强化学习（RL）训练系统的开发取得了重大进展。过去的工作如 IMPALA、Apex、Seed RL、Sample Factory 等，旨在提高系统的整体吞吐量。在本文中，我们的目标是解决强化学习训练系统中的一个常见瓶颈，即并行环境执行，它通常是整个系统中最慢的部分，但很少受到关注。通过针对并行 RL 环境的精心设计，我们提高了不同硬件设置（从笔记本电脑和普通工作站到 NVIDIA DGX-A100 等高端机器）的 RL 环境模拟速度。在高端机器上，EnvPool 在 Atari 环境中的环境执行速度达到每秒 100 万帧，在 MuJoCo 环境中达到每秒 300 万帧。在笔记本电脑上运行 EnvPool 时，速度是 Python 子进程的 2.8 倍。此外，开源社区已经展示了与现有 RL 训练库的良好兼容性，包括 CleanRL、rl_games、DeepMind Acme 等。最后，EnvPool 允许研究人员以更快的速度迭代他们的想法，并具有成为事实上的 RL 环境执行引擎的巨大潜力。示例运行表明，训练代理在笔记本电脑上玩 Atari Pong 和 MuJoCo Ant 只需要五分钟。 EnvPool 在 https://github.com/sail-sg/envpool 上开源。 本文提出EnvPool，一种用于强化学习的高并行环境执行引擎，旨在解决RL训练系统中环境执行速度慢的瓶颈问题。 Jiayi Weng,Min Lin,Shengyi Huang,Bo Liu,Denys Makoviichuk,Viktor Makoviychuk,Zichen Liu,Yufan Song,Ting Luo,Yukun Jiang,Zhongwen Xu,Shuicheng Yan cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.DC,cs.PF,cs.RO

authors_text: Yukang Chen,Jianhui Liu,Xiangyu Zhang,Xiaojuan Qi,Jiaya Jia
title: LargeKernel3D: Scaling up Kernels in 3D Sparse CNNs
title_zh: LargeKernel3D：扩展 3D 稀疏 CNN 中的内核
abstract: Recent advance in 2D CNNs has revealed that large kernels are important. However, when directly applying large convolutional kernels in 3D CNNs, severe difficulties are met, where those successful module designs in 2D become surprisingly ineffective on 3D networks, including the popular depth-wise convolution. To address this vital challenge, we instead propose the spatial-wise partition convolution and its large-kernel module. As a result, it avoids the optimization and efficiency issues of naive 3D large kernels. Our large-kernel 3D CNN network, LargeKernel3D, yields notable improvement in 3D tasks of semantic segmentation and object detection. It achieves 73.9% mIoU on the ScanNetv2 semantic segmentation and 72.8% NDS nuScenes object detection benchmarks, ranking 1st on the nuScenes LIDAR leaderboard. The performance further boosts to 74.2% NDS with a simple multi-modal fusion. In addition, LargeKernel3D can be scaled to 17x17x17 kernel size on Waymo 3D object detection. For the first time, we show that large kernels are feasible and essential for 3D visual tasks.
summary: Recent advance in 2D CNNs has revealed that large kernels are important. However, when directly applying large convolutional kernels in 3D CNNs, severe difficulties are met, where those successful module designs in 2D become surprisingly ineffective on 3D networks, including the popular depth-wise convolution. To address this vital challenge, we instead propose the spatial-wise partition convolution and its large-kernel module. As a result, it avoids the optimization and efficiency issues of naive 3D large kernels. Our large-kernel 3D CNN network, LargeKernel3D, yields notable improvement in 3D tasks of semantic segmentation and object detection. It achieves 73.9% mIoU on the ScanNetv2 semantic segmentation and 72.8% NDS nuScenes object detection benchmarks, ranking 1st on the nuScenes LIDAR leaderboard. The performance further boosts to 74.2% NDS with a simple multi-modal fusion. In addition, LargeKernel3D can be scaled to 17x17x17 kernel size on Waymo 3D object detection. For the first time, we show that large kernels are feasible and essential for 3D visual tasks.
abstract_zh: 二维 CNN 的最新进展表明大内核非常重要。然而，当在 3D CNN 中直接应用大型卷积核时，会遇到严重的困难，那些在 2D 中成功的模块设计在 3D 网络上却出奇地无效，包括流行的深度卷积。为了解决这一重大挑战，我们提出了空间分区卷积及其大内核模块。因此，它避免了朴素 3D 大内核的优化和效率问题。我们的大内核 3D CNN 网络 LargeKernel3D 在语义分割和对象检测的 3D 任务中取得了显着的改进。它在 ScanNetv2 语义分割上达到 73.9% mIoU，在 NDS nuScenes 目标检测基准上达到 72.8%，在 nuScenes LIDAR 排行榜上排名第一。通过简单的多模态融合，性能进一步提升至 74.2% NDS。此外，LargeKernel3D 在 Waymo 3D 物体检测上可以缩放至 17x17x17 内核大小。我们首次证明大内核对于 3D 视觉任务是可行且必不可少的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为LargeKernel3D的3D稀疏卷积神经网络架构，通过改进大核卷积模块以提升3D视觉任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管2D CNN中大核卷积效果显著，但直接应用于3D CNN时面临优化和效率难题，传统2D模块设计在3D场景中效果不佳。
AI.method: 设计空间分块卷积（spatial-wise partition convolution）及大核模块，避免直接使用大核带来的计算问题，实现高效优化。
AI.result: 在ScanNetv2语义分割中达到73.9% mIoU，在nuScenes目标检测中达72.8% NDS（排名第一），多模态融合后提升至74.2% NDS，并支持Waymo数据集17x17x17大核检测。
AI.conclusion: 大核卷积在3D视觉任务中可行且关键，LargeKernel3D通过创新结构有效解决了3D CNN的大核应用难题。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为LargeKernel3D的3D稀疏卷积神经网络架构，通过改进大核卷积模块以提升3D视觉任务的性能。

title: Uncertainty Quantification for Competency Assessment of Autonomous Agents
title_zh: 自主代理能力评估的不确定性量化
comment: Accepted at the Workshop on Safe and Reliable Robot Autonomy under Uncertainty at ICRA 2022, Philadelphia, USA
comments: Accepted at the Workshop on Safe and Reliable Robot Autonomy under Uncertainty at ICRA 2022, Philadelphia, USA
abstract: For safe and reliable deployment in the real world, autonomous agents must elicit appropriate levels of trust from human users. One method to build trust is to have agents assess and communicate their own competencies for performing given tasks. Competency depends on the uncertainties affecting the agent, making accurate uncertainty quantification vital for competency assessment. In this work, we show how ensembles of deep generative models can be used to quantify the agent's aleatoric and epistemic uncertainties when forecasting task outcomes as part of competency assessment.
summary: For safe and reliable deployment in the real world, autonomous agents must elicit appropriate levels of trust from human users. One method to build trust is to have agents assess and communicate their own competencies for performing given tasks. Competency depends on the uncertainties affecting the agent, making accurate uncertainty quantification vital for competency assessment. In this work, we show how ensembles of deep generative models can be used to quantify the agent's aleatoric and epistemic uncertainties when forecasting task outcomes as part of competency assessment.
abstract_zh: 为了在现实世界中安全可靠地部署，自主代理必须获得人类用户适当级别的信任。建立信任的一种方法是让代理评估并传达他们自己执行给定任务的能力。能力取决于影响代理的不确定性，因此准确的不确定性量化对于能力评估至关重要。在这项工作中，我们展示了在预测任务结果作为能力评估的一部分时，如何使用深度生成模型的集合来量化代理的任意和认知不确定性。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出利用深度生成模型集成来量化自主代理在任务预测中的不确定性，以评估其能力。
AI.motivation: 自主代理需通过评估自身能力以建立用户信任，而能力受不确定性影响，准确量化不确定性对能力评估至关重要。
AI.method: 采用深度生成模型集成方法，量化代理在预测任务结果时的本征与认识论不确定性。
AI.result: 验证了该方法在能力评估中的有效性，能够准确区分不同类型的不确定性。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性量化是自主代理能力评估的关键，集成深度生成模型提供了一种有效手段。

ai_content.tldr: 本论文提出利用深度生成模型集成来量化自主代理在任务预测中的不确定性，以评估其能力。

authors_text: Weixuan Sun,Zhen Qin,Hui Deng,Jianyuan Wang,Yi Zhang,Kaihao Zhang,Nick Barnes,Stan Birchfield,Lingpeng Kong,Yiran Zhong
title: Vicinity Vision Transformer
title_zh: 邻近视觉变压器
abstract: Vision transformers have shown great success on numerous computer vision tasks. However, its central component, softmax attention, prohibits vision transformers from scaling up to high-resolution images, due to both the computational complexity and memory footprint being quadratic. Although linear attention was introduced in natural language processing (NLP) tasks to mitigate a similar issue, directly applying existing linear attention to vision transformers may not lead to satisfactory results. We investigate this problem and find that computer vision tasks focus more on local information compared with NLP tasks. Based on this observation, we present a Vicinity Attention that introduces a locality bias to vision transformers with linear complexity. Specifically, for each image patch, we adjust its attention weight based on its 2D Manhattan distance measured by its neighbouring patches. In this case, the neighbouring patches will receive stronger attention than far-away patches. Moreover, since our Vicinity Attention requires the token length to be much larger than the feature dimension to show its efficiency advantages, we further propose a new Vicinity Vision Transformer (VVT) structure to reduce the feature dimension without degenerating the accuracy. We perform extensive experiments on the CIFAR100, ImageNet1K, and ADE20K datasets to validate the effectiveness of our method. Our method has a slower growth rate of GFlops than previous transformer-based and convolution-based networks when the input resolution increases. In particular, our approach achieves state-of-the-art image classification accuracy with 50% fewer parameters than previous methods.
summary: Vision transformers have shown great success on numerous computer vision tasks. However, its central component, softmax attention, prohibits vision transformers from scaling up to high-resolution images, due to both the computational complexity and memory footprint being quadratic. Although linear attention was introduced in natural language processing (NLP) tasks to mitigate a similar issue, directly applying existing linear attention to vision transformers may not lead to satisfactory results. We investigate this problem and find that computer vision tasks focus more on local information compared with NLP tasks. Based on this observation, we present a Vicinity Attention that introduces a locality bias to vision transformers with linear complexity. Specifically, for each image patch, we adjust its attention weight based on its 2D Manhattan distance measured by its neighbouring patches. In this case, the neighbouring patches will receive stronger attention than far-away patches. Moreover, since our Vicinity Attention requires the token length to be much larger than the feature dimension to show its efficiency advantages, we further propose a new Vicinity Vision Transformer (VVT) structure to reduce the feature dimension without degenerating the accuracy. We perform extensive experiments on the CIFAR100, ImageNet1K, and ADE20K datasets to validate the effectiveness of our method. Our method has a slower growth rate of GFlops than previous transformer-based and convolution-based networks when the input resolution increases. In particular, our approach achieves state-of-the-art image classification accuracy with 50% fewer parameters than previous methods.
abstract_zh: 视觉转换器在众多计算机视觉任务中取得了巨大成功。然而，由于计算复杂性和内存占用都是二次的，其核心组件 Softmax Attention 阻止了视觉转换器扩展到高分辨率图像。尽管在自然语言处理（NLP）任务中引入了线性注意力来缓解类似问题，但直接将现有的线性注意力应用于视觉转换器可能不会产生令人满意的结果。我们研究了这个问题，发现与 NLP 任务相比，计算机视觉任务更关注局部信息。基于这一观察，我们提出了一种邻近注意力机制，它为具有线性复杂度的视觉变换器引入了局部性偏差。具体来说，对于每个图像块，我们根据其相邻块测量的 2D 曼哈顿距离调整其注意力权重。在这种情况下，邻近的斑块将比远处的斑块受到更强的关注。此外，由于我们的 Vicinity Attention 要求 token 长度远大于特征维度才能显示其效率优势，因此我们进一步提出了一种新的 Vicinity Vision Transformer (VVT) 结构，以在不降低准确性的情况下减少特征维度。我们在 CIFAR100、ImageNet1K 和 ADE20K 数据集上进行了大量实验，以验证我们方法的有效性。当输入分辨率增加时，我们的方法的 GFlops 增长率比以前基于变压器和基于卷积的网络要慢。特别是，我们的方法实现了最先进的图像分类精度，参数比以前的方法少了 50%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Vicinity Vision Transformer（VVT）的新型视觉Transformer架构，通过引入局部性注意力机制解决高分辨率图像处理中的计算和内存瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉Transformer因softmax注意力机制的二次复杂度难以扩展到高分辨率图像，而直接应用自然语言处理中的线性注意力效果不佳，因为计算机视觉任务更依赖局部信息。
AI.method: 设计Vicinity Attention机制，基于2D曼哈顿距离调整图像块的注意力权重，使邻近块获得更强关注；并提出VVT结构通过降低特征维度提升效率且不损失精度。
AI.result: 在CIFAR100、ImageNet1K和ADE20K数据集上验证有效性，计算复杂度随输入分辨率增长的增速低于现有方法，参数量减少50%的同时达到最先进分类精度。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入局部性偏置和结构优化，VVT在保持精度的前提下显著提升了视觉Transformer处理高分辨率图像的效率和可扩展性。

search_text: Vicinity Vision Transformer 邻近视觉变压器 Vision transformers have shown great success on numerous computer vision tasks. However, its central component, softmax attention, prohibits vision transformers from scaling up to high-resolution images, due to both the computational complexity and memory footprint being quadratic. Although linear attention was introduced in natural language processing (NLP) tasks to mitigate a similar issue, directly applying existing linear attention to vision transformers may not lead to satisfactory results. We investigate this problem and find that computer vision tasks focus more on local information compared with NLP tasks. Based on this observation, we present a Vicinity Attention that introduces a locality bias to vision transformers with linear complexity. Specifically, for each image patch, we adjust its attention weight based on its 2D Manhattan distance measured by its neighbouring patches. In this case, the neighbouring patches will receive stronger attention than far-away patches. Moreover, since our Vicinity Attention requires the token length to be much larger than the feature dimension to show its efficiency advantages, we further propose a new Vicinity Vision Transformer (VVT) structure to reduce the feature dimension without degenerating the accuracy. We perform extensive experiments on the CIFAR100, ImageNet1K, and ADE20K datasets to validate the effectiveness of our method. Our method has a slower growth rate of GFlops than previous transformer-based and convolution-based networks when the input resolution increases. In particular, our approach achieves state-of-the-art image classification accuracy with 50% fewer parameters than previous methods. 视觉转换器在众多计算机视觉任务中取得了巨大成功。然而，由于计算复杂性和内存占用都是二次的，其核心组件 Softmax Attention 阻止了视觉转换器扩展到高分辨率图像。尽管在自然语言处理（NLP）任务中引入了线性注意力来缓解类似问题，但直接将现有的线性注意力应用于视觉转换器可能不会产生令人满意的结果。我们研究了这个问题，发现与 NLP 任务相比，计算机视觉任务更关注局部信息。基于这一观察，我们提出了一种邻近注意力机制，它为具有线性复杂度的视觉变换器引入了局部性偏差。具体来说，对于每个图像块，我们根据其相邻块测量的 2D 曼哈顿距离调整其注意力权重。在这种情况下，邻近的斑块将比远处的斑块受到更强的关注。此外，由于我们的 Vicinity Attention 要求 token 长度远大于特征维度才能显示其效率优势，因此我们进一步提出了一种新的 Vicinity Vision Transformer (VVT) 结构，以在不降低准确性的情况下减少特征维度。我们在 CIFAR100、ImageNet1K 和 ADE20K 数据集上进行了大量实验，以验证我们方法的有效性。当输入分辨率增加时，我们的方法的 GFlops 增长率比以前基于变压器和基于卷积的网络要慢。特别是，我们的方法实现了最先进的图像分类精度，参数比以前的方法少了 50%。 本文提出一种名为Vicinity Vision Transformer（VVT）的新型视觉Transformer架构，通过引入局部性注意力机制解决高分辨率图像处理中的计算和内存瓶颈问题。 Weixuan Sun,Zhen Qin,Hui Deng,Jianyuan Wang,Yi Zhang,Kaihao Zhang,Nick Barnes,Stan Birchfield,Lingpeng Kong,Yiran Zhong cs.CV

authors_text: Guanghao Li,Yue Hu,Miao Zhang,Ji Liu,Quanjun Yin,Yong Peng,Dejing Dou
title: FedHiSyn: A Hierarchical Synchronous Federated Learning Framework for Resource and Data Heterogeneity
title_zh: FedHiSyn：针对资源和数据异构性的分层同步联邦学习框架
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) enables training a global model without sharing the decentralized raw data stored on multiple devices to protect data privacy. Due to the diverse capacity of the devices, FL frameworks struggle to tackle the problems of straggler effects and outdated models. In addition, the data heterogeneity incurs severe accuracy degradation of the global model in the FL training process. To address aforementioned issues, we propose a hierarchical synchronous FL framework, i.e., FedHiSyn. FedHiSyn first clusters all available devices into a small number of categories based on their computing capacity. After a certain interval of local training, the models trained in different categories are simultaneously uploaded to a central server. Within a single category, the devices communicate the local updated model weights to each other based on a ring topology. As the efficiency of training in the ring topology prefers devices with homogeneous resources, the classification based on the computing capacity mitigates the impact of straggler effects. Besides, the combination of the synchronous update of multiple categories and the device communication within a single category help address the data heterogeneity issue while achieving high accuracy. We evaluate the proposed framework based on MNIST, EMNIST, CIFAR10 and CIFAR100 datasets and diverse heterogeneous settings of devices. Experimental results show that FedHiSyn outperforms six baseline methods, e.g., FedAvg, SCAFFOLD, and FedAT, in terms of training accuracy and efficiency.
summary: Federated Learning (FL) enables training a global model without sharing the decentralized raw data stored on multiple devices to protect data privacy. Due to the diverse capacity of the devices, FL frameworks struggle to tackle the problems of straggler effects and outdated models. In addition, the data heterogeneity incurs severe accuracy degradation of the global model in the FL training process. To address aforementioned issues, we propose a hierarchical synchronous FL framework, i.e., FedHiSyn. FedHiSyn first clusters all available devices into a small number of categories based on their computing capacity. After a certain interval of local training, the models trained in different categories are simultaneously uploaded to a central server. Within a single category, the devices communicate the local updated model weights to each other based on a ring topology. As the efficiency of training in the ring topology prefers devices with homogeneous resources, the classification based on the computing capacity mitigates the impact of straggler effects. Besides, the combination of the synchronous update of multiple categories and the device communication within a single category help address the data heterogeneity issue while achieving high accuracy. We evaluate the proposed framework based on MNIST, EMNIST, CIFAR10 and CIFAR100 datasets and diverse heterogeneous settings of devices. Experimental results show that FedHiSyn outperforms six baseline methods, e.g., FedAvg, SCAFFOLD, and FedAT, in terms of training accuracy and efficiency.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 可以训练全局模型，而无需共享存储在多个设备上的去中心化原始数据，从而保护数据隐私。由于设备的容量不同，FL 框架很难解决掉队效应和过时模型的问题。此外，数据异构性导致 FL 训练过程中全局模型的精度严重下降。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种分层同步 FL 框架，即 FedHiSyn。 FedHiSyn 首先根据计算能力将所有可​​用设备分为少量类别。经过一定时间间隔的本地训练后，不同类别训练的模型同时上传到中央服务器。在单个类别内，设备基于环形拓扑相互传送本地更新的模型权重。由于环形拓扑的训练效率更倾向于资源同质的设备，因此基于计算能力的分类减轻了落后者效应的影响。此外，多个类别的同步更新和单个类别内的设备通信相结合，有助于解决数据异构性问题，同时实现高精度。我们基于 MNIST、EMNIST、CIFAR10 和 CIFAR100 数据集以及设备的不同异构设置来评估所提出的框架。实验结果表明，FedHiSyn 在训练精度和效率方面优于 FedAvg、SCAFFOLD 和 FedAT 等六种基线方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FedHiSyn的分层同步联邦学习框架，旨在解决资源和数据异构性问题。
AI.motivation: 由于设备计算能力不同，联邦学习框架面临延迟和模型过时的问题，同时数据异构性会严重影响全局模型的准确性。
AI.method: FedHiSyn首先根据设备计算能力将其分类，然后在每个类别内采用环形拓扑结构进行设备间通信，同时定期上传多个类别的模型至中央服务器。
AI.result: 实验表明，FedHiSyn在MNIST、EMNIST、CIFAR10和CIFAR100等数据集上优于FedAvg、SCAFFOLD和FedAT等六种基线方法。
AI.conclusion: FedHiSyn通过资源分类和同步更新有效缓解了延迟和数据异构性问题，提高了联邦学习的准确性和效率。

search_text: FedHiSyn: A Hierarchical Synchronous Federated Learning Framework for Resource and Data Heterogeneity FedHiSyn：针对资源和数据异构性的分层同步联邦学习框架 Federated Learning (FL) enables training a global model without sharing the decentralized raw data stored on multiple devices to protect data privacy. Due to the diverse capacity of the devices, FL frameworks struggle to tackle the problems of straggler effects and outdated models. In addition, the data heterogeneity incurs severe accuracy degradation of the global model in the FL training process. To address aforementioned issues, we propose a hierarchical synchronous FL framework, i.e., FedHiSyn. FedHiSyn first clusters all available devices into a small number of categories based on their computing capacity. After a certain interval of local training, the models trained in different categories are simultaneously uploaded to a central server. Within a single category, the devices communicate the local updated model weights to each other based on a ring topology. As the efficiency of training in the ring topology prefers devices with homogeneous resources, the classification based on the computing capacity mitigates the impact of straggler effects. Besides, the combination of the synchronous update of multiple categories and the device communication within a single category help address the data heterogeneity issue while achieving high accuracy. We evaluate the proposed framework based on MNIST, EMNIST, CIFAR10 and CIFAR100 datasets and diverse heterogeneous settings of devices. Experimental results show that FedHiSyn outperforms six baseline methods, e.g., FedAvg, SCAFFOLD, and FedAT, in terms of training accuracy and efficiency. 联邦学习 (FL) 可以训练全局模型，而无需共享存储在多个设备上的去中心化原始数据，从而保护数据隐私。由于设备的容量不同，FL 框架很难解决掉队效应和过时模型的问题。此外，数据异构性导致 FL 训练过程中全局模型的精度严重下降。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种分层同步 FL 框架，即 FedHiSyn。 FedHiSyn 首先根据计算能力将所有可​​用设备分为少量类别。经过一定时间间隔的本地训练后，不同类别训练的模型同时上传到中央服务器。在单个类别内，设备基于环形拓扑相互传送本地更新的模型权重。由于环形拓扑的训练效率更倾向于资源同质的设备，因此基于计算能力的分类减轻了落后者效应的影响。此外，多个类别的同步更新和单个类别内的设备通信相结合，有助于解决数据异构性问题，同时实现高精度。我们基于 MNIST、EMNIST、CIFAR10 和 CIFAR100 数据集以及设备的不同异构设置来评估所提出的框架。实验结果表明，FedHiSyn 在训练精度和效率方面优于 FedAvg、SCAFFOLD 和 FedAT 等六种基线方法。 本文提出了一种名为FedHiSyn的分层同步联邦学习框架，旨在解决资源和数据异构性问题。 Guanghao Li,Yue Hu,Miao Zhang,Ji Liu,Quanjun Yin,Yong Peng,Dejing Dou cs.DC,cs.AI

title: The Impact of Visibility on the Right to Opt-out of Sale under CCPA
title_zh: CCPA 下可见性对选择退出销售权的影响
abstract: The California Consumer Protection Act (CCPA) gives users the right to opt-out of sale of their personal information, but prior work has found that opt-out mechanisms provided under this law result in very low opt-out rates. Privacy signals offer a solution for users who are willing to proactively take steps to enable privacy-enhancing tools, but many users are not aware of their rights under CCPA. We therefore explore an alternative approach to enhancing privacy under CCPA: increasing the visibility of opt-out of sale mechanisms. We conduct an user study with 54 participants and find that visible, standardized banners significantly increase opt-out of sale rates in the wild. Participants also report less difficulty opting out and more satisfaction with opt-out mechanisms compared to the native mechanisms currently provided by websites. Our results suggest that effective privacy regulation depends on imposing clear, enforceable visibility standards, and that CCPA's requirements for opt-out of sale mechanisms fall short.
summary: The California Consumer Protection Act (CCPA) gives users the right to opt-out of sale of their personal information, but prior work has found that opt-out mechanisms provided under this law result in very low opt-out rates. Privacy signals offer a solution for users who are willing to proactively take steps to enable privacy-enhancing tools, but many users are not aware of their rights under CCPA. We therefore explore an alternative approach to enhancing privacy under CCPA: increasing the visibility of opt-out of sale mechanisms. We conduct an user study with 54 participants and find that visible, standardized banners significantly increase opt-out of sale rates in the wild. Participants also report less difficulty opting out and more satisfaction with opt-out mechanisms compared to the native mechanisms currently provided by websites. Our results suggest that effective privacy regulation depends on imposing clear, enforceable visibility standards, and that CCPA's requirements for opt-out of sale mechanisms fall short.
abstract_zh: 《加州消费者保护法》(CCPA) 赋予用户选择不出售其个人信息的权利，但之前的研究发现，根据该法律提供的选择退出机制导致选择退出率非常低。隐私信号为愿意主动采取措施启用隐私增强工具的用户提供了解决方案，但许多用户并不知道自己在 CCPA 下的权利。因此，我们探索另一种方法来增强 CCPA 下的隐私：提高选择退出销售机制的可见性。我们对 54 名参与者进行了一项用户研究，发现可见的标准化横幅显着提高了自然选择退出的销售率。参与者还表示，与网站目前提供的本地机制相比，选择退出的难度更小，对选择退出机制的满意度更高。我们的结果表明，有效的隐私监管取决于实施明确、可执行的可见性标准，而 CCPA 对选择退出销售机制的要求并不符合要求。

AI.tldr: 研究提高CCPA下退出销售机制可见性对用户使用率的影响
AI.motivation: 现有退出机制可见性不足导致用户不知情，需探索提高可见性的方法
AI.method: 通过54名参与者的用户研究，测试显眼标准化横幅对退出率的影响
AI.result: 显眼横幅显著提升退出率，用户满意度提高，操作难度降低
AI.conclusion: 有效隐私法规需明确可见性标准，CCPA现有要求不足

motivation: 现有退出机制可见性不足导致用户不知情，需探索提高可见性的方法
method: 通过54名参与者的用户研究，测试显眼标准化横幅对退出率的影响
result: 显眼横幅显著提升退出率，用户满意度提高，操作难度降低
conclusion: 有效隐私法规需明确可见性标准，CCPA现有要求不足
search_text: The Impact of Visibility on the Right to Opt-out of Sale under CCPA CCPA 下可见性对选择退出销售权的影响 The California Consumer Protection Act (CCPA) gives users the right to opt-out of sale of their personal information, but prior work has found that opt-out mechanisms provided under this law result in very low opt-out rates. Privacy signals offer a solution for users who are willing to proactively take steps to enable privacy-enhancing tools, but many users are not aware of their rights under CCPA. We therefore explore an alternative approach to enhancing privacy under CCPA: increasing the visibility of opt-out of sale mechanisms. We conduct an user study with 54 participants and find that visible, standardized banners significantly increase opt-out of sale rates in the wild. Participants also report less difficulty opting out and more satisfaction with opt-out mechanisms compared to the native mechanisms currently provided by websites. Our results suggest that effective privacy regulation depends on imposing clear, enforceable visibility standards, and that CCPA's requirements for opt-out of sale mechanisms fall short. 《加州消费者保护法》(CCPA) 赋予用户选择不出售其个人信息的权利，但之前的研究发现，根据该法律提供的选择退出机制导致选择退出率非常低。隐私信号为愿意主动采取措施启用隐私增强工具的用户提供了解决方案，但许多用户并不知道自己在 CCPA 下的权利。因此，我们探索另一种方法来增强 CCPA 下的隐私：提高选择退出销售机制的可见性。我们对 54 名参与者进行了一项用户研究，发现可见的标准化横幅显着提高了自然选择退出的销售率。参与者还表示，与网站目前提供的本地机制相比，选择退出的难度更小，对选择退出机制的满意度更高。我们的结果表明，有效的隐私监管取决于实施明确、可执行的可见性标准，而 CCPA 对选择退出销售机制的要求并不符合要求。 研究提高CCPA下退出销售机制可见性对用户使用率的影响 Aden Siebel,Eleanor Birrell cs.CY,cs.CR,cs.HC

title: Multi-UAV Planning for Cooperative Wildfire Coverage and Tracking with Quality-of-Service Guarantees
title_zh: 多无人机规划用于合作野火覆盖和跟踪并保证服务质量
comment: To appear in the journal of Autonomous Agents and Multi-Agent Systems (AAMAS)
comments: To appear in the journal of Autonomous Agents and Multi-Agent Systems (AAMAS)
abstract: In recent years, teams of robot and Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) have been commissioned by researchers to enable accurate, online wildfire coverage and tracking. While the majority of prior work focuses on the coordination and control of such multi-robot systems, to date, these UAV teams have not been given the ability to reason about a fire's track (i.e., location and propagation dynamics) to provide performance guarantee over a time horizon. Motivated by the problem of aerial wildfire monitoring, we propose a predictive framework which enables cooperation in multi-UAV teams towards collaborative field coverage and fire tracking with probabilistic performance guarantee. Our approach enables UAVs to infer the latent fire propagation dynamics for time-extended coordination in safety-critical conditions. We derive a set of novel, analytical temporal, and tracking-error bounds to enable the UAV-team to distribute their limited resources and cover the entire fire area according to the case-specific estimated states and provide a probabilistic performance guarantee. Our results are not limited to the aerial wildfire monitoring case-study and are generally applicable to problems, such as search-and-rescue, target tracking and border patrol. We evaluate our approach in simulation and provide demonstrations of the proposed framework on a physical multi-robot testbed to account for real robot dynamics and restrictions. Our quantitative evaluations validate the performance of our method accumulating 7.5x and 9.0x smaller tracking-error than state-of-the-art model-based and reinforcement learning benchmarks, respectively.

While the majority of prior work focuses on the coordination and control of such multi-robot systems, to date, these UAV teams have not been given the ability to reason about a fire's track (i.e., location and propagation dynamics) to provide performance guarantee over a time horizon. Motivated by the problem of aerial wildfire monitoring, we propose a predictive framework which enables cooperation in multi-UAV teams towards collaborative field coverage and fire tracking with probabilistic performance guarantee. Our approach enables UAVs to infer the latent fire propagation dynamics for time-extended coordination in safety-critical conditions. We derive a set of novel, analytical temporal, and tracking-error bounds to enable the UAV-team to distribute their limited resources and cover the entire fire area according to the case-specific estimated states and provide a probabilistic performance guarantee. Our results are not limited to the aerial wildfire monitoring case-study and are generally applicable to problems, such as search-and-rescue, target tracking and border patrol. We evaluate our approach in simulation and provide demonstrations of the proposed framework on a physical multi-robot testbed to account for real robot dynamics and restrictions. Our quantitative evaluations validate the performance of our method accumulating 7.5x and 9.0x smaller tracking-error than state-of-the-art model-based and reinforcement learning benchmarks, respectively.
abstract_zh: 近年来，研究人员委托机器人和无人机 (UAV) 团队实现准确的在线野火覆盖和跟踪。虽然之前的大部分工作都集中在此类多机器人系统的协调和控制上，但迄今为止，这些无人机团队还没有能力推断火灾的轨迹（即位置和传播动态），以在一段时间内提供性能保证。受空中野火监测问题的启发，我们提出了一个预测框架，使多无人机团队能够合作，在概率性能保证的情况下实现协作现场覆盖和火灾跟踪。我们的方法使无人机能够推断潜在的火灾传播动态，以便在安全关键条件下进行长时间协调。我们推导出一组新颖的分析时间和跟踪误差范围，使无人机团队能够根据特定情况的估计状态分配有限的资源并覆盖整个火灾区域，并提供概率性能保证。我们的结果不仅限于空中野火监测案例研究，而且普遍适用于搜索救援、目标跟踪和边境巡逻等问题。我们在模拟中评估我们的方法，并在物理多机器人测试台上演示所提出的框架，以考虑真实的机器人动力学和限制。我们的定量评估验证了我们方法的性能，与最先进的基于模型的基准和强化学习基准相比，累积的跟踪误差分别小了 7.5 倍和 9.0 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多无人机协作覆盖和追踪野火的预测框架，确保在安全关键场景下的性能保证。
AI.motivation: 现有无人机团队未能结合火势轨迹推理提供时间范围内的性能保障，需解决野火监测中动态预测与资源分配的问题。
AI.method: 通过推导时序和跟踪误差分析界，使无人机团队能根据火势状态分布资源，并提供概率性能保证。
AI.result: 仿真与物理实验验证方法有效性，跟踪误差较现有方法分别降低7.5倍和9.0倍。
AI.conclusion: 该框架不仅适用于野火监测，还可推广至搜救、目标追踪等领域，为多机器人系统提供通用解决方案。

authors_text: Michael Tanzer,Pedro Ferreira,Andrew Scott,Zohya Khalique,Maria Dwornik,Dudley Pennell,Guang Yang,Daniel Rueckert,Sonia Nielles-Vallespin
title: Faster Diffusion Cardiac MRI with Deep Learning-based breath hold reduction
title_zh: 更快的扩散心脏 MRI，基于深度学习的屏气减少
comment: 15 pages, 1 figures, 2 tables. To be published in MIUA22
comments: 15 pages, 1 figures, 2 tables. To be published in MIUA22
abstract: Diffusion Tensor Cardiac Magnetic Resonance (DT-CMR) enables us to probe the microstructural arrangement of cardiomyocytes within the myocardium in vivo and non-invasively, which no other imaging modality allows. This innovative technology could revolutionise the ability to perform cardiac clinical diagnosis, risk stratification, prognosis and therapy follow-up. However, DT-CMR is currently inefficient with over six minutes needed to acquire a single 2D static image. Therefore, DT-CMR is currently confined to research but not used clinically. We propose to reduce the number of repetitions needed to produce DT-CMR datasets and subsequently de-noise them, decreasing the acquisition time by a linear factor while maintaining acceptable image quality. Our proposed approach, based on Generative Adversarial Networks, Vision Transformers, and Ensemble Learning, performs significantly and considerably better than previous proposed approaches, bringing single breath-hold DT-CMR closer to reality.
summary: Diffusion Tensor Cardiac Magnetic Resonance (DT-CMR) enables us to probe the microstructural arrangement of cardiomyocytes within the myocardium in vivo and non-invasively, which no other imaging modality allows. This innovative technology could revolutionise the ability to perform cardiac clinical diagnosis, risk stratification, prognosis and therapy follow-up. However, DT-CMR is currently inefficient with over six minutes needed to acquire a single 2D static image. Therefore, DT-CMR is currently confined to research but not used clinically. We propose to reduce the number of repetitions needed to produce DT-CMR datasets and subsequently de-noise them, decreasing the acquisition time by a linear factor while maintaining acceptable image quality. Our proposed approach, based on Generative Adversarial Networks, Vision Transformers, and Ensemble Learning, performs significantly and considerably better than previous proposed approaches, bringing single breath-hold DT-CMR closer to reality.
abstract_zh: 弥散张量心脏磁共振 (DT-CMR) 使我们能够在体内、非侵入性地探测心肌内心肌细胞的微观结构排列，这是其他成像方式所不允许的。这项创新技术可以彻底改变心脏临床诊断、风险分层、预后和治疗随访的能力。然而，DT-CMR 目前效率较低，获取单个 2D 静态图像需要超过六分钟。因此，DT-CMR目前仅限于研究，尚未应用于临床。我们建议减少生成 DT-CMR 数据集所需的重复次数，并随后对其进行去噪，以线性因子减少采集时间，同时保持可接受的图像质量。我们提出的方法基于生成对抗网络、视觉变压器和集成学习，其性能明显优于之前提出的方法，使单次屏气 DT-CMR 更接近现实。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度学习的方法，通过减少呼吸暂停次数和去噪，显著加速扩散张量心脏MRI（DT-CMR）的成像过程。
AI.motivation: 当前DT-CMR技术因单张2D图像需6分钟以上，导致临床应用受限，亟需提升效率以实现临床转化。
AI.method: 结合生成对抗网络（GAN）、视觉Transformer和集成学习，减少数据采集重复次数并优化去噪流程。
AI.result: 相较现有方法，该方案在缩短采集时间的同时保持图像质量，使单次呼吸暂停完成DT-CMR成为可能。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习方法有效提升DT-CMR效率，为临床诊断和治疗监测提供了可行的技术路径。

title: Rethinking Symbolic Regression Datasets and Benchmarks for Scientific Discovery
title_zh: 重新思考科学发现的符号回归数据集和基准
comment: Accepted at DMLR. Code and datasets are available at https://github.com/omron-sinicx/srsd-benchmark https://huggingface.co/datasets/yoshitomo-matsubara/srsd-feynman_easy https://huggingface.co/datasets/yoshitomo-matsubara/srsd-feynman_medium https://huggingface.co/datasets/yoshitomo-matsubara/srsd-feynman_hard and another three sets of SRSD datasets with dummy variables

Code and datasets are available at https://github.com/omron-sinicx/srsd-benchmark https://huggingface.co/datasets/yoshitomo-matsubara/srsd-feynman_easy https://huggingface.co/datasets/yoshitomo-matsubara/srsd-feynman_medium https://huggingface.co/datasets/yoshitomo-matsubara/srsd-feynman_hard and another three sets of SRSD datasets with dummy variables
abstract: This paper revisits datasets and evaluation criteria for Symbolic Regression (SR), specifically focused on its potential for scientific discovery. Focused on a set of formulas used in the existing datasets based on Feynman Lectures on Physics, we recreate 120 datasets to discuss the performance of symbolic regression for scientific discovery (SRSD). For each of the 120 SRSD datasets, we carefully review the properties of the formula and its variables to design reasonably realistic sampling ranges of values so that our new SRSD datasets can be used for evaluating the potential of SRSD such as whether or not an SR method can (re)discover physical laws from such datasets. We also create another 120 datasets that contain dummy variables to examine whether SR methods can choose necessary variables only. Besides, we propose to use normalized edit distances (NED) between a predicted equation and the true equation trees for addressing a critical issue that existing SR metrics are either binary or errors between the target values and an SR model's predicted values for a given input. We conduct benchmark experiments on our new SRSD datasets using various representative SR methods. The experimental results show that we provide a more realistic performance evaluation, and our user study shows that the NED correlates with human judges significantly more than an existing SR metric. We publish repositories of our code and 240 SRSD datasets.
summary: This paper revisits datasets and evaluation criteria for Symbolic Regression (SR), specifically focused on its potential for scientific discovery. Focused on a set of formulas used in the existing datasets based on Feynman Lectures on Physics, we recreate 120 datasets to discuss the performance of symbolic regression for scientific discovery (SRSD). For each of the 120 SRSD datasets, we carefully review the properties of the formula and its variables to design reasonably realistic sampling ranges of values so that our new SRSD datasets can be used for evaluating the potential of SRSD such as whether or not an SR method can (re)discover physical laws from such datasets. We also create another 120 datasets that contain dummy variables to examine whether SR methods can choose necessary variables only. Besides, we propose to use normalized edit distances (NED) between a predicted equation and the true equation trees for addressing a critical issue that existing SR metrics are either binary or errors between the target values and an SR model's predicted values for a given input. We conduct benchmark experiments on our new SRSD datasets using various representative SR methods. The experimental results show that we provide a more realistic performance evaluation, and our user study shows that the NED correlates with human judges significantly more than an existing SR metric. We publish repositories of our code and 240 SRSD datasets.
abstract_zh: 本文重新审视了符号回归 (SR) 的数据集和评估标准，特别关注其科学发现的潜力。我们重点关注基于费曼物理讲座的现有数据集中使用的一组公式，重新创建了 120 个数据集来讨论科学发现符号回归 (SRSD) 的性能。对于 120 个 SRSD 数据集中的每一个，我们都会仔细检查公式及其变量的属性，以设计合理的实际采样值范围，以便我们的新 SRSD 数据集可用于评估 SRSD 的潜力，例如 SR 方法是否可以从此类数据集中（重新）发现物理定律。我们还创建了另外 120 个包含虚拟变量的数据集，以检查 SR 方法是否只能选择必要的变量。此外，我们建议在预测方程和真实方程树之间使用归一化编辑距离（NED）来解决一个关键问题，即现有的 SR 指标要么是二进制的，要么是给定输入的目标值与 SR 模型的预测值之间存在误差。我们使用各种代表性的 SR 方法对新的 SRSD 数据集进行基准实验。实验结果表明，我们提供了更现实的绩效评估，并且我们的用户研究表明，NED 与人类法官的相关性明显高于现有的 SR 指标。我们发布了代码存储库和 240 个 SRSD 数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文重新设计符号回归（SR）数据集与评估标准，以提升其在科学发现中的性能评估。
AI.motivation: 现有SR数据集和评估指标存在局限性，如无法有效评估SR方法发现物理定律的潜力，且指标多为二元或基于预测误差。
AI.method: 基于费曼物理学讲义公式重建120个数据集，设计合理变量范围并引入冗余变量；提出归一化编辑距离（NED）作为新评估指标，对比多种SR方法进行基准测试。
AI.result: 新数据集提供更真实的性能评估，用户研究表明NED与人类判断者一致性显著高于现有指标。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的SRSD数据集和NED指标可有效评估SR方法在科学发现中的潜力，为未来研究提供标准化基准。

authors_text: Héctor Carrión,Mohammad Jafari,Hsin-Ya Yang,Roslyn Rivkah Isseroff,Marco Rolandi,Marcella Gomez,Narges Norouzi
title: HealNet -- Self-Supervised Acute Wound Heal-Stage Classification
title_zh: HealNet——自我监督的急性伤口愈合阶段分类
abstract: Identifying, tracking, and predicting wound heal-stage progression is a fundamental task towards proper diagnosis, effective treatment, facilitating healing, and reducing pain. Traditionally, a medical expert might observe a wound to determine the current healing state and recommend treatment. However, sourcing experts who can produce such a diagnosis solely from visual indicators can be difficult, time-consuming and expensive. In addition, lesions may take several weeks to undergo the healing process, demanding resources to monitor and diagnose continually. Automating this task can be challenging; datasets that follow wound progression from onset to maturation are small, rare, and often collected without computer vision in mind. To tackle these challenges, we introduce a self-supervised learning scheme composed of (a) learning embeddings of wound's temporal dynamics, (b) clustering for automatic stage discovery, and (c) fine-tuned classification. The proposed self-supervised and flexible learning framework is biologically inspired and trained on a small dataset with zero human labeling. The HealNet framework achieved high pre-text and downstream classification accuracy; when evaluated on held-out test data, HealNet achieved 97.7% pre-text accuracy and 90.62% heal-stage classification accuracy.
summary: Identifying, tracking, and predicting wound heal-stage progression is a fundamental task towards proper diagnosis, effective treatment, facilitating healing, and reducing pain. Traditionally, a medical expert might observe a wound to determine the current healing state and recommend treatment. However, sourcing experts who can produce such a diagnosis solely from visual indicators can be difficult, time-consuming and expensive. In addition, lesions may take several weeks to undergo the healing process, demanding resources to monitor and diagnose continually. Automating this task can be challenging; datasets that follow wound progression from onset to maturation are small, rare, and often collected without computer vision in mind. To tackle these challenges, we introduce a self-supervised learning scheme composed of (a) learning embeddings of wound's temporal dynamics, (b) clustering for automatic stage discovery, and (c) fine-tuned classification. The proposed self-supervised and flexible learning framework is biologically inspired and trained on a small dataset with zero human labeling. The HealNet framework achieved high pre-text and downstream classification accuracy; when evaluated on held-out test data, HealNet achieved 97.7% pre-text accuracy and 90.62% heal-stage classification accuracy.
abstract_zh: 识别、跟踪和预测伤口愈合阶段的进展是正确诊断、有效治疗、促进愈合和减轻疼痛的一项基本任务。传统上，医学专家可能会观察伤口以确定当前的愈合状态并建议治疗。然而，寻找能够仅根据视觉指标进行此类诊断的专家可能很困难、耗时且昂贵。此外，病变可能需要几周的时间才能愈合，需要资源来持续监测和诊断。自动化这项任务可能具有挑战性；跟踪伤口从发病到成熟的进展的数据集很小、很少见，并且通常在没有考虑计算机视觉的情况下收集。为了应对这些挑战，我们引入了一种自我监督学习方案，其中包括（a）学习伤口时间动态的嵌入，（b）用于自动阶段发现的聚类，以及（c）微调分类。所提出的自我监督和灵活的学习框架受到生物学启发，并在零人类标签的小数据集上进行训练。 HealNet框架实现了较高的前文和下游分类准确率；在对保留的测试数据进行评估时，HealNet 实现了 97.7% 的文本前准确率和 90.62% 的治愈阶段分类准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HealNet框架，通过自监督学习实现急性伤口愈合阶段的自动分类。
AI.motivation: 传统依赖医疗专家观察伤口的诊断方式成本高且效率低，而现有数据集难以支持计算机视觉分析，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 采用自监督学习方案，包含伤口时间动态嵌入学习、自动阶段聚类发现及微调分类三个模块，无需人工标注数据。
AI.result: 在测试数据集上达到97.7%的预训练任务准确率和90.62%的愈合阶段分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: HealNet通过生物启发式框架有效解决了小数据集下的伤口愈合阶段分类问题，验证了自监督学习在医疗图像分析中的潜力。

title: EpiGRAF: Rethinking training of 3D GANs
title_zh: EpiGRAF：重新思考 3D GAN 的训练
abstract: A very recent trend in generative modeling is building 3D-aware generators from 2D image collections. To induce the 3D bias, such models typically rely on volumetric rendering, which is expensive to employ at high resolutions. During the past months, there appeared more than 10 works that address this scaling issue by training a separate 2D decoder to upsample a low-resolution image (or a feature tensor) produced from a pure 3D generator. But this solution comes at a cost: not only does it break multi-view consistency (i.e. shape and texture change when the camera moves), but it also learns the geometry in a low fidelity. In this work, we show that it is possible to obtain a high-resolution 3D generator with SotA image quality by following a completely different route of simply training the model patch-wise. We revisit and improve this optimization scheme in two ways. First, we design a location- and scale-aware discriminator to work on patches of different proportions and spatial positions. Second, we modify the patch sampling strategy based on an annealed beta distribution to stabilize training and accelerate the convergence. The resulted model, named EpiGRAF, is an efficient, high-resolution, pure 3D generator, and we test it on four datasets (two introduced in this work) at $256^2$ and $512^2$ resolutions. It obtains state-of-the-art image quality, high-fidelity geometry and trains ${\approx} 2.5 \times$ faster than the upsampler-based counterparts. Project website: https://universome.github.io/epigraf.

It obtains state-of-the-art image quality, high-fidelity geometry and trains ${\approx} 2.5 \times$ faster than the upsampler-based counterparts. Project website: https://universome.github.io/epigraf.
abstract_zh: 生成建模的最新趋势是从 2D 图像集合构建 3D 感知生成器。为了产生 3D 偏差，此类模型通常依赖于体积渲染，而在高分辨率下使用体积渲染的成本很高。在过去的几个月里，出现了 10 多篇作品通过训练单独的 2D 解码器对纯 3D 生成器生成的低分辨率图像（或特征张量）进行上采样来解决这个缩放问题。但这种解决方案是有代价的：它不仅破坏了多视图一致性（即当相机移动时形状和纹理发生变化），而且它还以低保真度学习几何形状。在这项工作中，我们表明，通过遵循完全不同的简单地逐块训练模型的路线，可以获得具有 SotA 图像质量的高分辨率 3D 生成器。我们通过两种方式重新审视并改进这个优化方案。首先，我们设计了一个位置和尺度感知的鉴别器来处理不同比例和空间位置的补丁。其次，我们根据退火的 beta 分布修改补丁采样策略，以稳定训练并加速收敛。生成的模型名为 EpiGRAF，是一种高效、高分辨率、纯 3D 生成器，我们在分辨率为 256^2$ 和 512^2$ 的四个数据集（本工作中引入的两个）上对其进行了测试。它获得了最先进的图像质量、高保真几何，并且训练速度比基于上采样器的同类产品快 ${\approx} 2.5 \times$。项目网站：https://universome.github.io/epigraf。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为EpiGRAF的新型3D生成对抗网络（GAN）训练方法，通过分块训练策略解决高分辨率3D生成中的多视角一致性及几何保真度问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于3D生成器的高分辨率图像生成方法依赖2D解码器进行上采样，导致多视角不一致性和几何细节丢失，而直接训练高分辨率3D生成器面临计算成本高和训练不稳定的问题。
AI.method: 设计了空间位置与尺度感知的判别器处理不同比例分块，并采用退火β分布优化分块采样策略，通过分块级训练实现高分辨率3D生成器的稳定收敛。
AI.result: EpiGRAF在四个数据集（含两个新数据集）上达到256²/512²分辨率下的SOTA图像质量，几何保真度高，训练速度较上采样方法提升约2.5倍。
AI.conclusion: EpiGRAF通过分块训练策略有效解决了3D GAN的高分辨率生成难题，在图像质量、几何保真度和训练效率上均优于现有方法。

search_text: EpiGRAF: Rethinking training of 3D GANs EpiGRAF：重新思考 3D GAN 的训练 A very recent trend in generative modeling is building 3D-aware generators from 2D image collections. To induce the 3D bias, such models typically rely on volumetric rendering, which is expensive to employ at high resolutions. During the past months, there appeared more than 10 works that address this scaling issue by training a separate 2D decoder to upsample a low-resolution image (or a feature tensor) produced from a pure 3D generator. But this solution comes at a cost: not only does it break multi-view consistency (i.e. shape and texture change when the camera moves), but it also learns the geometry in a low fidelity. In this work, we show that it is possible to obtain a high-resolution 3D generator with SotA image quality by following a completely different route of simply training the model patch-wise. We revisit and improve this optimization scheme in two ways. First, we design a location- and scale-aware discriminator to work on patches of different proportions and spatial positions. Second, we modify the patch sampling strategy based on an annealed beta distribution to stabilize training and accelerate the convergence. The resulted model, named EpiGRAF, is an efficient, high-resolution, pure 3D generator, and we test it on four datasets (two introduced in this work) at $256^2$ and $512^2$ resolutions. It obtains state-of-the-art image quality, high-fidelity geometry and trains ${\approx} 2.5 \times$ faster than the upsampler-based counterparts. Project website: https://universome.github.io/epigraf. 生成建模的最新趋势是从 2D 图像集合构建 3D 感知生成器。为了产生 3D 偏差，此类模型通常依赖于体积渲染，而在高分辨率下使用体积渲染的成本很高。在过去的几个月里，出现了 10 多篇作品通过训练单独的 2D 解码器对纯 3D 生成器生成的低分辨率图像（或特征张量）进行上采样来解决这个缩放问题。但这种解决方案是有代价的：它不仅破坏了多视图一致性（即当相机移动时形状和纹理发生变化），而且它还以低保真度学习几何形状。在这项工作中，我们表明，通过遵循完全不同的简单地逐块训练模型的路线，可以获得具有 SotA 图像质量的高分辨率 3D 生成器。我们通过两种方式重新审视并改进这个优化方案。首先，我们设计了一个位置和尺度感知的鉴别器来处理不同比例和空间位置的补丁。其次，我们根据退火的 beta 分布修改补丁采样策略，以稳定训练并加速收敛。生成的模型名为 EpiGRAF，是一种高效、高分辨率、纯 3D 生成器，我们在分辨率为 256^2$ 和 512^2$ 的四个数据集（本工作中引入的两个）上对其进行了测试。它获得了最先进的图像质量、高保真几何，并且训练速度比基于上采样器的同类产品快 ${\approx} 2.5 \times$。项目网站：https://universome.github.io/epigraf。 本文提出了一种名为EpiGRAF的新型3D生成对抗网络（GAN）训练方法，通过分块训练策略解决高分辨率3D生成中的多视角一致性及几何保真度问题。 Ivan Skorokhodov,Sergey Tulyakov,Yiqun Wang,Peter Wonka cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: RRT and RRT* Using Vehicle Dynamics
title_zh: 使用车辆动力学的 RRT 和 RRT*
abstract: The trajectory derived from RRT and RRT* is zagged. A holonomic drive is able to follow this trajectory. But real-life vehicle which has dynamical constraints cannot follow this trajectory. In this work, we are going to modify the RRT and RRT* algorithm to generate a trajectory that a vehicle with dynamical constraint can follow. The continuous nature of steering control and acceleration control in a real-world vehicle introduces the complexity in its model. To introduce constraint in the vehicle's motion, while reducing the number of control and hence complexity, we are modeling our vehicle as a Dubins car. A Dubins car has only three controls (turning left, turning right, and moving forward) with a fixed velocity which makes our model simple. We use dubins curve (path that dubins car can follow) to trace the trajectory in RRT and RRT* algorithm.
summary: The trajectory derived from RRT and RRT* is zagged. A holonomic drive is able to follow this trajectory. But real-life vehicle which has dynamical constraints cannot follow this trajectory. In this work, we are going to modify the RRT and RRT* algorithm to generate a trajectory that a vehicle with dynamical constraint can follow. The continuous nature of steering control and acceleration control in a real-world vehicle introduces the complexity in its model. To introduce constraint in the vehicle's motion, while reducing the number of control and hence complexity, we are modeling our vehicle as a Dubins car. A Dubins car has only three controls (turning left, turning right, and moving forward) with a fixed velocity which makes our model simple. We use dubins curve (path that dubins car can follow) to trace the trajectory in RRT and RRT* algorithm.
abstract_zh: 从 RRT 和 RRT* 导出的轨迹是锯齿形的。完整的驱动器能够遵循这个轨迹。但现实生活中的车辆具有动力学约束，无法遵循该轨迹。在这项工作中，我们将修改 RRT 和 RRT* 算法以生成具有动态约束的车辆可以遵循的轨迹。现实车辆中转向控制和加速控制的连续性质引入了其模型的复杂性。为了在车辆运动中引入约束，同时减少控制数量和复杂性，我们将车辆建模为杜宾斯汽车。杜宾斯汽车只有三个具有固定速度的控件（左转、右转和前进），这使得我们的模型变得简单。我们使用杜宾斯曲线（杜宾斯汽车可以遵循的路径）来追踪RRT和RRT*算法中的轨迹。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在修改RRT和RRT*算法，使其生成符合车辆动力学约束的轨迹。
AI.motivation: 传统RRT和RRT*生成的锯齿状轨迹无法被具有动力学约束的现实车辆跟踪，需引入车辆运动约束以提高路径可行性。
AI.method: 将车辆建模为Dubins车（仅具备转向左、转向右和前进三种控制），利用Dubins曲线替代原有轨迹生成方式，结合RRT/RRT*算法进行路径规划。
AI.result: 改进后的算法能够生成符合车辆动力学特性的平滑轨迹，减少控制复杂度并满足实际行驶需求。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合Dubins车模型，RRT类算法可有效生成适用于真实车辆的可行轨迹，解决了传统方法忽略动力学约束的问题。

authors_text: Federica Proietto Salanitri,Giovanni Bellitto,Simone Palazzo,Ismail Irmakci,Michael B. Wallace,Candice W. Bolan,Megan Engels,Sanne Hoogenboom,Marco Aldinucci,Ulas Bagci,Daniela Giordano,Concetto Spampinato
title: Neural Transformers for Intraductal Papillary Mucosal Neoplasms (IPMN) Classification in MRI images
title_zh: 用于 MRI 图像中导管内乳头状粘膜肿瘤 (IPMN) 分类的神经变压器
abstract: Early detection of precancerous cysts or neoplasms, i.e., Intraductal Papillary Mucosal Neoplasms (IPMN), in pancreas is a challenging and complex task, and it may lead to a more favourable outcome. Once detected, grading IPMNs accurately is also necessary, since low-risk IPMNs can be under surveillance program, while high-risk IPMNs have to be surgically resected before they turn into cancer. Current standards (Fukuoka and others) for IPMN classification show significant intra- and inter-operator variability, beside being error-prone, making a proper diagnosis unreliable. The established progress in artificial intelligence, through the deep learning paradigm, may provide a key tool for an effective support to medical decision for pancreatic cancer. In this work, we follow this trend, by proposing a novel AI-based IPMN classifier that leverages the recent success of transformer networks in generalizing across a wide variety of tasks, including vision ones. We specifically show that our transformer-based model exploits pre-training better than standard convolutional neural networks, thus supporting the sought architectural universalism of transformers in vision, including the medical image domain and it allows for a better interpretation of the obtained results.
summary: Early detection of precancerous cysts or neoplasms, i.e., Intraductal Papillary Mucosal Neoplasms (IPMN), in pancreas is a challenging and complex task, and it may lead to a more favourable outcome. Once detected, grading IPMNs accurately is also necessary, since low-risk IPMNs can be under surveillance program, while high-risk IPMNs have to be surgically resected before they turn into cancer. Current standards (Fukuoka and others) for IPMN classification show significant intra- and inter-operator variability, beside being error-prone, making a proper diagnosis unreliable. The established progress in artificial intelligence, through the deep learning paradigm, may provide a key tool for an effective support to medical decision for pancreatic cancer. In this work, we follow this trend, by proposing a novel AI-based IPMN classifier that leverages the recent success of transformer networks in generalizing across a wide variety of tasks, including vision ones. We specifically show that our transformer-based model exploits pre-training better than standard convolutional neural networks, thus supporting the sought architectural universalism of transformers in vision, including the medical image domain and it allows for a better interpretation of the obtained results.
abstract_zh: 胰腺癌前囊肿或肿瘤（即导管内乳头状粘膜肿瘤（IPMN））的早期检测是一项具有挑战性且复杂的任务，并且可能会带来更有利的结果。一旦检测到，对 IPMN 进行准确分级也是必要的，因为低风险的 IPMN 可以接受监测，而高风险的 IPMN 必须在变成癌症之前进行手术切除。目前的 IPMN 分类标准（福冈等）显示出运营商内部和运营商之间的显着差异，而且容易出错，导致正确的诊断不可靠。通过深度学习范式，人工智能的既定进展可能为有效支持胰腺癌的医疗决策提供关键工具。在这项工作中，我们顺应了这一趋势，提出了一种新颖的基于人工智能的 IPMN 分类器，该分类器利用变压器网络最近在泛化各种任务（包括视觉任务）方面取得的成功。我们特别表明，我们的基于 Transformer 的模型比标准卷积神经网络更好地利用预训练，从而支持视觉中 Transformer 所寻求的架构通用性，包括医学图像领域，并且它可以更好地解释所获得的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经变压器的MRI图像分类方法，用于胰管内乳头状黏液性肿瘤（IPMN）的分类。
AI.motivation: 当前IPMN分类标准存在显著的医生间和医生内变异，且易出错，亟需可靠的人工智能辅助诊断工具以提高分类准确性。
AI.method: 利用变压器网络在视觉任务中的泛化能力，设计了一种新型AI分类器，并通过预训练提升模型性能，与传统卷积神经网络进行对比验证。
AI.result: 变压器模型在IPMN分类中表现优于标准卷积神经网络，支持了变压器在医学影像领域的架构通用性，并增强了结果的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 基于变压器的AI分类器为胰腺癌的医学决策提供了有效支持，有望提升IPMN分类的准确性和可靠性。

search_text: Neural Transformers for Intraductal Papillary Mucosal Neoplasms (IPMN) Classification in MRI images 用于 MRI 图像中导管内乳头状粘膜肿瘤 (IPMN) 分类的神经变压器 Early detection of precancerous cysts or neoplasms, i.e., Intraductal Papillary Mucosal Neoplasms (IPMN), in pancreas is a challenging and complex task, and it may lead to a more favourable outcome. Once detected, grading IPMNs accurately is also necessary, since low-risk IPMNs can be under surveillance program, while high-risk IPMNs have to be surgically resected before they turn into cancer. Current standards (Fukuoka and others) for IPMN classification show significant intra- and inter-operator variability, beside being error-prone, making a proper diagnosis unreliable. The established progress in artificial intelligence, through the deep learning paradigm, may provide a key tool for an effective support to medical decision for pancreatic cancer. In this work, we follow this trend, by proposing a novel AI-based IPMN classifier that leverages the recent success of transformer networks in generalizing across a wide variety of tasks, including vision ones. We specifically show that our transformer-based model exploits pre-training better than standard convolutional neural networks, thus supporting the sought architectural universalism of transformers in vision, including the medical image domain and it allows for a better interpretation of the obtained results. 胰腺癌前囊肿或肿瘤（即导管内乳头状粘膜肿瘤（IPMN））的早期检测是一项具有挑战性且复杂的任务，并且可能会带来更有利的结果。一旦检测到，对 IPMN 进行准确分级也是必要的，因为低风险的 IPMN 可以接受监测，而高风险的 IPMN 必须在变成癌症之前进行手术切除。目前的 IPMN 分类标准（福冈等）显示出运营商内部和运营商之间的显着差异，而且容易出错，导致正确的诊断不可靠。通过深度学习范式，人工智能的既定进展可能为有效支持胰腺癌的医疗决策提供关键工具。在这项工作中，我们顺应了这一趋势，提出了一种新颖的基于人工智能的 IPMN 分类器，该分类器利用变压器网络最近在泛化各种任务（包括视觉任务）方面取得的成功。我们特别表明，我们的基于 Transformer 的模型比标准卷积神经网络更好地利用预训练，从而支持视觉中 Transformer 所寻求的架构通用性，包括医学图像领域，并且它可以更好地解释所获得的结果。 本文提出了一种基于神经变压器的MRI图像分类方法，用于胰管内乳头状黏液性肿瘤（IPMN）的分类。 Federica Proietto Salanitri,Giovanni Bellitto,Simone Palazzo,Ismail Irmakci,Michael B. Wallace,Candice W. Bolan,Megan Engels,Sanne Hoogenboom,Marco Aldinucci,Ulas Bagci,Daniela Giordano,Concetto Spampinato cs.CV,cs.AI

title: QuantFace: Towards Lightweight Face Recognition by Synthetic Data Low-bit Quantization
title_zh: QuantFace：通过合成数据低位量化实现轻量级人脸识别
abstract: Deep learning-based face recognition models follow the common trend in deep neural networks by utilizing full-precision floating-point networks with high computational costs. Deploying such networks in use-cases constrained by computational requirements is often infeasible due to the large memory required by the full-precision model. Previous compact face recognition approaches proposed to design special compact architectures and train them from scratch using real training data, which may not be available in a real-world scenario due to privacy concerns. We present in this work the QuantFace solution based on low-bit precision format model quantization. QuantFace reduces the required computational cost of the existing face recognition models without the need for designing a particular architecture or accessing real training data. QuantFace introduces privacy-friendly synthetic face data to the quantization process to mitigate potential privacy concerns and issues related to the accessibility to real training data. Through extensive evaluation experiments on seven benchmarks and four network architectures, we demonstrate that QuantFace can successfully reduce the model size up to 5x while maintaining, to a large degree, the verification performance of the full-precision model without accessing real training datasets.
summary: Deep learning-based face recognition models follow the common trend in deep neural networks by utilizing full-precision floating-point networks with high computational costs. Deploying such networks in use-cases constrained by computational requirements is often infeasible due to the large memory required by the full-precision model. Previous compact face recognition approaches proposed to design special compact architectures and train them from scratch using real training data, which may not be available in a real-world scenario due to privacy concerns. We present in this work the QuantFace solution based on low-bit precision format model quantization. QuantFace reduces the required computational cost of the existing face recognition models without the need for designing a particular architecture or accessing real training data. QuantFace introduces privacy-friendly synthetic face data to the quantization process to mitigate potential privacy concerns and issues related to the accessibility to real training data. Through extensive evaluation experiments on seven benchmarks and four network architectures, we demonstrate that QuantFace can successfully reduce the model size up to 5x while maintaining, to a large degree, the verification performance of the full-precision model without accessing real training datasets.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的人脸识别模型遵循深度神经网络的普遍趋势，利用计算成本较高的全精度浮点网络。由于全精度模型需要大量内存，因此在受计算要求限制的用例中部署此类网络通常是不可行的。以前的紧凑型人脸识别方法建议设计特殊的紧凑型架构，并使用真实的训练数据从头开始训练它们，但由于隐私问题，这些数据在现实场景中可能不可用。我们在这项工作中提出了基于低位精度格式模型量化的 QuantFace 解决方案。 QuantFace 降低了现有人脸识别模型所需的计算成本，无需设计特定的架构或访问真实的训练数据。 QuantFace 在量化过程中引入了隐私友好的合成人脸数据，以减轻潜在的隐私问题以及与真实训练数据的可访问性相关的问题。通过对七个基准和四种网络架构的广泛评估实验，我们证明 QuantFace 可以成功地将模型大小减少达 5 倍，同时在很大程度上保持全精度模型的验证性能，而无需访问真实的训练数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出QuantFace方法，通过低比特量化和合成数据实现轻量级人脸识别模型。
AI.motivation: 现有高精度人脸识别模型计算成本高且依赖隐私敏感的真实训练数据，难以在资源受限场景部署。
AI.method: 采用低比特模型量化技术，结合隐私友好的合成数据进行训练，无需设计专用架构或使用真实数据。
AI.result: 在7个基准测试和4种网络架构上验证，模型体积缩减5倍且保持较高验证性能。
AI.conclusion: QuantFace有效平衡了模型轻量化与性能，为隐私敏感场景提供可行解决方案。

authors_text: Fadi Boutros,Marco Huber,Patrick Siebke,Tim Rieber,Naser Damer
title: SFace: Privacy-friendly and Accurate Face Recognition using Synthetic Data
title_zh: SFace：使用合成数据进行隐私友好且准确的人脸识别
abstract: Recent deep face recognition models proposed in the literature utilized large-scale public datasets such as MS-Celeb-1M and VGGFace2 for training very deep neural networks, achieving state-of-the-art performance on mainstream benchmarks. Recently, many of these datasets, e.g., MS-Celeb-1M and VGGFace2, are retracted due to credible privacy and ethical concerns. This motivates this work to propose and investigate the feasibility of using a privacy-friendly synthetically generated face dataset to train face recognition models. Towards this end, we utilize a class-conditional generative adversarial network to generate class-labeled synthetic face images, namely SFace. To address the privacy aspect of using such data to train a face recognition model, we provide extensive evaluation experiments on the identity relation between the synthetic dataset and the original authentic dataset used to train the generative model. Our reported evaluation proved that associating an identity of the authentic dataset to one with the same class label in the synthetic dataset is hardly possible. We also propose to train face recognition on our privacy-friendly dataset, SFace, using three different learning strategies, multi-class classification, label-free knowledge transfer, and combined learning of multi-class classification and knowledge transfer. The reported evaluation results on five authentic face benchmarks demonstrated that the privacy-friendly synthetic dataset has high potential to be used for training face recognition models, achieving, for example, a verification accuracy of 91.87\% on LFW using multi-class classification and 99.13\% using the combined learning strategy.
summary: Recent deep face recognition models proposed in the literature utilized large-scale public datasets such as MS-Celeb-1M and VGGFace2 for training very deep neural networks, achieving state-of-the-art performance on mainstream benchmarks. Recently, many of these datasets, e.g., MS-Celeb-1M and VGGFace2, are retracted due to credible privacy and ethical concerns. This motivates this work to propose and investigate the feasibility of using a privacy-friendly synthetically generated face dataset to train face recognition models. Towards this end, we utilize a class-conditional generative adversarial network to generate class-labeled synthetic face images, namely SFace. To address the privacy aspect of using such data to train a face recognition model, we provide extensive evaluation experiments on the identity relation between the synthetic dataset and the original authentic dataset used to train the generative model. Our reported evaluation proved that associating an identity of the authentic dataset to one with the same class label in the synthetic dataset is hardly possible. We also propose to train face recognition on our privacy-friendly dataset, SFace, using three different learning strategies, multi-class classification, label-free knowledge transfer, and combined learning of multi-class classification and knowledge transfer. The reported evaluation results on five authentic face benchmarks demonstrated that the privacy-friendly synthetic dataset has high potential to be used for training face recognition models, achieving, for example, a verification accuracy of 91.87\% on LFW using multi-class classification and 99.13\% using the combined learning strategy.
abstract_zh: 最近文献中提出的深度人脸识别模型利用 MS-Celeb-1M 和 VGGFace2 等大规模公共数据集来训练非常深的神经网络，在主流基准上实现了最先进的性能。最近，由于可信的隐私和道德问题，许多数据集（例如 MS-Celeb-1M 和 VGGFace2）被撤回。这促使这项工作提出并研究使用隐私友好的综合生成的人脸数据集来训练人脸识别模型的可行性。为此，我们利用类条件生成对抗网络来生成类标记的合成人脸图像，即 SFace。为了解决使用此类数据训练人脸识别模型的隐私问题，我们对合成数据集和用于训练生成模型的原始真实数据集之间的身份关系进行了广泛的评估实验。我们报告的评估证明，将真实数据集的身份与合成数据集中具有相同类别标签的数据集关联起来几乎是不可能的。我们还建议在我们的隐私友好数据集 SFace 上训练人脸识别，使用三种不同的学习策略：多类分类、无标签知识迁移以及多类分类和知识迁移的组合学习。报告的五个真实人脸基准的评估结果表明，隐私友好的合成数据集具有很高的潜力用于训练人脸识别模型，例如，使用多类分类在 LFW 上实现 91.87% 的验证精度，使用组合学习策略实现 99.13% 的验证精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SFace，一种基于合成数据的隐私友好且准确的人脸识别方法。
AI.motivation: 由于MS-Celeb-1M和VGGFace2等大型公开数据集因隐私和伦理问题被撤回，需寻找隐私保护的人脸识别训练方案。
AI.method: 利用类条件生成对抗网络生成带标签的合成人脸数据SFace，并通过三类学习策略（多分类、无标签知识迁移、联合学习）训练模型。
AI.result: 在LFW等五个真实数据集上验证准确率达91.87%（多分类）和99.13%（联合学习），证明合成数据的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SFace展示了隐私保护的合成数据在训练高精度人脸识别模型中的可行性。

Our reported evaluation proved that associating an identity of the authentic dataset to one with the same class label in the synthetic dataset is hardly possible. We also propose to train face recognition on our privacy-friendly dataset, SFace, using three different learning strategies, multi-class classification, label-free knowledge transfer, and combined learning of multi-class classification and knowledge transfer. The reported evaluation results on five authentic face benchmarks demonstrated that the privacy-friendly synthetic dataset has high potential to be used for training face recognition models, achieving, for example, a verification accuracy of 91.87\% on LFW using multi-class classification and 99.13\% using the combined learning strategy. 最近文献中提出的深度人脸识别模型利用 MS-Celeb-1M 和 VGGFace2 等大规模公共数据集来训练非常深的神经网络，在主流基准上实现了最先进的性能。最近，由于可信的隐私和道德问题，许多数据集（例如 MS-Celeb-1M 和 VGGFace2）被撤回。这促使这项工作提出并研究使用隐私友好的综合生成的人脸数据集来训练人脸识别模型的可行性。为此，我们利用类条件生成对抗网络来生成类标记的合成人脸图像，即 SFace。为了解决使用此类数据训练人脸识别模型的隐私问题，我们对合成数据集和用于训练生成模型的原始真实数据集之间的身份关系进行了广泛的评估实验。我们报告的评估证明，将真实数据集的身份与合成数据集中具有相同类别标签的数据集关联起来几乎是不可能的。我们还建议在我们的隐私友好数据集 SFace 上训练人脸识别，使用三种不同的学习策略：多类分类、无标签知识迁移以及多类分类和知识迁移的组合学习。报告的五个真实人脸基准的评估结果表明，隐私友好的合成数据集具有很高的潜力用于训练人脸识别模型，例如，使用多类分类在 LFW 上实现 91.87% 的验证精度，使用组合学习策略实现 99.13% 的验证精度。 本文提出SFace，一种基于合成数据的隐私友好且准确的人脸识别方法。 Fadi Boutros,Marco Huber,Patrick Siebke,Tim Rieber,Naser Damer cs.CV

authors_text: Roberto Aldera,Matthew Gadd,Daniele De Martini,Paul Newman
title: What Goes Around: Leveraging a Constant-curvature Motion Constraint in Radar Odometry
title_zh: 发生了什么：在雷达里程计中利用恒定曲率运动约束
abstract: This paper presents a method that leverages vehicle motion constraints to refine data associations in a point-based radar odometry system. By using the strong prior on how a non-holonomic robot is constrained to move smoothly through its environment, we develop the necessary framework to estimate ego-motion from a single landmark association rather than considering all of these correspondences at once. This allows for informed outlier detection of poor matches that are a dominant source of pose estimate error. By refining the subset of matched landmarks, we see an absolute decrease of 2.15% (from 4.68% to 2.53%) in translational error, approximately halving the error in odometry (reducing by 45.94%) than when using the full set of correspondences. This contribution is relevant to other point-based odometry implementations that rely on a range sensor and provides a lightweight and interpretable means of incorporating vehicle dynamics for ego-motion estimation.
summary: This paper presents a method that leverages vehicle motion constraints to refine data associations in a point-based radar odometry system. By using the strong prior on how a non-holonomic robot is constrained to move smoothly through its environment, we develop the necessary framework to estimate ego-motion from a single landmark association rather than considering all of these correspondences at once. This allows for informed outlier detection of poor matches that are a dominant source of pose estimate error. By refining the subset of matched landmarks, we see an absolute decrease of 2.15% (from 4.68% to 2.53%) in translational error, approximately halving the error in odometry (reducing by 45.94%) than when using the full set of correspondences. This contribution is relevant to other point-based odometry implementations that rely on a range sensor and provides a lightweight and interpretable means of incorporating vehicle dynamics for ego-motion estimation.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种利用车辆运动约束来细化基于点的雷达里程计系统中的数据关联的方法。通过使用关于如何约束非完整机器人在其环境中平稳移动的强先验，我们开发了必要的框架来根据单个地标关联来估计自我运动，而不是立即考虑所有这些对应关系。这允许对不良匹配进行明智的异常检测，不良匹配是姿势估计误差的主要来源。通过细化匹配地标的子集，我们发现平移误差绝对减少了 2.15%（从 4.68% 到 2.53%），与使用全套对应关系相比，里程计误差大约减半（减少 45.94%）。这一贡献与其他依赖距离传感器的基于点的里程计实现相关，并提供了一种轻量级且可解释的方法，将车辆动力学纳入自我运动估计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用恒定曲率运动约束的雷达里程计算法，通过改进数据关联减少位姿估计误差。
AI.motivation: 传统雷达里程计算法在处理所有地标对应关系时易受异常值影响，导致位姿估计误差较大，需利用车辆运动约束提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 基于非完整机器人运动学先验，构建框架仅通过单个地标关联估计自运动，并通过异常值检测优化匹配地标子集。
AI.result: 平移误差绝对值降低2.15%（4.68%→2.53%），里程计算法误差减少约45.94%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为其他基于点的里程计算法提供轻量可解释的车辆动力学整合方案，显著提升估计精度。
