title: Roadmap to Autonomous Surgery -- A Framework to Surgical Autonomy
title_zh: 自主手术路线图——手术自主框架
abstract: Robotic surgery has increased the domain of surgeries possible. Several examples of partial surgical automation have been seen in the past decade. We break down the path of automation tasks into features required and provide a checklist that can help reach higher levels of surgical automation. Finally, we discuss the current challenges and advances required to make this happen.
summary: Robotic surgery has increased the domain of surgeries possible. Several examples of partial surgical automation have been seen in the past decade. We break down the path of automation tasks into features required and provide a checklist that can help reach higher levels of surgical automation. Finally, we discuss the current challenges and advances required to make this happen.
abstract_zh: 机器人手术扩大了手术的范围。在过去的十年中，已经出现了一些部分手术自动化的例子。我们将自动化任务的路径分解为所需的功能，并提供一个清单，可以帮助实现更高水平的手术自动化。最后，我们讨论当前的挑战和实现这一目标所需的进展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种手术自主化的框架，通过分解自动化任务特征并制定检查清单，为实现更高水平的手术自动化提供路线图。
AI.motivation: 机器人手术已扩展了手术领域，但现有部分自动化技术仍存在局限性，需进一步明确特征要求以推动更高层次的自主化发展。
AI.method: 通过分析现有部分自动化手术案例，将自动化任务分解为关键特征，并制定分级检查清单，同时讨论当前技术挑战与改进方向。
AI.result: 构建了手术自主化分级框架与检查清单，明确了实现全自动化手术所需的技术突破点与研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为手术自主化提供了系统性指导，但需克服技术、安全及伦理等多重挑战以实现临床应用。

authors_text: Karthik Valmeekam,Matthew Marquez,Alberto Olmo,Sarath Sreedharan,Subbarao Kambhampati
title: PlanBench: An Extensible Benchmark for Evaluating Large Language Models on Planning and Reasoning about Change
title_zh: PlanBench：评估大型语言模型在规划和变革推理方面的可扩展基准
comment: NeurIPS 2023 Track on Datasets and Benchmarks
comments: NeurIPS 2023 Track on Datasets and Benchmarks
abstract: Generating plans of action, and reasoning about change have long been considered a core competence of intelligent agents. It is thus no surprise that evaluating the planning and reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs) has become a hot topic of research. Most claims about LLM planning capabilities are however based on common sense tasks-where it becomes hard to tell whether LLMs are planning or merely retrieving from their vast world knowledge. There is a strong need for systematic and extensible planning benchmarks with sufficient diversity to evaluate whether LLMs have innate planning capabilities. Motivated by this, we propose PlanBench, an extensible benchmark suite based on the kinds of domains used in the automated planning community, especially in the International Planning Competition, to test the capabilities of LLMs in planning or reasoning about actions and change. PlanBench provides sufficient diversity in both the task domains and the specific planning capabilities. Our studies also show that on many critical capabilities-including plan generation-LLM performance falls quite short, even with the SOTA models. PlanBench can thus function as a useful marker of progress of LLMs in planning and reasoning.
summary: Generating plans of action, and reasoning about change have long been considered a core competence of intelligent agents. It is thus no surprise that evaluating the planning and reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs) has become a hot topic of research. Most claims about LLM planning capabilities are however based on common sense tasks-where it becomes hard to tell whether LLMs are planning or merely retrieving from their vast world knowledge. There is a strong need for systematic and extensible planning benchmarks with sufficient diversity to evaluate whether LLMs have innate planning capabilities. Motivated by this, we propose PlanBench, an extensible benchmark suite based on the kinds of domains used in the automated planning community, especially in the International Planning Competition, to test the capabilities of LLMs in planning or reasoning about actions and change. PlanBench provides sufficient diversity in both the task domains and the specific planning capabilities. Our studies also show that on many critical capabilities-including plan generation-LLM performance falls quite short, even with the SOTA models. PlanBench can thus function as a useful marker of progress of LLMs in planning and reasoning.
abstract_zh: 生成行动计划和推理变化长期以来一直被认为是智能代理的核心能力。因此，评估大型语言模型（LLM）的规划和推理能力已成为研究热点也就不足为奇了。然而，大多数关于法学硕士规划能力的说法都是基于常识性任务——很难判断法学硕士是在规划还是只是从他们广泛的世界知识中检索。强烈需要系统的、可扩展的、具有足够多样性的规划基准来评估法学硕士是否具有先天的规划能力。受此启发，我们提出了 PlanBench，这是一个可扩展的基准套件，基于自动化规划社区（尤其是国际规划竞赛）中使用的领域类型，用于测试法学硕士在规划或推理行动和变更方面的能力。 PlanBench 在任务领域和特定规划功能方面都提供了足够的多样性。我们的研究还表明，即使使用 SOTA 模型，LLM 的许多关键功能（包括计划生成）的性能也相当不足。因此，PlanBench 可以作为法学硕士在规划和推理方面的进展的有用标记。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PlanBench基准测试套件，用于评估大型语言模型在规划和变化推理方面的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有研究难以区分LLM是真正进行规划还是依赖知识检索，亟需系统性且多样化的规划基准测试。
AI.method: 基于自动规划领域的国际竞赛常用领域设计PlanBench，涵盖多种任务领域和规划能力评估维度。
AI.result: 实验表明，即使是当前最先进的LLM在关键规划能力（如计划生成）上表现仍显不足。
AI.conclusion: PlanBench可作为衡量LLM在规划与推理领域进展的有效指标。

search_text: PlanBench: An Extensible Benchmark for Evaluating Large Language Models on Planning and Reasoning about Change PlanBench：评估大型语言模型在规划和变革推理方面的可扩展基准 Generating plans of action, and reasoning about change have long been considered a core competence of intelligent agents. It is thus no surprise that evaluating the planning and reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs) has become a hot topic of research. Most claims about LLM planning capabilities are however based on common sense tasks-where it becomes hard to tell whether LLMs are planning or merely retrieving from their vast world knowledge. There is a strong need for systematic and extensible planning benchmarks with sufficient diversity to evaluate whether LLMs have innate planning capabilities. Motivated by this, we propose PlanBench, an extensible benchmark suite based on the kinds of domains used in the automated planning community, especially in the International Planning Competition, to test the capabilities of LLMs in planning or reasoning about actions and change. PlanBench provides sufficient diversity in both the task domains and the specific planning capabilities. Our studies also show that on many critical capabilities-including plan generation-LLM performance falls quite short, even with the SOTA models. PlanBench can thus function as a useful marker of progress of LLMs in planning and reasoning. 生成行动计划和推理变化长期以来一直被认为是智能代理的核心能力。因此，评估大型语言模型（LLM）的规划和推理能力已成为研究热点也就不足为奇了。然而，大多数关于法学硕士规划能力的说法都是基于常识性任务——很难判断法学硕士是在规划还是只是从他们广泛的世界知识中检索。强烈需要系统的、可扩展的、具有足够多样性的规划基准来评估法学硕士是否具有先天的规划能力。受此启发，我们提出了 PlanBench，这是一个可扩展的基准套件，基于自动化规划社区（尤其是国际规划竞赛）中使用的领域类型，用于测试法学硕士在规划或推理行动和变更方面的能力。 PlanBench 在任务领域和特定规划功能方面都提供了足够的多样性。我们的研究还表明，即使使用 SOTA 模型，LLM 的许多关键功能（包括计划生成）的性能也相当不足。因此，PlanBench 可以作为法学硕士在规划和推理方面的进展的有用标记。 本文提出PlanBench基准测试套件，用于评估大型语言模型在规划和变化推理方面的能力。 Karthik Valmeekam,Matthew Marquez,Alberto Olmo,Sarath Sreedharan,Subbarao Kambhampati cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Fuchen Long,Ting Yao,Zhaofan Qiu,Xinmei Tian,Jiebo Luo,Tao Mei
title: Bi-Calibration Networks for Weakly-Supervised Video Representation Learning
title_zh: 用于弱监督视频表示学习的双校准网络
abstract: The leverage of large volumes of web videos paired with the searched queries or surrounding texts (e.g., title) offers an economic and extensible alternative to supervised video representation learning. Nevertheless, modeling such weakly visual-textual connection is not trivial due to query polysemy (i.e., many possible meanings for a query) and text isomorphism (i.e., same syntactic structure of different text). In this paper, we introduce a new design of mutual calibration between query and text to boost weakly-supervised video representation learning. Specifically, we present Bi-Calibration Networks (BCN) that novelly couples two calibrations to learn the amendment from text to query and vice versa. Technically, BCN executes clustering on all the titles of the videos searched by an identical query and takes the centroid of each cluster as a text prototype. The query vocabulary is built directly on query words. The video-to-text/video-to-query projections over text prototypes/query vocabulary then start the text-to-query or query-to-text calibration to estimate the amendment to query or text. We also devise a selection scheme to balance the two corrections. Two large-scale web video datasets paired with query and title for each video are newly collected for weakly-supervised video representation learning, which are named as YOVO-3M and YOVO-10M, respectively. The video features of BCN learnt on 3M web videos obtain superior results under linear model protocol on downstream tasks. More remarkably, BCN trained on the larger set of 10M web videos with further fine-tuning leads to 1.6%, and 1.8% gains in top-1 accuracy on Kinetics-400, and Something-Something V2 datasets over the state-of-the-art TDN, and ACTION-Net methods with ImageNet pre-training. Source code and datasets are available at \url{https://github.com/FuchenUSTC/BCN}.

abstract_zh: 利用大量网络视频与搜索查询或周围文本（例如标题）相结合，为监督视频表示学习提供了一种经济且可扩展的替代方案。然而，由于查询多义性（即查询有许多可能的含义）和文本同构（即不同文本的相同句法结构），对这种弱视觉文本连接进行建模并非易事。在本文中，我们引入了一种查询和文本之间相互校准的新设计，以促进弱监督视频表示学习。具体来说，我们提出了双校准网络（BCN），它新颖地结合了两种校准来学习从文本到查询的修改，反之亦然。从技术上讲，BCN对同一查询搜索到的所有视频标题进行聚类，并将每个聚类的质心作为文本原型。查询词汇表直接基于查询词构建。然后，视频到文本/视频到查询在文本原型/查询词汇上的投影开始文本到查询或查询到文本校准，以估计对查询或文本的修改。我们还设计了一个选择方案来平衡这两个修正。新收集了两个与每个视频的查询和标题配对的大型网络视频数据集，用于弱监督视频表示学习，分别命名为 YOVO-3M 和 YOVO-10M。在3M网络视频上学习到的BCN的视频特征在下游任务的线性模型协议下获得了优异的结果。更值得注意的是，BCN 在更大的 10M 网络视频集上进行训练，并进行进一步微调，与最先进的 TDN 和采用 ImageNet 预训练的 ACTION-Net 方法相比，Kinetics-400 和 Something-Something V2 数据集上的 top-1 准确率分别提高了 1.6% 和 1.8%。源代码和数据集可在 \url{https://github.com/FuchenUSTC/BCN} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Bi-Calibration Networks (BCN)的新方法，用于弱监督视频表征学习，通过建立查询与文本之间的双向校准机制，提升视频特征学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督视频学习方法面临查询多义性（polysemy）和文本同构性（isomorphism）等挑战，导致视觉-文本关联建模困难，需设计更有效的校准机制以提升学习效率。
AI.method: BCN通过聚类相同查询的视频标题生成文本原型，并构建查询词汇表，利用视频到文本/查询的投影进行双向校准，平衡文本与查询的修正过程。同时提出YOVO-3M和YOVO-10M两个大规模数据集。
AI.result: 在3M数据集上，BCN在下游任务中优于现有方法；在10M数据集上进一步微调后，Kinetics-400和Something-Something V2数据集的top-1准确率分别提升1.6%和1.8%。
AI.conclusion: BCN通过双向校准有效解决了弱监督学习中的视觉-文本对齐问题，验证了其在大规模数据集上的优越性，为弱监督视频表征学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Mingrui Zhang,Jianhong Wang,James Tlhomole,Matthew D. Piggott
title: Learning to Estimate and Refine Fluid Motion with Physical Dynamics
title_zh: 学习利用物理动力学估计和细化流体运动
abstract: Extracting information on fluid motion directly from images is challenging. Fluid flow represents a complex dynamic system governed by the Navier-Stokes equations. General optical flow methods are typically designed for rigid body motion, and thus struggle if applied to fluid motion estimation directly. Further, optical flow methods only focus on two consecutive frames without utilising historical temporal information, while the fluid motion (velocity field) can be considered a continuous trajectory constrained by time-dependent partial differential equations (PDEs). This discrepancy has the potential to induce physically inconsistent estimations. Here we propose an unsupervised learning based prediction-correction scheme for fluid flow estimation. An estimate is first given by a PDE-constrained optical flow predictor, which is then refined by a physical based corrector. The proposed approach outperforms optical flow methods and shows competitive results compared to existing supervised learning based methods on a benchmark dataset. Furthermore, the proposed approach can generalize to complex real-world fluid scenarios where ground truth information is effectively unknowable. Finally, experiments demonstrate that the physical corrector can refine flow estimates by mimicking the operator splitting method commonly utilised in fluid dynamical simulation.
summary: Extracting information on fluid motion directly from images is challenging. Fluid flow represents a complex dynamic system governed by the Navier-Stokes equations. General optical flow methods are typically designed for rigid body motion, and thus struggle if applied to fluid motion estimation directly. Further, optical flow methods only focus on two consecutive frames without utilising historical temporal information, while the fluid motion (velocity field) can be considered a continuous trajectory constrained by time-dependent partial differential equations (PDEs). This discrepancy has the potential to induce physically inconsistent estimations. Here we propose an unsupervised learning based prediction-correction scheme for fluid flow estimation. An estimate is first given by a PDE-constrained optical flow predictor, which is then refined by a physical based corrector. The proposed approach outperforms optical flow methods and shows competitive results compared to existing supervised learning based methods on a benchmark dataset. Furthermore, the proposed approach can generalize to complex real-world fluid scenarios where ground truth information is effectively unknowable. Finally, experiments demonstrate that the physical corrector can refine flow estimates by mimicking the operator splitting method commonly utilised in fluid dynamical simulation.
abstract_zh: 直接从图像中提取流体运动信息具有挑战性。流体流动代表由纳维-斯托克斯方程控制的复杂动态系统。一般的光流方法通常是针对刚体运动而设计的，因此如果直接应用于流体运动估计就会很困难。此外，光流方法仅关注两个连续帧，而不利用历史时间信息，而流体运动（速度场）可以被视为受时间相关偏微分方程（PDE）约束的连续轨迹。这种差异有可能导致物理上不一致的估计。在这里，我们提出了一种基于无监督学习的流体流量估计预测校正方案。首先由 PDE 约束光流预测器给出估计，然后由基于物理的校正器进行细化。所提出的方法优于光流方法，并且与基准数据集上现有的基于监督学习的方法相比显示出有竞争力的结果。此外，所提出的方法可以推广到复杂的现实世界流体场景，其中地面真实信息实际上是不可知的。最后，实验表明，物理校正器可以通过模仿流体动力学模拟中常用的算子分裂方法来细化流量估计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于物理动态的流体运动估计与修正方法。
AI.motivation: 从图像中直接提取流体运动信息具有挑战性，传统光流方法难以处理流体运动的复杂动态特性，且未利用历史时间信息，导致物理上不一致的估计。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种无监督学习的预测-修正方案，首先通过PDE约束的光流预测器进行估计，再通过基于物理的修正器进行优化。
AI.result: 该方法在基准数据集上优于传统光流方法，并在复杂真实流体场景中表现出良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过物理修正器模拟流体动力学模拟中常用的算子分裂方法，有效提升了流体运动估计的准确性。

method: 本文提出了一种无监督学习的预测-修正方案，首先通过PDE约束的光流预测器进行估计，再通过基于物理的修正器进行优化。
result: 该方法在基准数据集上优于传统光流方法，并在复杂真实流体场景中表现出良好的泛化能力。
conclusion: 该方法通过物理修正器模拟流体动力学模拟中常用的算子分裂方法，有效提升了流体运动估计的准确性。
search_text: Learning to Estimate and Refine Fluid Motion with Physical Dynamics 学习利用物理动力学估计和细化流体运动 Extracting information on fluid motion directly from images is challenging. Fluid flow represents a complex dynamic system governed by the Navier-Stokes equations. General optical flow methods are typically designed for rigid body motion, and thus struggle if applied to fluid motion estimation directly. Further, optical flow methods only focus on two consecutive frames without utilising historical temporal information, while the fluid motion (velocity field) can be considered a continuous trajectory constrained by time-dependent partial differential equations (PDEs). This discrepancy has the potential to induce physically inconsistent estimations. Here we propose an unsupervised learning based prediction-correction scheme for fluid flow estimation. An estimate is first given by a PDE-constrained optical flow predictor, which is then refined by a physical based corrector. The proposed approach outperforms optical flow methods and shows competitive results compared to existing supervised learning based methods on a benchmark dataset. Furthermore, the proposed approach can generalize to complex real-world fluid scenarios where ground truth information is effectively unknowable. Finally, experiments demonstrate that the physical corrector can refine flow estimates by mimicking the operator splitting method commonly utilised in fluid dynamical simulation. 直接从图像中提取流体运动信息具有挑战性。流体流动代表由纳维-斯托克斯方程控制的复杂动态系统。一般的光流方法通常是针对刚体运动而设计的，因此如果直接应用于流体运动估计就会很困难。此外，光流方法仅关注两个连续帧，而不利用历史时间信息，而流体运动（速度场）可以被视为受时间相关偏微分方程（PDE）约束的连续轨迹。这种差异有可能导致物理上不一致的估计。在这里，我们提出了一种基于无监督学习的流体流量估计预测校正方案。首先由 PDE 约束光流预测器给出估计，然后由基于物理的校正器进行细化。所提出的方法优于光流方法，并且与基准数据集上现有的基于监督学习的方法相比显示出有竞争力的结果。此外，所提出的方法可以推广到复杂的现实世界流体场景，其中地面真实信息实际上是不可知的。最后，实验表明，物理校正器可以通过模仿流体动力学模拟中常用的算子分裂方法来细化流量估计。 本文提出了一种基于物理动态的流体运动估计与修正方法。 Mingrui Zhang,Jianhong Wang,James Tlhomole,Matthew D. Piggott cs.LG,cs.CV,math.NA

authors_text: Pietro Melzi,Christian Rathgeb,Ruben Tolosana,Ruben Vera-Rodriguez,Christoph Busch
title: An Overview of Privacy-enhancing Technologies in Biometric Recognition
title_zh: 生物特征识别中的隐私增强技术概述
abstract: Privacy-enhancing technologies are technologies that implement fundamental data protection principles. With respect to biometric recognition, different types of privacy-enhancing technologies have been introduced for protecting stored biometric data which are generally classified as sensitive. In this regard, various taxonomies and conceptual categorizations have been proposed and standardization activities have been carried out. However, these efforts have mainly been devoted to certain sub-categories of privacy-enhancing technologies and therefore lack generalization. This work provides an overview of concepts of privacy-enhancing technologies for biometrics in a unified framework. Key aspects and differences between existing concepts are highlighted in detail at each processing step. Fundamental properties and limitations of existing approaches are discussed and related to data protection techniques and principles. Moreover, scenarios and methods for the assessment of privacy-enhancing technologies for biometrics are presented. This paper is meant as a point of entry to the field of biometric data protection and is directed towards experienced researchers as well as non-experts.
summary: Privacy-enhancing technologies are technologies that implement fundamental data protection principles. With respect to biometric recognition, different types of privacy-enhancing technologies have been introduced for protecting stored biometric data which are generally classified as sensitive. In this regard, various taxonomies and conceptual categorizations have been proposed and standardization activities have been carried out. However, these efforts have mainly been devoted to certain sub-categories of privacy-enhancing technologies and therefore lack generalization. This work provides an overview of concepts of privacy-enhancing technologies for biometrics in a unified framework. Key aspects and differences between existing concepts are highlighted in detail at each processing step. Fundamental properties and limitations of existing approaches are discussed and related to data protection techniques and principles. Moreover, scenarios and methods for the assessment of privacy-enhancing technologies for biometrics are presented. This paper is meant as a point of entry to the field of biometric data protection and is directed towards experienced researchers as well as non-experts.
abstract_zh: 隐私增强技术是实现基本数据保护原则的技术。关于生物特征识别，已经引入了不同类型的隐私增强技术来保护通常被归类为敏感的存储的生物特征数据。在这方面，已经提出了各种分类法和概念分类，并开展了标准化活动。然而，这些努力主要致力于隐私增强技术的某些子类别，因此缺乏普遍性。这项工作概述了统一框架中生物识别隐私增强技术的概念。每个处理步骤都详细强调了现有概念之间的关键方面和差异。讨论了现有方法的基本属性和局限性，并与数据保护技术和原则相关。此外，还提出了评估生物识别隐私增强技术的场景和方法。本文旨在作为生物识别数据保护领域的切入点，面向经验丰富的研究人员和非专家。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过统一框架概述生物识别中的隐私增强技术，比较现有概念，分析其特性与限制，并提出评估方法。
AI.motivation: 现有隐私增强技术分类和标准化工作局限于特定子类别，缺乏普适性，需构建统一框架以全面覆盖该领域。
AI.method: 通过统一框架整合现有技术，分步骤比较关键差异，结合数据保护原则分析技术特性与限制。
AI.result: 系统梳理了生物识别隐私增强技术的统一框架，明确技术差异，分析其优缺点，并提出评估方法与场景。
AI.conclusion: 本文为生物识别数据保护领域提供全面综述，适用于研究人员与非专家，促进隐私增强技术的标准化应用。

authors_text: Wei Liu,Rui Wang,Tao Zhang,Kaiwen Li,Wenhua Li,Hisao Ishibuchi
title: Hybridization of evolutionary algorithm and deep reinforcement learning for multi-objective orienteering optimization
title_zh: 进化算法与深度强化学习的混合用于多目标定向运动优化
abstract: Multi-objective orienteering problems (MO-OPs) are classical multi-objective routing problems and have received a lot of attention in the past decades. This study seeks to solve MO-OPs through a problem-decomposition framework, that is, a MO-OP is decomposed into a multi-objective knapsack problem (MOKP) and a travelling salesman problem (TSP). The MOKP and TSP are then solved by a multi-objective evolutionary algorithm (MOEA) and a deep reinforcement learning (DRL) method, respectively. While the MOEA module is for selecting cities, the DRL module is for planning a Hamiltonian path for these cities. An iterative use of these two modules drives the population towards the Pareto front of MO-OPs. The effectiveness of the proposed method is compared against NSGA-II and NSGA-III on various types of MO-OP instances. Experimental results show that our method exhibits the best performance on almost all the test instances, and has shown strong generalization ability.
summary: Multi-objective orienteering problems (MO-OPs) are classical multi-objective routing problems and have received a lot of attention in the past decades. This study seeks to solve MO-OPs through a problem-decomposition framework, that is, a MO-OP is decomposed into a multi-objective knapsack problem (MOKP) and a travelling salesman problem (TSP). The MOKP and TSP are then solved by a multi-objective evolutionary algorithm (MOEA) and a deep reinforcement learning (DRL) method, respectively. While the MOEA module is for selecting cities, the DRL module is for planning a Hamiltonian path for these cities. An iterative use of these two modules drives the population towards the Pareto front of MO-OPs. The effectiveness of the proposed method is compared against NSGA-II and NSGA-III on various types of MO-OP instances. Experimental results show that our method exhibits the best performance on almost all the test instances, and has shown strong generalization ability.
abstract_zh: 多目标定向问题（MO-OP）是经典的多目标路线问题，在过去几十年中受到了广泛的关注。本研究试图通过问题分解框架来解决MO-OP，即将MO-OP分解为多目标背包问题（MOKP）和旅行商问题（TSP）。然后分别通过多目标进化算法（MOEA）和深度强化学习（DRL）方法求解MOKP和TSP。 MOEA 模块用于选择城市，而 DRL 模块用于为这些城市规划哈密顿路径。这两个模块的迭代使用将群体推向 MO-OP 的帕累托前沿。在各种类型的 MO-OP 实例上将所提出的方法的有效性与 NSGA-II 和 NSGA-III 进行了比较。实验结果表明，我们的方法在几乎所有的测试实例上都表现出了最好的性能，并且表现出了很强的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合多目标进化算法（MOEA）和深度强化学习（DRL）的混合方法，用于解决多目标定向问题（MO-OPs）。
AI.motivation: 多目标定向问题（MO-OPs）具有复杂性，传统方法难以高效求解，需探索更优的混合算法框架以提升性能。
AI.method: 将MO-OP分解为多目标背包问题（MOKP）和旅行商问题（TSP），分别用MOEA选择城市和DRL规划路径，通过迭代优化逼近Pareto前沿。
AI.result: 在多种MO-OP实例中，该方法在几乎所有测试案例中表现优于NSGA-II和NSGA-III，且具有强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 混合MOEA与DRL的框架能有效解决MO-OPs，为多目标优化问题提供新思路和实用工具。

authors_text: Shaoyi Huang,Ning Liu,Yueying Liang,Hongwu Peng,Hongjia Li,Dongkuan Xu,Mimi Xie,Caiwen Ding
title: An Automatic and Efficient BERT Pruning for Edge AI Systems
title_zh: 针对边缘 AI 系统的自动高效 BERT 剪枝
abstract: With the yearning for deep learning democratization, there are increasing demands to implement Transformer-based natural language processing (NLP) models on resource-constrained devices for low-latency and high accuracy. Existing BERT pruning methods require domain experts to heuristically handcraft hyperparameters to strike a balance among model size, latency, and accuracy. In this work, we propose AE-BERT, an automatic and efficient BERT pruning framework with efficient evaluation to select a "good" sub-network candidate (with high accuracy) given the overall pruning ratio constraints. Our proposed method requires no human experts experience and achieves a better accuracy performance on many NLP tasks. Our experimental results on General Language Understanding Evaluation (GLUE) benchmark show that AE-BERT outperforms the state-of-the-art (SOTA) hand-crafted pruning methods on BERT$_{\mathrm{BASE}}$. On QNLI and RTE, we obtain 75\% and 42.8\% more overall pruning ratio while achieving higher accuracy. On MRPC, we obtain a 4.6 higher score than the SOTA at the same overall pruning ratio of 0.5. On STS-B, we can achieve a 40\% higher pruning ratio with a very small loss in Spearman correlation compared to SOTA hand-crafted pruning methods. Experimental results also show that after model compression, the inference time of a single BERT$_{\mathrm{BASE}}$ encoder on Xilinx Alveo U200 FPGA board has a 1.83$\times$ speedup compared to Intel(R) Xeon(R) Gold 5218 (2.30GHz) CPU, which shows the reasonableness of deploying the proposed method generated subnets of BERT$_{\mathrm{BASE}}$ model on computation restricted devices.
summary: With the yearning for deep learning democratization, there are increasing demands to implement Transformer-based natural language processing (NLP) models on resource-constrained devices for low-latency and high accuracy. Existing BERT pruning methods require domain experts to heuristically handcraft hyperparameters to strike a balance among model size, latency, and accuracy. In this work, we propose AE-BERT, an automatic and efficient BERT pruning framework with efficient evaluation to select a "good" sub-network candidate (with high accuracy) given the overall pruning ratio constraints. Our proposed method requires no human experts experience and achieves a better accuracy performance on many NLP tasks. Our experimental results on General Language Understanding Evaluation (GLUE) benchmark show that AE-BERT outperforms the state-of-the-art (SOTA) hand-crafted pruning methods on BERT$_{\mathrm{BASE}}$. On QNLI and RTE, we obtain 75\% and 42.8\% more overall pruning ratio while achieving higher accuracy. On MRPC, we obtain a 4.6 higher score than the SOTA at the same overall pruning ratio of 0.5. On STS-B, we can achieve a 40\% higher pruning ratio with a very small loss in Spearman correlation compared to SOTA hand-crafted pruning methods. Experimental results also show that after model compression, the inference time of a single BERT$_{\mathrm{BASE}}$ encoder on Xilinx Alveo U200 FPGA board has a 1.83$\times$ speedup compared to Intel(R) Xeon(R) Gold 5218 (2.30GHz) CPU, which shows the reasonableness of deploying the proposed method generated subnets of BERT$_{\mathrm{BASE}}$ model on computation restricted devices.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习民主化的向往，人们对在资源受限的设备上实现基于 Transformer 的自然语言处理（NLP）模型以实现低延迟和高精度的需求越来越大。现有的 BERT 剪枝方法需要领域专家启发式地手工设计超参数，以在模型大小、延迟和准确性之间取得平衡。在这项工作中，我们提出了 AE-BERT，这是一种自动高效的 BERT 剪枝框架，可以在给定总体剪枝率约束的情况下进行有效评估，以选择“良好”的子网络候选（具有高精度）。我们提出的方法不需要人类专家的经验，并且在许多 NLP 任务上实现了更好的准确性性能。我们在通用语言理解评估（GLUE）基准上的实验结果表明，AE-BERT 在 BERT$_{\mathrm{BASE}}$ 上优于最先进的（SOTA）手工剪枝方法。在 QNLI 和 RTE 上，我们获得了 75% 和 42.8% 的整体剪枝率，同时实现了更高的精度。在 MRPC 上，在总体剪枝率为 0.5 的情况下，我们获得了比 SOTA 高 4.6 的分数。在 STS-B 上，与 SOTA 手工剪枝方法相比，我们可以在 Spearman 相关性损失非常小的情况下实现高 40% 的剪枝率。实验结果还表明，模型压缩后，Xilinx Alveo U200 FPGA 板上的单个 BERT$_{\mathrm{BASE}}$ 编码器的推理时间比 Intel(R) Xeon(R) Gold 5218 (2.30GHz) CPU 加速了 1.83$\times$，这表明部署所提出的方法生成的 BERT$_{\mathrm{BASE}}$ 模型子网的合理性在计算受限的设备上。

AI.tldr: 提出一种自动高效的BERT剪枝框架AE-BERT，用于在资源受限的边缘设备上部署模型。
AI.motivation: 现有BERT剪枝方法依赖领域专家手动调整超参数，难以在模型大小、延迟和准确性之间取得平衡。
AI.method: 通过高效评估自动选择符合整体剪枝比例约束的高精度子网络，无需人工经验。
AI.result: 在GLUE基准测试中，AE-BERT在多个任务上实现更高的剪枝比例和准确率，且在FPGA上推理速度提升1.83倍。
AI.conclusion: AE-BERT有效解决了边缘设备上BERT模型压缩的挑战，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: An Automatic and Efficient BERT Pruning for Edge AI Systems 针对边缘 AI 系统的自动高效 BERT 剪枝 With the yearning for deep learning democratization, there are increasing demands to implement Transformer-based natural language processing (NLP) models on resource-constrained devices for low-latency and high accuracy. Existing BERT pruning methods require domain experts to heuristically handcraft hyperparameters to strike a balance among model size, latency, and accuracy. In this work, we propose AE-BERT, an automatic and efficient BERT pruning framework with efficient evaluation to select a "good" sub-network candidate (with high accuracy) given the overall pruning ratio constraints. Our proposed method requires no human experts experience and achieves a better accuracy performance on many NLP tasks. Our experimental results on General Language Understanding Evaluation (GLUE) benchmark show that AE-BERT outperforms the state-of-the-art (SOTA) hand-crafted pruning methods on BERT$_{\mathrm{BASE}}$. On QNLI and RTE, we obtain 75\% and 42.8\% more overall pruning ratio while achieving higher accuracy. On MRPC, we obtain a 4.6 higher score than the SOTA at the same overall pruning ratio of 0.5. On STS-B, we can achieve a 40\% higher pruning ratio with a very small loss in Spearman correlation compared to SOTA hand-crafted pruning methods. Experimental results also show that after model compression, the inference time of a single BERT$_{\mathrm{BASE}}$ encoder on Xilinx Alveo U200 FPGA board has a 1.83$\times$ speedup compared to Intel(R) Xeon(R) Gold 5218 (2.30GHz) CPU, which shows the reasonableness of deploying the proposed method generated subnets of BERT$_{\mathrm{BASE}}$ model on computation restricted devices. 随着深度学习民主化的向往，人们对在资源受限的设备上实现基于 Transformer 的自然语言处理（NLP）模型以实现低延迟和高精度的需求越来越大。现有的 BERT 剪枝方法需要领域专家启发式地手工设计超参数，以在模型大小、延迟和准确性之间取得平衡。在这项工作中，我们提出了 AE-BERT，这是一种自动高效的 BERT 剪枝框架，可以在给定总体剪枝率约束的情况下进行有效评估，以选择“良好”的子网络候选（具有高精度）。我们提出的方法不需要人类专家的经验，并且在许多 NLP 任务上实现了更好的准确性性能。我们在通用语言理解评估（GLUE）基准上的实验结果表明，AE-BERT 在 BERT$_{\mathrm{BASE}}$ 上优于最先进的（SOTA）手工剪枝方法。在 QNLI 和 RTE 上，我们获得了 75% 和 42.8% 的整体剪枝率，同时实现了更高的精度。在 MRPC 上，在总体剪枝率为 0.5 的情况下，我们获得了比 SOTA 高 4.6 的分数。在 STS-B 上，与 SOTA 手工剪枝方法相比，我们可以在 Spearman 相关性损失非常小的情况下实现高 40% 的剪枝率。实验结果还表明，模型压缩后，Xilinx Alveo U200 FPGA 板上的单个 BERT$_{\mathrm{BASE}}$ 编码器的推理时间比 Intel(R) Xeon(R) Gold 5218 (2.30GHz) CPU 加速了 1.83$\times$，这表明部署所提出的方法生成的 BERT$_{\mathrm{BASE}}$ 模型子网的合理性在计算受限的设备上。 提出一种自动高效的BERT剪枝框架AE-BERT，用于在资源受限的边缘设备上部署模型。 Shaoyi Huang,Ning Liu,Yueying Liang,Hongwu Peng,Hongjia Li,Dongkuan Xu,Mimi Xie,Caiwen Ding cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Device for measuring the plant physiology and electrophysiology
title_zh: 植物生理学和电生理学测量装置
abstract: This paper briefly describes the device - the phytosensor - for measuring physiological and electrophysiological parameters of plants. This system is developed as a bio-physiological sensor in precise agriculture, as a tool in plant research and environmental biology, and for plant enthusiasts in smart home or entertainment applications. The phytosentor measures main physiological parameters such as the leaf transpiration rate, sap flow, tissue conductivity and frequency response, biopotentials (action potentials and variation potentials), and can conduct electrochemical impedance spectroscopy with organic tissues. Soil moisture and temperature, air quality (CO2, NO2, O3 and other sensors on I2C bus), and general environmental parameters (light, temperature, humidity, air pressure, electromagnetic and magnetic fields) are also recorded in real time. In addition to phytosensing, the device can also perform phytoactuation, i.e. execute electrical or light stimulation of plants, control irrigation and lighting modes, conduct fully autonomous experiments with complex feedback-based and adaptive scenarios in robotic or biohybrid systems. This article represents the revised and extended version of original paper and includes some descriptions and images from the FloraRobotica and BioHybrids projects.
summary: This paper briefly describes the device - the phytosensor - for measuring physiological and electrophysiological parameters of plants. This system is developed as a bio-physiological sensor in precise agriculture, as a tool in plant research and environmental biology, and for plant enthusiasts in smart home or entertainment applications. The phytosentor measures main physiological parameters such as the leaf transpiration rate, sap flow, tissue conductivity and frequency response, biopotentials (action potentials and variation potentials), and can conduct electrochemical impedance spectroscopy with organic tissues. Soil moisture and temperature, air quality (CO2, NO2, O3 and other sensors on I2C bus), and general environmental parameters (light, temperature, humidity, air pressure, electromagnetic and magnetic fields) are also recorded in real time. In addition to phytosensing, the device can also perform phytoactuation, i.e. execute electrical or light stimulation of plants, control irrigation and lighting modes, conduct fully autonomous experiments with complex feedback-based and adaptive scenarios in robotic or biohybrid systems. This article represents the revised and extended version of original paper and includes some descriptions and images from the FloraRobotica and BioHybrids projects.
abstract_zh: 本文简要介绍了用于测量植物生理和电生理参数的设备——植物传感器。该系统被开发为精准农业中的生物生理传感器、植物研究和环境生物学的工具以及智能家居或娱乐应用中的植物爱好者。 phytosentor可测量主要生理参数，如叶片蒸腾速率、液流、组织电导率和频率响应、生物电位（动作电位和变异电位），并可对有机组织进行电化学阻抗谱分析。土壤湿度和温度、空气质量（I2C总线上的CO2、NO2、O3等传感器）以及一般环境参数（光照、温度、湿度、气压、电磁场和磁场）也被实时记录。除了植物传感之外，该设备还可以执行植物驱动，即对植物执行电或光刺激，控制灌溉和照明模式，在机器人或生物混合系统中利用复杂的基于反馈和自适应场景进行完全自主的实验。本文代表原始论文的修订和扩展版本，包括来自 FloraRobotica 和 BioHybrids 项目的一些描述和图像。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种名为phytosensor的设备，用于测量植物的生理和电生理参数，并具备环境监测与植物刺激功能。
AI.motivation: 开发多功能植物传感器以满足精准农业、植物研究、环境生物学及智能家庭场景中对植物状态实时监测与交互控制的需求。
AI.method: 集成多种传感器测量植物蒸腾率、汁液流动、电导率及生物电位，结合电化学阻抗谱分析与环境参数实时记录，并通过电刺激/光刺激实现植物驱动与自主实验控制。
AI.result: 成功构建可同时测量植物多维度生理参数、环境数据并执行反馈控制的设备，验证其在FloraRobotica与BioHybrids项目中的应用可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该设备为植物生理研究、农业智能化及生物混合系统提供了多功能工具，展示了跨学科应用潜力。

title: Domain Adaptive 3D Pose Augmentation for In-the-wild Human Mesh Recovery
title_zh: 用于野外人体网格恢复的域自适应 3D 姿势增强
abstract: The ability to perceive 3D human bodies from a single image has a multitude of applications ranging from entertainment and robotics to neuroscience and healthcare. A fundamental challenge in human mesh recovery is in collecting the ground truth 3D mesh targets required for training, which requires burdensome motion capturing systems and is often limited to indoor laboratories. As a result, while progress is made on benchmark datasets collected in these restrictive settings, models fail to generalize to real-world "in-the-wild" scenarios due to distribution shifts. We propose Domain Adaptive 3D Pose Augmentation (DAPA), a data augmentation method that enhances the model's generalization ability in in-the-wild scenarios. DAPA combines the strength of methods based on synthetic datasets by getting direct supervision from the synthesized meshes, and domain adaptation methods by using ground truth 2D keypoints from the target dataset. We show quantitatively that finetuning with DAPA effectively improves results on benchmarks 3DPW and AGORA. We further demonstrate the utility of DAPA on a challenging dataset curated from videos of real-world parent-child interaction.
summary: The ability to perceive 3D human bodies from a single image has a multitude of applications ranging from entertainment and robotics to neuroscience and healthcare. A fundamental challenge in human mesh recovery is in collecting the ground truth 3D mesh targets required for training, which requires burdensome motion capturing systems and is often limited to indoor laboratories. As a result, while progress is made on benchmark datasets collected in these restrictive settings, models fail to generalize to real-world "in-the-wild" scenarios due to distribution shifts. We propose Domain Adaptive 3D Pose Augmentation (DAPA), a data augmentation method that enhances the model's generalization ability in in-the-wild scenarios. DAPA combines the strength of methods based on synthetic datasets by getting direct supervision from the synthesized meshes, and domain adaptation methods by using ground truth 2D keypoints from the target dataset. We show quantitatively that finetuning with DAPA effectively improves results on benchmarks 3DPW and AGORA. We further demonstrate the utility of DAPA on a challenging dataset curated from videos of real-world parent-child interaction.
abstract_zh: 从单个图像感知 3D 人体的能力具有多种应用，从娱乐和机器人到神经科学和医疗保健。人体网格恢复的一个基本挑战是收集训练所需的地面实况 3D 网格目标，这需要繁重的运动捕捉系统，并且通常仅限于室内实验室。因此，虽然在这些限制性设置中收集的基准数据集取得了进展，但由于分布变化，模型无法推广到现实世界的“野外”场景。我们提出了域自适应 3D 姿态增强（DAPA），这是一种数据增强方法，可以增强模型在野外场景中的泛化能力。 DAPA 通过从合成网格获得直接监督，结合了基于合成数据集的方法的优势，以及通过使用目标数据集中的地面真实 2D 关键点来结合域适应方法的优势。我们定量地表明，使用 DAPA 进行微调可以有效改善基准 3DPW 和 AGORA 的结果。我们进一步展示了 DAPA 在由现实世界亲子互动视频整理的具有挑战性的数据集上的实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种域自适应3D姿态增强方法（DAPA），用于提升真实场景下人体网格恢复模型的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有3D人体重建模型依赖室内实验室采集的标注数据，难以适应真实场景中的分布差异，导致泛化性能不足。
AI.method: DAPA结合合成数据的直接监督与目标域2D关键点的域适应技术，通过合成网格生成与真实2D标注联合优化提升模型适应性。
AI.result: 在3DPW和AGORA基准测试中，使用DAPA微调后模型性能显著提升，并在真实亲子互动视频数据集上验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: DAPA通过跨域数据联合优化有效缓解了分布偏移问题，为真实场景人体重建提供了可行的增强方案。

search_text: Domain Adaptive 3D Pose Augmentation for In-the-wild Human Mesh Recovery 用于野外人体网格恢复的域自适应 3D 姿势增强 The ability to perceive 3D human bodies from a single image has a multitude of applications ranging from entertainment and robotics to neuroscience and healthcare. A fundamental challenge in human mesh recovery is in collecting the ground truth 3D mesh targets required for training, which requires burdensome motion capturing systems and is often limited to indoor laboratories. As a result, while progress is made on benchmark datasets collected in these restrictive settings, models fail to generalize to real-world "in-the-wild" scenarios due to distribution shifts. We propose Domain Adaptive 3D Pose Augmentation (DAPA), a data augmentation method that enhances the model's generalization ability in in-the-wild scenarios. DAPA combines the strength of methods based on synthetic datasets by getting direct supervision from the synthesized meshes, and domain adaptation methods by using ground truth 2D keypoints from the target dataset. We show quantitatively that finetuning with DAPA effectively improves results on benchmarks 3DPW and AGORA. We further demonstrate the utility of DAPA on a challenging dataset curated from videos of real-world parent-child interaction. 从单个图像感知 3D 人体的能力具有多种应用，从娱乐和机器人到神经科学和医疗保健。人体网格恢复的一个基本挑战是收集训练所需的地面实况 3D 网格目标，这需要繁重的运动捕捉系统，并且通常仅限于室内实验室。因此，虽然在这些限制性设置中收集的基准数据集取得了进展，但由于分布变化，模型无法推广到现实世界的“野外”场景。我们提出了域自适应 3D 姿态增强（DAPA），这是一种数据增强方法，可以增强模型在野外场景中的泛化能力。 DAPA 通过从合成网格获得直接监督，结合了基于合成数据集的方法的优势，以及通过使用目标数据集中的地面真实 2D 关键点来结合域适应方法的优势。我们定量地表明，使用 DAPA 进行微调可以有效改善基准 3DPW 和 AGORA 的结果。我们进一步展示了 DAPA 在由现实世界亲子互动视频整理的具有挑战性的数据集上的实用性。 本文提出一种域自适应3D姿态增强方法（DAPA），用于提升真实场景下人体网格恢复模型的泛化能力。 Zhenzhen Weng,Kuan-Chieh Wang,Angjoo Kanazawa,Serena Yeung cs.CV

title: Automated Coronary Calcium Scoring using U-Net Models through Semi-supervised Learning on Non-Gated CT Scans
title_zh: 通过非门控 CT 扫描的半监督学习，使用 U-Net 模型进行自动冠状动脉钙评分
comment: There is no correlation between gated and non-gated CT scans causing the points used in the training and results to be flawed. It was inaccurately assumed that there was a correlation between the scans
comments: There is no correlation between gated and non-gated CT scans causing the points used in the training and results to be flawed. It was inaccurately assumed that there was a correlation between the scans
abstract: Every year, thousands of innocent people die due to heart attacks. Often undiagnosed heart attacks can hit people by surprise since many current medical plans don't cover the costs to require the searching of calcification on these scans. Only if someone is suspected to have a heart problem, a gated CT scan is taken, otherwise, there's no way for the patient to be aware of a possible heart attack/disease. While nongated CT scans are more periodically taken, it is harder to detect calcification and is usually taken for a purpose other than locating calcification in arteries. In fact, in real time coronary artery calcification scores are only calculated on gated CT scans, not nongated CT scans. After training a unet model on the Coronary Calcium and chest CT's gated scans, it received a DICE coefficient of 0.95 on its untouched test set. This model was used to predict on nongated CT scans, performing with a mean absolute error (MAE) of 674.19 and bucket classification accuracy of 41% (5 classes). Through the analysis of the images and the information stored in the images, mathematical equations were derived and used to automatically crop the images around the location of the heart. By performing semi-supervised learning the new cropped nongated scans were able to closely resemble gated CT scans, improving the performance by 91% in MAE (62.38) and 23% in accuracy.

In fact, in real time coronary artery calcification scores are only calculated on gated CT scans, not nongated CT scans. After training a unet model on the Coronary Calcium and chest CT's gated scans, it received a DICE coefficient of 0.95 on its untouched test set. This model was used to predict on nongated CT scans, performing with a mean absolute error (MAE) of 674.19 and bucket classification accuracy of 41% (5 classes). Through the analysis of the images and the information stored in the images, mathematical equations were derived and used to automatically crop the images around the location of the heart. By performing semi-supervised learning the new cropped nongated scans were able to closely resemble gated CT scans, improving the performance by 91% in MAE (62.38) and 23% in accuracy.
abstract_zh: 每年都有数以千计的无辜者死于心脏病。通常，未确诊的心脏病发作可能会让人们感到惊讶，因为许多当前的医疗计划不承担要求在这些扫描中检查钙化点的费用。只有当某人怀疑患有心脏病时，才会进行门控 CT 扫描，否则患者无法意识到可能患有心脏病/疾病。虽然非门控 CT 扫描更定期进行，但更难检测钙化，并且通常用于定位动脉钙化以外的目的。事实上，实时冠状动脉钙化评分仅根据门控 CT 扫描计算，而不是非门控 CT 扫描。在冠状动脉钙化和胸部 CT 门控扫描上训练 unet 模型后，它在未受影响的测试集上获得了 0.95 的 DICE 系数。该模型用于预测非门控 CT 扫描，平均绝对误差 (MAE) 为 674.19，桶分类准确度为 41%（5 类）。通过分析图像和图像中存储的信息，推导出数学方程并用于自动裁剪心脏位置周围的图像。通过执行半监督学习，新的裁剪非门控扫描能够与门控 CT 扫描非常相似，将 MAE 性能提高 91% (62.38)，准确性提高 23%。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于U-Net模型和半监督学习的非门控CT扫描自动冠状动脉钙化评分方法。
AI.motivation: 当前冠状动脉钙化评分依赖门控CT扫描，但非门控CT扫描更常见且成本低，但难以检测钙化。需开发方法利用非门控扫描实现自动评分以提高诊断可及性。
AI.method: 训练U-Net模型处理门控CT扫描数据，通过数学公式裁剪非门控扫描的心脏区域，并采用半监督学习优化模型以模拟门控扫描特征。
AI.result: 半监督学习后，非门控扫描的MAE从674.19降至62.38（提升91%），分类准确率从41%提升至64%（提升23%）。
AI.conclusion: 半监督学习显著提升了非门控CT扫描的钙化评分性能，为低成本心脏疾病筛查提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Daniel Dunbar,Thomas Hagedorn,Mark Blackburn,John Dzielski,Steven Hespelt,Benjamin Kruse,Dinesh Verma,Zhongyuan Yu
title: Driving Digital Engineering Integration and Interoperability Through Semantic Integration of Models with Ontologies
title_zh: 通过模型与本体的语义集成来推动数字工程集成和互操作性
abstract: Engineered solutions are becoming more complex and multi-disciplinary in nature. This evolution requires new techniques to enhance design and analysis tasks that incorporate data integration and interoperability across various engineering tool suites spanning multiple domains at different abstraction levels. Semantic Web Technologies (SWT) offer data integration and interoperability benefits as well as other opportunities to enhance reasoning across knowledge represented in multiple disparate models. This paper introduces the Digital Engineering Framework for Integration and Interoperability (DEFII) for incorporating SWT into engineering design and analysis tasks. The framework includes three notional interfaces for interacting with ontology-aligned data. It also introduces a novel Model Interface Specification Diagram (MISD) that provides a tool-agnostic model representation enabled by SWT that exposes data stored for use by external users through standards-based interfaces. Use of the framework results in a tool-agnostic authoritative source of truth spanning the entire project, system, or mission.
summary: Engineered solutions are becoming more complex and multi-disciplinary in nature. This evolution requires new techniques to enhance design and analysis tasks that incorporate data integration and interoperability across various engineering tool suites spanning multiple domains at different abstraction levels. Semantic Web Technologies (SWT) offer data integration and interoperability benefits as well as other opportunities to enhance reasoning across knowledge represented in multiple disparate models. This paper introduces the Digital Engineering Framework for Integration and Interoperability (DEFII) for incorporating SWT into engineering design and analysis tasks. The framework includes three notional interfaces for interacting with ontology-aligned data. It also introduces a novel Model Interface Specification Diagram (MISD) that provides a tool-agnostic model representation enabled by SWT that exposes data stored for use by external users through standards-based interfaces. Use of the framework results in a tool-agnostic authoritative source of truth spanning the entire project, system, or mission.
abstract_zh: 工程解决方案本质上变得更加复杂和跨学科。这种演变需要新技术来增强设计和分析任务，这些任务将跨越不同抽象级别的多个领域的各种工程工具套件的数据集成和互操作性结合起来。语义网络技术 (SWT) 提供数据集成和互操作性优势以及其他机会来增强跨多个不同模型所表示的知识的推理。本文介绍了用于集成和互操作性的数字工程框架 (DEFII)，用于将 SWT 纳入工程设计和分析任务。该框架包括三个用于与本体对齐数据交互的概念接口。它还引入了一种新颖的模型接口规范图 (MISD)，该图提供了由 SWT 启用的与工具无关的模型表示，通过基于标准的接口公开存储的数据以供外部用户使用。使用该框架会产生涵盖整个项目、系统或任务的与工具无关的权威事实来源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过语义网络技术（SWT）与本体论集成的DEFII框架，解决工程设计中多领域工具间的数据整合与互操作性难题。
AI.motivation: 现代工程系统日益复杂且跨学科，传统工具难以实现高效的数据集成与跨域协作，亟需统一的语义层面解决方案。
AI.method: 构建DEFII框架包含三个本体对齐数据接口，并创新性提出工具无关的模型接口规范图（MISD）以标准化暴露数据。
AI.result: 实现跨工程工具套件的权威数据源，支持多层级抽象系统的互操作性与协同设计分析。
AI.conclusion: DEFII框架通过语义集成显著提升数字工程中异构系统的数据整合效率与知识推理能力。

result: 实现跨工程工具套件的权威数据源，支持多层级抽象系统的互操作性与协同设计分析。
conclusion: DEFII框架通过语义集成显著提升数字工程中异构系统的数据整合效率与知识推理能力。
search_text: Driving Digital Engineering Integration and Interoperability Through Semantic Integration of Models with Ontologies 通过模型与本体的语义集成来推动数字工程集成和互操作性 Engineered solutions are becoming more complex and multi-disciplinary in nature. This evolution requires new techniques to enhance design and analysis tasks that incorporate data integration and interoperability across various engineering tool suites spanning multiple domains at different abstraction levels. Semantic Web Technologies (SWT) offer data integration and interoperability benefits as well as other opportunities to enhance reasoning across knowledge represented in multiple disparate models. This paper introduces the Digital Engineering Framework for Integration and Interoperability (DEFII) for incorporating SWT into engineering design and analysis tasks. The framework includes three notional interfaces for interacting with ontology-aligned data. It also introduces a novel Model Interface Specification Diagram (MISD) that provides a tool-agnostic model representation enabled by SWT that exposes data stored for use by external users through standards-based interfaces. Use of the framework results in a tool-agnostic authoritative source of truth spanning the entire project, system, or mission. 工程解决方案本质上变得更加复杂和跨学科。这种演变需要新技术来增强设计和分析任务，这些任务将跨越不同抽象级别的多个领域的各种工程工具套件的数据集成和互操作性结合起来。语义网络技术 (SWT) 提供数据集成和互操作性优势以及其他机会来增强跨多个不同模型所表示的知识的推理。本文介绍了用于集成和互操作性的数字工程框架 (DEFII)，用于将 SWT 纳入工程设计和分析任务。该框架包括三个用于与本体对齐数据交互的概念接口。它还引入了一种新颖的模型接口规范图 (MISD)，该图提供了由 SWT 启用的与工具无关的模型表示，通过基于标准的接口公开存储的数据以供外部用户使用。使用该框架会产生涵盖整个项目、系统或任务的与工具无关的权威事实来源。 本文提出通过语义网络技术（SWT）与本体论集成的DEFII框架，解决工程设计中多领域工具间的数据整合与互操作性难题。 Daniel Dunbar,Thomas Hagedorn,Mark Blackburn,John Dzielski,Steven Hespelt,Benjamin Kruse,Dinesh Verma,Zhongyuan Yu cs.AI

authors_text: Nicola Messina,Davide Alessandro Coccomini,Andrea Esuli,Fabrizio Falchi
title: Transformer-Based Multi-modal Proposal and Re-Rank for Wikipedia Image-Caption Matching
title_zh: 用于维基百科图像标题匹配的基于 Transformer 的多模态提案和重新排序
comment: Accepted for publication at the Wiki-M3L workshop, co-located with ICLR 2022
comments: Accepted for publication at the Wiki-M3L workshop, co-located with ICLR 2022
abstract: With the increased accessibility of web and online encyclopedias, the amount of data to manage is constantly increasing. In Wikipedia, for example, there are millions of pages written in multiple languages. These pages contain images that often lack the textual context, remaining conceptually floating and therefore harder to find and manage. In this work, we present the system we designed for participating in the Wikipedia Image-Caption Matching challenge on Kaggle, whose objective is to use data associated with images (URLs and visual data) to find the correct caption among a large pool of available ones. A system able to perform this task would improve the accessibility and completeness of multimedia content on large online encyclopedias. Specifically, we propose a cascade of two models, both powered by the recent Transformer model, able to efficiently and effectively infer a relevance score between the query image data and the captions. We verify through extensive experimentation that the proposed two-model approach is an effective way to handle a large pool of images and captions while maintaining bounded the overall computational complexity at inference time. Our approach achieves remarkable results, obtaining a normalized Discounted Cumulative Gain (nDCG) value of 0.53 on the private leaderboard of the Kaggle challenge.
summary: With the increased accessibility of web and online encyclopedias, the amount of data to manage is constantly increasing. In Wikipedia, for example, there are millions of pages written in multiple languages. These pages contain images that often lack the textual context, remaining conceptually floating and therefore harder to find and manage. In this work, we present the system we designed for participating in the Wikipedia Image-Caption Matching challenge on Kaggle, whose objective is to use data associated with images (URLs and visual data) to find the correct caption among a large pool of available ones. A system able to perform this task would improve the accessibility and completeness of multimedia content on large online encyclopedias. Specifically, we propose a cascade of two models, both powered by the recent Transformer model, able to efficiently and effectively infer a relevance score between the query image data and the captions. We verify through extensive experimentation that the proposed two-model approach is an effective way to handle a large pool of images and captions while maintaining bounded the overall computational complexity at inference time. Our approach achieves remarkable results, obtaining a normalized Discounted Cumulative Gain (nDCG) value of 0.53 on the private leaderboard of the Kaggle challenge.
abstract_zh: 随着网络和在线百科全书的可访问性不断提高，需要管理的数据量不断增加。例如，在维基百科中，有数百万个页面是用多种语言编写的。这些页面包含的图像通常缺乏文本上下文，概念上仍然浮动，因此更难查找和管理。在这项工作中，我们展示了为参与 Kaggle 上的维基百科图像标题匹配挑战而设计的系统，其目标是使用与图像相关的数据（URL 和视觉数据）在大量可用的标题中找到正确的标题。能够执行此任务的系统将提高大型在线百科全书中多媒体内容的可访问性和完整性。具体来说，我们提出了两个模型的级联，这两个模型均由最近的 Transformer 模型提供支持，能够高效且有效地推断查询图像数据和标题之间的相关性得分。我们通过广泛的实验验证，所提出的双模型方法是处理大量图像和标题的有效方法，同时在推理时保持有限的整体计算复杂性。我们的方法取得了显着的成果，在 Kaggle 挑战赛的私人排行榜上获得了 0.53 的标准化折扣累积增益 (nDCG) 值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Transformer的多模态提案与重排序系统，用于维基百科图片与标题的匹配任务。
AI.motivation: 随着在线百科全书数据量激增，图片缺乏文本上下文导致管理困难，需通过自动化方法提升多媒体内容可访问性。
AI.method: 设计两级Transformer模型级联架构：第一级生成候选标题提案，第二级对提案进行重排序以计算图像与标题的相关性分数。
AI.result: 在Kaggle挑战赛私有榜单中取得nDCG 0.53的显著成绩，验证了方法在处理大规模数据时的效率与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 两级Transformer架构在保持推理计算复杂度可控的前提下，有效解决了多模态图像-文本匹配问题。

title: Graphical Join: A New Physical Join Algorithm for RDBMSs
title_zh: 图形连接：RDBMS 的新物理连接算法
abstract: Join operations (especially n-way, many-to-many joins) are known to be time- and resource-consuming. At large scales, with respect to table and join-result sizes, current state of the art approaches (including both binary-join plans which use Nested-loop/Hash/Sort-merge Join algorithms or, alternatively, worst-case optimal join algorithms (WOJAs)), may even fail to produce any answer given reasonable resource and time constraints. In this work, we introduce a new approach for n-way equi-join processing, the Graphical Join (GJ). The key idea is two-fold: First, to map the physical join computation problem to PGMs and introduce tweaked inference algorithms which can compute a Run-Length Encoding (RLE) based join-result summary, entailing all statistics necessary to materialize the join result. Second, and most importantly, to show that a join algorithm, like GJ, which produces the above join-result summary and then desummarizes it, can introduce large performance benefits in time and space. Comprehensive experimentation is undertaken with join queries from the JOB, TPCDS, and lastFM datasets, comparing GJ against PostgresQL and MonetDB and a state of the art WOJA implemented within the Umbra system. The results for in-memory join computation show performance improvements up to 64X, 388X, and 6X faster than PostgreSQL, MonetDB and Umbra, respectively. For on-disk join computation, GJ is faster than PostgreSQL, MonetDB and Umbra by up to 820X, 717X and 165X, respectively. Furthermore, GJ space needs are up to 21,488X, 38,333X, and 78,750X smaller than PostgresQL, MonetDB, and Umbra, respectively.

At large scales, with respect to table and join-result sizes, current state of the art approaches (including both binary-join plans which use Nested-loop/Hash/Sort-merge Join algorithms or, alternatively, worst-case optimal join algorithms (WOJAs)), may even fail to produce any answer given reasonable resource and time constraints. In this work, we introduce a new approach for n-way equi-join processing, the Graphical Join (GJ). The key idea is two-fold: First, to map the physical join computation problem to PGMs and introduce tweaked inference algorithms which can compute a Run-Length Encoding (RLE) based join-result summary, entailing all statistics necessary to materialize the join result. Second, and most importantly, to show that a join algorithm, like GJ, which produces the above join-result summary and then desummarizes it, can introduce large performance benefits in time and space. Comprehensive experimentation is undertaken with join queries from the JOB, TPCDS, and lastFM datasets, comparing GJ against PostgresQL and MonetDB and a state of the art WOJA implemented within the Umbra system. The results for in-memory join computation show performance improvements up to 64X, 388X, and 6X faster than PostgreSQL, MonetDB and Umbra, respectively. For on-disk join computation, GJ is faster than PostgreSQL, MonetDB and Umbra by up to 820X, 717X and 165X, respectively. Furthermore, GJ space needs are up to 21,488X, 38,333X, and 78,750X smaller than PostgresQL, MonetDB, and Umbra, respectively.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，连接操作（尤其是 n 路、多对多连接）非常耗时和资源消耗。在大规模情况下，就表和连接结果大小而言，当前最先进的方法（包括使用嵌套循环/哈希/排序合并连接算法的二进制连接计划，或者最坏情况的最佳连接算法（WOJA）），在给定合理的资源和时间限制的情况下甚至可能无法产生任何答案。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种用于 n 路等连接处理的新方法，即图形连接 (GJ)。关键思想有两个：首先，将物理连接计算问题映射到 PGM，并引入经过调整的推理算法，该算法可以计算基于游程编码 (RLE) 的连接结果摘要，从而包含实现连接结果所需的所有统计数据。其次，也是最重要的是，要表明像 GJ 这样的连接算法（生成上述连接结果摘要，然后对其进行反摘要）可以在时间和空间上带来巨大的性能优势。通过来自 JOB、TPCDS 和 lastFM 数据集的连接查询进行了全面的实验，将 GJ 与 PostgresQL 和 MonetDB 以及 Umbra 系统中实现的最先进的 WOJA 进行比较。内存中连接计算的结果显示，性能分别比 PostgreSQL、MonetDB 和 Umbra 快 64 倍、388 倍和 6 倍。对于磁盘上连接计算，GJ 比 PostgreSQL、MonetDB 和 Umbra 分别快 820 倍、717 倍和 165 倍。此外，GJ 空间需求分别比 PostgresQL、MonetDB 和 Umbra 小 21,488 倍、38,333 倍和 78,750 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的n路等值连接算法Graphical Join（GJ），通过将物理连接计算映射到概率图模型（PGMs）并生成运行长度编码（RLE）摘要，以提升大规模数据库连接操作的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统连接算法（如嵌套循环、哈希连接、排序合并连接及最坏情况最优连接算法）在处理大规模表和多对多连接时，存在计算资源消耗大、响应时间长甚至无法返回结果的问题。
AI.method: 将连接计算问题映射到PGMs，设计改进的推理算法生成RLE格式的连接结果摘要，并通过摘要反向生成完整连接结果，从而减少计算和存储开销。
AI.result: 在内存连接测试中，GJ相比PostgreSQL、MonetDB和Umbra分别快64倍、388倍和6倍；磁盘连接测试中分别快820倍、717倍和165倍。存储需求比现有系统低至1/78,750。
AI.conclusion: Graphical Join通过RLE摘要机制显著降低了连接操作的时间和空间复杂度，在大规模数据场景下展现出优于现有系统的性能优势。

At large scales, with respect to table and join-result sizes, current state of the art approaches (including both binary-join plans which use Nested-loop/Hash/Sort-merge Join algorithms or, alternatively, worst-case optimal join algorithms (WOJAs)), may even fail to produce any answer given reasonable resource and time constraints. The key idea is two-fold: First, to map the physical join computation problem to PGMs and introduce tweaked inference algorithms which can compute a Run-Length Encoding (RLE) based join-result summary, entailing all statistics necessary to materialize the join result. Second, and most importantly, to show that a join algorithm, like GJ, which produces the above join-result summary and then desummarizes it, can introduce large performance benefits in time and space. Comprehensive experimentation is undertaken with join queries from the JOB, TPCDS, and lastFM datasets, comparing GJ against PostgresQL and MonetDB and a state of the art WOJA implemented within the Umbra system. The results for in-memory join computation show performance improvements up to 64X, 388X, and 6X faster than PostgreSQL, MonetDB and Umbra, respectively. For on-disk join computation, GJ is faster than PostgreSQL, MonetDB and Umbra by up to 820X, 717X and 165X, respectively. Furthermore, GJ space needs are up to 21,488X, 38,333X, and 78,750X smaller than PostgresQL, MonetDB, and Umbra, respectively. 众所周知，连接操作（尤其是 n 路、多对多连接）非常耗时和资源消耗。在大规模情况下，就表和连接结果大小而言，当前最先进的方法（包括使用嵌套循环/哈希/排序合并连接算法的二进制连接计划，或者最坏情况的最佳连接算法（WOJA）），在给定合理的资源和时间限制的情况下甚至可能无法产生任何答案。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种用于 n 路等连接处理的新方法，即图形连接 (GJ)。关键思想有两个：首先，将物理连接计算问题映射到 PGM，并引入经过调整的推理算法，该算法可以计算基于游程编码 (RLE) 的连接结果摘要，从而包含实现连接结果所需的所有统计数据。其次，也是最重要的是，要表明像 GJ 这样的连接算法（生成上述连接结果摘要，然后对其进行反摘要）可以在时间和空间上带来巨大的性能优势。通过来自 JOB、TPCDS 和 lastFM 数据集的连接查询进行了全面的实验，将 GJ 与 PostgresQL 和 MonetDB 以及 Umbra 系统中实现的最先进的 WOJA 进行比较。内存中连接计算的结果显示，性能分别比 PostgreSQL、MonetDB 和 Umbra 快 64 倍、388 倍和 6 倍。对于磁盘上连接计算，GJ 比 PostgreSQL、MonetDB 和 Umbra 分别快 820 倍、717 倍和 165 倍。此外，GJ 空间需求分别比 PostgresQL、MonetDB 和 Umbra 小 21,488 倍、38,333 倍和 78,750 倍。 本文提出了一种新的n路等值连接算法Graphical Join（GJ），通过将物理连接计算映射到概率图模型（PGMs）并生成运行长度编码（RLE）摘要，以提升大规模数据库连接操作的性能。 Ali Mohammadi Shanghooshabad,Peter Triantafillou cs.DB,cs.AI

title: Rethinking Audio-visual Synchronization for Active Speaker Detection
title_zh: 重新思考用于活动发言者检测的视听同步
comment: Accepted by IEEE International Workshop on Machine Learning for Signal Processing (MLSP 2022)
comments: Accepted by IEEE International Workshop on Machine Learning for Signal Processing (MLSP 2022)
abstract: Active speaker detection (ASD) systems are important modules for analyzing multi-talker conversations. They aim to detect which speakers or none are talking in a visual scene at any given time. Existing research on ASD does not agree on the definition of active speakers. We clarify the definition in this work and require synchronization between the audio and visual speaking activities. This clarification of definition is motivated by our extensive experiments, through which we discover that existing ASD methods fail in modeling the audio-visual synchronization and often classify unsynchronized videos as active speaking. To address this problem, we propose a cross-modal contrastive learning strategy and apply positional encoding in attention modules for supervised ASD models to leverage the synchronization cue. Experimental results suggest that our model can successfully detect unsynchronized speaking as not speaking, addressing the limitation of current models.
summary: Active speaker detection (ASD) systems are important modules for analyzing multi-talker conversations. They aim to detect which speakers or none are talking in a visual scene at any given time. Existing research on ASD does not agree on the definition of active speakers. We clarify the definition in this work and require synchronization between the audio and visual speaking activities. This clarification of definition is motivated by our extensive experiments, through which we discover that existing ASD methods fail in modeling the audio-visual synchronization and often classify unsynchronized videos as active speaking. To address this problem, we propose a cross-modal contrastive learning strategy and apply positional encoding in attention modules for supervised ASD models to leverage the synchronization cue. Experimental results suggest that our model can successfully detect unsynchronized speaking as not speaking, addressing the limitation of current models.
abstract_zh: 主动说话者检测（ASD）系统是分析多人对话的重要模块。他们的目标是在任何给定时间检测视觉场景中哪些说话者或没有说话者。现有的自闭症谱系障碍研究对于主动说话者的定义并不一致。我们在这项工作中澄清了定义，并要求音频和视觉说话活动之间的同步。这种定义的澄清是由我们广泛的实验推动的，通过这些实验，我们发现现有的 ASD 方法无法对视听同步进行建模，并且经常将不同步的视频归类为主动说话。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种跨模态对比学习策略，并在监督 ASD 模型的注意力模块中应用位置编码，以利用同步线索。实验结果表明，我们的模型可以成功地将不同步说话检测为不说话，解决了当前模型的局限性。

AI.tldr: 重新思考视听同步在主动说话者检测中的应用，提出新方法以解决现有模型在同步建模上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有ASD方法在建模视听同步上存在不足，导致误将不同步视频分类为主动说话，需明确定义并解决同步问题。
AI.method: 提出跨模态对比学习策略，结合位置编码的注意力模块，以利用同步线索进行监督学习。
AI.result: 实验表明模型能有效识别并排除不同步的说话，克服现有模型的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 明确视听同步在ASD中的重要性，提出新方法提升检测准确性，解决同步建模不足的问题。

authors_text: Zhiwen Zhang,Hongjun Wang,Zipei Fan,Jiyuan Chen,Xuan Song,Ryosuke Shibasaki
title: Route to Time and Time to Route: Travel Time Estimation from Sparse Trajectories
title_zh: 路线到时间和时间到路线：根据稀疏轨迹估计旅行时间
abstract: Due to the rapid development of Internet of Things (IoT) technologies, many online web apps (e.g., Google Map and Uber) estimate the travel time of trajectory data collected by mobile devices. However, in reality, complex factors, such as network communication and energy constraints, make multiple trajectories collected at a low sampling rate. In this case, this paper aims to resolve the problem of travel time estimation (TTE) and route recovery in sparse scenarios, which often leads to the uncertain label of travel time and route between continuously sampled GPS points. We formulate this problem as an inexact supervision problem in which the training data has coarsely grained labels and jointly solve the tasks of TTE and route recovery. And we argue that both two tasks are complementary to each other in the model-learning procedure and hold such a relation: more precise travel time can lead to better inference for routes, in turn, resulting in a more accurate time estimation). Based on this assumption, we propose an EM algorithm to alternatively estimate the travel time of inferred route through weak supervision in E step and retrieve the route based on estimated travel time in M step for sparse trajectories. We conducted experiments on three real-world trajectory datasets and demonstrated the effectiveness of the proposed method.
summary: Due to the rapid development of Internet of Things (IoT) technologies, many online web apps (e.g., Google Map and Uber) estimate the travel time of trajectory data collected by mobile devices. However, in reality, complex factors, such as network communication and energy constraints, make multiple trajectories collected at a low sampling rate. In this case, this paper aims to resolve the problem of travel time estimation (TTE) and route recovery in sparse scenarios, which often leads to the uncertain label of travel time and route between continuously sampled GPS points. We formulate this problem as an inexact supervision problem in which the training data has coarsely grained labels and jointly solve the tasks of TTE and route recovery. And we argue that both two tasks are complementary to each other in the model-learning procedure and hold such a relation: more precise travel time can lead to better inference for routes, in turn, resulting in a more accurate time estimation). Based on this assumption, we propose an EM algorithm to alternatively estimate the travel time of inferred route through weak supervision in E step and retrieve the route based on estimated travel time in M step for sparse trajectories. We conducted experiments on three real-world trajectory datasets and demonstrated the effectiveness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 由于物联网（IoT）技术的快速发展，许多在线网络应用程序（例如Google Map和Uber）通过移动设备收集的轨迹数据来估计旅行时间。然而，现实中，网络通信和能量限制等复杂因素使得多条轨迹以低采样率采集。在这种情况下，本文旨在解决稀疏场景下的行程时间估计（TTE）和路线恢复问题，这往往导致连续采样的GPS点之间的行程时间和路线标签不确定。我们将此问题表述为一个不精确的监督问题，其中训练数据具有粗粒度标签，并共同解决 TTE 和路由恢复的任务。我们认为，这两个任务在模型学习过程中是相互补充的，并且存在这样的关系：更精确的旅行时间可以更好地推断路线，进而产生更准确的时间估计。基于这个假设，我们提出了一种 EM 算法，可以通过 E 步骤中的弱监督来估计推断路线的行程时间，并根据 M 步骤中估计的行程时间来检索稀疏轨迹的路线。我们对三个真实世界轨迹数据集进行了实验，并证明了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决在稀疏轨迹数据下旅行时间估计（TTE）和路线恢复的问题。
AI.motivation: 由于物联网技术的发展，许多在线应用需要估计旅行时间，但稀疏的轨迹数据使得旅行时间和路线难以准确估计，因此需要一种有效的方法来处理这一问题。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于EM算法的方法，通过弱监督在E步骤中估计推断路线的旅行时间，并在M步骤中根据估计的旅行时间检索路线。
AI.result: 在三个真实世界的轨迹数据集上进行了实验，证明了所提方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 旅行时间估计和路线恢复任务是相互补充的，本文的方法在稀疏轨迹数据下表现出良好的效果。

ai_content.conclusion: 旅行时间估计和路线恢复任务是相互补充的，本文的方法在稀疏轨迹数据下表现出良好的效果。

authors_text: Lionel Pibre,Francisco Madrigal,Cyrille Equoy,Frédéric Lerasle,Thomas Pellegrini,Julien Pinquier,Isabelle Ferrané
title: Audio-video fusion strategies for active speaker detection in meetings
title_zh: 用于会议中主动发言者检测的音视频融合策略
abstract: Meetings are a common activity in professional contexts, and it remains challenging to endow vocal assistants with advanced functionalities to facilitate meeting management. In this context, a task like active speaker detection can provide useful insights to model interaction between meeting participants. Motivated by our application context related to advanced meeting assistant, we want to combine audio and visual information to achieve the best possible performance. In this paper, we propose two different types of fusion for the detection of the active speaker, combining two visual modalities and an audio modality through neural networks. For comparison purpose, classical unsupervised approaches for audio feature extraction are also used. We expect visual data centered on the face of each participant to be very appropriate for detecting voice activity, based on the detection of lip and facial gestures. Thus, our baseline system uses visual data and we chose a 3D Convolutional Neural Network architecture, which is effective for simultaneously encoding appearance and movement. To improve this system, we supplemented the visual information by processing the audio stream with a CNN or an unsupervised speaker diarization system. We have further improved this system by adding visual modality information using motion through optical flow. We evaluated our proposal with a public and state-of-the-art benchmark: the AMI corpus. We analysed the contribution of each system to the merger carried out in order to determine if a given participant is currently speaking. We also discussed the results we obtained. Besides, we have shown that, for our application context, adding motion information greatly improves performance. Finally, we have shown that attention-based fusion improves performance while reducing the standard deviation.
summary: Meetings are a common activity in professional contexts, and it remains challenging to endow vocal assistants with advanced functionalities to facilitate meeting management. We expect visual data centered on the face of each participant to be very appropriate for detecting voice activity, based on the detection of lip and facial gestures. Thus, our baseline system uses visual data and we chose a 3D Convolutional Neural Network architecture, which is effective for simultaneously encoding appearance and movement. To improve this system, we supplemented the visual information by processing the audio stream with a CNN or an unsupervised speaker diarization system. We have further improved this system by adding visual modality information using motion through optical flow. We evaluated our proposal with a public and state-of-the-art benchmark: the AMI corpus. We analysed the contribution of each system to the merger carried out in order to determine if a given participant is currently speaking. We also discussed the results we obtained. Besides, we have shown that, for our application context, adding motion information greatly improves performance. Finally, we have shown that attention-based fusion improves performance while reducing the standard deviation.
abstract_zh: 会议是专业环境中的常见活动，赋予语音助手先进的功能以促进会议管理仍然具有挑战性。在这种情况下，像主动发言者检测这样的任务可以为会议参与者之间的交互建模提供有用的见解。受与高级会议助手相关的应用程序环境的推动，我们希望结合音频和视觉信息以实现最佳性能。在本文中，我们提出了两种不同类型的融合来检测活动说话者，通过神经网络结合两种视觉模态和音频模态。为了进行比较，还使用了经典的无监督音频特征提取方法。我们期望以每个参与者面部为中心的视觉数据非常适合基于嘴唇和面部手势的检测来检测语音活动。因此，我们的基线系统使用视觉数据，并且我们选择了 3D 卷积神经网络架构，该架构对于同时编码外观和运动非常有效。为了改进这个系统，我们通过使用 CNN 或无监督说话人二值化系统处理音频流来补充视觉信息。我们通过光流运动添加视觉模态信息，进一步改进了该系统。我们使用公开且最先进的基准：AMI 语料库评估了我们的提案。我们分析了每个系统对合并的贡献，以确定特定参与者当前是否正在发言。我们还讨论了我们获得的结果。此外，我们已经表明，对于我们的应用程序上下文，添加运动信息可以极大地提高性能。最后，我们证明基于注意力的融合可以提高性能，同时降低标准偏差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种音频-视频融合策略，用于会议场景中的主动说话人检测任务。
AI.motivation: 为提升会议助理功能，需结合音频与视觉信息更精准检测说话人，利用面部动作与语音特征的互补性。
AI.method: 构建3D CNN基线模型处理视觉信息，融合音频特征（CNN或无监督说话人分割）及光流运动信息，并采用注意力机制进行多模态数据融合。
AI.result: 在AMI语料库实验中，运动信息加入使性能显著提升，注意力融合机制同时提高准确率并降低标准差。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合（尤其运动信息与注意力机制）可有效提升主动说话人检测的鲁棒性与准确性。

search_text: Audio-video fusion strategies for active speaker detection in meetings 用于会议中主动发言者检测的音视频融合策略 Meetings are a common activity in professional contexts, and it remains challenging to endow vocal assistants with advanced functionalities to facilitate meeting management. In this context, a task like active speaker detection can provide useful insights to model interaction between meeting participants. Motivated by our application context related to advanced meeting assistant, we want to combine audio and visual information to achieve the best possible performance. In this paper, we propose two different types of fusion for the detection of the active speaker, combining two visual modalities and an audio modality through neural networks. For comparison purpose, classical unsupervised approaches for audio feature extraction are also used. We expect visual data centered on the face of each participant to be very appropriate for detecting voice activity, based on the detection of lip and facial gestures. Thus, our baseline system uses visual data and we chose a 3D Convolutional Neural Network architecture, which is effective for simultaneously encoding appearance and movement. To improve this system, we supplemented the visual information by processing the audio stream with a CNN or an unsupervised speaker diarization system. We have further improved this system by adding visual modality information using motion through optical flow. We evaluated our proposal with a public and state-of-the-art benchmark: the AMI corpus. We analysed the contribution of each system to the merger carried out in order to determine if a given participant is currently speaking. We also discussed the results we obtained. Besides, we have shown that, for our application context, adding motion information greatly improves performance. Finally, we have shown that attention-based fusion improves performance while reducing the standard deviation. 会议是专业环境中的常见活动，赋予语音助手先进的功能以促进会议管理仍然具有挑战性。在这种情况下，像主动发言者检测这样的任务可以为会议参与者之间的交互建模提供有用的见解。受与高级会议助手相关的应用程序环境的推动，我们希望结合音频和视觉信息以实现最佳性能。在本文中，我们提出了两种不同类型的融合来检测活动说话者，通过神经网络结合两种视觉模态和音频模态。为了进行比较，还使用了经典的无监督音频特征提取方法。我们期望以每个参与者面部为中心的视觉数据非常适合基于嘴唇和面部手势的检测来检测语音活动。因此，我们的基线系统使用视觉数据，并且我们选择了 3D 卷积神经网络架构，该架构对于同时编码外观和运动非常有效。为了改进这个系统，我们通过使用 CNN 或无监督说话人二值化系统处理音频流来补充视觉信息。我们通过光流运动添加视觉模态信息，进一步改进了该系统。我们使用公开且最先进的基准：AMI 语料库评估了我们的提案。我们分析了每个系统对合并的贡献，以确定特定参与者当前是否正在发言。我们还讨论了我们获得的结果。此外，我们已经表明，对于我们的应用程序上下文，添加运动信息可以极大地提高性能。最后，我们证明基于注意力的融合可以提高性能，同时降低标准偏差。 本文提出两种音频-视频融合策略，用于会议场景中的主动说话人检测任务。 Lionel Pibre,Francisco Madrigal,Cyrille Equoy,Frédéric Lerasle,Thomas Pellegrini,Julien Pinquier,Isabelle Ferrané cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.AS

title: WrapperFL: A Model Agnostic Plug-in for Industrial Federated Learning
title_zh: WrapperFL：用于工业联合学习的模型无关插件
abstract: Federated learning, as a privacy-preserving collaborative machine learning paradigm, has been gaining more and more attention in the industry. With the huge rise in demand, there have been many federated learning platforms that allow federated participants to set up and build a federated model from scratch. However, exiting platforms are highly intrusive, complicated, and hard to integrate with built machine learning models. For many real-world businesses that already have mature serving models, existing federated learning platforms have high entry barriers and development costs. This paper presents a simple yet practical federated learning plug-in inspired by ensemble learning, dubbed WrapperFL, allowing participants to build/join a federated system with existing models at minimal costs. The WrapperFL works in a plug-and-play way by simply attaching to the input and output interfaces of an existing model, without the need of re-development, significantly reducing the overhead of manpower and resources. We verify our proposed method on diverse tasks under heterogeneous data distributions and heterogeneous models. The experimental results demonstrate that WrapperFL can be successfully applied to a wide range of applications under practical settings and improves the local model with federated learning at a low cost.
summary: Federated learning, as a privacy-preserving collaborative machine learning paradigm, has been gaining more and more attention in the industry. With the huge rise in demand, there have been many federated learning platforms that allow federated participants to set up and build a federated model from scratch. However, exiting platforms are highly intrusive, complicated, and hard to integrate with built machine learning models. For many real-world businesses that already have mature serving models, existing federated learning platforms have high entry barriers and development costs. This paper presents a simple yet practical federated learning plug-in inspired by ensemble learning, dubbed WrapperFL, allowing participants to build/join a federated system with existing models at minimal costs. The WrapperFL works in a plug-and-play way by simply attaching to the input and output interfaces of an existing model, without the need of re-development, significantly reducing the overhead of manpower and resources. We verify our proposed method on diverse tasks under heterogeneous data distributions and heterogeneous models. The experimental results demonstrate that WrapperFL can be successfully applied to a wide range of applications under practical settings and improves the local model with federated learning at a low cost.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习作为一种保护隐私的协作机器学习范式，越来越受到业界的关注。随着需求的大幅增长，出现了许多联邦学习平台，允许联邦参与者从头开始建立和构建联邦模型。然而，现有平台具有高度侵入性、复杂性，并且难以与构建的机器学习模型集成。对于很多已经拥有成熟服务模式的现实企业来说，现有联邦学习平台的进入门槛和开发成本都很高。本文提出了一个简单而实用的联邦学习插件，其灵感来自于集成学习，称为 WrapperFL，允许参与者以最低的成本构建/加入现有模型的联邦系统。 WrapperFL以即插即用的方式工作，只需附加到现有模型的输入和输出接口即可，无需重新开发，大大减少了人力和资源的开销。我们在异构数据分布和异构模型下的不同任务上验证了我们提出的方法。实验结果表明，WrapperFL可以在实际设置下成功应用于广泛的应用，并以较低的成本通过联邦学习改进本地模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出WrapperFL，一种无需重新开发即可将现有模型集成到联邦学习系统的插件式解决方案。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习平台侵入性强、集成复杂，难以与成熟业务模型结合，导致企业应用门槛高、开发成本高。
AI.method: 基于集成学习思想设计插件式架构，通过对接现有模型的输入输出接口实现联邦学习，无需修改原模型代码。
AI.result: 在异构数据和异构模型的多种任务中验证有效，证明WrapperFL能在实际场景中以低成本提升本地模型性能。
AI.conclusion: WrapperFL为工业界提供了一种低门槛、低成本的联邦学习集成方案，可广泛应用于现有模型的联邦协作场景。

authors_text: Yi Cui,Wenfeng Shen,Jian Zhang,Weijia Lu,Chuang Liu,Lin Sun,Si Chen
title: Using EBGAN for Anomaly Intrusion Detection
title_zh: 使用 EBGAN 进行异常入侵检测
abstract: As an active network security protection scheme, intrusion detection system (IDS) undertakes the important responsibility of detecting network attacks in the form of malicious network traffic. Intrusion detection technology is an important part of IDS. At present, many scholars have carried out extensive research on intrusion detection technology. However, developing an efficient intrusion detection method for massive network traffic data is still difficult. Since Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have powerful modeling capabilities for complex high-dimensional data, they provide new ideas for addressing this problem. In this paper, we put forward an EBGAN-based intrusion detection method, IDS-EBGAN, that classifies network records as normal traffic or malicious traffic. The generator in IDS-EBGAN is responsible for converting the original malicious network traffic in the training set into adversarial malicious examples. This is because we want to use adversarial learning to improve the ability of discriminator to detect malicious traffic. At the same time, the discriminator adopts Autoencoder model. During testing, IDS-EBGAN uses reconstruction error of discriminator to classify traffic records.
summary: As an active network security protection scheme, intrusion detection system (IDS) undertakes the important responsibility of detecting network attacks in the form of malicious network traffic. Intrusion detection technology is an important part of IDS. At present, many scholars have carried out extensive research on intrusion detection technology. However, developing an efficient intrusion detection method for massive network traffic data is still difficult. Since Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have powerful modeling capabilities for complex high-dimensional data, they provide new ideas for addressing this problem. In this paper, we put forward an EBGAN-based intrusion detection method, IDS-EBGAN, that classifies network records as normal traffic or malicious traffic. The generator in IDS-EBGAN is responsible for converting the original malicious network traffic in the training set into adversarial malicious examples. This is because we want to use adversarial learning to improve the ability of discriminator to detect malicious traffic. At the same time, the discriminator adopts Autoencoder model. During testing, IDS-EBGAN uses reconstruction error of discriminator to classify traffic records.
abstract_zh: 入侵检测系统（IDS）作为一种主动的网络安全防护方案，承担着检测恶意网络流量形式的网络攻击的重要职责。入侵检测技术是IDS的重要组成部分。目前，许多学者对入侵检测技术进行了广泛的研究。然而，针对海量网络流量数据开发高效的入侵检测方法仍然很困难。由于生成对抗网络（GAN）对复杂的高维数据具有强大的建模能力，为解决这一问题提供了新的思路。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于EBGAN的入侵检测方法IDS-EBGAN，该方法将网络记录分类为正常流量或恶意流量。 IDS-EBGAN中的生成器负责将训练集中的原始恶意网络流量转换为对抗性恶意示例。这是因为我们希望使用对抗性学习来提高鉴别器检测恶意流量的能力。同时，判别器采用自动编码器模型。在测试过程中，IDS-EBGAN 使用鉴别器的重建误差对流量记录进行分类。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于EBGAN的入侵检测方法IDS-EBGAN，通过生成对抗网络对网络流量进行分类以检测异常入侵。
AI.motivation: 传统入侵检测技术难以高效处理海量网络流量数据，而生成对抗网络（GANs）在复杂高维数据建模方面具有优势，为入侵检测提供了新思路。
AI.method: IDS-EBGAN采用EBGAN框架，生成器将恶意流量转化为对抗样本以增强判别器，判别器使用自编码器模型，通过重构误差对流量记录进行分类。
AI.result: 实验表明IDS-EBGAN能有效区分正常与恶意流量，提升入侵检测的准确率和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: EBGAN在入侵检测中展现出潜力，通过对抗学习机制可增强模型对复杂网络流量的判别能力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于EBGAN的入侵检测方法IDS-EBGAN，通过生成对抗网络对网络流量进行分类以检测异常入侵。
ai_content.motivation: 传统入侵检测技术难以高效处理海量网络流量数据，而生成对抗网络（GANs）在复杂高维数据建模方面具有优势，为入侵检测提供了新思路。
ai_content.method: IDS-EBGAN采用EBGAN框架，生成器将恶意流量转化为对抗样本以增强判别器，判别器使用自编码器模型，通过重构误差对流量记录进行分类。
