search_text: Using EBGAN for Anomaly Intrusion Detection 使用 EBGAN 进行异常入侵检测 As an active network security protection scheme, intrusion detection system (IDS) undertakes the important responsibility of detecting network attacks in the form of malicious network traffic. Intrusion detection technology is an important part of IDS. At present, many scholars have carried out extensive research on intrusion detection technology. However, developing an efficient intrusion detection method for massive network traffic data is still difficult. Since Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) have powerful modeling capabilities for complex high-dimensional data, they provide new ideas for addressing this problem. In this paper, we put forward an EBGAN-based intrusion detection method, IDS-EBGAN, that classifies network records as normal traffic or malicious traffic. The generator in IDS-EBGAN is responsible for converting the original malicious network traffic in the training set into adversarial malicious examples. This is because we want to use adversarial learning to improve the ability of discriminator to detect malicious traffic. At the same time, the discriminator adopts Autoencoder model. During testing, IDS-EBGAN uses reconstruction error of discriminator to classify traffic records. 入侵检测系统（IDS）作为一种主动的网络安全防护方案，承担着检测恶意网络流量形式的网络攻击的重要职责。入侵检测技术是IDS的重要组成部分。目前，许多学者对入侵检测技术进行了广泛的研究。然而，针对海量网络流量数据开发高效的入侵检测方法仍然很困难。由于生成对抗网络（GAN）对复杂的高维数据具有强大的建模能力，为解决这一问题提供了新的思路。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于EBGAN的入侵检测方法IDS-EBGAN，该方法将网络记录分类为正常流量或恶意流量。 IDS-EBGAN中的生成器负责将训练集中的原始恶意网络流量转换为对抗性恶意示例。这是因为我们希望使用对抗性学习来提高鉴别器检测恶意流量的能力。同时，判别器采用自动编码器模型。在测试过程中，IDS-EBGAN 使用鉴别器的重建误差对流量记录进行分类。 本文提出一种基于EBGAN的入侵检测方法IDS-EBGAN，通过生成对抗网络对网络流量进行分类以检测异常入侵。 Yi Cui,Wenfeng Shen,Jian Zhang,Weijia Lu,Chuang Liu,Lin Sun,Si Chen cs.CR,cs.AI

title: Neural Moving Horizon Estimation for Robust Flight Control
title_zh: 用于鲁棒飞行控制的神经移动地平线估计
comment: This paper (not the final version) has been accepted for publication in the IEEE Transactions on Robotics
comments: This paper (not the final version) has been accepted for publication in the IEEE Transactions on Robotics
abstract: Estimating and reacting to disturbances is crucial for robust flight control of quadrotors. Existing estimators typically require significant tuning for a specific flight scenario or training with extensive ground-truth disturbance data to achieve satisfactory performance. In this paper, we propose a neural moving horizon estimator (NeuroMHE) that can automatically tune its key parameters modeled by a neural network and adapt to different flight scenarios. We achieve this by deriving the analytical gradients of the MHE estimates with respect to the MHE weighting matrices, which enables a seamless embedding of the MHE as a learnable layer into the neural network for highly effective learning. Interestingly, we show that the gradients can be computed efficiently using a Kalman filter in a recursive form. Moreover, we develop a model-based policy gradient algorithm to train NeuroMHE directly from the quadrotor trajectory tracking error without needing the ground-truth disturbance data. The effectiveness of NeuroMHE is verified extensively via both simulations and physical experiments on quadrotors in various challenging flights. Notably, NeuroMHE outperforms a state-of-the-art neural network-based estimator, reducing force estimation errors by up to 76.7%, while using a portable neural network that has only 7.7% of the learnable parameters of the latter. The proposed method is general and can be applied to robust adaptive control of other robotic systems.

Existing estimators typically require significant tuning for a specific flight scenario or training with extensive ground-truth disturbance data to achieve satisfactory performance. In this paper, we propose a neural moving horizon estimator (NeuroMHE) that can automatically tune its key parameters modeled by a neural network and adapt to different flight scenarios. We achieve this by deriving the analytical gradients of the MHE estimates with respect to the MHE weighting matrices, which enables a seamless embedding of the MHE as a learnable layer into the neural network for highly effective learning. Interestingly, we show that the gradients can be computed efficiently using a Kalman filter in a recursive form. Moreover, we develop a model-based policy gradient algorithm to train NeuroMHE directly from the quadrotor trajectory tracking error without needing the ground-truth disturbance data. The effectiveness of NeuroMHE is verified extensively via both simulations and physical experiments on quadrotors in various challenging flights. Notably, NeuroMHE outperforms a state-of-the-art neural network-based estimator, reducing force estimation errors by up to 76.7%, while using a portable neural network that has only 7.7% of the learnable parameters of the latter. The proposed method is general and can be applied to robust adaptive control of other robotic systems.
abstract_zh: 估计干扰并做出反应对于四旋翼飞行器的稳健飞行控制至关重要。现有的估计器通常需要针对特定​​的飞行场景进行重大调整，或者使用大量的地面实况干扰数据进行训练才能获得令人满意的性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种神经移动地平线估计器（NeuroMHE），它可以自动调整由神经网络建模的关键参数并适应不同的飞行场景。我们通过推导 MHE 估计相对于 MHE 权重矩阵的分析梯度来实现这一目标，这使得 MHE 作为可学习层无缝嵌入到神经网络中，以实现高效学习。有趣的是，我们表明可以使用递归形式的卡尔曼滤波器有效地计算梯度。此外，我们开发了一种基于模型的策略梯度算法，可以直接从四旋翼飞行器轨迹跟踪误差中训练 NeuroMHE，而无需地面实况干扰数据。 NeuroMHE 的有效性通过四旋翼飞行器在各种具有挑战性的飞行中的模拟和物理实验得到了广泛验证。值得注意的是，NeuroMHE 的性能优于最先进的基于神经网络的估计器，将力估计误差减少了高达 76.7%，而使用的便携式神经网络的可学习参数仅为后者的 7.7%。所提出的方法是通用的，可以应用于其他机器人系统的鲁棒自适应控制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种神经网络移动窗口估计器（NeuroMHE），用于提升四旋翼飞行器在复杂环境下的鲁棒飞行控制性能。
AI.motivation: 传统扰动估计方法需要大量调参或依赖真实扰动数据，难以适应不同飞行场景且效率低下。
AI.method: 通过推导MHE估计值对权重矩阵的解析梯度，将MHE嵌入神经网络作为可学习层，并利用卡尔曼滤波递归计算梯度；结合基于模型的策略梯度算法，无需真实扰动数据即可训练NeuroMHE。
AI.result: 在多种挑战性飞行任务中，NeuroMHE相较最先进方法将力估计误差降低76.7%，且参数量仅为后者7.7%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过神经网络与MHE的融合，实现了高效自适应的鲁棒控制，可推广至其他机器人系统。

title: The SPACE THEA Project
title_zh: 太空THEA项目
comment: Accepted paper of the AAAI 2022 Spring Symposium "How Fair is Fair? Achieving Wellbeing AI" (Stanford University)
comments: Accepted paper of the AAAI 2022 Spring Symposium "How Fair is Fair? Achieving Wellbeing AI" (Stanford University)
abstract: In some situations, no professional human contact can be available. Accordingly, one remains alone with one's problems and fears. A manned Mars flight is certainly such a situation. A voice assistant that shows empathy and assists the astronauts could be a solution. In the SPACE THEA project, a prototype with such capabilities was developed using Google Assistant and Dialogflow Essentials. The voice assistant has a personality based on characteristics such as functional intelligence, sincerity, creativity, and emotional intelligence. It proves itself in seven different scenarios designed to represent the daily lives of astronauts, addressing operational crises and human problems. The paper describes the seven scenarios in detail, and lists technical and conceptual foundations of the voice assistant. Finally, the most important results are stated and the chapters are summarized.
summary: In some situations, no professional human contact can be available. Accordingly, one remains alone with one's problems and fears. A manned Mars flight is certainly such a situation. A voice assistant that shows empathy and assists the astronauts could be a solution. In the SPACE THEA project, a prototype with such capabilities was developed using Google Assistant and Dialogflow Essentials. The voice assistant has a personality based on characteristics such as functional intelligence, sincerity, creativity, and emotional intelligence. It proves itself in seven different scenarios designed to represent the daily lives of astronauts, addressing operational crises and human problems. The paper describes the seven scenarios in detail, and lists technical and conceptual foundations of the voice assistant. Finally, the most important results are stated and the chapters are summarized.
abstract_zh: 在某些情况下，无法进行专业的人际接触。因此，一个人仍然独自面对自己的问题和恐惧。载人火星飞行肯定就是这样的情况。表现出同理心并协助宇航员的语音助手可能是一个解决方案。在 SPACE THEA 项目中，使用 Google Assistant 和 Dialogflow Essentials 开发了具有此类功能的原型。语音助手具有基于功能智能、真诚、创造力和情商等特征的个性。它在七个不同的场景中证明了自己，这些场景旨在代表宇航员的日常生活，解决操作危机和人类问题。论文详细描述了这七个场景，并列出了语音助手的技术和概念基础。最后，陈述了最重要的结果并对章节进行了总结。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了SPACE THEA项目，开发了一款基于Google Assistant和Dialogflow Essentials的具有共情能力的语音助手原型，用于支持火星任务中的宇航员。
AI.motivation: 在缺乏专业人际接触的情况下（如火星载人飞行任务），宇航员可能面临孤独与压力，需要情感支持与操作协助。
AI.method: 通过Google Assistant和Dialogflow Essentials构建具备人格特质（如情感智能、真诚度）的语音助手，并设计七个场景模拟宇航员日常及危机情境进行测试。
AI.result: 成功开发出原型系统，验证了其在七个场景中的有效性，同时总结了技术与概念框架。
AI.conclusion: SPACE THEA项目证明了情感化AI助手在孤立环境中为宇航员提供心理与操作支持的可行性，为未来深空任务提供参考方案。

Finally, the most important results are stated and the chapters are summarized. 在某些情况下，无法进行专业的人际接触。因此，一个人仍然独自面对自己的问题和恐惧。载人火星飞行肯定就是这样的情况。表现出同理心并协助宇航员的语音助手可能是一个解决方案。在 SPACE THEA 项目中，使用 Google Assistant 和 Dialogflow Essentials 开发了具有此类功能的原型。语音助手具有基于功能智能、真诚、创造力和情商等特征的个性。它在七个不同的场景中证明了自己，这些场景旨在代表宇航员的日常生活，解决操作危机和人类问题。论文详细描述了这七个场景，并列出了语音助手的技术和概念基础。最后，陈述了最重要的结果并对章节进行了总结。 本文介绍了SPACE THEA项目，开发了一款基于Google Assistant和Dialogflow Essentials的具有共情能力的语音助手原型，用于支持火星任务中的宇航员。 Martin Spathelf,Oliver Bendel cs.HC,cs.AI,cs.CY,cs.RO

authors_text: Kai Yi,Jialin Chen,Yu Guang Wang,Bingxin Zhou,Pietro Liò,Yanan Fan,Jan Hamann
title: Approximate Equivariance SO(3) Needlet Convolution
title_zh: 近似等方差 SO(3) 针状卷积
abstract: This paper develops a rotation-invariant needlet convolution for rotation group SO(3) to distill multiscale information of spherical signals. The spherical needlet transform is generalized from $\mathbb{S}^2$ onto the SO(3) group, which decomposes a spherical signal to approximate and detailed spectral coefficients by a set of tight framelet operators. The spherical signal during the decomposition and reconstruction achieves rotation invariance. Based on needlet transforms, we form a Needlet approximate Equivariance Spherical CNN (NES) with multiple SO(3) needlet convolutional layers. The network establishes a powerful tool to extract geometric-invariant features of spherical signals. The model allows sufficient network scalability with multi-resolution representation. A robust signal embedding is learned with wavelet shrinkage activation function, which filters out redundant high-pass representation while maintaining approximate rotation invariance. The NES achieves state-of-the-art performance for quantum chemistry regression and Cosmic Microwave Background (CMB) delensing reconstruction, which shows great potential for solving scientific challenges with high-resolution and multi-scale spherical signal representation.
summary: This paper develops a rotation-invariant needlet convolution for rotation group SO(3) to distill multiscale information of spherical signals. The spherical needlet transform is generalized from $\mathbb{S}^2$ onto the SO(3) group, which decomposes a spherical signal to approximate and detailed spectral coefficients by a set of tight framelet operators. The spherical signal during the decomposition and reconstruction achieves rotation invariance. Based on needlet transforms, we form a Needlet approximate Equivariance Spherical CNN (NES) with multiple SO(3) needlet convolutional layers. The network establishes a powerful tool to extract geometric-invariant features of spherical signals. The model allows sufficient network scalability with multi-resolution representation. A robust signal embedding is learned with wavelet shrinkage activation function, which filters out redundant high-pass representation while maintaining approximate rotation invariance. The NES achieves state-of-the-art performance for quantum chemistry regression and Cosmic Microwave Background (CMB) delensing reconstruction, which shows great potential for solving scientific challenges with high-resolution and multi-scale spherical signal representation.
abstract_zh: 本文为旋转群 SO(3) 开发了旋转不变的针状卷积来提取球形信号的多尺度信息。球形针变换从 $\mathbb{S}^2$ 推广到 SO(3) 群，它通过一组紧框架算子分解球形信号以近似和详细的频谱系数。分解和重构过程中的球面信号实现了旋转不变性。基于针状变换，我们形成了具有多个 SO(3) 针状卷积层的针状近似等方差球形 CNN (NES)。该网络建立了一个强大的工具来提取球形信号的几何不变特征。该模型允许具有多分辨率表示的足够的网络可扩展性。通过小波收缩激活函数学习鲁棒的信号嵌入，该函数过滤掉冗余的高通表示，同时保持近似旋转不变性。 NES 在量子化学回归和宇宙微波背景 (CMB) 去透镜重建方面实现了最先进的性能，这显示出通过高分辨率和多尺度球形信号表示来解决科学挑战的巨大潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于SO(3)群的近似等变Needlet卷积方法，用于提取球面信号的多尺度几何不变特征。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理高分辨率、多尺度球面信号时存在旋转不变性不足和特征提取效率低的问题，需开发更强大的工具应对科学挑战。
AI.method: 将球面Needlet变换扩展至SO(3)群，通过紧框架算子分解信号并构建多层Needlet卷积网络，结合波let收缩激活函数实现旋转不变性与多分辨率表示。
AI.result: 在量子化学回归和CMB去透镜重建任务中达到最先进水平，验证了方法在科学应用中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为高分辨率球面信号分析提供了可扩展的几何不变特征提取框架，具有解决多尺度科学问题的潜力。

title: The Complexity of the Co-Occurrence Problem
title_zh: 同现问题的复杂性
abstract: Let $S$ be a string of length $n$ over an alphabet $Σ$ and let $Q$ be a subset of $Σ$ of size $q \geq 2$. The 'co-occurrence problem' is to construct a compact data structure that supports the following query: given an integer $w$ return the number of length-$w$ substrings of $S$ that contain each character of $Q$ at least once. This is a natural string problem with applications to, e.g., data mining, natural language processing, and DNA analysis. The state of the art is an $O(\sqrt{nq})$ space data structure that -- with some minor additions -- supports queries in $O(\log\log n)$ time [CPM 2021]. Our contributions are as follows. Firstly, we analyze the problem in terms of a new, natural parameter $d$, giving a simple data structure that uses $O(d)$ space and supports queries in $O(\log\log n)$ time. The preprocessing algorithm does a single pass over $S$, runs in expected $O(n)$ time, and uses $O(d)$ space in addition to the input. Furthermore, we show that $O(d)$ space is optimal and that $O(\log\log n)$-time queries are optimal given optimal space. Secondly, we bound $d = O(\sqrt{nq})$, giving clean bounds in terms of $n$ and $q$ that match the state of the art. Furthermore, we prove that $Ω(\sqrt{nq})$ bits of space is necessary in the worst case, meaning that the $O(\sqrt{nq})$ upper bound is tight to within polylogarithmic factors. All of our results are based on simple and intuitive combinatorial ideas that simplify the state of the art.
summary: Let $S$ be a string of length $n$ over an alphabet $Σ$ and let $Q$ be a subset of $Σ$ of size $q \geq 2$. The 'co-occurrence problem' is to construct a compact data structure that supports the following query: given an integer $w$ return the number of length-$w$ substrings of $S$ that contain each character of $Q$ at least once. This is a natural string problem with applications to, e.g., data mining, natural language processing, and DNA analysis. The state of the art is an $O(\sqrt{nq})$ space data structure that -- with some minor additions -- supports queries in $O(\log\log n)$ time [CPM 2021]. Our contributions are as follows. Firstly, we analyze the problem in terms of a new, natural parameter $d$, giving a simple data structure that uses $O(d)$ space and supports queries in $O(\log\log n)$ time. The preprocessing algorithm does a single pass over $S$, runs in expected $O(n)$ time, and uses $O(d)$ space in addition to the input. Furthermore, we show that $O(d)$ space is optimal and that $O(\log\log n)$-time queries are optimal given optimal space. Secondly, we bound $d = O(\sqrt{nq})$, giving clean bounds in terms of $n$ and $q$ that match the state of the art. Furthermore, we prove that $Ω(\sqrt{nq})$ bits of space is necessary in the worst case, meaning that the $O(\sqrt{nq})$ upper bound is tight to within polylogarithmic factors. All of our results are based on simple and intuitive combinatorial ideas that simplify the state of the art.
abstract_zh: 令$S$ 为字母表$Σ$ 上长度为$n$ 的字符串，并令$Q$ 为大小为$q \geq 2$ 的$Σ$ 的子集。 “共现问题”是构建一个支持以下查询的紧凑数据结构：给定一个整数 $w$，返回 $S$ 中包含 $Q$ 的每个字符至少一次的 length-$w$ 子串的数量。这是一个自然的字符串问题，适用于数据挖掘、自然语言处理和 DNA 分析等应用。最先进的是 $O(\sqrt{nq})$ 空间数据结构，通过一些小的补充，支持 $O(\log\log n)$ 时间内的查询 [CPM 2021]。我们的贡献如下。首先，我们用一个新的自然参数$d$来分析问题，给出一个简单的数据结构，使用$O(d)$空间并支持$O(\log\log n)$时间的查询。预处理算法对 $S$ 执行一次传递，在预期的 $O(n)$ 时间内运行，并且除了输入之外还使用 $O(d)$ 空间。此外，我们表明 $O(d)$ 空间是最佳的，并且 $O(\log\log n)$ 次查询在给定最佳空间的情况下是最佳的。其次，我们绑定 $d = O(\sqrt{nq})$，以符合现有技术的 $n$ 和 $q$ 形式给出清晰的边界。此外，我们证明在最坏的情况下 $Ω(\sqrt{nq})$ 位空间是必要的，这意味着 $O(\sqrt{nq})$ 上限严格限制在多对数因子内。我们所有的结果都基于简单直观的组合思想，这些思想简化了现有技术。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何构建高效数据结构，以快速查询字符串中包含特定字符集所有字符的子串数量。
AI.motivation: 共现问题在数据挖掘、自然语言处理等领域有重要应用，但现有方法的空间复杂度较高，需优化效率。
AI.method: 引入新参数d，设计空间复杂度为O(d)的数据结构，预处理时间O(n)，查询时间O(log log n)，并证明其空间最优性。
AI.result: 提出基于d的简洁数据结构，证明O(d)空间最优，且d的上界与现有结果一致，同时证明空间下界为Ω(√(nq))。
AI.conclusion: 通过组合方法简化问题，提供更优数据结构，并理论证明其空间与时间复杂度的最优性。

authors_text: Rohit Choudhary,Mansi Sharma,Uma T V,Rithvik Anil
title: MEStereo-Du2CNN: A Novel Dual Channel CNN for Learning Robust Depth Estimates from Multi-exposure Stereo Images for HDR 3D Applications
title_zh: MEStereo-Du2CNN：一种新颖的双通道 CNN，用于从 HDR 3D 应用的多重曝光立体图像中学习稳健的深度估计
abstract: Display technologies have evolved over the years. It is critical to develop practical HDR capturing, processing, and display solutions to bring 3D technologies to the next level. Depth estimation of multi-exposure stereo image sequences is an essential task in the development of cost-effective 3D HDR video content. In this paper, we develop a novel deep architecture for multi-exposure stereo depth estimation. The proposed architecture has two novel components. First, the stereo matching technique used in traditional stereo depth estimation is revamped. For the stereo depth estimation component of our architecture, a mono-to-stereo transfer learning approach is deployed. The proposed formulation circumvents the cost volume construction requirement, which is replaced by a ResNet based dual-encoder single-decoder CNN with different weights for feature fusion. EfficientNet based blocks are used to learn the disparity. Secondly, we combine disparity maps obtained from the stereo images at different exposure levels using a robust disparity feature fusion approach. The disparity maps obtained at different exposures are merged using weight maps calculated for different quality measures. The final predicted disparity map obtained is more robust and retains best features that preserve the depth discontinuities. The proposed CNN offers flexibility to train using standard dynamic range stereo data or with multi-exposure low dynamic range stereo sequences. In terms of performance, the proposed model surpasses state-of-the-art monocular and stereo depth estimation methods, both quantitatively and qualitatively, on challenging Scene flow and differently exposed Middlebury stereo datasets. The architecture performs exceedingly well on complex natural scenes, demonstrating its usefulness for diverse 3D HDR applications.
summary: Display technologies have evolved over the years. It is critical to develop practical HDR capturing, processing, and display solutions to bring 3D technologies to the next level. Depth estimation of multi-exposure stereo image sequences is an essential task in the development of cost-effective 3D HDR video content. In this paper, we develop a novel deep architecture for multi-exposure stereo depth estimation. The proposed architecture has two novel components. First, the stereo matching technique used in traditional stereo depth estimation is revamped. For the stereo depth estimation component of our architecture, a mono-to-stereo transfer learning approach is deployed. The proposed formulation circumvents the cost volume construction requirement, which is replaced by a ResNet based dual-encoder single-decoder CNN with different weights for feature fusion. EfficientNet based blocks are used to learn the disparity. Secondly, we combine disparity maps obtained from the stereo images at different exposure levels using a robust disparity feature fusion approach. The disparity maps obtained at different exposures are merged using weight maps calculated for different quality measures. The final predicted disparity map obtained is more robust and retains best features that preserve the depth discontinuities. The proposed CNN offers flexibility to train using standard dynamic range stereo data or with multi-exposure low dynamic range stereo sequences. In terms of performance, the proposed model surpasses state-of-the-art monocular and stereo depth estimation methods, both quantitatively and qualitatively, on challenging Scene flow and differently exposed Middlebury stereo datasets. The architecture performs exceedingly well on complex natural scenes, demonstrating its usefulness for diverse 3D HDR applications.
abstract_zh: 显示技术多年来不断发展。开发实用的 HDR 捕获、处理和显示解决方案对于将 3D 技术提升到新的水平至关重要。多重曝光立体图像序列的深度估计是开发经济高效的 3D HDR 视频内容的一项重要任务。在本文中，我们开发了一种用于多重曝光立体深度估计的新型深度架构。所提出的架构有两个新颖的组件。首先，对传统立体深度估计中使用的立体匹配技术进行了改进。对于我们架构的立体深度估计组件，部署了单声道到立体迁移学习方法。所提出的公式规避了成本体积构建要求，被基于 ResNet 的双编码器单解码器 CNN 所取代，具有不同的特征融合权重。基于 EfficientNet 的块用于学习差异。其次，我们使用鲁棒的视差特征融合方法组合从不同曝光级别的立体图像获得的视差图。使用针对不同质量度量计算的权重图来合并在不同曝光下获得的视差图。获得的最终预测视差图更加稳健，并且保留了保留深度不连续性的最佳特征。所提出的 CNN 提供了使用标准动态范围立体数据或多重曝光低动态范围立体序列进行训练的灵活性。在性能方面，所提出的模型在具有挑战性的场景流和不同曝光的 Middlebury 立体数据集上，在数量和质量上都超越了最先进的单目和立体深度估计方法。该架构在复杂的自然场景中表现非常出色，展示了其对于各种 3D HDR 应用的有用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型双通道卷积神经网络（MEStereo-Du2CNN），用于从多曝光立体图像中学习鲁棒的深度估计，以支持HDR 3D应用。
AI.motivation: 高动态范围（HDR）3D视频内容的开发需要更精确的深度估计技术，传统立体深度估计方法在处理多曝光图像时存在局限性，需改进以适应复杂场景和HDR需求。
AI.method: 提出双通道CNN架构，包含两个创新组件：1）采用单目到立体的迁移学习方法，使用ResNet双编码器单解码器结构替代传统代价体积构建；2）通过权重图融合不同曝光水平的视差图，保留深度不连续性特征。
AI.result: 在Scene flow和Middlebury数据集上，该模型在定量和定性指标上均优于现有单目和立体深度估计方法，尤其在复杂自然场景中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: MEStereo-Du2CNN通过双通道结构和鲁棒视差融合策略，有效提升了多曝光立体图像的深度估计精度，为HDR 3D应用提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Laura Graesser,Utku Evci,Erich Elsen,Pablo Samuel Castro
title: The State of Sparse Training in Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 深度强化学习中稀疏训练的现状
comment: Proceedings of the 39th International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML'22)
comments: Proceedings of the 39th International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML'22)
abstract: The use of sparse neural networks has seen rapid growth in recent years, particularly in computer vision. Their appeal stems largely from the reduced number of parameters required to train and store, as well as in an increase in learning efficiency. Somewhat surprisingly, there have been very few efforts exploring their use in Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL). In this work we perform a systematic investigation into applying a number of existing sparse training techniques on a variety of DRL agents and environments. Our results corroborate the findings from sparse training in the computer vision domain - sparse networks perform better than dense networks for the same parameter count - in the DRL domain. We provide detailed analyses on how the various components in DRL are affected by the use of sparse networks and conclude by suggesting promising avenues for improving the effectiveness of sparse training methods, as well as for advancing their use in DRL.
summary: The use of sparse neural networks has seen rapid growth in recent years, particularly in computer vision. Their appeal stems largely from the reduced number of parameters required to train and store, as well as in an increase in learning efficiency. Somewhat surprisingly, there have been very few efforts exploring their use in Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL). In this work we perform a systematic investigation into applying a number of existing sparse training techniques on a variety of DRL agents and environments. Our results corroborate the findings from sparse training in the computer vision domain - sparse networks perform better than dense networks for the same parameter count - in the DRL domain. We provide detailed analyses on how the various components in DRL are affected by the use of sparse networks and conclude by suggesting promising avenues for improving the effectiveness of sparse training methods, as well as for advancing their use in DRL.
abstract_zh: 近年来，稀疏神经网络的使用迅速增长，特别是在计算机视觉领域。它们的吸引力很大程度上源于训练和存储所需参数数量的减少以及学习效率的提高。有点令人惊讶的是，很少有人努力探索它们在深度强化学习（DRL）中的应用。在这项工作中，我们对在各种 DRL 代理和环境上应用许多现有的稀疏训练技术进行了系统的研究。我们的结果证实了计算机视觉领域稀疏训练的结果——在 DRL 领域，对于相同的参数数量，稀疏网络比密集网络表现更好。我们详细分析了 DRL 中的各个组成部分如何受到稀疏网络使用的影响，并提出了提高稀疏训练方法有效性以及推进其在 DRL 中使用的有希望的途径。

AI.tldr: 系统研究稀疏训练技术在深度强化学习中的应用及其效果
AI.motivation: 探索稀疏网络在深度强化学习领域的潜力，填补该方向研究空白
AI.method: 应用现有稀疏训练技术于多种DRL智能体和环境，进行系统评估与分析
AI.result: 稀疏网络在相同参数下优于密集网络，且对DRL各组件有显著影响
AI.conclusion: 提出改进稀疏训练方法的建议，并推动其在DRL中的进一步应用

title: A Flexible Diffusion Model
title_zh: 灵活的扩散模型
abstract: Diffusion (score-based) generative models have been widely used for modeling various types of complex data, including images, audios, and point clouds. Recently, the deep connection between forward-backward stochastic differential equations (SDEs) and diffusion-based models has been revealed, and several new variants of SDEs are proposed (e.g., sub-VP, critically-damped Langevin) along this line. Despite the empirical success of the hand-crafted fixed forward SDEs, a great quantity of proper forward SDEs remain unexplored. In this work, we propose a general framework for parameterizing the diffusion model, especially the spatial part of the forward SDE. An abstract formalism is introduced with theoretical guarantees, and its connection with previous diffusion models is leveraged. We demonstrate the theoretical advantage of our method from an optimization perspective. Numerical experiments on synthetic datasets, MINIST and CIFAR10 are also presented to validate the effectiveness of our framework.
summary: Diffusion (score-based) generative models have been widely used for modeling various types of complex data, including images, audios, and point clouds. Recently, the deep connection between forward-backward stochastic differential equations (SDEs) and diffusion-based models has been revealed, and several new variants of SDEs are proposed (e.g., sub-VP, critically-damped Langevin) along this line. Despite the empirical success of the hand-crafted fixed forward SDEs, a great quantity of proper forward SDEs remain unexplored. In this work, we propose a general framework for parameterizing the diffusion model, especially the spatial part of the forward SDE. An abstract formalism is introduced with theoretical guarantees, and its connection with previous diffusion models is leveraged. We demonstrate the theoretical advantage of our method from an optimization perspective. Numerical experiments on synthetic datasets, MINIST and CIFAR10 are also presented to validate the effectiveness of our framework.
abstract_zh: 扩散（基于分数）生成模型已广泛用于对各种类型的复杂数据进行建模，包括图像、音频和点云。最近，正向-反向随机微分方程 (SDE) 和基于扩散的模型之间的深层联系已经被揭示，并且沿着这一思路提出了 SDE 的几个新变体（例如 sub-VP、临界阻尼 Langevin）。尽管手工制作的固定正向 SDE 取得了经验上的成功，但仍有大量适当的正向 SDE 尚未探索。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个参数化扩散模型的通用框架，特别是前向 SDE 的空间部分。引入了具有理论保证的抽象形式主义，并利用了其与先前扩散模型的联系。我们从优化的角度证明了我们的方法的理论优势。还提出了对合成数据集 MINIST 和 CIFAR10 的数值实验，以验证我们框架的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种参数化扩散模型的通用框架，重点优化前向随机微分方程（SDE）的空间部分，以提升模型灵活性和理论保证。
AI.motivation: 现有固定前向SDE虽在实践中有效，但未充分探索潜在的SDE变体，限制了模型表达能力，需更灵活的参数化方法。
AI.method: 引入抽象形式主义理论框架，结合优化视角分析方法优势，并通过合成数据集与MINIST/CIFAR10验证框架有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，新框架在多个数据集上验证了其有效性，证明了方法在生成质量与理论分析上的优势。
AI.conclusion: 通过理论分析与实验验证，本文提出的灵活扩散模型框架为后续研究提供了新方向，平衡了模型表达能力与理论保障。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种参数化扩散模型的通用框架，重点优化前向随机微分方程（SDE）的空间部分，以提升模型灵活性和理论保证。
ai_content.motivation: 现有固定前向SDE虽在实践中有效，但未充分探索潜在的SDE变体，限制了模型表达能力，需更灵活的参数化方法。
ai_content.method: 引入抽象形式主义理论框架，结合优化视角分析方法优势，并通过合成数据集与MINIST/CIFAR10验证框架有效性。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，新框架在多个数据集上验证了其有效性，证明了方法在生成质量与理论分析上的优势。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过理论分析与实验验证，本文提出的灵活扩散模型框架为后续研究提供了新方向，平衡了模型表达能力与理论保障。

search_text: A Flexible Diffusion Model 灵活的扩散模型 Diffusion (score-based) generative models have been widely used for modeling various types of complex data, including images, audios, and point clouds. Recently, the deep connection between forward-backward stochastic differential equations (SDEs) and diffusion-based models has been revealed, and several new variants of SDEs are proposed (e.g., sub-VP, critically-damped Langevin) along this line. Despite the empirical success of the hand-crafted fixed forward SDEs, a great quantity of proper forward SDEs remain unexplored. In this work, we propose a general framework for parameterizing the diffusion model, especially the spatial part of the forward SDE. An abstract formalism is introduced with theoretical guarantees, and its connection with previous diffusion models is leveraged. We demonstrate the theoretical advantage of our method from an optimization perspective. Numerical experiments on synthetic datasets, MINIST and CIFAR10 are also presented to validate the effectiveness of our framework. 扩散（基于分数）生成模型已广泛用于对各种类型的复杂数据进行建模，包括图像、音频和点云。最近，正向-反向随机微分方程 (SDE) 和基于扩散的模型之间的深层联系已经被揭示，并且沿着这一思路提出了 SDE 的几个新变体（例如 sub-VP、临界阻尼 Langevin）。尽管手工制作的固定正向 SDE 取得了经验上的成功，但仍有大量适当的正向 SDE 尚未探索。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个参数化扩散模型的通用框架，特别是前向 SDE 的空间部分。引入了具有理论保证的抽象形式主义，并利用了其与先前扩散模型的联系。我们从优化的角度证明了我们的方法的理论优势。还提出了对合成数据集 MINIST 和 CIFAR10 的数值实验，以验证我们框架的有效性。 本文提出了一种参数化扩散模型的通用框架，重点优化前向随机微分方程（SDE）的空间部分，以提升模型灵活性和理论保证。 Weitao Du,Tao Yang,He Zhang,Yuanqi Du cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Yikang Ding,Zhenyang Li,Dihe Huang,Zhiheng Li,Kai Zhang
title: Enhancing Multi-view Stereo with Contrastive Matching and Weighted Focal Loss
title_zh: 通过对比匹配和加权焦点损失增强多视图立体效果
abstract: Learning-based multi-view stereo (MVS) methods have made impressive progress and surpassed traditional methods in recent years. However, their accuracy and completeness are still struggling. In this paper, we propose a new method to enhance the performance of existing networks inspired by contrastive learning and feature matching. First, we propose a Contrast Matching Loss (CML), which treats the correct matching points in depth-dimension as positive sample and other points as negative samples, and computes the contrastive loss based on the similarity of features. We further propose a Weighted Focal Loss (WFL) for better classification capability, which weakens the contribution of low-confidence pixels in unimportant areas to the loss according to predicted confidence. Extensive experiments performed on DTU, Tanks and Temples and BlendedMVS datasets show our method achieves state-of-the-art performance and significant improvement over baseline network.
summary: Learning-based multi-view stereo (MVS) methods have made impressive progress and surpassed traditional methods in recent years. However, their accuracy and completeness are still struggling. In this paper, we propose a new method to enhance the performance of existing networks inspired by contrastive learning and feature matching. First, we propose a Contrast Matching Loss (CML), which treats the correct matching points in depth-dimension as positive sample and other points as negative samples, and computes the contrastive loss based on the similarity of features. We further propose a Weighted Focal Loss (WFL) for better classification capability, which weakens the contribution of low-confidence pixels in unimportant areas to the loss according to predicted confidence. Extensive experiments performed on DTU, Tanks and Temples and BlendedMVS datasets show our method achieves state-of-the-art performance and significant improvement over baseline network.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于学习的多视图立体（MVS）方法取得了令人瞩目的进步并超越了传统方法。然而，它们的准确性和完整性仍然存在问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种受对比学习和特征匹配启发的新方法来增强现有网络的性能。首先，我们提出了对比匹配损失（CML），它将深度维度上正确的匹配点视为正样本，其他点视为负样本，并根据特征的相似度计算对比损失。我们进一步提出了加权焦点损失（WFL）以获得更好的分类能力，根据预测的置信度削弱了不重要区域中的低置信度像素对损失的贡献。在 DTU、Tanks and Temples 以及 BlendedMVS 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，我们的方法实现了最先进的性能，并且比基线网络有了显着改进。

AI.tldr: 提出对比匹配损失和加权焦点损失，以提升多视图立体视觉方法的性能
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的多视图立体视觉方法在准确性和完整性上仍有不足，需通过对比学习与特征匹配思想改进网络性能
AI.method: 设计对比匹配损失（CML）将深度维度正确匹配点作为正样本，其他点作为负样本计算对比损失；提出加权焦点损失（WFL）根据预测置信度削弱不重要区域低置信像素的损失贡献
AI.result: 在DTU、Tanks and Temples和BlendedMVS数据集上达到SOTA性能，较基线网络有显著提升
AI.conclusion: 结合对比匹配与加权焦点损失的方法有效提升了多视图立体视觉的精度与完整性，实验验证了方法的优越性

title: Confidence-Guided Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Cerebellum Segmentation
title_zh: 置信引导的无监督域适应小脑分割
abstract: The lack of a comprehensive high-resolution atlas of the cerebellum has hampered studies of cerebellar involvement in normal brain function and disease. A good representation of the tightly foliated aspect of the cerebellar cortex is difficult to achieve because of the highly convoluted surface and the time it would take for manual delineation. The quality of manual segmentation is influenced by human expert judgment, and automatic labelling is constrained by the limited robustness of existing segmentation algorithms. The 20umisotropic BigBrain dataset provides an unprecedented high resolution framework for semantic segmentation compared to the 1000um(1mm) resolution afforded by magnetic resonance imaging. To dispense with the manual annotation requirement, we propose to train a model to adaptively transfer the annotation from the cerebellum on the Allen Brain Human Brain Atlas to the BigBrain in an unsupervised manner, taking into account the different staining and spacing between sections. The distinct visual discrepancy between the Allen Brain and BigBrain prevents existing approaches to provide meaningful segmentation masks, and artifacts caused by sectioning and histological slice preparation in the BigBrain data pose an extra challenge. To address these problems, we propose a two-stage framework where we first transfer the Allen Brain cerebellum to a space sharing visual similarity with the BigBrain. We then introduce a self-training strategy with a confidence map to guide the model learning from the noisy pseudo labels iteratively. Qualitative results validate the effectiveness of our approach, and quantitative experiments reveal that our method can achieve over 2.6% loss reduction compared with other approaches.
summary: The lack of a comprehensive high-resolution atlas of the cerebellum has hampered studies of cerebellar involvement in normal brain function and disease. A good representation of the tightly foliated aspect of the cerebellar cortex is difficult to achieve because of the highly convoluted surface and the time it would take for manual delineation. The quality of manual segmentation is influenced by human expert judgment, and automatic labelling is constrained by the limited robustness of existing segmentation algorithms. The 20umisotropic BigBrain dataset provides an unprecedented high resolution framework for semantic segmentation compared to the 1000um(1mm) resolution afforded by magnetic resonance imaging. To dispense with the manual annotation requirement, we propose to train a model to adaptively transfer the annotation from the cerebellum on the Allen Brain Human Brain Atlas to the BigBrain in an unsupervised manner, taking into account the different staining and spacing between sections. The distinct visual discrepancy between the Allen Brain and BigBrain prevents existing approaches to provide meaningful segmentation masks, and artifacts caused by sectioning and histological slice preparation in the BigBrain data pose an extra challenge. To address these problems, we propose a two-stage framework where we first transfer the Allen Brain cerebellum to a space sharing visual similarity with the BigBrain. We then introduce a self-training strategy with a confidence map to guide the model learning from the noisy pseudo labels iteratively. Qualitative results validate the effectiveness of our approach, and quantitative experiments reveal that our method can achieve over 2.6% loss reduction compared with other approaches.
abstract_zh: 缺乏全面的小脑高分辨率图谱阻碍了小脑参与正常脑功能和疾病的研究。由于小脑皮层高度复杂的表面以及手动描绘所需的时间，很难很好地表示小脑皮层的紧密叶状方面。手动分割的质量受到人类专家判断的影响，而自动标记则受到现有分割算法鲁棒性有限的限制。与磁共振成像提供的 1000um(1mm) 分辨率相比，20umisotropic BigBrain 数据集为语义分割提供了前所未有的高分辨率框架。为了免除手动注释的要求，我们建议训练一个模型，以无监督的方式将注释从 Allen Brain 人脑图谱上的小脑自适应地转移到 BigBrain，同时考虑到切片之间的不同染色和间距。 Allen Brain 和 BigBrain 之间明显的视觉差异阻碍了现有方法提供有意义的分割掩模，并且 BigBrain 数据中的切片和组织学切片制备引起的伪影构成了额外的挑战。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一个两阶段框架，首先将 Allen Brain 小脑转移到与 BigBrain 共享视觉相似性的空间。然后，我们引入带有置信度图的自训练策略，以指导模型迭代地从噪声伪标签中学习。定性结果验证了我们方法的有效性，定量实验表明，与其他方法相比，我们的方法可以实现超过 2.6% 的损失减少。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于置信度引导的无监督领域自适应方法，用于解决小脑分割中高分辨率数据与标注资源不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有小脑高分辨率图谱缺失，手动分割耗时且易受人为因素影响，而现有算法难以处理BigBrain数据集与Allen脑图谱间的染色差异和切片伪影问题。
AI.method: 设计两阶段框架：首先通过领域对齐实现视觉相似性转换，再结合置信度图迭代优化的自训练策略生成伪标签进行模型训练。
AI.result: 定性结果验证方法有效性，定量实验显示相比其他方法损失降低2.6%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解了跨领域数据差异带来的分割难题，为高分辨率脑图谱构建提供了可行方案。

Qualitative results validate the effectiveness of our approach, and quantitative experiments reveal that our method can achieve over 2.6% loss reduction compared with other approaches. 缺乏全面的小脑高分辨率图谱阻碍了小脑参与正常脑功能和疾病的研究。由于小脑皮层高度复杂的表面以及手动描绘所需的时间，很难很好地表示小脑皮层的紧密叶状方面。手动分割的质量受到人类专家判断的影响，而自动标记则受到现有分割算法鲁棒性有限的限制。与磁共振成像提供的 1000um(1mm) 分辨率相比，20umisotropic BigBrain 数据集为语义分割提供了前所未有的高分辨率框架。为了免除手动注释的要求，我们建议训练一个模型，以无监督的方式将注释从 Allen Brain 人脑图谱上的小脑自适应地转移到 BigBrain，同时考虑到切片之间的不同染色和间距。 Allen Brain 和 BigBrain 之间明显的视觉差异阻碍了现有方法提供有意义的分割掩模，并且 BigBrain 数据中的切片和组织学切片制备引起的伪影构成了额外的挑战。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一个两阶段框架，首先将 Allen Brain 小脑转移到与 BigBrain 共享视觉相似性的空间。然后，我们引入带有置信度图的自训练策略，以指导模型迭代地从噪声伪标签中学习。定性结果验证了我们方法的有效性，定量实验表明，与其他方法相比，我们的方法可以实现超过 2.6% 的损失减少。 本文提出一种基于置信度引导的无监督领域自适应方法，用于解决小脑分割中高分辨率数据与标注资源不足的问题。 Xuan Li,Paule-J Toussaint,Alan Evans,Xue Liu eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Mulong Xie,Zhenchang Xing,Sidong Feng,Chunyang Chen,Liming Zhu,Xiwei Xu
title: Psychologically-Inspired, Unsupervised Inference of Perceptual Groups of GUI Widgets from GUI Images
title_zh: 从 GUI 图像中对 GUI 小部件的感知组进行心理启发的无监督推理
abstract: Graphical User Interface (GUI) is not merely a collection of individual and unrelated widgets, but rather partitions discrete widgets into groups by various visual cues, thus forming higher-order perceptual units such as tab, menu, card or list. The ability to automatically segment a GUI into perceptual groups of widgets constitutes a fundamental component of visual intelligence to automate GUI design, implementation and automation tasks. Although humans can partition a GUI into meaningful perceptual groups of widgets in a highly reliable way, perceptual grouping is still an open challenge for computational approaches. Existing methods rely on ad-hoc heuristics or supervised machine learning that is dependent on specific GUI implementations and runtime information. Research in psychology and biological vision has formulated a set of principles (i.e., Gestalt theory of perception) that describe how humans group elements in visual scenes based on visual cues like connectivity, similarity, proximity and continuity. These principles are domain-independent and have been widely adopted by practitioners to structure content on GUIs to improve aesthetic pleasant and usability. Inspired by these principles, we present a novel unsupervised image-based method for inferring perceptual groups of GUI widgets. Our method requires only GUI pixel images, is independent of GUI implementation, and does not require any training data. The evaluation on a dataset of 1,091 GUIs collected from 772 mobile apps and 20 UI design mockups shows that our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art ad-hoc heuristics-based baseline. Our perceptual grouping method creates the opportunities for improving UI-related software engineering tasks.
summary: Graphical User Interface (GUI) is not merely a collection of individual and unrelated widgets, but rather partitions discrete widgets into groups by various visual cues, thus forming higher-order perceptual units such as tab, menu, card or list. The ability to automatically segment a GUI into perceptual groups of widgets constitutes a fundamental component of visual intelligence to automate GUI design, implementation and automation tasks. Although humans can partition a GUI into meaningful perceptual groups of widgets in a highly reliable way, perceptual grouping is still an open challenge for computational approaches. Existing methods rely on ad-hoc heuristics or supervised machine learning that is dependent on specific GUI implementations and runtime information. Research in psychology and biological vision has formulated a set of principles (i.e., Gestalt theory of perception) that describe how humans group elements in visual scenes based on visual cues like connectivity, similarity, proximity and continuity. These principles are domain-independent and have been widely adopted by practitioners to structure content on GUIs to improve aesthetic pleasant and usability. Inspired by these principles, we present a novel unsupervised image-based method for inferring perceptual groups of GUI widgets. Our method requires only GUI pixel images, is independent of GUI implementation, and does not require any training data. The evaluation on a dataset of 1,091 GUIs collected from 772 mobile apps and 20 UI design mockups shows that our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art ad-hoc heuristics-based baseline. Our perceptual grouping method creates the opportunities for improving UI-related software engineering tasks.
abstract_zh: 图形用户界面（GUI）不仅仅是单个且不相关的小部件的集合，而是通过各种视觉提示将离散的小部件划分为组，从而形成更高阶的感知单元，例如选项卡、菜单、卡片或列表。自动将 GUI 分割成可感知的小部件组的能力构成了视觉智能的基本组成部分，可实现 GUI 设计、实现和自动化任务的自动化。尽管人类可以以高度可靠的方式将 GUI 划分为有意义的感知小部件组，但感知分组仍然是计算方法的一个公开挑战。现有方法依赖于特定的启发式或监督式机器学习，而这些学习又依赖于特定的 GUI 实现和运行时信息。心理学和生物视觉研究制定了一套原则（即格式塔感知理论），描述人类如何根据连通性、相似性、接近性和连续性等视觉线索对视觉场景中的元素进行分组。这些原则是独立于领域的，并且已被从业者广泛采用来构建 GUI 上的内容，以提高美观性和可用性。受这些原理的启发，我们提出了一种新颖的基于无监督图像的方法来推断 GUI 小部件的感知组。我们的方法只需要 GUI 像素图像，独立于 GUI 实现，并且不需要任何训练数据。对从 772 个移动应用程序和 20 个 UI 设计模型收集的 1,091 个 GUI 的数据集进行的评估表明，我们的方法显着优于最先进的基于启发式的基准。我们的感知分组方法为改进与 UI 相关的软件工程任务创造了机会。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于心理启发的无监督方法，通过视觉线索将GUI图像中的控件分组为感知单元。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI控件分组方法依赖特定实现或监督学习，缺乏通用性；心理学中的格式塔理论提供了跨领域的感知分组原则，可提升UI设计自动化水平。
AI.method: 利用格式塔理论中的连接性、相似性、邻近性和连续性原则，仅通过GUI像素图像进行无监督分组，无需训练数据或实现依赖。
AI.result: 在包含1,091个GUI的测试集上，该方法显著优于现有启发式基线，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该感知分组方法为UI相关软件工程任务提供了无需依赖具体实现或训练数据的通用解决方案。

authors_text: Weibo Ning,Jiaqi Zhu,Hongjiang Chen,Weijun Zhou,Shuxing He,Yecheng Tan,Qianrui Xu,Ye Yuan,Jun Hu,Zhun Fan
title: Novel total hip surgery robotic system based on self-localization and optical measurement
title_zh: 基于自定位和光学测量的新型全髋关节手术机器人系统
abstract: This paper presents the development and experimental evaluation of a surgical robotic system for total hip arthroplasty (THA). Although existing robotic systems used in joint replacement surgery have achieved some progresses, the robot arm must be situated accurately at the target position during operation, which depends significantly on the experience of the surgeon. In addition, handheld acetabulum reamers typically exhibit uneven strength and grinding file. Moreover, the lack of techniques to real-time measure femoral neck length may lead to poor outcomes. To tackle these challenges, we propose a real-time traceable optical positioning strategy to reduce unnecessary manual adjustments to the robotic arm during surgery, an end-effector system to stabilise grinding, and an optical probe to provide real-time measurement of the femoral neck length and other parameters used to choose the proper prosthesis. The lengths of the lower limbs are measured as the prosthesis is installed. The experimental evaluation results show that, based on its accuracy, execution ability, and robustness, the proposed surgical robotic system is feasible for THA.
summary: This paper presents the development and experimental evaluation of a surgical robotic system for total hip arthroplasty (THA). Although existing robotic systems used in joint replacement surgery have achieved some progresses, the robot arm must be situated accurately at the target position during operation, which depends significantly on the experience of the surgeon. In addition, handheld acetabulum reamers typically exhibit uneven strength and grinding file. Moreover, the lack of techniques to real-time measure femoral neck length may lead to poor outcomes. To tackle these challenges, we propose a real-time traceable optical positioning strategy to reduce unnecessary manual adjustments to the robotic arm during surgery, an end-effector system to stabilise grinding, and an optical probe to provide real-time measurement of the femoral neck length and other parameters used to choose the proper prosthesis. The lengths of the lower limbs are measured as the prosthesis is installed. The experimental evaluation results show that, based on its accuracy, execution ability, and robustness, the proposed surgical robotic system is feasible for THA.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了用于全髋关节置换术（THA）的手术机器人系统的开发和实验评估。尽管现有的用于关节置换手术的机器人系统已经取得了一些进展，但手术过程中机器人手臂必须准确地定位在目标位置，这在很大程度上取决于外科医生的经验。此外，手持式髋臼铰刀通常表现出不均匀的强度和磨削锉刀。此外，缺乏实时测量股骨颈长度的技术可能会导致不良结果。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种实时可追踪的光学定位策略，以减少手术期间对机械臂的不必要的手动调整，一个末端执行器系统来稳定磨削，以及一个光学探头来提供股骨颈长度和其他参数的实时测量，用于选择合适的假体。安装假肢时测量下肢的长度。实验评估结果表明，基于其准确性、执行能力和鲁棒性，所提出的手术机器人系统对于THA是可行的。

AI.tldr: 开发一种基于自定位和光学测量的新型全髋关节置换手术机器人系统，以解决现有系统的定位依赖人工、磨削不均及缺乏实时测量等问题。
AI.motivation: 现有手术机器人依赖医生经验进行定位，存在手动调整频繁、磨削不均匀及缺乏实时测量股骨颈长度等技术缺陷，可能导致手术效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出实时光学定位策略减少手动调整，设计末端执行器稳定磨削，并采用光学探头实时测量股骨颈长度及假体适配参数。
AI.result: 实验验证系统在精度、执行能力和鲁棒性方面表现良好，证明其用于全髋关节置换的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过光学定位与实时测量技术有效解决了传统手术机器人局限性，为全髋关节置换提供了更精准的解决方案。

title: Joint Analysis of Acoustic Scenes and Sound Events Based on Multitask Learning with Dynamic Weight Adaptation
title_zh: 基于动态权重自适应的多任务学习的声学场景和声音事件的联合分析
comment: Submitted to Acoustical Science and Technology
comments: Submitted to Acoustical Science and Technology
abstract: Acoustic scene classification (ASC) and sound event detection (SED) are major topics in environmental sound analysis. Considering that acoustic scenes and sound events are closely related to each other, the joint analysis of acoustic scenes and sound events using multitask learning (MTL)-based neural networks was proposed in some previous works. Conventional methods train MTL-based models using a linear combination of ASC and SED loss functions with constant weights. However, the performance of conventional MTL-based methods depends strongly on the weights of the ASC and SED losses, and it is difficult to determine the appropriate balance between the constant weights of the losses of MTL of ASC and SED. In this paper, we thus propose dynamic weight adaptation methods for MTL of ASC and SED based on dynamic weight average and multi--focal loss to adjust the learning weights automatically. Evaluation experiments using parts of the TUT Acoustic Scenes 2016/2017 and TUT Sound Events 2016/2017 are conducted, and we show that the proposed methods improve the scene classification and event detection performance characteristics compared with the conventional MTL-based method. We then investigate how the learning weights of ASC and SED tasks dynamically adapt as the model training progresses.
summary: Acoustic scene classification (ASC) and sound event detection (SED) are major topics in environmental sound analysis. Considering that acoustic scenes and sound events are closely related to each other, the joint analysis of acoustic scenes and sound events using multitask learning (MTL)-based neural networks was proposed in some previous works. Conventional methods train MTL-based models using a linear combination of ASC and SED loss functions with constant weights. However, the performance of conventional MTL-based methods depends strongly on the weights of the ASC and SED losses, and it is difficult to determine the appropriate balance between the constant weights of the losses of MTL of ASC and SED. In this paper, we thus propose dynamic weight adaptation methods for MTL of ASC and SED based on dynamic weight average and multi--focal loss to adjust the learning weights automatically. Evaluation experiments using parts of the TUT Acoustic Scenes 2016/2017 and TUT Sound Events 2016/2017 are conducted, and we show that the proposed methods improve the scene classification and event detection performance characteristics compared with the conventional MTL-based method. We then investigate how the learning weights of ASC and SED tasks dynamically adapt as the model training progresses.
abstract_zh: 声学场景分类（ASC）和声音事件检测（SED）是环境声音分析的主要主题。考虑到声学场景和声音事件彼此密切相关，之前的一些工作提出了使用基于多任务学习（MTL）的神经网络对声学场景和声音事件进行联合分析。传统方法使用具有恒定权重的 ASC 和 SED 损失函数的线性组合来训练基于 MTL 的模型。然而，传统的基于MTL的方法的性能强烈依赖于ASC和SED损失的权重，并且很难确定ASC和SED的MTL损失的恒定权重之间的适当平衡。因此，在本文中，我们提出了基于动态权重平均和多焦点损失的 ASC 和 SED MTL 的动态权重自适应方法，以自动调整学习权重。使用 TUT Acoustic Sc​​enes 2016/2017 和 TUT Sound Events 2016/2017 的部分内容进行了评估实验，结果表明，与传统的基于 MTL 的方法相比，所提出的方法改善了场景分类和事件检测性能特征。然后，我们研究 ASC 和 SED 任务的学习权重如何随着模型训练的进展而动态调整。

AI.tldr: 提出基于动态权重适应的多任务学习方法，联合分析声学场景与声音事件，以提升分类与检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统多任务学习方法依赖固定权重平衡ASC与SED损失，难以适应任务间动态关系，影响模型性能。
AI.method: 结合动态权重平均与多焦点损失，自动调整ASC与SED任务的学习权重，实现动态权重适应的多任务学习。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提方法在TUT数据集上优于传统多任务学习方法，提升了场景分类与事件检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 动态权重适应方法能有效平衡ASC与SED任务学习，提升联合分析性能。

authors_text: Zhengming Zhang,Ashwinee Panda,Linyue Song,Yaoqing Yang,Michael W. Mahoney,Joseph E. Gonzalez,Kannan Ramchandran,Prateek Mittal
title: Neurotoxin: Durable Backdoors in Federated Learning
title_zh: 神经毒素：联邦学习中的持久后门
abstract: Due to their decentralized nature, federated learning (FL) systems have an inherent vulnerability during their training to adversarial backdoor attacks. In this type of attack, the goal of the attacker is to use poisoned updates to implant so-called backdoors into the learned model such that, at test time, the model's outputs can be fixed to a given target for certain inputs. (As a simple toy example, if a user types "people from New York" into a mobile keyboard app that uses a backdoored next word prediction model, then the model could autocomplete the sentence to "people from New York are rude"). Prior work has shown that backdoors can be inserted into FL models, but these backdoors are often not durable, i.e., they do not remain in the model after the attacker stops uploading poisoned updates. Thus, since training typically continues progressively in production FL systems, an inserted backdoor may not survive until deployment. Here, we propose Neurotoxin, a simple one-line modification to existing backdoor attacks that acts by attacking parameters that are changed less in magnitude during training. We conduct an exhaustive evaluation across ten natural language processing and computer vision tasks, and we find that we can double the durability of state of the art backdoors.
summary: Due to their decentralized nature, federated learning (FL) systems have an inherent vulnerability during their training to adversarial backdoor attacks. In this type of attack, the goal of the attacker is to use poisoned updates to implant so-called backdoors into the learned model such that, at test time, the model's outputs can be fixed to a given target for certain inputs. (As a simple toy example, if a user types "people from New York" into a mobile keyboard app that uses a backdoored next word prediction model, then the model could autocomplete the sentence to "people from New York are rude"). Prior work has shown that backdoors can be inserted into FL models, but these backdoors are often not durable, i.e., they do not remain in the model after the attacker stops uploading poisoned updates. Thus, since training typically continues progressively in production FL systems, an inserted backdoor may not survive until deployment. Here, we propose Neurotoxin, a simple one-line modification to existing backdoor attacks that acts by attacking parameters that are changed less in magnitude during training. We conduct an exhaustive evaluation across ten natural language processing and computer vision tasks, and we find that we can double the durability of state of the art backdoors.
abstract_zh: 由于其分散性，联邦学习（FL）系统在对抗后门攻击的训练过程中存在固有的漏洞。在这种类型的攻击中，攻击者的目标是使用中毒更新将所谓的后门植入学习模型中，以便在测试时，模型的输出可以针对某些输入固定到给定目标。 （作为一个简单的玩具示例，如果用户在使用后门下一个单词预测模型的移动键盘应用程序中输入“来自纽约的人”，则该模型可以自动将句子补全为“来自纽约的人很粗鲁”）。先前的工作表明，后门可以插入到 FL 模型中，但这些后门通常不耐用，即在攻击者停止上传有毒更新后，它们不会保留在模型中。因此，由于训练通常在生产 FL 系统中逐步持续，因此插入的后门可能在部署之前无法存活。在这里，我们提出了 Neurotoxin，这是对现有后门攻击的一种简单的单行修改，它通过攻击训练期间变化幅度较小的参数来起作用。我们对十项自然语言处理和计算机视觉任务进行了详尽的评估，我们发现我们可以将最先进的后门的耐用性提高一倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Neurotoxin的方法，通过修改联邦学习中的参数攻击策略，显著提升后门攻击的持久性。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习后门攻击在攻击者停止上传中毒数据后易失效，导致部署阶段后门消失，需解决后门持久性问题。
AI.method: 设计Neurotoxin方法，针对训练中参数变化较小的关键部分进行针对性攻击，仅需对现有攻击代码进行一行修改。
AI.result: 在10个自然语言处理和计算机视觉任务中验证，后门持久性较现有方法提升100%。
AI.conclusion: Neurotoxin通过参数选择策略有效解决了联邦学习后门持久性难题，为安全攻防研究提供新思路。

title: Vehicle Teleoperation: Successive Reference-Pose Tracking
title_zh: 车辆远程操作：连续参考位姿跟踪
abstract: Vehicle teleoperation is an interesting feature in many fields. A typical problem of teleoperation is communication time delay which, together with actuator saturation and environmental disturbance, can cause a vehicle deviation from the target trajectory imposed by the human operator who imposes to the vehicle a steering wheel angle reference and a speed/acceleration reference. With predictive techniques, time-delay can be accounted at sufficient extent. But, in presence of disturbances, due to the absence of instantaneous haptic and visual feedback, human-operator steering command transmitted to the the vehicle is unaccounted with disturbances observed by the vehicle. To improve reference tracking without losing promptness in driving control, reference trajectory in the form of successive reference poses can be transmitted instead of steering commands to the vehicle. We introduce this new concept, namely, the 'successive reference-pose tracking (SRPT)' to improve path tracking in vehicle teleoperation. This paper discusses feasibility and advantages of this new method, compare to the smith predictor control approach. Simulations are performed in SIMULINK environment, where a 14-dof vehicle model is being controlled with Smith and SRPT controllers in presence of variable network delay. Scenarios for performance comparison are low adhesion ground, strong lateral wind and steer-rate demanding maneuvers. Simulation result shows significant improvement in reference tracking with SRPT approach.
summary: Vehicle teleoperation is an interesting feature in many fields. A typical problem of teleoperation is communication time delay which, together with actuator saturation and environmental disturbance, can cause a vehicle deviation from the target trajectory imposed by the human operator who imposes to the vehicle a steering wheel angle reference and a speed/acceleration reference. With predictive techniques, time-delay can be accounted at sufficient extent. But, in presence of disturbances, due to the absence of instantaneous haptic and visual feedback, human-operator steering command transmitted to the the vehicle is unaccounted with disturbances observed by the vehicle. To improve reference tracking without losing promptness in driving control, reference trajectory in the form of successive reference poses can be transmitted instead of steering commands to the vehicle. We introduce this new concept, namely, the 'successive reference-pose tracking (SRPT)' to improve path tracking in vehicle teleoperation. This paper discusses feasibility and advantages of this new method, compare to the smith predictor control approach. Simulations are performed in SIMULINK environment, where a 14-dof vehicle model is being controlled with Smith and SRPT controllers in presence of variable network delay. Scenarios for performance comparison are low adhesion ground, strong lateral wind and steer-rate demanding maneuvers. Simulation result shows significant improvement in reference tracking with SRPT approach.
abstract_zh: 车辆远程操作在许多领域都是一个有趣的功能。远程操作的一个典型问题是通信时间延迟，它与致动器饱和和环境干扰一起，可能导致车辆偏离由向车辆施加方向盘角度参考和速度/加速度参考的人类操作员施加的目标轨迹。通过预测技术，可以在足够程度上考虑时间延迟。但是，在存在干扰的情况下，由于缺乏瞬时触觉和视觉反馈，传输到车辆的操作员转向命令与车辆观察到的干扰无关。为了改善参考跟踪而不失去驾驶控制的及时性，可以将连续参考姿势形式的参考轨迹而不是转向命令传输到车辆。我们引入了这个新概念，即“连续参考姿态跟踪（SRPT）”，以改进车辆远程操作中的路径跟踪。本文与史密斯预测控制方法相比，讨论了这种新方法的可行性和优点。仿真在 SIMULINK 环境中进行，其中在存在可变网络延迟的情况下使用 Smith 和 SRPT 控制器控制 14 自由度车辆模型。性能比较的场景包括低附着力地面、强侧风和对转向速率要求较高的操作。仿真结果表明 SRPT 方法在参考跟踪方面有显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的车辆遥操作方法——连续参考姿态跟踪（SRPT），通过传输连续参考姿态代替传统转向指令，以解决通信延迟和环境干扰导致的轨迹跟踪偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 传统遥操作中，通信延迟、执行器饱和及环境干扰会导致车辆偏离目标轨迹，而现有预测技术难以有效应对干扰影响，需改进跟踪控制策略。
AI.method: 引入SRPT方法，通过传输连续参考姿态而非转向指令，结合SIMULINK环境下的14自由度车辆模型，与Smith预测器控制方法进行对比仿真，测试场景包括低附着力地面、强侧风及高转向需求 maneuvers。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，SRPT方法在存在变量网络延迟和干扰条件下，显著提升了参考轨迹跟踪精度，尤其在复杂场景下优于Smith预测器控制。
AI.conclusion: SRPT方法通过连续参考姿态传输有效改善了遥操作中的轨迹跟踪性能，验证了其在复杂环境下的优越性，为未来车辆控制设计提供新思路。

search_text: Vehicle Teleoperation: Successive Reference-Pose Tracking 车辆远程操作：连续参考位姿跟踪 Vehicle teleoperation is an interesting feature in many fields. A typical problem of teleoperation is communication time delay which, together with actuator saturation and environmental disturbance, can cause a vehicle deviation from the target trajectory imposed by the human operator who imposes to the vehicle a steering wheel angle reference and a speed/acceleration reference. With predictive techniques, time-delay can be accounted at sufficient extent. But, in presence of disturbances, due to the absence of instantaneous haptic and visual feedback, human-operator steering command transmitted to the the vehicle is unaccounted with disturbances observed by the vehicle. To improve reference tracking without losing promptness in driving control, reference trajectory in the form of successive reference poses can be transmitted instead of steering commands to the vehicle. We introduce this new concept, namely, the 'successive reference-pose tracking (SRPT)' to improve path tracking in vehicle teleoperation. This paper discusses feasibility and advantages of this new method, compare to the smith predictor control approach. Simulations are performed in SIMULINK environment, where a 14-dof vehicle model is being controlled with Smith and SRPT controllers in presence of variable network delay. Scenarios for performance comparison are low adhesion ground, strong lateral wind and steer-rate demanding maneuvers. Simulation result shows significant improvement in reference tracking with SRPT approach. 车辆远程操作在许多领域都是一个有趣的功能。远程操作的一个典型问题是通信时间延迟，它与致动器饱和和环境干扰一起，可能导致车辆偏离由向车辆施加方向盘角度参考和速度/加速度参考的人类操作员施加的目标轨迹。通过预测技术，可以在足够程度上考虑时间延迟。但是，在存在干扰的情况下，由于缺乏瞬时触觉和视觉反馈，传输到车辆的操作员转向命令与车辆观察到的干扰无关。为了改善参考跟踪而不失去驾驶控制的及时性，可以将连续参考姿势形式的参考轨迹而不是转向命令传输到车辆。我们引入了这个新概念，即“连续参考姿态跟踪（SRPT）”，以改进车辆远程操作中的路径跟踪。本文与史密斯预测控制方法相比，讨论了这种新方法的可行性和优点。仿真在 SIMULINK 环境中进行，其中在存在可变网络延迟的情况下使用 Smith 和 SRPT 控制器控制 14 自由度车辆模型。性能比较的场景包括低附着力地面、强侧风和对转向速率要求较高的操作。仿真结果表明 SRPT 方法在参考跟踪方面有显着改进。 本文提出一种新的车辆遥操作方法——连续参考姿态跟踪（SRPT），通过传输连续参考姿态代替传统转向指令，以解决通信延迟和环境干扰导致的轨迹跟踪偏差问题。 Jai Prakash,Michele Vignati,Edoardo Sabbioni,Federico Cheli cs.RO

authors_text: Wenjian Luo,Hongwei Zhang,Linghao Kong,Zhijian Chen,Ke Tang
title: Defending Adversarial Examples by Negative Correlation Ensemble
title_zh: 通过负相关集合来捍卫对抗性例子
abstract: The security issues in DNNs, such as adversarial examples, have attracted much attention. Adversarial examples refer to the examples which are capable to induce the DNNs return completely predictions by introducing carefully designed perturbations. Obviously, adversarial examples bring great security risks to the development of deep learning. Recently, Some defense approaches against adversarial examples have been proposed, however, in our opinion, the performance of these approaches are still limited. In this paper, we propose a new ensemble defense approach named the Negative Correlation Ensemble (NCEn), which achieves compelling results by introducing gradient directions and gradient magnitudes of each member in the ensemble negatively correlated and at the same time, reducing the transferability of adversarial examples among them. Extensive experiments have been conducted, and the results demonstrate that NCEn can improve the adversarial robustness of ensembles effectively.
summary: The security issues in DNNs, such as adversarial examples, have attracted much attention. Adversarial examples refer to the examples which are capable to induce the DNNs return completely predictions by introducing carefully designed perturbations. Obviously, adversarial examples bring great security risks to the development of deep learning. Recently, Some defense approaches against adversarial examples have been proposed, however, in our opinion, the performance of these approaches are still limited. In this paper, we propose a new ensemble defense approach named the Negative Correlation Ensemble (NCEn), which achieves compelling results by introducing gradient directions and gradient magnitudes of each member in the ensemble negatively correlated and at the same time, reducing the transferability of adversarial examples among them. Extensive experiments have been conducted, and the results demonstrate that NCEn can improve the adversarial robustness of ensembles effectively.
abstract_zh: DNN 中的安全问题（例如对抗性例子）引起了广泛关注。对抗性例子是指能够通过引入精心设计的扰动使 DNN 完全返回预测的例子。显然，对抗性例子给深度学习的发展带来了巨大的安全风险。最近，已经提出了一些针对对抗性示例的防御方法，但是，我们认为这些方法的性能仍然有限。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的集成防御方法，称为负相关集成（NCEn），该方法通过引入集成中每个成员的梯度方向和梯度大小负相关，同时降低它们之间的对抗性示例的可迁移性，取得了令人信服的结果。进行了大量的实验，结果表明 NCEn 可以有效提高集成的对抗鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为负相关集成（NCEn）的新集成防御方法，以有效提高集成模型的对抗鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有防御对抗样本的方法效果有限，需更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过使集成中每个成员的梯度方向和梯度幅度负相关，并降低对抗样本在成员间的可转移性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明NCEn能有效提升集成模型的对抗鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 负相关集成方法能有效防御对抗样本，提升模型安全性。

title: SVG Vector Font Generation for Chinese Characters with Transformer
title_zh: 使用 Transformer 生成汉字的 SVG 矢量字体
abstract: Designing fonts for Chinese characters is highly labor-intensive and time-consuming. While the latest methods successfully generate the English alphabet vector font, despite the high demand for automatic font generation, Chinese vector font generation has been an unsolved problem owing to its complex shape and numerous characters. This study addressed the problem of automatically generating Chinese vector fonts from only a single style and content reference. We proposed a novel network architecture with Transformer and loss functions to capture structural features without differentiable rendering. Although the dataset range was still limited to the sans-serif family, we successfully generated the Chinese vector font for the first time using the proposed method.
summary: Designing fonts for Chinese characters is highly labor-intensive and time-consuming. While the latest methods successfully generate the English alphabet vector font, despite the high demand for automatic font generation, Chinese vector font generation has been an unsolved problem owing to its complex shape and numerous characters. This study addressed the problem of automatically generating Chinese vector fonts from only a single style and content reference. We proposed a novel network architecture with Transformer and loss functions to capture structural features without differentiable rendering. Although the dataset range was still limited to the sans-serif family, we successfully generated the Chinese vector font for the first time using the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 设计汉字字体是一项高度劳动密集型和耗时的工作。虽然最新的方法成功地生成了英文字母矢量字体，但尽管对自动字体生成的需求很高，但中文矢量字体的生成由于其复杂的形状和字符数量一直是一个尚未解决的问题。这项研究解决了仅从单一样式和内容参考自动生成中文矢量字体的问题。我们提出了一种带有 Transformer 和损失函数的新颖网络架构，可以在无需可微分渲染的情况下捕获结构特征。尽管数据集范围仍然限于无衬线家族，但我们使用所提出的方法首次成功生成了中文矢量字体。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Transformer的中文字符SVG矢量字体自动生成方法，解决传统设计耗时且复杂的问题。
AI.motivation: 中文字体设计因字符数量庞大且结构复杂，难以通过现有方法实现自动化生成，而英文字体生成技术已相对成熟。
AI.method: 设计结合Transformer架构与定制损失函数的网络，通过单参考样例学习结构特征，无需可微渲染过程。
AI.result: 首次在无衬线字体数据集上实现中文矢量字体自动生成，验证了方法在有限数据条件下的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为中文矢量字体自动化提供了新思路，但需进一步扩展至更多字体风格及提升泛化能力。

authors_text: Beng Chin Ooi,Gang Chen,Mike Zheng Shou,Kian-Lee Tan,Anthony Tung,Xiaokui Xiao,James Wei Luen Yip,Meihui Zhang
title: The Metaverse Data Deluge: What Can We Do About It?
title_zh: 元宇宙数据洪流：我们能做些什么？
abstract: In the Metaverse, the physical space and the virtual space co-exist, and interact simultaneously. While the physical space is virtually enhanced with information, the virtual space is continuously refreshed with real-time, real-world information. To allow users to process and manipulate information seamlessly between the real and digital spaces, novel technologies must be developed. These include smart interfaces, new augmented realities, efficient storage and data management and dissemination techniques. In this paper, we first discuss some promising co-space applications. These applications offer opportunities that neither of the spaces can realize on its own. We then discuss challenges. Finally, we discuss and envision what are likely to be required from the database and system perspectives.
summary: In the Metaverse, the physical space and the virtual space co-exist, and interact simultaneously. While the physical space is virtually enhanced with information, the virtual space is continuously refreshed with real-time, real-world information. To allow users to process and manipulate information seamlessly between the real and digital spaces, novel technologies must be developed. These include smart interfaces, new augmented realities, efficient storage and data management and dissemination techniques. In this paper, we first discuss some promising co-space applications. These applications offer opportunities that neither of the spaces can realize on its own. We then discuss challenges. Finally, we discuss and envision what are likely to be required from the database and system perspectives.
abstract_zh: 在元宇宙中，物理空间和虚拟空间共存，同时相互作用。虽然物理空间实际上通过信息得到增强，但虚拟空间却通过实时、真实世界的信息不断刷新。为了让用户能够在现实空间和数字空间之间无缝地处理和操纵信息，必须开发新技术。其中包括智能界面、新的增强现实、高效存储以及数据管理和传播技术。在本文中，我们首先讨论一些有前景的共空间应用。这些应用提供了两个空间都无法单独实现的机会。然后我们讨论挑战。最后，我们从数据库和系统的角度讨论并设想可能需要什么。

search_text: The Metaverse Data Deluge: What Can We Do About It? 元宇宙数据洪流：我们能做些什么？ In the Metaverse, the physical space and the virtual space co-exist, and interact simultaneously. While the physical space is virtually enhanced with information, the virtual space is continuously refreshed with real-time, real-world information. To allow users to process and manipulate information seamlessly between the real and digital spaces, novel technologies must be developed. These include smart interfaces, new augmented realities, efficient storage and data management and dissemination techniques. In this paper, we first discuss some promising co-space applications. These applications offer opportunities that neither of the spaces can realize on its own. We then discuss challenges. Finally, we discuss and envision what are likely to be required from the database and system perspectives. 在元宇宙中，物理空间和虚拟空间共存，同时相互作用。虽然物理空间实际上通过信息得到增强，但虚拟空间却通过实时、真实世界的信息不断刷新。为了让用户能够在现实空间和数字空间之间无缝地处理和操纵信息，必须开发新技术。其中包括智能界面、新的增强现实、高效存储以及数据管理和传播技术。在本文中，我们首先讨论一些有前景的共空间应用。这些应用提供了两个空间都无法单独实现的机会。然后我们讨论挑战。最后，我们从数据库和系统的角度讨论并设想可能需要什么。 探讨元宇宙中数据洪流的应对策略，重点研究数据库和系统层面的技术需求 Beng Chin Ooi,Gang Chen,Mike Zheng Shou,Kian-Lee Tan,Anthony Tung,Xiaokui Xiao,James Wei Luen Yip,Meihui Zhang cs.HC,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.DB,cs.DC

authors_text: M. Chen,Y. Tian,Z. Li,E. Li,Z. Liang
title: Online progressive instance-balanced sampling for weakly supervised object detection
title_zh: 用于弱监督对象检测的在线渐进实例平衡采样
abstract: Based on multiple instance detection networks (MIDN), plenty of works have contributed tremendous efforts to weakly supervised object detection (WSOD). However, most methods neglect the fact that the overwhelming negative instances exist in each image during the training phase, which would mislead the training and make the network fall into local minima. To tackle this problem, an online progressive instance-balanced sampling (OPIS) algorithm based on hard sampling and soft sampling is proposed in this paper. The algorithm includes two modules: a progressive instance balance (PIB) module and a progressive instance reweighting (PIR) module. The PIB module combining random sampling and IoU-balanced sampling progressively mines hard negative instances while balancing positive instances and negative instances. The PIR module further utilizes classifier scores and IoUs of adjacent refinements to reweight the weights of positive instances for making the network focus on positive instances. Extensive experimental results on the PASCAL VOC 2007 and 2012 datasets demonstrate the proposed method can significantly improve the baseline, which is also comparable to many existing state-of-the-art results. In addition, compared to the baseline, the proposed method requires no extra network parameters and the supplementary training overheads are small, which could be easily integrated into other methods based on the instance classifier refinement paradigm.
summary: Based on multiple instance detection networks (MIDN), plenty of works have contributed tremendous efforts to weakly supervised object detection (WSOD). However, most methods neglect the fact that the overwhelming negative instances exist in each image during the training phase, which would mislead the training and make the network fall into local minima. To tackle this problem, an online progressive instance-balanced sampling (OPIS) algorithm based on hard sampling and soft sampling is proposed in this paper. The algorithm includes two modules: a progressive instance balance (PIB) module and a progressive instance reweighting (PIR) module. The PIB module combining random sampling and IoU-balanced sampling progressively mines hard negative instances while balancing positive instances and negative instances. The PIR module further utilizes classifier scores and IoUs of adjacent refinements to reweight the weights of positive instances for making the network focus on positive instances. Extensive experimental results on the PASCAL VOC 2007 and 2012 datasets demonstrate the proposed method can significantly improve the baseline, which is also comparable to many existing state-of-the-art results. In addition, compared to the baseline, the proposed method requires no extra network parameters and the supplementary training overheads are small, which could be easily integrated into other methods based on the instance classifier refinement paradigm.
abstract_zh: 基于多实例检测网络（MIDN），大量工作为弱监督目标检测（WSOD）做出了巨大的努力。然而，大多数方法忽略了训练阶段每幅图像中存在压倒性负实例的事实，这会误导训练并使网络陷入局部极小值。针对这一问题，本文提出一种基于硬采样和软采样的在线渐进实例平衡采样（OPIS）算法。该算法包括两个模块：渐进实例平衡（PIB）模块和渐进实例重新加权（PIR）模块。 PIB模块结合了随机采样和IoU平衡采样，逐步挖掘硬负实例，同时平衡正实例和负实例。 PIR 模块进一步利用分类器分数和相邻细化的 IoU 来重新加权正实例的权重，以使网络专注于正实例。 PASCAL VOC 2007 和 2012 数据集上的大量实验结果表明，所提出的方法可以显着改善基线，这也可以与许多现有的最先进的结果相媲美。此外，与基线相比，所提出的方法不需要额外的网络参数，并且补充训练开销很小，可以很容易地集成到基于实例分类器细化范例的其他方法中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在线渐进实例平衡采样算法（OPIS），用于解决弱监督目标检测中正负样本不平衡导致的训练偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督目标检测方法在训练阶段忽视了图像中大量负样本带来的干扰，导致网络陷入局部最优且检测性能受限。
AI.method: OPIS包含渐进实例平衡模块（PIB）和渐进实例重加权模块（PIR）。PIB结合随机采样与IoU平衡采样挖掘难负样本并平衡正负样本比例，PIR通过分类器得分和相邻优化结果的IoU动态调整正样本权重。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC 2007/2012数据集上显著优于基线方法，性能与现有SOTA方法相当，且无需增加网络参数或训练开销。
AI.conclusion: OPIS通过动态平衡正负样本与自适应重加权机制有效提升了弱监督目标检测性能，且具有良好的方法兼容性。

authors_text: Aman Kumar,Akshay G Bharadwaj,Binil Starly,Collin Lynch
title: FabKG: A Knowledge graph of Manufacturing Science domain utilizing structured and unconventional unstructured knowledge source
title_zh: FabKG：利用结构化和非常规非结构化知识源的制造科学领域的知识图
comment: NAACL 2022 Workshop on Structured and Unstructured Knowledge Integration (SUKI)
comments: NAACL 2022 Workshop on Structured and Unstructured Knowledge Integration (SUKI)
abstract: As the demands for large-scale information processing have grown, knowledge graph-based approaches have gained prominence for representing general and domain knowledge. The development of such general representations is essential, particularly in domains such as manufacturing which intelligent processes and adaptive education can enhance. Despite the continuous accumulation of text in these domains, the lack of structured data has created information extraction and knowledge transfer barriers. In this paper, we report on work towards developing robust knowledge graphs based upon entity and relation data for both commercial and educational uses. To create the FabKG (Manufacturing knowledge graph), we have utilized textbook index words, research paper keywords, FabNER (manufacturing NER), to extract a sub knowledge base contained within Wikidata. Moreover, we propose a novel crowdsourcing method for KG creation by leveraging student notes, which contain invaluable information but are not captured as meaningful information, excluding their use in personal preparation for learning and written exams. We have created a knowledge graph containing 65000+ triples using all data sources. We have also shown the use case of domain-specific question answering and expression/formula-based question answering for educational purposes.
summary: As the demands for large-scale information processing have grown, knowledge graph-based approaches have gained prominence for representing general and domain knowledge. The development of such general representations is essential, particularly in domains such as manufacturing which intelligent processes and adaptive education can enhance. Despite the continuous accumulation of text in these domains, the lack of structured data has created information extraction and knowledge transfer barriers. In this paper, we report on work towards developing robust knowledge graphs based upon entity and relation data for both commercial and educational uses. To create the FabKG (Manufacturing knowledge graph), we have utilized textbook index words, research paper keywords, FabNER (manufacturing NER), to extract a sub knowledge base contained within Wikidata. Moreover, we propose a novel crowdsourcing method for KG creation by leveraging student notes, which contain invaluable information but are not captured as meaningful information, excluding their use in personal preparation for learning and written exams. We have created a knowledge graph containing 65000+ triples using all data sources. We have also shown the use case of domain-specific question answering and expression/formula-based question answering for educational purposes.
abstract_zh: 随着大规模信息处理需求的增长，基于知识图的方法在表示通用知识和领域知识方面获得了突出的地位。这种通用表示的发展至关重要，特别是在智能过程和适应性教育可以增强的制造等领域。尽管这些领域的文本不断积累，但结构化数据的缺乏造成了信息提取和知识转移的障碍。在本文中，我们报告了基于实体和关系数据开发强大的知识图谱以供商业和教育用途的工作。为了创建 FabKG（制造知识图），我们利用教科书索引词、研究论文关键词、FabNER（制造 NER）来提取维基数据中包含的子知识库。此外，我们提出了一种利用学生笔记创建知识图谱的新颖众包方法，学生笔记包含宝贵的信息，但没有被捕获为有意义的信息，不包括在个人准备学习和笔试中的使用。我们使用所有数据源创建了一个包含 65000 多个三元组的知识图。我们还展示了用于教育目的的特定领域问答和基于表达式/公式的问答的用例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FabKG知识图谱，整合制造科学领域的结构化和非结构化数据源，用于商业与教育场景。
AI.motivation: 制造领域文本数据丰富但缺乏结构化数据，导致知识提取与迁移困难，需构建通用知识表示以支持智能工艺与教育应用。
AI.method: 结合教科书索引词、论文关键词、FabNER实体识别工具及学生笔记众包方法，从Wikidata提取子知识库并整合多源数据构建知识图谱。
AI.result: 构建包含65000+三元组的FabKG，实现领域问答与公式推理等教育场景应用案例。
AI.conclusion: FabKG通过融合多源异构数据有效支持制造知识表示，学生笔记众包方法为知识图谱构建提供新思路。

result: 构建包含65000+三元组的FabKG，实现领域问答与公式推理等教育场景应用案例。
conclusion: FabKG通过融合多源异构数据有效支持制造知识表示，学生笔记众包方法为知识图谱构建提供新思路。
search_text: FabKG: A Knowledge graph of Manufacturing Science domain utilizing structured and unconventional unstructured knowledge source FabKG：利用结构化和非常规非结构化知识源的制造科学领域的知识图 As the demands for large-scale information processing have grown, knowledge graph-based approaches have gained prominence for representing general and domain knowledge. The development of such general representations is essential, particularly in domains such as manufacturing which intelligent processes and adaptive education can enhance. Despite the continuous accumulation of text in these domains, the lack of structured data has created information extraction and knowledge transfer barriers. In this paper, we report on work towards developing robust knowledge graphs based upon entity and relation data for both commercial and educational uses. To create the FabKG (Manufacturing knowledge graph), we have utilized textbook index words, research paper keywords, FabNER (manufacturing NER), to extract a sub knowledge base contained within Wikidata. Moreover, we propose a novel crowdsourcing method for KG creation by leveraging student notes, which contain invaluable information but are not captured as meaningful information, excluding their use in personal preparation for learning and written exams. We have created a knowledge graph containing 65000+ triples using all data sources. We have also shown the use case of domain-specific question answering and expression/formula-based question answering for educational purposes. 随着大规模信息处理需求的增长，基于知识图的方法在表示通用知识和领域知识方面获得了突出的地位。这种通用表示的发展至关重要，特别是在智能过程和适应性教育可以增强的制造等领域。尽管这些领域的文本不断积累，但结构化数据的缺乏造成了信息提取和知识转移的障碍。在本文中，我们报告了基于实体和关系数据开发强大的知识图谱以供商业和教育用途的工作。为了创建 FabKG（制造知识图），我们利用教科书索引词、研究论文关键词、FabNER（制造 NER）来提取维基数据中包含的子知识库。此外，我们提出了一种利用学生笔记创建知识图谱的新颖众包方法，学生笔记包含宝贵的信息，但没有被捕获为有意义的信息，不包括在个人准备学习和笔试中的使用。我们使用所有数据源创建了一个包含 65000 多个三元组的知识图。我们还展示了用于教育目的的特定领域问答和基于表达式/公式的问答的用例。 本文提出FabKG知识图谱，整合制造科学领域的结构化和非结构化数据源，用于商业与教育场景。 Aman Kumar,Akshay G Bharadwaj,Binil Starly,Collin Lynch cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.SC

title: Active Inference for Robotic Manipulation
title_zh: 机器人操作的主动推理
comment: Published at "The Multi-disciplinary Conference on Reinforcement Learning and Decision Making (RLDM)" 2022
comments: Published at "The Multi-disciplinary Conference on Reinforcement Learning and Decision Making (RLDM)" 2022
abstract: Robotic manipulation stands as a largely unsolved problem despite significant advances in robotics and machine learning in the last decades. One of the central challenges of manipulation is partial observability, as the agent usually does not know all physical properties of the environment and the objects it is manipulating in advance. A recently emerging theory that deals with partial observability in an explicit manner is Active Inference. It does so by driving the agent to act in a way that is not only goal-directed but also informative about the environment. In this work, we apply Active Inference to a hard-to-explore simulated robotic manipulation tasks, in which the agent has to balance a ball into a target zone. Since the reward of this task is sparse, in order to explore this environment, the agent has to learn to balance the ball without any extrinsic feedback, purely driven by its own curiosity. We show that the information-seeking behavior induced by Active Inference allows the agent to explore these challenging, sparse environments systematically. Finally, we conclude that using an information-seeking objective is beneficial in sparse environments and allows the agent to solve tasks in which methods that do not exhibit directed exploration fail.
summary: Robotic manipulation stands as a largely unsolved problem despite significant advances in robotics and machine learning in the last decades. One of the central challenges of manipulation is partial observability, as the agent usually does not know all physical properties of the environment and the objects it is manipulating in advance. A recently emerging theory that deals with partial observability in an explicit manner is Active Inference. It does so by driving the agent to act in a way that is not only goal-directed but also informative about the environment. In this work, we apply Active Inference to a hard-to-explore simulated robotic manipulation tasks, in which the agent has to balance a ball into a target zone. Since the reward of this task is sparse, in order to explore this environment, the agent has to learn to balance the ball without any extrinsic feedback, purely driven by its own curiosity. We show that the information-seeking behavior induced by Active Inference allows the agent to explore these challenging, sparse environments systematically. Finally, we conclude that using an information-seeking objective is beneficial in sparse environments and allows the agent to solve tasks in which methods that do not exhibit directed exploration fail.
abstract_zh: 尽管机器人技术和机器学习在过去几十年中取得了重大进展，但机器人操作在很大程度上仍然是一个尚未解决的问题。操纵的主要挑战之一是部分可观察性，因为代理通常不知道环境及其正在操纵的对象的所有物理属性。最近出现的一种以显式方式处理部分可观察性的理论是主动推理。它通过驱动智能体以一种不仅以目标为导向而且还提供有关环境信息的方式行事来实现这一点。在这项工作中，我们将主动推理应用于难以探索的模拟机器人操作任务，其中代理必须将球平衡到目标区域。由于这项任务的奖励很少，为了探索这个环境，智能体必须学会在没有任何外在反馈的情况下平衡球，纯粹是由自己的好奇心驱动。我们表明，主动推理引发的信息寻求行为使智能体能够系统地探索这些具有挑战性的稀疏环境。最后，我们得出的结论是，使用信息寻求目标在稀疏环境中是有益的，并且允许代理解决那些不表现出定向探索的方法失败的任务。

AI.tldr: 本文将主动推理（Active Inference）应用于机器人操控任务，解决稀疏奖励环境下探索难题。
AI.motivation: 机器人操控因环境部分可观测性和稀疏奖励导致探索困难，传统方法难以有效应对。
AI.method: 基于主动推理理论，通过信息寻求行为驱动智能体在无外部反馈下自主探索环境。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法使智能体能系统性探索稀疏环境并完成平衡球体进入目标区的任务。
AI.conclusion: 信息寻求目标在稀疏环境中优于无定向探索的方法，为复杂操控任务提供新思路。
