search_text: Deep Active Latent Surfaces for Medical Geometries 医学几何的深层活性潜在表面 Shape priors have long been known to be effective when reconstructing 3D shapes from noisy or incomplete data. When using a deep-learning based shape representation, this often involves learning a latent representation, which can be either in the form of a single global vector or of multiple local ones. The latter allows more flexibility but is prone to overfitting. In this paper, we advocate a hybrid approach representing shapes in terms of 3D meshes with a separate latent vector at each vertex. During training the latent vectors are constrained to have the same value, which avoids overfitting. For inference, the latent vectors are updated independently while imposing spatial regularization constraints. We show that this gives us both flexibility and generalization capabilities, which we demonstrate on several medical image processing tasks. 人们早就知道形状先验在从噪声或不完整数据重建 3D 形状时非常有效。当使用基于深度学习的形状表示时，这通常涉及学习潜在表示，该表示可以是单个全局向量或多个局部向量的形式。后者提供了更大的灵活性，但容易过度拟合。在本文中，我们提倡采用一种混合方法，用 3D 网格来表示形状，每个顶点都有一个单独的潜在向量。在训练期间，潜在向量被限制为具有相同的值，这可以避免过度拟合。为了进行推理，在施加空间正则化约束的同时独立更新潜在向量。我们证明这为我们提供了灵活性和泛化能力，我们在几个医学图像处理任务中证明了这一点。 本文提出一种结合全局与局部潜在向量的混合方法，用于医学图像中3D形状的重建。 Patrick M. Jensen,Udaranga Wickramasinghe,Anders B. Dahl,Pascal Fua,Vedrana A. Dahl cs.CV

title: Fluctuation-driven initialization for spiking neural network training
title_zh: 脉冲神经网络训练的波动驱动初始化
abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) underlie low-power, fault-tolerant information processing in the brain and could constitute a power-efficient alternative to conventional deep neural networks when implemented on suitable neuromorphic hardware accelerators. However, instantiating SNNs that solve complex computational tasks in-silico remains a significant challenge. Surrogate gradient (SG) techniques have emerged as a standard solution for training SNNs end-to-end. Still, their success depends on synaptic weight initialization, similar to conventional artificial neural networks (ANNs). Yet, unlike in the case of ANNs, it remains elusive what constitutes a good initial state for an SNN. Here, we develop a general initialization strategy for SNNs inspired by the fluctuation-driven regime commonly observed in the brain. Specifically, we derive practical solutions for data-dependent weight initialization that ensure fluctuation-driven firing in the widely used leaky integrate-and-fire (LIF) neurons. We empirically show that SNNs initialized following our strategy exhibit superior learning performance when trained with SGs. These findings generalize across several datasets and SNN architectures, including fully connected, deep convolutional, recurrent, and more biologically plausible SNNs obeying Dale's law. Thus fluctuation-driven initialization provides a practical, versatile, and easy-to-implement strategy for improving SNN training performance on diverse tasks in neuromorphic engineering and computational neuroscience.
summary: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) underlie low-power, fault-tolerant information processing in the brain and could constitute a power-efficient alternative to conventional deep neural networks when implemented on suitable neuromorphic hardware accelerators. However, instantiating SNNs that solve complex computational tasks in-silico remains a significant challenge. Surrogate gradient (SG) techniques have emerged as a standard solution for training SNNs end-to-end. Still, their success depends on synaptic weight initialization, similar to conventional artificial neural networks (ANNs). Yet, unlike in the case of ANNs, it remains elusive what constitutes a good initial state for an SNN. Here, we develop a general initialization strategy for SNNs inspired by the fluctuation-driven regime commonly observed in the brain. Specifically, we derive practical solutions for data-dependent weight initialization that ensure fluctuation-driven firing in the widely used leaky integrate-and-fire (LIF) neurons. We empirically show that SNNs initialized following our strategy exhibit superior learning performance when trained with SGs. These findings generalize across several datasets and SNN architectures, including fully connected, deep convolutional, recurrent, and more biologically plausible SNNs obeying Dale's law. Thus fluctuation-driven initialization provides a practical, versatile, and easy-to-implement strategy for improving SNN training performance on diverse tasks in neuromorphic engineering and computational neuroscience.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 是大脑中低功耗、容错信息处理的基础，当在合适的神经形态硬件加速器上实现时，可以构成传统深度神经网络的高效替代方案。然而，实例化 SNN 来解决复杂的计算机任务仍然是一个重大挑战。替代梯度 (SG) 技术已成为端到端训练 SNN 的标准解决方案。尽管如此，它们的成功取决于突触权重初始化，类似于传统的人工神经网络（ANN）。然而，与 ANN 的情况不同，什么构成 SNN 的良好初始状态仍然难以捉摸。在这里，我们受大脑中常见的波动驱动机制的启发，开发了一种 SNN 的通用初始化策略。具体来说，我们为数据相关的权重初始化得出了实用的解决方案，确保广泛使用的泄漏积分和激发（LIF）神经元中的波动驱动激发。我们的经验表明，按照我们的策略初始化的 SNN 在使用 SG 进行训练时表现出优异的学习性能。这些发现概括了多个数据集和 SNN 架构，包括完全连接的、深度卷积的、循环的以及遵循戴尔定律的在生物学上更合理的 SNN。因此，波动驱动的初始化提供了一种实用、通用且易于实施的策略，用于提高神经形态工程和计算神经科学中各种任务的 SNN 训练性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于波动驱动机制的脉冲神经网络（SNN）初始化策略，以提升其训练性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管代理梯度（SG）技术已成为训练SNN的标准方法，但其效果高度依赖于突触权重初始化，而SNN的初始化原则尚不明确，亟需一种通用且有效的初始化方案。
AI.method: 受大脑中波动驱动放电机制启发，推导出数据依赖的权重初始化方法，确保漏积分-放电（LIF）神经元的波动驱动 firing，适用于多种SNN架构。
AI.result: 实验表明，该初始化策略在多个数据集和架构（全连接、卷积、循环及符合Dale定律的生物可解释SNN）上均显著提升SG训练性能。
AI.conclusion: 波动驱动初始化为SNN训练提供了一种实用、通用且易实现的解决方案，可广泛应用于神经形态工程和计算神经科学领域。

title: Broken News: Making Newspapers Accessible to Print-Impaired
title_zh: 突发新闻：让阅读障碍者也能阅读报纸
comment: ef:Extended Abstract at Accessibility, Vision, and Autonomy Meet (CVPR 2022 Workshop)
comments: ef:Extended Abstract at Accessibility, Vision, and Autonomy Meet (CVPR 2022 Workshop)
abstract: Accessing daily news content still remains a big challenge for people with print-impairment including blind and low-vision due to opacity of printed content and hindrance from online sources. In this paper, we present our approach for digitization of print newspaper into an accessible file format such as HTML. We use an ensemble of instance segmentation and detection framework for newspaper layout analysis and then OCR to recognize text elements such as headline and article text. Additionally, we propose EdgeMask loss function for Mask-RCNN framework to improve segmentation mask boundary and hence accuracy of downstream OCR task. Empirically, we show that our proposed loss function reduces the Word Error Rate (WER) of news article text by 32.5 %.
summary: Accessing daily news content still remains a big challenge for people with print-impairment including blind and low-vision due to opacity of printed content and hindrance from online sources. In this paper, we present our approach for digitization of print newspaper into an accessible file format such as HTML. We use an ensemble of instance segmentation and detection framework for newspaper layout analysis and then OCR to recognize text elements such as headline and article text. Additionally, we propose EdgeMask loss function for Mask-RCNN framework to improve segmentation mask boundary and hence accuracy of downstream OCR task. Empirically, we show that our proposed loss function reduces the Word Error Rate (WER) of news article text by 32.5 %.
abstract_zh: 对于印刷障碍人士（包括盲人和低视力人士）来说，由于印刷内容的不透明性和在线资源的阻碍，获取每日新闻内容仍然是一个巨大的挑战。在本文中，我们介绍了将印刷报纸数字化为可访问的文件格式（例如 HTML）的方法。我们使用实例分割和检测框架的集合来进行报纸布局分析，然后使用 OCR 来识别标题和文章文本等文本元素。此外，我们为 Mask-RCNN 框架提出了 EdgeMask 损失函数，以改善分割掩模边界，从而提高下游 OCR 任务的准确性。根据经验，我们表明我们提出的损失函数将新闻文章文本的字错误率 (WER) 降低了 32.5%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将印刷报纸数字化为可访问格式（如HTML），以帮助视力受损者获取新闻内容。
AI.motivation: 印刷报纸内容对盲人及低视力人群存在可访问性障碍，现有在线资源亦难以满足需求。
AI.method: 采用实例分割与检测框架分析报纸版面布局，结合OCR识别文本元素，并提出EdgeMask损失函数优化Mask-RCNN的分割边界。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提方法使新闻文本词错误率（WER）降低32.5%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过改进分割精度提升OCR效果，有效增强印刷报纸对视力障碍者的可访问性。

title: Rethinking Unsupervised Neural Superpixel Segmentation
title_zh: 重新思考无监督神经超像素分割
abstract: Recently, the concept of unsupervised learning for superpixel segmentation via CNNs has been studied. Essentially, such methods generate superpixels by convolutional neural network (CNN) employed on a single image, and such CNNs are trained without any labels or further information. Thus, such approach relies on the incorporation of priors, typically by designing an objective function that guides the solution towards a meaningful superpixel segmentation. In this paper we propose three key elements to improve the efficacy of such networks: (i) the similarity of the \emph{soft} superpixelated image compared to the input image, (ii) the enhancement and consideration of object edges and boundaries and (iii) a modified architecture based on atrous convolution, which allow for a wider field of view, functioning as a multi-scale component in our network. By experimenting with the BSDS500 dataset, we find evidence to the significance of our proposal, both qualitatively and quantitatively.
summary: Recently, the concept of unsupervised learning for superpixel segmentation via CNNs has been studied. Essentially, such methods generate superpixels by convolutional neural network (CNN) employed on a single image, and such CNNs are trained without any labels or further information. Thus, such approach relies on the incorporation of priors, typically by designing an objective function that guides the solution towards a meaningful superpixel segmentation. In this paper we propose three key elements to improve the efficacy of such networks: (i) the similarity of the \emph{soft} superpixelated image compared to the input image, (ii) the enhancement and consideration of object edges and boundaries and (iii) a modified architecture based on atrous convolution, which allow for a wider field of view, functioning as a multi-scale component in our network. By experimenting with the BSDS500 dataset, we find evidence to the significance of our proposal, both qualitatively and quantitatively.
abstract_zh: 最近，人们研究了通过 CNN 进行超像素分割的无监督学习概念。本质上，此类方法通过在单个图像上使用的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 生成超像素，并且此类 CNN 的训练不需要任何标签或进一步的信息。因此，这种方法依赖于先验的结合，通常通过设计一个目标函数来指导解决方案实现有意义的超像素分割。在本文中，我们提出了三个关键要素来提高此类网络的效率：（i）\emph{soft}超像素化图像与输入图像相比的相似性，（ii）对象边缘和边界的增强和考虑，以及（iii）基于空洞卷积的修改架构，它允许更宽的视野，在我们的网络中充当多尺度组件。通过对 BSDS500 数据集进行实验，我们在定性和定量方面找到了证明我们提案重要性的证据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的无监督神经网络超像素分割方法，通过引入相似性约束、边缘增强和空洞卷积架构提升分割效果。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督超像素分割方法依赖先验设计的目标函数，但缺乏对图像结构特征（如边缘）的有效建模，导致分割结果不够精确。
AI.method: 提出三项改进：1）通过软超像素图像与输入图像的相似性约束保持结构一致性；2）增强物体边缘和边界特征；3）采用空洞卷积构建多尺度感知网络。
AI.result: 在BSDS500数据集上实验表明，改进方法在定性视觉效果和定量评估指标上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过结构相似性约束、边缘增强和多尺度特征融合，有效提升了无监督超像素分割的质量。

title: A Context Model for Personal Data Streams
title_zh: 个人数据流的上下文模型
abstract: We propose a model of the situational context of a person and show how it can be used to organize and, consequently, reason about massive streams of sensor data and annotations, as they can be collected from mobile devices, e.g. smartphones, smartwatches or fitness trackers. The proposed model is validated on a very large dataset about the everyday life of one hundred and fifty-eight people over four weeks, twenty-four hours a day.
summary: We propose a model of the situational context of a person and show how it can be used to organize and, consequently, reason about massive streams of sensor data and annotations, as they can be collected from mobile devices, e.g. smartphones, smartwatches or fitness trackers. The proposed model is validated on a very large dataset about the everyday life of one hundred and fifty-eight people over four weeks, twenty-four hours a day.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个人的情境模型，并展示了如何使用它来组织并推理大量的传感器数据和注释流，因为它们可以从移动设备（例如移动设备）收集。智能手机、智能手表或健身追踪器。所提出的模型在一个非常大的数据集上进行了验证，该数据集涉及 158 个人在四个星期、每天 24 小时内的日常生活。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种情境模型，用于组织和分析来自移动设备的大量传感器数据流。
AI.motivation: 随着智能手机、智能手表等设备普及，如何有效管理和分析海量个人传感器数据成为挑战。
AI.method: 构建情境模型框架，通过大规模真实场景数据（158人连续4周的24小时数据）验证模型有效性。
AI.result: 模型成功实现了对传感器数据流的组织与推理，验证了其在实际场景中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 情境模型为处理个人数据流提供了有效方法，有助于挖掘数据中的行为模式与上下文关联。

authors_text: Gang Li,Heliang Zheng,Daqing Liu,Chaoyue Wang,Bing Su,Changwen Zheng
title: SemMAE: Semantic-Guided Masking for Learning Masked Autoencoders
title_zh: SemMAE：用于学习屏蔽自动编码器的语义引导屏蔽
abstract: Recently, significant progress has been made in masked image modeling to catch up to masked language modeling. However, unlike words in NLP, the lack of semantic decomposition of images still makes masked autoencoding (MAE) different between vision and language. In this paper, we explore a potential visual analogue of words, i.e., semantic parts, and we integrate semantic information into the training process of MAE by proposing a Semantic-Guided Masking strategy. Compared to widely adopted random masking, our masking strategy can gradually guide the network to learn various information, i.e., from intra-part patterns to inter-part relations. In particular, we achieve this in two steps. 1) Semantic part learning: we design a self-supervised part learning method to obtain semantic parts by leveraging and refining the multi-head attention of a ViT-based encoder. 2) Semantic-guided MAE (SemMAE) training: we design a masking strategy that varies from masking a portion of patches in each part to masking a portion of (whole) parts in an image. Extensive experiments on various vision tasks show that SemMAE can learn better image representation by integrating semantic information. In particular, SemMAE achieves 84.5% fine-tuning accuracy on ImageNet-1k, which outperforms the vanilla MAE by 1.4%. In the semantic segmentation and fine-grained recognition tasks, SemMAE also brings significant improvements and yields the state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Recently, significant progress has been made in masked image modeling to catch up to masked language modeling. However, unlike words in NLP, the lack of semantic decomposition of images still makes masked autoencoding (MAE) different between vision and language. In this paper, we explore a potential visual analogue of words, i.e., semantic parts, and we integrate semantic information into the training process of MAE by proposing a Semantic-Guided Masking strategy. Compared to widely adopted random masking, our masking strategy can gradually guide the network to learn various information, i.e., from intra-part patterns to inter-part relations. In particular, we achieve this in two steps. 1) Semantic part learning: we design a self-supervised part learning method to obtain semantic parts by leveraging and refining the multi-head attention of a ViT-based encoder. 2) Semantic-guided MAE (SemMAE) training: we design a masking strategy that varies from masking a portion of patches in each part to masking a portion of (whole) parts in an image. Extensive experiments on various vision tasks show that SemMAE can learn better image representation by integrating semantic information. In particular, SemMAE achieves 84.5% fine-tuning accuracy on ImageNet-1k, which outperforms the vanilla MAE by 1.4%. In the semantic segmentation and fine-grained recognition tasks, SemMAE also brings significant improvements and yields the state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 最近，蒙蔽图像建模取得了重大进展，以赶上蒙蔽语言建模。然而，与 NLP 中的单词不同，图像语义分解的缺乏仍然使得视觉和语言之间的掩蔽自动编码（MAE）有所不同。在本文中，我们探索了单词的潜在视觉模拟，即语义部分，并通过提出语义引导掩蔽策略将语义信息集成到 MAE 的训练过程中。与广泛采用的随机掩蔽相比，我们的掩蔽策略可以逐渐引导网络学习各种信息，即从部分内模式到部分间关系。具体来说，我们分两步实现这一目标。 1）语义部分学习：我们设计了一种自监督部分学习方法，通过利用和细化基于 ViT 的编码器的多头注意力来获取语义部分。 2）语义引导的MAE（SemMAE）训练：我们设计了一种掩蔽策略，从掩蔽每个部分中的一部分补丁到掩蔽图像中（整个）部分的一部分。对各种视觉任务的大量实验表明，SemMAE 可以通过整合语义信息来学习更好的图像表示。特别是，SemMAE 在 ImageNet-1k 上实现了 84.5% 的微调精度，比普通 MAE 高出 1.4%。在语义分割和细粒度识别任务中，SemMAE 也带来了显着的改进并产生了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SemMAE方法，通过引入语义引导的掩码策略改进视觉掩码自编码器，以提升图像表示学习效果。
AI.motivation: 图像缺乏类似自然语言中单词的语义分解，导致视觉与语言掩码自编码器存在差异，需探索视觉语义部件并整合到训练中。
AI.method: 分两步实现：1) 利用ViT编码器多头注意力进行自监督语义部件学习；2) 设计渐进式掩码策略，从局部补丁掩码过渡到整部件掩码。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1k上微调准确率达84.5%（优于基础MAE 1.4%），并在语义分割和细粒度识别任务中取得SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合语义信息，SemMAE有效提升了多任务下的图像表征能力，验证了语义引导掩码策略的有效性。

Extensive experiments on various vision tasks show that SemMAE can learn better image representation by integrating semantic information. In particular, SemMAE achieves 84.5% fine-tuning accuracy on ImageNet-1k, which outperforms the vanilla MAE by 1.4%. In the semantic segmentation and fine-grained recognition tasks, SemMAE also brings significant improvements and yields the state-of-the-art performance. 最近，蒙蔽图像建模取得了重大进展，以赶上蒙蔽语言建模。然而，与 NLP 中的单词不同，图像语义分解的缺乏仍然使得视觉和语言之间的掩蔽自动编码（MAE）有所不同。在本文中，我们探索了单词的潜在视觉模拟，即语义部分，并通过提出语义引导掩蔽策略将语义信息集成到 MAE 的训练过程中。与广泛采用的随机掩蔽相比，我们的掩蔽策略可以逐渐引导网络学习各种信息，即从部分内模式到部分间关系。具体来说，我们分两步实现这一目标。 1）语义部分学习：我们设计了一种自监督部分学习方法，通过利用和细化基于 ViT 的编码器的多头注意力来获取语义部分。 2）语义引导的MAE（SemMAE）训练：我们设计了一种掩蔽策略，从掩蔽每个部分中的一部分补丁到掩蔽图像中（整个）部分的一部分。对各种视觉任务的大量实验表明，SemMAE 可以通过整合语义信息来学习更好的图像表示。特别是，SemMAE 在 ImageNet-1k 上实现了 84.5% 的微调精度，比普通 MAE 高出 1.4%。在语义分割和细粒度识别任务中，SemMAE 也带来了显着的改进并产生了最先进的性能。 本文提出SemMAE方法，通过引入语义引导的掩码策略改进视觉掩码自编码器，以提升图像表示学习效果。 Gang Li,Heliang Zheng,Daqing Liu,Chaoyue Wang,Bing Su,Changwen Zheng cs.CV

authors_text: Leonardo Rossi,Marco Valenti,Sara Elisabetta Legler,Andrea Prati
title: LDD: A Dataset for Grape Diseases Object Detection and Instance Segmentation
title_zh: LDD：葡萄病害对象检测和实例分割数据集
comment: ef:International Conference on Image Analysis and Processing. Springer, Cham, 2022
comments: ef:International Conference on Image Analysis and Processing. Springer, Cham, 2022
abstract: The Instance Segmentation task, an extension of the well-known Object Detection task, is of great help in many areas, such as precision agriculture: being able to automatically identify plant organs and the possible diseases associated with them, allows to effectively scale and automate crop monitoring and its diseases control. To address the problem related to early disease detection and diagnosis on vines plants, a new dataset has been created with the goal of advancing the state-of-the-art of diseases recognition via instance segmentation approaches. This was achieved by gathering images of leaves and clusters of grapes affected by diseases in their natural context. The dataset contains photos of 10 object types which include leaves and grapes with and without symptoms of the eight more common grape diseases, with a total of 17,706 labeled instances in 1,092 images. Multiple statistical measures are proposed in order to offer a complete view on the characteristics of the dataset. Preliminary results for the object detection and instance segmentation tasks reached by the models Mask R-CNN and R^3-CNN are provided as baseline, demonstrating that the procedure is able to reach promising results about the objective of automatic diseases' symptoms recognition.
summary: The Instance Segmentation task, an extension of the well-known Object Detection task, is of great help in many areas, such as precision agriculture: being able to automatically identify plant organs and the possible diseases associated with them, allows to effectively scale and automate crop monitoring and its diseases control. To address the problem related to early disease detection and diagnosis on vines plants, a new dataset has been created with the goal of advancing the state-of-the-art of diseases recognition via instance segmentation approaches. This was achieved by gathering images of leaves and clusters of grapes affected by diseases in their natural context. The dataset contains photos of 10 object types which include leaves and grapes with and without symptoms of the eight more common grape diseases, with a total of 17,706 labeled instances in 1,092 images. Multiple statistical measures are proposed in order to offer a complete view on the characteristics of the dataset. Preliminary results for the object detection and instance segmentation tasks reached by the models Mask R-CNN and R^3-CNN are provided as baseline, demonstrating that the procedure is able to reach promising results about the objective of automatic diseases' symptoms recognition.
abstract_zh: 实例分割任务是众所周知的对象检测任务的扩展，在许多领域都有很大帮助，例如精准农业：能够自动识别植物器官以及与之相关的可能疾病，可以有效地扩展和自动化作物监测及其疾病控制。为了解决与藤本植物早期疾病检测和诊断相关的问题，创建了一个新的数据集，其目标是通过实例分割方法推进最先进的疾病识别。这是通过收集自然环境中受疾病影响的叶子和葡萄串的图像来实现的。该数据集包含 10 种对象类型的照片，其中包括有或没有八种更常见葡萄病害症状的叶子和葡萄，1,092 张图像中总共有 17,706 个标记实例。提出了多种统计措施，以便提供有关数据集特征的完整视图。 Mask R-CNN 和 R^3-CNN 模型达到的对象检测和实例分割任务的初步结果作为基线，表明该过程能够在自动疾病症状识别的目标方面取得有希望的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LDD数据集，用于葡萄病害的目标检测与实例分割，旨在推动自动病害识别技术的发展。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在葡萄病害早期检测中存在不足，需通过高质量数据集促进实例分割技术在精准农业中的应用。
AI.method: 采集葡萄叶片和果串的自然场景图像，标注10类物体（含8种常见病害的有无症状样本），构建包含1092张图像、17706个实例的数据集，并采用Mask R-CNN和R^3-CNN进行基线实验。
AI.result: 基线模型在目标检测和实例分割任务中取得有前景的结果，验证了数据集的有效性和方法可行性。
AI.conclusion: LDD数据集为葡萄病害自动识别提供了标准化资源，可推动实例分割技术在农业病害监测中的进一步研究与应用。

title: Analysis of Self-Supervised Learning and Dimensionality Reduction Methods in Clustering-Based Active Learning for Speech Emotion Recognition
title_zh: 基于聚类的语音情感识别主动学习中的自监督学习和降维方法分析
comment: To be published in Proc. Interspeech 2022, Incheon, South Korea
comments: To be published in Proc. Interspeech 2022, Incheon, South Korea
abstract: When domain experts are needed to perform data annotation for complex machine-learning tasks, reducing annotation effort is crucial in order to cut down time and expenses. For cases when there are no annotations available, one approach is to utilize the structure of the feature space for clustering-based active learning (AL) methods. However, these methods are heavily dependent on how the samples are organized in the feature space and what distance metric is used. Unsupervised methods such as contrastive predictive coding (CPC) can potentially be used to learn organized feature spaces, but these methods typically create high-dimensional features which might be challenging for estimating data density. In this paper, we combine CPC and multiple dimensionality reduction methods in search of functioning practices for clustering-based AL. Our experiments for simulating speech emotion recognition system deployment show that both the local and global topology of the feature space can be successfully used for AL, and that CPC can be used to improve clustering-based AL performance over traditional signal features. Additionally, we observe that compressing data dimensionality does not harm AL performance substantially, and that 2-D feature representations achieved similar AL performance as higher-dimensional representations when the number of annotations is not very low.
summary: When domain experts are needed to perform data annotation for complex machine-learning tasks, reducing annotation effort is crucial in order to cut down time and expenses. For cases when there are no annotations available, one approach is to utilize the structure of the feature space for clustering-based active learning (AL) methods. However, these methods are heavily dependent on how the samples are organized in the feature space and what distance metric is used. Unsupervised methods such as contrastive predictive coding (CPC) can potentially be used to learn organized feature spaces, but these methods typically create high-dimensional features which might be challenging for estimating data density. In this paper, we combine CPC and multiple dimensionality reduction methods in search of functioning practices for clustering-based AL. Our experiments for simulating speech emotion recognition system deployment show that both the local and global topology of the feature space can be successfully used for AL, and that CPC can be used to improve clustering-based AL performance over traditional signal features. Additionally, we observe that compressing data dimensionality does not harm AL performance substantially, and that 2-D feature representations achieved similar AL performance as higher-dimensional representations when the number of annotations is not very low.
abstract_zh: 当需要领域专家为复杂的机器学习任务执行数据注释时，减少注释工作对于减少时间和费用至关重要。对于没有可用注释的情况，一种方法是利用特征空间的结构进行基于聚类的主动学习（AL）方法。然而，这些方法在很大程度上取决于样本在特征空间中的组织方式以及使用的距离度量。对比预测编码 (CPC) 等无监督方法可用于学习有组织的特征空间，但这些方法通常会创建高维特征，这对于估计数据密度可能具有挑战性。在本文中，我们结合 CPC 和多维降维方法来寻找基于聚类的 AL 的功能实践。我们模拟语音情感识别系统部署的实验表明，特征空间的局部和全局拓扑都可以成功地用于 AL，并且 CPC 可用于提高基于聚类的 AL 性能，使其优于传统信号特征。此外，我们观察到压缩数据维度并不会显着损害 AL 性能，并且当注释数量不是很低时，2-D 特征表示实现了与高维表示类似的 AL 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究将自监督学习与降维方法结合至基于聚类的主动学习中，以提升语音情感识别的性能。
AI.motivation: 在缺乏标注数据的情况下，基于聚类的主动学习需依赖特征空间结构，但高维特征可能影响数据密度估计，需探索有效方法。
AI.method: 结合对比预测编码（CPC）与多种降维技术，通过模拟语音情感识别场景验证特征空间拓扑结构对主动学习的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，CPC能提升聚类主动学习效果，且降维后特征（如2D）在标注量充足时性能接近高维表示。
AI.conclusion: CPC与降维结合可有效优化基于聚类的主动学习，低维特征在标注资源充足时具备实用价值。

title: Improving Localization for Semi-Supervised Object Detection
title_zh: 改进半监督目标检测的定位
comment: ef:International Conference on Image Analysis and Processing. Springer, Cham, 2022
comments: ef:International Conference on Image Analysis and Processing. Springer, Cham, 2022
abstract: Nowadays, Semi-Supervised Object Detection (SSOD) is a hot topic, since, while it is rather easy to collect images for creating a new dataset, labeling them is still an expensive and time-consuming task. One of the successful methods to take advantage of raw images on a Semi-Supervised Learning (SSL) setting is the Mean Teacher technique, where the operations of pseudo-labeling by the Teacher and the Knowledge Transfer from the Student to the Teacher take place simultaneously. However, the pseudo-labeling by thresholding is not the best solution since the confidence value is not strictly related to the prediction uncertainty, not permitting to safely filter predictions. In this paper, we introduce an additional classification task for bounding box localization to improve the filtering of the predicted bounding boxes and obtain higher quality on Student training. Furthermore, we empirically prove that bounding box regression on the unsupervised part can equally contribute to the training as much as category classification. Our experiments show that our IL-net (Improving Localization net) increases SSOD performance by 1.14% AP on COCO dataset in limited-annotation regime. The code is available at https://github.com/IMPLabUniPr/unbiased-teacher/tree/ilnet
summary: Nowadays, Semi-Supervised Object Detection (SSOD) is a hot topic, since, while it is rather easy to collect images for creating a new dataset, labeling them is still an expensive and time-consuming task. One of the successful methods to take advantage of raw images on a Semi-Supervised Learning (SSL) setting is the Mean Teacher technique, where the operations of pseudo-labeling by the Teacher and the Knowledge Transfer from the Student to the Teacher take place simultaneously. However, the pseudo-labeling by thresholding is not the best solution since the confidence value is not strictly related to the prediction uncertainty, not permitting to safely filter predictions. In this paper, we introduce an additional classification task for bounding box localization to improve the filtering of the predicted bounding boxes and obtain higher quality on Student training. Furthermore, we empirically prove that bounding box regression on the unsupervised part can equally contribute to the training as much as category classification. Our experiments show that our IL-net (Improving Localization net) increases SSOD performance by 1.14% AP on COCO dataset in limited-annotation regime. The code is available at https://github.com/IMPLabUniPr/unbiased-teacher/tree/ilnet
abstract_zh: 如今，半监督对象检测（SSOD）是一个热门话题，因为虽然收集图像来创建新数据集相当容易，但标记它们仍然是一项昂贵且耗时的任务。在半监督学习 (SSL) 设置上利用原始图像的成功方法之一是平均教师技术，其中教师的伪标记操作和从学生到教师的知识传输同时进行。然而，通过阈值进行伪标记并不是最好的解决方案，因为置信值与预测不确定性并不严格相关，不允许安全地过滤预测。在本文中，我们引入了用于边界框定位的附加分类任务，以改进预测边界框的过滤并获得更高质量的学生训练。此外，我们凭经验证明，无监督部分的边界框回归可以与类别分类一样对训练做出同样的贡献。我们的实验表明，我们的 IL-net（改进定位网络）在有限注释机制下的 COCO 数据集上将 SSOD 性能提高了 1.14% AP。代码位于 https://github.com/IMPLabUniPr/unbiased-teacher/tree/ilnet

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进半监督目标检测中边界框定位的方法，通过引入额外分类任务提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督目标检测方法依赖置信度阈值过滤伪标签，但置信度与预测不确定性无严格关联，导致过滤效果不佳。
AI.method: 设计IL-net网络，在学生模型中增加边界框定位分类任务，证明无监督部分的边界框回归与分类任务对训练贡献相当。
AI.result: 在COCO数据集有限标注场景下，模型检测性能（AP）提升1.14%。
AI.conclusion: 改进的定位优化方法有效提升半监督目标检测性能，代码已开源。

search_text: Improving Localization for Semi-Supervised Object Detection 改进半监督目标检测的定位 Nowadays, Semi-Supervised Object Detection (SSOD) is a hot topic, since, while it is rather easy to collect images for creating a new dataset, labeling them is still an expensive and time-consuming task. One of the successful methods to take advantage of raw images on a Semi-Supervised Learning (SSL) setting is the Mean Teacher technique, where the operations of pseudo-labeling by the Teacher and the Knowledge Transfer from the Student to the Teacher take place simultaneously. However, the pseudo-labeling by thresholding is not the best solution since the confidence value is not strictly related to the prediction uncertainty, not permitting to safely filter predictions. In this paper, we introduce an additional classification task for bounding box localization to improve the filtering of the predicted bounding boxes and obtain higher quality on Student training. Furthermore, we empirically prove that bounding box regression on the unsupervised part can equally contribute to the training as much as category classification. Our experiments show that our IL-net (Improving Localization net) increases SSOD performance by 1.14% AP on COCO dataset in limited-annotation regime. The code is available at https://github.com/IMPLabUniPr/unbiased-teacher/tree/ilnet 如今，半监督对象检测（SSOD）是一个热门话题，因为虽然收集图像来创建新数据集相当容易，但标记它们仍然是一项昂贵且耗时的任务。在半监督学习 (SSL) 设置上利用原始图像的成功方法之一是平均教师技术，其中教师的伪标记操作和从学生到教师的知识传输同时进行。然而，通过阈值进行伪标记并不是最好的解决方案，因为置信值与预测不确定性并不严格相关，不允许安全地过滤预测。在本文中，我们引入了用于边界框定位的附加分类任务，以改进预测边界框的过滤并获得更高质量的学生训练。此外，我们凭经验证明，无监督部分的边界框回归可以与类别分类一样对训练做出同样的贡献。我们的实验表明，我们的 IL-net（改进定位网络）在有限注释机制下的 COCO 数据集上将 SSOD 性能提高了 1.14% AP。代码位于 https://github.com/IMPLabUniPr/unbiased-teacher/tree/ilnet 本文提出一种改进半监督目标检测中边界框定位的方法，通过引入额外分类任务提升模型性能。 Leonardo Rossi,Akbar Karimi,Andrea Prati cs.CV

authors_text: Jinu Joseph,Mahesh Raveendranatha Panicker,Yale Tung Chen,Kesavadas Chandrasekharan,Vimal Chacko Mondy,Anoop Ayyappan,Jineesh Valakkada,Kiran Vishnu Narayan
title: covEcho Resource constrained lung ultrasound image analysis tool for faster triaging and active learning
title_zh: covEcho 资源受限的肺部超声图像分析工具，可实现更快的分类和主动学习
comment: Submitted to Elsevier CMPBUP on Dec 1, 2021
comments: Submitted to Elsevier CMPBUP on Dec 1, 2021
abstract: Lung ultrasound (LUS) is possibly the only medical imaging modality which could be used for continuous and periodic monitoring of the lung. This is extremely useful in tracking the lung manifestations either during the onset of lung infection or to track the effect of vaccination on lung as in pandemics such as COVID-19. There have been many attempts in automating the classification of severity of lung into various classes or automatic segmentation of various LUS landmarks and manifestations. However, all these approaches are based on training static machine learning models which require a significantly clinically annotated large dataset and are computationally heavy and most of the time non-real time. In this work, a real-time light weight active learning-based approach is presented for faster triaging in COVID-19 subjects in resource constrained settings. The tool, based on the you look only once (YOLO) network, has the capability of providing the quality of images based on the identification of various LUS landmarks, artefacts and manifestations, prediction of severity of lung infection, possibility of active learning based on the feedback from clinicians or on the image quality and a summarization of the significant frames which are having high severity of infection and high image quality for further analysis. The results show that the proposed tool has a mean average precision (mAP) of 66% at an Intersection over Union (IoU) threshold of 0.5 for the prediction of LUS landmarks. The 14MB lightweight YOLOv5s network achieves 123 FPS while running in a Quadro P4000 GPU. The tool is available for usage and analysis upon request from the authors.

This is extremely useful in tracking the lung manifestations either during the onset of lung infection or to track the effect of vaccination on lung as in pandemics such as COVID-19. However, all these approaches are based on training static machine learning models which require a significantly clinically annotated large dataset and are computationally heavy and most of the time non-real time. In this work, a real-time light weight active learning-based approach is presented for faster triaging in COVID-19 subjects in resource constrained settings. The tool, based on the you look only once (YOLO) network, has the capability of providing the quality of images based on the identification of various LUS landmarks, artefacts and manifestations, prediction of severity of lung infection, possibility of active learning based on the feedback from clinicians or on the image quality and a summarization of the significant frames which are having high severity of infection and high image quality for further analysis. The results show that the proposed tool has a mean average precision (mAP) of 66% at an Intersection over Union (IoU) threshold of 0.5 for the prediction of LUS landmarks. The 14MB lightweight YOLOv5s network achieves 123 FPS while running in a Quadro P4000 GPU. The tool is available for usage and analysis upon request from the authors.
abstract_zh: 肺部超声（LUS）可能是唯一可用于连续和定期监测肺部的医学成像方式。这对于追踪肺部感染发作期间的肺部表现或追踪疫苗接种对肺部的影响（如在 COVID-19 等流行病中）非常有用。人们已经进行了许多尝试，将肺部的严重程度自动分类为各种类别或自动分割各种 LUS 标志和表现。然而，所有这些方法都是基于训练静态机器学习模型，这些模型需要经过大量临床注释的大型数据集，并且计算量很大，而且大多数时候都是非实时的。在这项工作中，提出了一种基于实时轻量级主动学习的方法，用于在资源有限的环境中更快地对 COVID-19 受试者进行分类。该工具基于“只看一次”(YOLO) 网络，能够根据各种 LUS 标志、伪影和表现的识别提供图像质量，预测肺部感染的严重程度，根据临床医生的反馈或图像质量进行主动学习的可能性，以及对感染严重程度高和图像质量高的重要帧进行总结以供进一步分析。结果表明，所提出的工具在预测 LUS 地标时，在交并集 (IoU) 阈值为 0.5 时，平均精度 (mAP) 为 66%。 14MB 轻量级 YOLOv5s 网络在 Quadro P4000 GPU 中运行时可实现 123 FPS。该工具可根据作者的要求供使用和分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级实时肺部超声图像分析工具covEcho，用于资源受限环境下的COVID-19患者快速分诊和主动学习。
AI.motivation: 现有肺部超声图像分析方法依赖大规模标注数据且计算量大，难以满足资源受限场景下的实时性需求。
AI.method: 基于YOLOv5s网络构建14MB轻量模型，结合主动学习机制，通过识别LUS标志物、伪影和感染表现实现图像质量评估与严重程度预测。
AI.result: 模型在IoU=0.5时达到66% mAP，Quadro P4000 GPU下实现123 FPS实时处理，可输出高感染严重度与高质量图像的关键帧。
AI.conclusion: 该工具有效解决了资源受限场景下的肺部超声实时分析难题，具有临床部署潜力。

authors_text: Yi Gu,Chao Han,Yuhan Chen,Shenggang Liu,Xinwei Wang
title: Large region targets observation scheduling by multiple satellites using resampling particle swarm optimization
title_zh: 使用重采样粒子群优化的大区域目标多卫星观测调度
comment: This work has been submitted to IEEE TAES
comments: This work has been submitted to IEEE TAES
abstract: The last decades have witnessed a rapid increase of Earth observation satellites (EOSs), leading to the increasing complexity of EOSs scheduling. On account of the widespread applications of large region observation, this paper aims to address the EOSs observation scheduling problem for large region targets. A rapid coverage calculation method employing a projection reference plane and a polygon clipping technique is first developed. We then formulate a nonlinear integer programming model for the scheduling problem, where the objective function is calculated based on the developed coverage calculation method. A greedy initialization-based resampling particle swarm optimization (GI-RPSO) algorithm is proposed to solve the model. The adopted greedy initialization strategy and particle resampling method contribute to generating efficient and effective solutions during the evolution process. In the end, extensive experiments are conducted to illustrate the effectiveness and reliability of the proposed method. Compared to the traditional particle swarm optimization and the widely used greedy algorithm, the proposed GI-RPSO can improve the scheduling result by 5.42% and 15.86%, respectively.
summary: The last decades have witnessed a rapid increase of Earth observation satellites (EOSs), leading to the increasing complexity of EOSs scheduling. On account of the widespread applications of large region observation, this paper aims to address the EOSs observation scheduling problem for large region targets. A rapid coverage calculation method employing a projection reference plane and a polygon clipping technique is first developed. We then formulate a nonlinear integer programming model for the scheduling problem, where the objective function is calculated based on the developed coverage calculation method. A greedy initialization-based resampling particle swarm optimization (GI-RPSO) algorithm is proposed to solve the model. The adopted greedy initialization strategy and particle resampling method contribute to generating efficient and effective solutions during the evolution process. In the end, extensive experiments are conducted to illustrate the effectiveness and reliability of the proposed method. Compared to the traditional particle swarm optimization and the widely used greedy algorithm, the proposed GI-RPSO can improve the scheduling result by 5.42% and 15.86%, respectively.
abstract_zh: 过去几十年来，地球观测卫星（EOS）的数量迅速增加，导致EOS调度的复杂性不断增加。鉴于大区域观测的广泛应用，本文旨在解决大区域目标的EOS观测调度问题。首次开发了一种采用投影参考平面和多边形裁剪技术的快速覆盖计算方法。然后，我们为调度问题制定了非线性整数规划模型，其中目标函数是根据开发的覆盖率计算方法计算的。提出了一种基于贪婪初始化的重采样粒子群优化（GI-RPSO）算法来求解该模型。采用的贪婪初始化策略和粒子重采样方法有助于在进化过程中生成高效且有效的解决方案。最后，进行了大量的实验来说明该方法的有效性和可靠性。与传统的粒子群优化和广泛使用的贪心算法相比，所提出的GI-RPSO可以将调度结果分别提高5.42%和15.86%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于贪心初始化的重采样粒子群优化算法（GI-RPSO），用于解决多颗地球观测卫星对大区域目标的观测调度问题。
AI.motivation: 随着地球观测卫星数量激增，大区域观测任务的调度复杂度显著提升，传统方法难以兼顾效率与覆盖精度。
AI.method: 开发基于投影参考平面与多边形裁剪的快速覆盖计算方法，构建非线性整数规划模型，并设计结合贪心初始化策略与粒子重采样的改进粒子群优化算法。
AI.result: 实验表明，GI-RPSO相比传统粒子群优化算法和贪心算法，调度结果分别提升5.42%和15.86%。
AI.conclusion: 提出的GI-RPSO算法能有效提升多卫星系统对大区域目标的观测调度效率与覆盖质量，具有实际应用价值。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于贪心初始化的重采样粒子群优化算法（GI-RPSO），用于解决多颗地球观测卫星对大区域目标的观测调度问题。

search_text: Large region targets observation scheduling by multiple satellites using resampling particle swarm optimization 使用重采样粒子群优化的大区域目标多卫星观测调度 The last decades have witnessed a rapid increase of Earth observation satellites (EOSs), leading to the increasing complexity of EOSs scheduling. On account of the widespread applications of large region observation, this paper aims to address the EOSs observation scheduling problem for large region targets. A rapid coverage calculation method employing a projection reference plane and a polygon clipping technique is first developed. We then formulate a nonlinear integer programming model for the scheduling problem, where the objective function is calculated based on the developed coverage calculation method. A greedy initialization-based resampling particle swarm optimization (GI-RPSO) algorithm is proposed to solve the model. The adopted greedy initialization strategy and particle resampling method contribute to generating efficient and effective solutions during the evolution process. In the end, extensive experiments are conducted to illustrate the effectiveness and reliability of the proposed method. Compared to the traditional particle swarm optimization and the widely used greedy algorithm, the proposed GI-RPSO can improve the scheduling result by 5.42% and 15.86%, respectively. 过去几十年来，地球观测卫星（EOS）的数量迅速增加，导致EOS调度的复杂性不断增加。鉴于大区域观测的广泛应用，本文旨在解决大区域目标的EOS观测调度问题。首次开发了一种采用投影参考平面和多边形裁剪技术的快速覆盖计算方法。然后，我们为调度问题制定了非线性整数规划模型，其中目标函数是根据开发的覆盖率计算方法计算的。提出了一种基于贪婪初始化的重采样粒子群优化（GI-RPSO）算法来求解该模型。采用的贪婪初始化策略和粒子重采样方法有助于在进化过程中生成高效且有效的解决方案。最后，进行了大量的实验来说明该方法的有效性和可靠性。与传统的粒子群优化和广泛使用的贪心算法相比，所提出的GI-RPSO可以将调度结果分别提高5.42%和15.86%。 本文提出一种基于贪心初始化的重采样粒子群优化算法（GI-RPSO），用于解决多颗地球观测卫星对大区域目标的观测调度问题。 Yi Gu,Chao Han,Yuhan Chen,Shenggang Liu,Xinwei Wang astro-ph.IM,cs.AI

authors_text: Rui-Jie Zhu,Malu Zhang,Qihang Zhao,Haoyu Deng,Yule Duan,Liang-Jian Deng
title: TCJA-SNN: Temporal-Channel Joint Attention for Spiking Neural Networks
title_zh: TCJA-SNN：尖峰神经网络的时间通道联合注意力
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems
abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are attracting widespread interest due to their biological plausibility, energy efficiency, and powerful spatio-temporal information representation ability. Given the critical role of attention mechanisms in enhancing neural network performance, the integration of SNNs and attention mechanisms exhibits potential to deliver energy-efficient and high-performance computing paradigms. We present a novel Temporal-Channel Joint Attention mechanism for SNNs, referred to as TCJA-SNN. The proposed TCJA-SNN framework can effectively assess the significance of spike sequence from both spatial and temporal dimensions. More specifically, our essential technical contribution lies on: 1) We employ the squeeze operation to compress the spike stream into an average matrix. Then, we leverage two local attention mechanisms based on efficient 1D convolutions to facilitate comprehensive feature extraction at the temporal and channel levels independently. 2) We introduce the Cross Convolutional Fusion (CCF) layer as a novel approach to model the inter-dependencies between the temporal and channel scopes. This layer breaks the independence of these two dimensions and enables the interaction between features. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed TCJA-SNN outperforms SOTA by up to 15.7% accuracy on standard static and neuromorphic datasets, including Fashion-MNIST, CIFAR10-DVS, N-Caltech 101, and DVS128 Gesture. Furthermore, we apply the TCJA-SNN framework to image generation tasks by leveraging a variation autoencoder. To the best of our knowledge, this study is the first instance where the SNN-attention mechanism has been employed for image classification and generation tasks. Notably, our approach has achieved SOTA performance in both domains, establishing a significant advancement in the field. Codes are available at https://github.com/ridgerchu/TCJA.

Given the critical role of attention mechanisms in enhancing neural network performance, the integration of SNNs and attention mechanisms exhibits potential to deliver energy-efficient and high-performance computing paradigms. We present a novel Temporal-Channel Joint Attention mechanism for SNNs, referred to as TCJA-SNN. The proposed TCJA-SNN framework can effectively assess the significance of spike sequence from both spatial and temporal dimensions. More specifically, our essential technical contribution lies on: 1) We employ the squeeze operation to compress the spike stream into an average matrix. Then, we leverage two local attention mechanisms based on efficient 1D convolutions to facilitate comprehensive feature extraction at the temporal and channel levels independently. 2) We introduce the Cross Convolutional Fusion (CCF) layer as a novel approach to model the inter-dependencies between the temporal and channel scopes. This layer breaks the independence of these two dimensions and enables the interaction between features. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed TCJA-SNN outperforms SOTA by up to 15.7% accuracy on standard static and neuromorphic datasets, including Fashion-MNIST, CIFAR10-DVS, N-Caltech 101, and DVS128 Gesture. Furthermore, we apply the TCJA-SNN framework to image generation tasks by leveraging a variation autoencoder. To the best of our knowledge, this study is the first instance where the SNN-attention mechanism has been employed for image classification and generation tasks. Notably, our approach has achieved SOTA performance in both domains, establishing a significant advancement in the field. Codes are available at https://github.com/ridgerchu/TCJA.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络（SNN）由于其生物学合理性、能源效率和强大的时空信息表示能力而引起了广泛的兴趣。鉴于注意力机制在增强神经网络性能方面的关键作用，SNN 和注意力机制的集成展现出了提供节能和高性能计算范式的潜力。我们提出了一种新颖的 SNN 时间通道联合注意力机制，称为 TCJA-SNN。所提出的 TCJA-SNN 框架可以从空间和时间维度有效评估尖峰序列的重要性。更具体地说，我们的重要技术贡献在于：1）我们采用挤压操作将尖峰流压缩为平均矩阵。然后，我们利用两种基于高效一维卷积的局部注意力机制来独立地促进时间和通道级别的全面特征提取。 2）我们引入交叉卷积融合（CCF）层作为一种新颖的方法来对时间范围和通道范围之间的相互依赖关系进行建模。这一层打破了这两个维度的独立性，实现了特征之间的交互。实验结果表明，所提出的 TCJA-SNN 在标准静态和神经形态数据集（包括 Fashion-MNIST、CIFAR10-DVS、N-Caltech 101 和 DVS128 Gesture）上的准确率优于 SOTA，准确率高达 15.7%。此外，我们通过利用变体自动编码器将 TCJA-SNN 框架应用于图像生成任务。据我们所知，这项研究是第一个将 SNN-attention 机制应用于图像分类和生成任务的实例。值得注意的是，我们的方法在这两个领域都实现了 SOTA 性能，在该领域取得了重大进步。代码可在 https://github.com/ridgerchu/TCJA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为TCJA-SNN的时空联合注意力机制，用于提升脉冲神经网络（SNN）在图像分类和生成任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管SNN具有生物合理性和能效优势，但现有方法在时空特征提取和跨维度交互方面存在不足，限制了其性能。引入注意力机制可增强SNN的表示能力，但需解决时空与通道维度的联合建模问题。
AI.method: 1) 通过squeeze操作压缩脉冲流为平均矩阵；2) 使用高效1D卷积实现时序与通道局部注意力；3) 引入跨卷积融合（CCF）层建模时空与通道特征的交互关系。
AI.result: 在Fashion-MNIST、CIFAR10-DVS等数据集上分类准确率较SOTA方法提升最高15.7%，并首次将SNN-注意力机制应用于图像生成任务，均达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: TCJA-SNN通过联合建模时空与通道维度，显著提升了SNN在分类和生成任务中的表现，为SNN与注意力机制的结合提供了创新范式。

search_text: TCJA-SNN: Temporal-Channel Joint Attention for Spiking Neural Networks TCJA-SNN：尖峰神经网络的时间通道联合注意力 Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are attracting widespread interest due to their biological plausibility, energy efficiency, and powerful spatio-temporal information representation ability. Given the critical role of attention mechanisms in enhancing neural network performance, the integration of SNNs and attention mechanisms exhibits potential to deliver energy-efficient and high-performance computing paradigms. We present a novel Temporal-Channel Joint Attention mechanism for SNNs, referred to as TCJA-SNN. The proposed TCJA-SNN framework can effectively assess the significance of spike sequence from both spatial and temporal dimensions. More specifically, our essential technical contribution lies on: 1) We employ the squeeze operation to compress the spike stream into an average matrix. Then, we leverage two local attention mechanisms based on efficient 1D convolutions to facilitate comprehensive feature extraction at the temporal and channel levels independently. 2) We introduce the Cross Convolutional Fusion (CCF) layer as a novel approach to model the inter-dependencies between the temporal and channel scopes. This layer breaks the independence of these two dimensions and enables the interaction between features. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed TCJA-SNN outperforms SOTA by up to 15.7% accuracy on standard static and neuromorphic datasets, including Fashion-MNIST, CIFAR10-DVS, N-Caltech 101, and DVS128 Gesture. Furthermore, we apply the TCJA-SNN framework to image generation tasks by leveraging a variation autoencoder. To the best of our knowledge, this study is the first instance where the SNN-attention mechanism has been employed for image classification and generation tasks. Notably, our approach has achieved SOTA performance in both domains, establishing a significant advancement in the field.
